source: ICRT News Lunchbox / News for Kids（國小）

episodes.title: A Long, Crazy Drive to South Africa
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

A Long, Crazy Drive to South Africa

Do you like to go for long drives? How long is your longest drive?

Two men wanted to go for a very long drive. They wanted to start in the U.K.
They wanted to drive to South Africa! How crazy!
你喜歡開車長途旅行嗎？有兩名男子有個瘋狂的想法。他們想從英國出發，一路開車到南非！

The men got a small car. It has three wheels. One is in the front. Two are in
the back. The car is 25 years old!
他們找來一輛三輪小汽車。這輛老車有已經有二十五年車齡了！

This old car is not strong. But the men drove it in wet jungles. They drove
it in hot, dry deserts. They drove it up and down mountains! That is crazy!
這兩人開著老車穿越潮濕的叢林與乾燥的沙漠。老車翻山越嶺，太不可思議了！

The car broke down many times. But people in Africa fixed it every time! How
lucky!
這台車在路上故障了很多次。但幸運的是，總會有人能幫他們修好！

The men drove and drove. They drove in 22 countries! They saw elephants!
Giraffes ran next to their car!
這兩名男子開車穿越了二十二個國家！他們還看見了大象跟長頸鹿在車旁奔跑！

Sometimes there was danger. A bus almost hit them. And in some countries,
there were wars. Whoa, how scary…
在這趟旅程中，他們差一點與巴士擦撞，還經過深陷戰亂的國家，十分危險。

The men drove 22,000 kilometers! That is the longest drive for a car with
three wheels.
他們總共行駛了二萬二千公里，創下了三輪汽車最長行駛距離的新紀錄！

What a crazy drive! Where will these two men drive next?
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Vocabulary
這兩名男士開著三個輪子的汽車，花了一百多天穿越非洲。

1.	longest 最長的。
How long was your longest ride in a car? 你坐過最長的一趟車程有多長?
Hmmm, about 700 kilometers from Ulaanbaatar to Gobi. 大約七百公里，從烏蘭巴托到戈壁。

2.	country 國家。
In Mongolia? 在蒙古?
Yeah. It’s a big country. 對，它是個很大的國家。

3.	desert 沙漠。
Did you see deserts and sand dunes? 有看到沙漠跟沙丘嗎?
Oh yes. The scenery was amazing! 有，很精采的風景!

4.	break down 拋錨。
Lucky you! 你很幸運! I was once stuck on a bus in Canada. 我有一次被卡在加拿大的巴士上。
Oh no. 真糟糕。
It broke down after 5 hours. 它開了五個小時，然後拋錨了。

你喜歡坐車嗎? 來讀單字。
longest最長的    country國家    desert沙漠    break down拋錨
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Quiz

1. Where did the men start the drive?
a. In the U.S.
b. In Taiwan
c. In the U.K.

2. How many wheels does the men's car have?
a. It has 3 wheels.
b. It has 4 wheels.
c. It has 25 wheels.

3. What animals ran next to their car?
a. Elephants
b. Giraffes
c. Lions

Answers
1. c
2. a
3  b

episodes.title: TV for Dogs
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	 

	TV for Dogs

	 

	Who’s a good dog?! 

	 

	Dogs are great! When we come home, they show us love and happiness! They make us laugh. They make us walk! We play with them.

	回到家的時候，狗狗會用愛與快樂讓我們開懷大笑！我們和狗狗出門散步、玩遊戲，度過快樂的時光。 

	 

	Dogs want to be with others. They want to do everything together. That is why they look so happy to see us!

	狗是群居動物，喜歡跟別人待在一起，也喜歡一起做各種事情。所以每次看到我們回家的時候，牠們總是特別興奮！ 

	 

	When we go out, we worry. Our dogs do not want to be alone. But we cannot be with them all the time…

	不過，當我們出門的時候，也會擔心家裡的狗狗。牠們不喜歡孤單，但我們又不可能隨時陪在牠們的身邊…… 

	 

	What can we do?! We can go online and find... TV for dogs! TV for dogs are videos made for dogs.

	那該怎麼辦呢？其實，我們可以上網找「狗狗電視」！這是專門為狗狗設計的影片。

	 

	Our dogs can watch other dogs, other animals, fun toys, and much more! They can watch them in blue and yellow. Those are the colors dogs see best. 

	牠們可以看其他的狗、各種動物、有趣的玩具等等。影片中的畫面也會以藍色跟黃色為主，因為這是狗狗最容易看清楚的顏色。 

	 

	Thunder, fireworks, and other loud sounds can scare our dogs. TV for dogs does not scare dogs with sounds. Our dogs can listen to calm music and nice sounds.

	打雷、放煙火或其他巨大聲響，常常會讓狗狗感到害怕。但狗狗電視不會播放會嚇到牠們的聲音。相反地，裡面有舒緩的音樂跟輕鬆的自然聲響。 

	 

	Now we do not have to worry. We can go to school or work. Our dogs will not feel alone!

	________________________________________

	 

	Vocabulary

	 狗是群居動物，不喜歡孤獨。現在有新的辦法陪伴狗狗。

	 

	1. music 音樂。

	Hey, are those your headphones Buddy is wearing? 巴弟戴著你的耳機嗎?

	Yeah, Buddy likes soft music. 是的，巴弟喜歡輕柔的音樂。

	Dogs like music? That’s news to me. 狗狗喜歡音樂?這可是新聞。 

	 

	2. sound 聲音。

	They really do. 牠們真的喜歡。

	They’re scared of loud and noisy sounds. 牠們害怕吵鬧的聲音。

	But why the headphones? 但是為什麼戴耳機? 

	Oh, I don’t want music when I’m watching TV. 我看電視的時候不要有音樂。

	 

	3. listen 注意聽。

	So you watch TV and Buddy listens to music. 所以你看電視，巴弟聽音樂。

	 

	4. all the time 整天。

	I can’t be with Buddy all the time. 我不能整天跟牠在一起。

	Music makes him feel less alone. 音樂讓牠比較不孤單。

	 

	你記得今天的單字嗎?

	music音樂    sound聲音    listen注意聽    all the time整天

	________________________________________

	 

	Quiz

	 

	1. Where can we find TV for dogs?

	a. On a bus

	b. At school

	c. Online

	 

	2. What kind of sounds does TV for dogs have?

	a. Nice sounds

	b. Loud sounds

	c. Thunder

	 

	3. What colors can dogs see best?

	a. Red and blue

	b. Blue and yellow

	c. Yellow and red

	 

	Answers

	1. c

	2. a

	3. b

episodes.title: Two Brothers Make a Change
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Two Brothers Make a Change

	Two brothers lived in a big city in India. Lots of people burn trash there.

	That makes the air dirty. The dirty air made the older brother cough a lot.

	在印度，很多人燒垃圾，導致空氣變得很髒。有一對兄弟住在印度的大城市裡，髒空氣讓哥哥經常咳嗽。

	A big mountain of trash is near their city. It had a fire! The air got

	dirtier! That made the older brother cough and cough...

	有一天，附近的垃圾山發生火災，濃煙讓哥哥咳得更厲害。

	The brothers were fourteen and eleven years old. They wanted to make a

	change. They wanted a better world. They wanted cleaner air! The brothers

	started to recycle trash. But they did not have a lot to recycle. So they

	asked people for trash!

	14歲跟11歲的兄弟決定要改變現況！為了讓空氣變乾淨，他們想要回收垃圾。他們開始挨家挨戶請居民提供可以回收的物品。

	At first, they got trash from fifteen homes. Now, seven years later, they get

	trash from thirty thousand homes, schools, and businesses!

	一開始，他們只從十五戶家庭回收垃圾。七年之後，他們總共從三萬戶家庭、學校和企業回收垃圾！

	The brothers made a group. Its workers sort many kinds of paper, plastics,

	glass, metal, and e-waste. That makes recycling easier. The brothers have

	recycled one and a half million kilograms of trash! Their work has won big

	awards.

	這對兄弟成立了一個組織，工作人員進行垃圾分類，讓回收更有效率。他們到現在已經回收了一百五十萬公斤的垃圾，也獲得許多重要獎項的肯定。

	Kids can make changes for a better world. The brothers made a change. Can you

	make one too?

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	印度這對兄弟，採取實際行動來改善空氣品質。

	1. sort 分類。

	Wow, what’s happening here? 哇，這裡怎麼了?

	Why is your living room full of stuff? 你的客廳怎麼放滿了東西?

	It’s all trash. I'm sorting it to recycle it. 都是垃圾，我正在把它分類好回收。

	2. waste 廢棄物。

	Will you help me? 你可以幫我嗎?

	Me? I can donate my old cellphone. 我?我可以捐出舊手機。

	Good! E-waste goes there. 真好，電子廢棄物在那一邊。

	3. metal 金屬。

	You also collect batteries? 你也收集電池?

	I do. There’s metal in them that can be recycled. 對，電池有金屬可以回收。

	4. world 世界。

	Trying to save the world? 想要拯救世界?

	Why not? 為什麼不呢?

	I like a cleaner world. 我喜歡更乾淨的世界。

	來跟我一起讀單字。

	sort分類 waste廢棄物 metal金屬 world世界

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. What made the older brother cough a lot?

	a. Dirty air

	b. Businesses

	c. Big awards

	2. How many homes did the brothers get trash from at first?

	a. Seven

	b. Fifteen

	c. Thirty thousand

	3. What do the workers do with the trash?

	a. Sort it

	b. Clean it

	c. Burn it

	Answers

	1. a

	2. b

	3. a

episodes.title: The Possum at the Airport
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	The Possum at the Airport

	Many airports have gift shops. An airport in Australia has a gift shop. It

	sells cute stuffed animals and many other things.

	很多機場都有禮品店。澳洲一座機場的禮品店內可以買到可愛的絨毛娃娃！

	Someone went to the gift shop. The person looked at the toys: stuffed

	kangaroos, stuffed koalas, stuffed … huh?!

	有人在逛禮品店的時候看到袋鼠娃娃，無尾熊娃娃，還有——！

	The person stopped. There was a stuffed possum. It had big brown eyes. But,

	its eyes were moving! Hey! It was not a stuffed possum! It was not a toy! It

	was a real possum!

	一隻負鼠娃娃，有大大的棕色眼睛，但是牠的眼睛竟然在動！ 這隻負鼠不是玩具，而是真的動物！

	The possum sat with the stuffed animals. Its body did not move. It looked

	like a stuffed animal!

	這隻負鼠跟其他的動物玩偶站在一起，一動也不動，看起來就像個娃娃！

	The person told a shop worker about the possum. The worker was very

	surprised! Some airport workers came to look at it. But it did not like

	people looking at it. It ran away!

	發現負鼠的人立刻通知店員，一些機場工作人員也跑來看。但是負鼠可不喜歡受到那麼多注意，所以跑掉了！

	The airport workers caught the possum. They took it outside. They let it go.

	It was not hurt.

	機場工作人員抓到牠，把牠送回大自然放生。幸好負鼠沒有受傷！

	How did the possum get in the shop? Nobody knows. How long was it there?

	Nobody knows. Why did it sit with the stuffed animals? Nobody knows.

	負鼠是怎麼進到店裡的呢，牠在店裡待了多久，又為什麼要和玩偶站在一起呢？沒有人知道！

	Maybe the possum wanted to make new friends!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	禮品店裡面的絨毛娃娃，居然有一隻真的動物夾在中間!

	1. toy 玩具。

	Look at this kangaroo. 你看這隻袋鼠。

	It’s cute! 好可愛!

	Yeah, and it looks so real! 而且看起來像真的!

	What if it IS real? 假如它是真的呢?

	This is a toy store. Not a zoo. 這是玩具店，不是動物園。

	2. real 真實的。

	If there’s a real kangaroo in this store, 要是這家店裡有一隻真的袋鼠...

	Then we’d better run! 那我們最好快跑!

	3. run away 逃走。

	Run to chase it? 跑去追它嗎?

	No! Run away from it! 不是，是逃走!

	I didn’t know you’re scared of kangaroos. 我不知道你怕袋鼠。

	4. surprised 驚訝的。

	Do you know how big they are? 你知道牠們有多大嗎? I'd be surprised if you didn't try

	to run! 要是你不跑我會很驚訝。

	Try to use these words. toy玩具 real真實的 run away逃走 surprised驚訝的

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. What kind of shop was the possum in?

	a. A pet shop

	b. A toy shop

	c. A gift shop

	2. What did the possum do in the shop?

	a. It sat.

	b. It played.

	c. It ate.

	3. Why did the possum run away?

	a. Someone wanted to buy it.

	b. A worker took a picture of it.

	c. It did not like people looking at it.

	Answers

	1. c

	2. a

	3. c

sections.story:
________________________________

	The Possum at the Airport

	Many airports have gift shops. An airport in Australia has a gift shop. It

	sells cute stuffed animals and many other things.

	很多機場都有禮品店。澳洲一座機場的禮品店內可以買到可愛的絨毛娃娃！

	Someone went to the gift shop. The person looked at the toys: stuffed

	kangaroos, stuffed koalas, stuffed … huh?!

	有人在逛禮品店的時候看到袋鼠娃娃，無尾熊娃娃，還有——！

	The person stopped. There was a stuffed possum. It had big brown eyes. But,

	its eyes were moving! Hey! It was not a stuffed possum! It was not a toy! It

	was a real possum!

	一隻負鼠娃娃，有大大的棕色眼睛，但是牠的眼睛竟然在動！ 這隻負鼠不是玩具，而是真的動物！

	The possum sat with the stuffed animals. Its body did not move. It looked

	like a stuffed animal!

	這隻負鼠跟其他的動物玩偶站在一起，一動也不動，看起來就像個娃娃！

	The person told a shop worker about the possum. The worker was very

	surprised! Some airport workers came to look at it. But it did not like

	people looking at it. It ran away!

	發現負鼠的人立刻通知店員，一些機場工作人員也跑來看。但是負鼠可不喜歡受到那麼多注意，所以跑掉了！

	The airport workers caught the possum. They took it outside. They let it go.

	It was not hurt.

	機場工作人員抓到牠，把牠送回大自然放生。幸好負鼠沒有受傷！

	How did the possum get in the shop? Nobody knows. How long was it there?

	Nobody knows. Why did it sit with the stuffed animals? Nobody knows.

	負鼠是怎麼進到店裡的呢，牠在店裡待了多久，又為什麼要和玩偶站在一起呢？沒有人知道！

	Maybe the possum wanted to make new friends!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	to run! 要是你不跑我會很驚訝。

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	a. A pet shop

	b. A toy shop

	c. A gift shop

	2. What did the possum do in the shop?

	b. It played.

	c. It ate.

	3. Why did the possum run away?

	b. A worker took a picture of it.

	c. It did not like people looking at it.

episodes.title: The Smart Kumquat Farm
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	The Smart Kumquat Farm

	Do you know what kumquats are? They are a small orange fruit. They are sweet

	and sour.

	你知道金棗嗎？金棗是一種酸酸甜甜的柑橘類水果。

	Two farmers in Yilan grow kumquats. They grow them in very smart ways!

	有兩位在宜蘭的果農用很聰明的方式種植金棗！

	The farmers built a greenhouse. That is a big glass house. Yilan is very

	rainy. Too much rain is bad for kumquats. The greenhouse keeps the kumquats

	safe from the rain.

	宜蘭經常下雨，但太多雨水會影響到金棗的生長。果農於是蓋了一間溫室來遮雨。

	The farmers also use AI. AI watches the water, the air, and the food for the

	kumquat trees. It helps the kumquats grow well.

	他們也運用人工智慧來控制澆水灌溉，空氣跟肥料，讓金棗長得更好。

	There is more! The farmers use chickens too. Sometimes there are insects.

	They eat the kumquats! So the chickens walk around the trees. They eat the

	insects. They help keep the kumquats clean and safe

	除此之外，果農還養雞。雞在果樹之間走來走去，吃掉愛吃金棗的昆蟲。

	Before, the farmers did everything. But it was too much work! Now the

	greenhouse helps them. AI helps them. The chickens help them. Farming is much

	easier!

	以前，果農必須親自做所有的工作。現在，溫室、人工智慧跟雞群都可以幫他們分擔壓力，讓工作更輕鬆！

	Now people visit the farm. They pick kumquats. They make kumquat tea or

	candied kumquats. They have fun!

	遊客可以來果園採金棗，做成金棗茶或是蜜餞。真好玩！

	This farm is one of the smartest farms in Taiwan!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	宜蘭的金棗很有名，用聰明的辦法種植可以省時省力。

	1. farm 農場。

	Where did you get these strawberries? 你在哪裡買的這些草莓? So sweet! 好甜喔!

	I picked them at a farm today. 我今天在一家農場採的。

	2. fruit 水果。

	You went to a farm? 你去了一家農場?

	Yeah, in Miaoli. 對，在苗栗。The farmer grows several different kinds of fruit.

	那個農夫種好幾種不同的水果。

	3. too much 太多。

	Their pineapples are not good, though. 不過他們的鳳梨不好。There’s been too much rain.

	下太多雨了。

	4. what 什麼。

	Maybe AI can help this farmer. 也許AI能幫忙農夫。

	By telling the rain to stop? 它會叫雨停?

	No, AI is not a god! 不，AI又不是神! But it can tell him what to grow. 但是它可以告訴農夫種什麼。

	你是否去過農場? farm農場 fruit水果 too much太多 what什麼

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. What are kumquats?

	a. A small orange fruit

	b. A big glass house

	c. A very smart farmer

	2. What does AI do for the kumquats?

	a. Makes them sweet and sour

	b. Watches chickens

	c. Helps them grow well

	3. What do the chickens do on the farm?

	a. Play with people

	b. Eat kumquats

	c. Eat insects

	Answers

	1. a

	2. c

	3. c

episodes.title: Taiwan VR Movie with Indigenous Story Wins Awards
episodes.transcript:
________________________________
Taiwan VR Movie with Indigenous Story Wins Awards

Have you seen a VR movie? You put on a headset. The movie starts. And… you
are in the movie! You can walk around. You can go anywhere you want!
Everything looks real. But it is not!
你有看過虛擬實境VR電影嗎？把裝置戴在頭上之後，就好像置身在電影裡面！你可以到處走，眼前所有的景色都超逼真！

A Taiwanese filmmaker made a VR movie. It is from a book by a Taiwanese
writer. One of the stories it tells is very old.
一位台灣導演製作了一部 VR 電影。這部作品改編自台灣作家寫的故事，其中一個故事其實很古老。

The story is from the Rukai people. Some Rukai hunters see a Formosan clouded
leopard. They follow it a long way. It stops on a mountain. The hunters build
a village there.
很久以前，幾名魯凱族獵人發現了一頭台灣雲豹。他們一路跟著這隻雲豹，走了很遠很遠的路。最後，雲豹停在一座山上，獵人便在那裡建立了村落。

When you watch this movie, you walk in mountain forests. You look for the
leopard. You follow it, like the Rukai hunters!
觀眾看這部 VR 電影時，彷彿走進了故事裡面那片山林。你會像當年的魯凱獵人一樣，在森林裡尋找雲豹的蹤跡，一路追著牠跑。

This VR movie won awards. It won at the Kaohsiung Film Festival. And it won
at some famous film festivals in Europe!
這部 VR 電影獲得了許多獎項！除了在高雄電影節獲獎外，它也在歐洲好幾個知名影展中受到肯定。

Now, many people want to learn more about Taiwan. They want to learn more
stories of Taiwan's indigenous peoples.
越來越多人因為這部電影而想認識台灣，也想了解台灣原住民族的故事。

That is good, because Taiwan has great stories to tell the world!

________________________________________
Vocabulary

虛擬實境電影，可以讓觀眾成為電影的一部份。

1.	film 電影。
Did you hear? 你聽說了嗎 ? The Film Festival is back in town! 影展要回來了! I've been
looking for tickets all morning. 我整個早上都在找電影票。

2.	story 故事。
No way! Are any famous films showing? 不會吧! 有什麼名片嗎?
One tells the story of stars and space. 有一部講星星跟太空的故事。

3.	real 真實的。
That’s my favorite theme! 那是我最喜歡的主題!
I know. And they made the movie in space for real. 我知道。而且他們是真正在太空裡拍的。

4.	put on 穿戴。
You mean all the workers put on space suits? 你是說所有工作人員都穿上太空衣?
Yeah, and they were all floating around. 對，並且都飄來飄去。

Do you love space films? film電影    story故事    real真實的    put on穿戴
________________________________________
Quiz

1. What do you put on to watch a VR movie?
a. Shoes
b. A headset
c. A cap

2. What did the Rukai hunters follow?
a. A mountain forest
b. A Formosan clouded leopard
c. People in Europe

3. Where is the film festival in Taiwan?
a. Taichung
b. Hualien
c. Kaohsiung

Answers
1.    b
2.    b
3.    c

episodes.title: Hero Rat Gets Statue
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Hero Rat Gets Statue

	Some countries have wars. Afterwards, people try to build their lives again.

	But in a few countries, many cannot. Landmines are everywhere.

	有些國家在打完仗之後需要重建，但是到處都埋著地雷，讓重建變得非常困難。

	Many landmines are about fifteen centimeters down in the ground. No one can

	see them. People walk on them. That makes the landmines explode. They hurt or

	kill people every year.

	多數的地雷被埋在底下十五公分深。走在路面上的人看不到這些地雷，如果不幸踩上去就會爆炸！每年都有人因為誤踩地雷而傷亡。

	Experts try to find the landmines. It takes a lot of time. They are very

	careful. They do not want to get hurt or killed! It is very dangerous work.

	專家想要清除這些地雷，但是這個過程十分漫長而且危險，所以他們必須非常小心。他們不想在過程中受傷，甚至送命。

	So rats are helping the experts. What? Rats? How? Rats can learn how to find

	landmines! They use their noses. They smell landmines!

	現在，老鼠正在幫助掃雷專家！老鼠可以學習如何利用他們敏銳的嗅覺，聞出地雷的位置！

	Rats are small and light. They can walk on landmines. The landmines do not

	explode. After the rats find a landmine, experts carefully dig it up.

	老鼠體型輕巧，就算踩上地雷也不會引爆。老鼠找到地雷後，專家接著小心的挖除。

	In one country, a rat found 71 landmines! It made a lot of land safe. So the

	country made a big statue of the rat!

	在某個國家，有一隻老鼠找到了71個地雷！為了感謝牠讓大家更安全，人們還為牠豎立了一座雕像！

	This rat is a hero. All rats that find landmines are heroes too. Now many

	more people can build their lives again!

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	老鼠成為掃除地雷的英雄，這可是大家都沒有想到的吧?

	1. everywhere 到處。

	Why are you walking funny? 你怎麼走路那麼奇怪?

	I’m pretending there’s lava everywhere. 我在假裝地上都是岩漿。

	Are we going to get burned? 我們會被灼傷嗎?

	2. afterwards 之後。

	Probably. But lava should turn to rocks afterwards. 也許，不過之後岩漿應該會變成石頭。

	3. hurt 受傷。

	So, you’re afraid to walk across the park now? 所以你現在害怕走過公園? Yeah, I like my

	life. 對，我喜歡我的人生。I don’t want to get hurt. 我可不想受傷。

	4. safe 安全的。

	Let’s stay safe by only stepping on the rocks. 我們來只踩著石頭走，就可以保持安全。

	Great idea! 好主意!

	你今天學到哪些單字? everywhere到處 afterwards之後 hurt受傷 safe安全的

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. How do rats find landmines?

	a. The rats smell them.

	b. The rats hear them.

	c. The rats see them.

	2. How many landmines did one rat find?

	a. 15

	b. 71

	c. 92

	3. Why did the country make a statue of the rat?

	a. The rat liked to dig up landmines.

	b. The rat was cute.

	c. The rat made a lot of land safe.

	Answers

	1. a

	2. b

	3. c

sections.story:
________________________________

	Hero Rat Gets Statue

	Some countries have wars. Afterwards, people try to build their lives again.

	But in a few countries, many cannot. Landmines are everywhere.

	有些國家在打完仗之後需要重建，但是到處都埋著地雷，讓重建變得非常困難。

	Many landmines are about fifteen centimeters down in the ground. No one can

	see them. People walk on them. That makes the landmines explode. They hurt or

	kill people every year.

	多數的地雷被埋在底下十五公分深。走在路面上的人看不到這些地雷，如果不幸踩上去就會爆炸！每年都有人因為誤踩地雷而傷亡。

	Experts try to find the landmines. It takes a lot of time. They are very

	careful. They do not want to get hurt or killed! It is very dangerous work.

	專家想要清除這些地雷，但是這個過程十分漫長而且危險，所以他們必須非常小心。他們不想在過程中受傷，甚至送命。

	So rats are helping the experts. What? Rats? How? Rats can learn how to find

	landmines! They use their noses. They smell landmines!

	現在，老鼠正在幫助掃雷專家！老鼠可以學習如何利用他們敏銳的嗅覺，聞出地雷的位置！

	Rats are small and light. They can walk on landmines. The landmines do not

	explode. After the rats find a landmine, experts carefully dig it up.

	老鼠體型輕巧，就算踩上地雷也不會引爆。老鼠找到地雷後，專家接著小心的挖除。

	In one country, a rat found 71 landmines! It made a lot of land safe. So the

	country made a big statue of the rat!

	在某個國家，有一隻老鼠找到了71個地雷！為了感謝牠讓大家更安全，人們還為牠豎立了一座雕像！

	This rat is a hero. All rats that find landmines are heroes too. Now many

	more people can build their lives again!

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
sections.vocabulary:
Vocabulary

	老鼠成為掃除地雷的英雄，這可是大家都沒有想到的吧?

	1. everywhere 到處。

	Why are you walking funny? 你怎麼走路那麼奇怪?

	I’m pretending there’s lava everywhere. 我在假裝地上都是岩漿。

	Are we going to get burned? 我們會被灼傷嗎?

	2. afterwards 之後。

	Probably. But lava should turn to rocks afterwards. 也許，不過之後岩漿應該會變成石頭。

	3. hurt 受傷。

	So, you’re afraid to walk across the park now? 所以你現在害怕走過公園? Yeah, I like my

	life. 對，我喜歡我的人生。I don’t want to get hurt. 我可不想受傷。

	4. safe 安全的。

	Let’s stay safe by only stepping on the rocks. 我們來只踩著石頭走，就可以保持安全。

	Great idea! 好主意!

	你今天學到哪些單字? everywhere到處 afterwards之後 hurt受傷 safe安全的

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
sections.quiz:
Quiz

	1. How do rats find landmines?

	a. The rats smell them.

	b. The rats hear them.

	c. The rats see them.

	2. How many landmines did one rat find?

	a. 15

	b. 71

	c. 92

	3. Why did the country make a statue of the rat?

	a. The rat liked to dig up landmines.

	b. The rat was cute.

	c. The rat made a lot of land safe.

episodes.title: No More Running for Taiwan’s Little Green Men
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	No More Running for Taiwan’s Little Green Men

	Have you seen little green men? Some of them wear hats. They are everywhere!

	你有看過小綠人嗎？小綠人隨處可見，有些頭上還戴著帽子！

	These little green men are on crossing signals. They help us know when we can

	safely walk across the street.

	小綠人會出現在十字路口，告訴我們什麼時候可以安全地過馬路。

	Taiwan was the first country in the world to make these little green men

	move. Now they walk all over the world!

	台灣是全世界第一個讓小綠人動起來的國家！現在，世界很多地方也都可以見到。

	In many places in Taiwan, the little green men run too. But they are going to

	stop running. They will walk.

	在台灣很多地方，小綠人不只會走，還會跑！但是，跑步的小綠人以後都只會用走的。

	Why? Well, the little green men run when the crossing signal is going to turn

	red. They are telling us to wait.

	這是因為當行人號誌快要變紅燈的時候，小綠人會快跑，提醒大家等下一個綠燈再過馬路。

	But some people think the little green men are telling them to run. So they

	run! That is dangerous! They do not have time to cross the street safely.

	但是很多人以為小綠人是叫他們加緊腳步，所以就衝了出去！這很危險，因為可能已經沒有時間讓他們安全過馬路了！

	Taiwan wants everyone to cross the street more safely. So all of Taiwan's

	little green men will stop running by the end of this year. Changing many

	crossing signals takes time!

	交通部希望讓大家更安全，所以今年年底前 所有小綠人都會停止跑步，改成慢慢走！

	Now you know how to cross the street more safely. Do not run when you see a

	little green man!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	為了避免讓行人誤會，小綠人號誌以後只會走，不會跑。

	1. cross 越過。

	I can’t believe you just crossed the street like that! 我真不敢相信你就那樣過馬路!

	Why not? 為什麼不行? It’s faster. 那比較快。

	2. dangerous 危險的。

	But it’s dangerous! 但是很危險! You could have been hit by cars. 你有可能被車子撞到。

	I looked both ways, okay? 我有看兩邊，好嗎? Cars were far away. 車子都很遠。

	3. run 跑步。

	What about those motorcycles? 那些摩托車呢?

	They stopped when they saw me running. 他們看到我跑步都有停下來。

	4. signal 信號。They stopped because they didn’t want to be fined! 他們停下來是為了怕罰款!

	How much is the fine? 罰多少錢?

	At least $18,000 NT if they hit you. 假如撞到你，至少一萬八千元。

	Wow! Next time I’ll wait for traffic signals, okay? 哇! 好吧，下次我等紅綠燈。

	來一起讀單字。cross越過 dangerous危險的 run跑步 signal信號

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. Which was the first country to make the little green man move?

	a. Taiwan

	b. Thailand

	c. Japan

	2. What are the little green men telling us when they run?

	a. Run!

	b. Walk!

	c. Wait!

	3. What does Taiwan want everyone to do?

	a. Change many crossing signals

	b. Cross the street more safely

	c. Wear hats everywhere

	Answers

	1. a

	2. c

	3. b

episodes.title: Pet Walks in Socks
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Pet Walks in Socks

	One day in Kaohsiung, a car stopped at a red light. A woman was crossing the

	street. She was pushing a cart. She was walking with her pet. It was a big

	tortoise! And, it was wearing socks! Huh?!

	高雄一位女子正在過馬路。她推著一台小推車，還帶著她的寵物，一隻穿襪子的陸龜！

	Tortoises live on land. Some live more than fifty years! This tortoise is

	eight years old. Four years ago, it was four kilograms. Now it is forty

	kilograms!

	陸龜住在陸地上，有些壽命超過五十年。這名女子的陸龜八歲，四年前牠重四公斤，現在已經四十公斤了！

	The tortoise walks a lot. It walks outside. Sometimes it crosses the street

	too slowly. Then the woman puts it on her cart. She gives it a fast ride to

	the other side!

	這隻陸龜常常在戶外散步，有時候牠過馬路的速度實在太慢，主人會把牠抱到推車上，快速推牠過馬路！

	The woman is kind. She walks for three or four hours with the tortoise. They

	do this every day. When the walk is too short, the tortoise cries!

	這名很有愛心的女子每天都會陪陸龜散步三、四個小時。如果散步時間太短，陸龜還會發出叫聲！

	So why does the tortoise wear socks? Its feet get hurt sometimes. Sidewalks

	and streets are hard! The woman bought many pairs of short socks. She puts

	them on the tortoise's feet. They keep its feet safe.

	為什麼牠要穿襪子呢？因為人行道跟馬路太硬了，牠的腳會受傷。主人為了保護牠的腳，買了很多雙短襪給牠穿。

	People love seeing the tortoise. They stop and take pictures. This tortoise

	is a Kaohsiung star!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	愛散步的陸龜，穿著襪子上街。

	1. slowly 慢慢地。

	Why are you walking so slowly? 你怎麼走這麼慢?

	Because my feet hurt! 因為我的腳痛! And don't ask me why. 別問我為什麼。

	2. stop 停止。

	I don’t need to. I already know. 我不用問，我早就知道了。

	Really? Let's hear it. 真的嗎?說來聽聽。

	You refused to stop dancing last night. 你昨晚不肯停止跳舞。

	3. wear 穿著。

	Okay, maybe that's true. 好吧，也許你說對了。

	And you were wearing those beautiful new shoes. 而且你還穿著那雙漂亮新鞋子。

	4. feet 雙腳。

	Hey, I like those shoes! 我喜歡那雙鞋子!

	Your feet don't. 你的腳可不喜歡。Sometimes fashion and feet can't live happily

	together! 有的時候腳跟時尚就是不合。

	你喜歡散步嗎? 來讀讀單字。slowly慢慢地 stop停止 wear穿著 feet雙腳

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. What was the tortoise wearing?

	a. A cap

	b. Shoes

	c. Socks

	2. How old is the tortoise?

	a. Four years old

	b. Eight years old

	c. Forty years old

	3. What does the woman use to help her pet cross the street?

	a. The tortoise

	b. A cart

	c. Traffic lights

	Answers

	1. c

	2. b

	3. b

episodes.title: Dragon Boat World Records
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Dragon Boat World Records

	Ready, set... Happy Dragon Boat Festival!

	端午節快樂！龍舟比賽正式開始了！

	Many dragon boat teams want a world record. They want their boat to be the

	fastest or the biggest. They want to be the best!

	很多龍舟隊都想創下世界紀錄，讓自己的龍舟成為最快、最大，最厲害的龍舟！

	A Chinese team has the world record for the longest dragon boat. It is more

	than 100 meters long! That is as long as a soccer field! Four hundred and

	twenty people can paddle it!

	有一個中國的龍舟隊擁有世界最長的龍舟。那艘龍舟超過一百公尺，跟一個足球場差不多長！那艘龍舟最多可以容得下四百二十個人一起划！

	Two U.S. teams have dragon boat world records. Five people were on both U.S.

	teams.

	有兩支美國龍舟隊也曾經創下了世界紀錄，有五個成員同時都在這兩支隊伍裡。

	The first U.S. team went the farthest in a dragon boat in 24 hours. Their

	arms hurt. But they did not stop! They went 322 kilometers!

	第一支美國隊在二十四小時內划了最遠的距離。他們的手很痠，但他們沒有停下來！最後，他們總共划了三百二十二公里。

	The second U.S. team went the farthest in a dragon boat. They went 596

	kilometers! That is like paddling from New Taipei City to Pingtung!

	第二支美國隊則是創下了划龍舟最遠距離的紀錄。他們總共划了五百九十六公里，這就像從新北市一路划到屏東一樣遠！

	That team paddled for 51 hours! They did not stop! They took turns taking

	short breaks. They ate, drank, and... more in the boat. Wow!

	這支隊伍總共划了五十一個小時！他們完全沒有停下來，只有在中途輪流短暫的休息、吃東西、喝水等等。

	Will Taiwan's dragon boats get any world records this year?

	________________________________________

	Vocabulary 端午節有龍舟競賽，比的是速度和距離。

	1. people 人們。

	Why do the boats have dragon heads? 為什麼那些船都用龍的頭? Why not tigers? 為什麼不用老虎?

	Because people believe dragons rule the water. 因為人們相信龍會治水。

	2. best 最好的。

	So they think dragons bring good luck? 所以他們認為龍會帶來好運? Yeah, dragons are the

	best. 對，龍是最棒的。

	3. fastest 最快的。

	I wonder which team will be the fastest this year. 真想知道今年哪一隊最快。

	The winner often comes from a fitness center. 贏家通常是健身房隊。

	4. paddle 划船。

	What a perfect ad! 真是好廣告! Their slogan can be “we paddle faster than all!”

	他們的廣告詞可以用 [我們划船比誰都快]!

	今天你學到那些單字? people人們 best最好的 fastest最快的 paddle划船

	________________________________________

	Quiz

	1. What was the Chinese team's world record?

	a. Best dragon boat

	b. Strongest dragon boat

	c. Longest dragon boat

	2. How many people were on both U.S. teams?

	a. 2 people

	b. 5 people

	c. 10 people

	3. What was the second U.S. team's dragon boat world record?

	a. Going 24 hours

	b. Going the farthest

	c. Going the fastest

	Answers

	1. c

	2. b

	3. b

	arms hurt. But they did not stop! They went 322 kilometers!

	第一支美國隊在二十四小時內划了最遠的距離。他們的手很痠，但他們沒有停下來！最後，他們總共划了三百二十二公里。

	The second U.S. team went the farthest in a dragon boat. They went 596

	kilometers! That is like paddling from New Taipei City to Pingtung!

	第二支美國隊則是創下了划龍舟最遠距離的紀錄。他們總共划了五百九十六公里，這就像從新北市一路划到屏東一樣遠！

	That team paddled for 51 hours! They did not stop! They took turns taking

	short breaks. They ate, drank, and... more in the boat. Wow!

	這支隊伍總共划了五十一個小時！他們完全沒有停下來，只有在中途輪流短暫的休息、吃東西、喝水等等。

	Will Taiwan's dragon boats get any world records this year?

	________________________________________
sections.vocabulary:
Vocabulary 端午節有龍舟競賽，比的是速度和距離。

	1. people 人們。

	Why do the boats have dragon heads? 為什麼那些船都用龍的頭? Why not tigers? 為什麼不用老虎?

	Because people believe dragons rule the water. 因為人們相信龍會治水。

	2. best 最好的。

	So they think dragons bring good luck? 所以他們認為龍會帶來好運? Yeah, dragons are the

	best. 對，龍是最棒的。

	3. fastest 最快的。

	I wonder which team will be the fastest this year. 真想知道今年哪一隊最快。

	The winner often comes from a fitness center. 贏家通常是健身房隊。

	4. paddle 划船。

	What a perfect ad! 真是好廣告! Their slogan can be “we paddle faster than all!”

	他們的廣告詞可以用 [我們划船比誰都快]!

	今天你學到那些單字? people人們 best最好的 fastest最快的 paddle划船

	________________________________________
sections.quiz:
Quiz

	1. What was the Chinese team's world record?

	a. Best dragon boat

	b. Strongest dragon boat

	c. Longest dragon boat

	2. How many people were on both U.S. teams?

	a. 2 people

	b. 5 people

	c. 10 people

	3. What was the second U.S. team's dragon boat world record?

	a. Going 24 hours

	b. Going the farthest

	c. Going the fastest

episodes.title: A Friend to Every Orangutan
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

A Friend to Every Orangutan

One day, a scientist went to Borneo. She wanted to study orangutans. She
studied them there for fifty years! Whoa!
有一天，一位科學家想研究紅毛猩猩，所以她就去了婆羅洲。她在那裡總共研究了五十年！

Orangutans are big red apes. They live in the trees. They eat fruit and
leaves.
紅毛猩猩是大型的猿類，牠們住在樹上，喜歡吃水果跟樹葉。

People thought orangutans always stayed in the trees. But the scientist
learned they walked on the ground too! She also learned they had babies every
eight years!
以前，人們以為紅毛猩猩永遠都待在樹上。但是，這位科學家發現紅毛猩猩也會在地上行走！她還發現，紅毛猩猩大約八年就會生一次寶寶！

One baby orangutan was one year old. He was lonely. He did not have a mom. He
thought the scientist was his mom! He went everywhere with her.
有一隻一歲的紅毛猩猩沒有媽媽，非常孤單。所以，這隻猩猩就把科學家當成自己的媽媽，走到哪跟到哪。

The young orangutan learned how to climb trees. He learned how to find food.
He learned how to be an orangutan. The scientist was his teacher.
科學家教這隻小紅毛猩猩怎麼爬樹跟尋找食物，牠也逐漸學會如何當一隻真正的紅毛猩猩！

The scientist worked hard to keep all orangutans safe. But some people hunt
them. Some take the babies to be pets. Some cut down their trees. Some take
their forests for farming.
這位科學家非常努力地保護所有的紅毛猩猩。但是，有些人會獵捕牠們並把小紅毛猩猩抓去當寵物，還有些人會砍掉牠們居住的樹林，把森林改成農地。

The scientist died this year. She was more than a scientist. She was a friend
to every orangutan.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Vocabulary

一位科學家努力研究紅毛猩猩，希望牠們不要滅絕。

1)	tree 樹木。Humans are very close to orangutans.人類跟紅毛猩猩很接近。No way! They are
ugly! 不會吧! 牠們好醜! Hey, they have a big brain, just like us. 牠們有個大腦袋，跟我們一樣。But
they live in the trees! 但是牠們住在樹上!

2)	fruit 水果。They eat worms! 牠們吃蟲子。Come on. They also eat fruits like apples.
好啦，牠也吃水果，例如蘋果。

3)	climb 攀爬。You eat apples too! 你也吃蘋果啊! True, but I don’t climb trees.
確實，但我不爬樹。

4)	lonely 寂寞的。Did you know they like to live alone? 紅毛猩猩其實喜歡單獨生活。 Really?
Don't they feel lonely? 真的嗎？牠們不會覺得寂寞嗎？

你有見過猩猩嗎? 一起讀單字。tree樹木    fruit水果    climb攀爬    lonely寂寞的
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Quiz

1. How long did the scientist study orangutans?
a. Five years
b. Fifteen years
c. Fifty years

2. What did the scientist learn about orangutans?
a. They can swim.
b. They are lonely.
c. They walk on the ground.

3. What did the scientist do for all orangutans?
a. Worked to keep them safe
b. Sold them to nice zoos
c. Gave them taller trees

Answers
1. c
2. c
3. a

episodes.title: A Song for Taiwan’s Brave Firefighters
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	A Song for Taiwan’s Brave Firefighters

	Firefighters keep us safe. They put out fires. They help when no one else

	can. They are very brave.

	消防員撲滅火災，在沒有人能幫忙的時候伸出援手，保護我們的安全。他們非常勇敢！

	There was a big fire in Keelung. People needed help. They called 1-1-9.

	Firefighters came in bright red trucks. The firefighters put out the fire.

	They saved many people. But one brave firefighter died. Fires are very

	dangerous for firefighters too.

	基隆曾經發生一場大火。很多人需要幫助，所以有人打了119。消防員開著鮮紅色的消防車趕來滅火，救出了很多人。但是，有一位勇敢的消防員不幸過世了。對消防員來說，火災也非常危險。

	A group of Amis, Atayal, and Hakka singers in Keelung want to thank the brave

	firefighter. One of the singers wrote a song. It is called “Yǒng zhì bù

	wàng”* It means “Never Forget.” The song is about the firefighter and how

	brave he was. It helps us remember firefighters keep us safe.

	基隆有一群阿美族、泰雅族和客家歌手想向這位勇敢的消防員表達感謝。其中一位歌手寫了一首歌，歌名叫做《永誌不忘》，意思是「永遠不會忘記」。

	這首歌也提醒我們，消防員一直都在守護大家的安全。

	The song is online. When we listen, it gets money. The money will buy

	Taiwan’s firefighters safety helmets, rescue suits, and other things. These

	will keep them safe.

	這首歌現在已經放在網路上，只要大家聽歌就能給創作團隊一些收入。賺到的錢會被用來購買消防員專用的安全帽、衣服跟其他的裝備，幫助台灣的消防員更安全的執行任務！

	The singers in Keelung want to help keep Taiwan's firefighters safe. You can

	too! Listen to their song online and help our brave firefighters!

	________________________________________

	Vocabulary

	為了替勇敢的打火兄弟募款，一群人創作了一首歌。

	1) truck 卡車。(救火車鳴笛飛馳) Oh, my gosh! I wonder where the fire truck is going!

	我的天。不知道救火車要去哪裡。I hope it’s not anywhere near us. 希望不在我家附近。

	2) die 死亡。You shouldn’t say that. 你不該那樣講。Nobody wants a fire nearby!

	沒人想要附近發生火災。People could die, you know. 可能有傷亡呢。Okay, okay. 好啦!

	3) forget 忘記。Don’t forget when there’s a fire, just run! 別忘了火災時趕快跑!

	4) put out 撲滅。Shouldn’t I try to put it out? 我不是應該先滅火嗎? No, you should ask an

	adult for help. 不是, 你應該先找大人幫忙。

	火災發生時該怎麼做? 來讀單字。

	truck卡車 die死亡 forget忘記 put out撲滅

	________________________________________

	Quiz

	1. What number did people in Keelung call for help?

	a. 9-9-9

	b. 9-1-1

	c. 1-1-9

	2. What does the song's name mean?

	a. “Brave Firefighter”

	b. “Never Forget”

	c. “Bright Red Truck”

	3. Where can we listen to the song?

	a. On the radio

	b. Online

	c. Taipei

	Answers

	1. c

	2. b

	3. b

	b. 9-1-1

	c. 1-1-9

	2. What does the song's name mean?

	a. “Brave Firefighter”

	b. “Never Forget”

	c. “Bright Red Truck”

	3. Where can we listen to the song?

	a. On the radio

	b. Online

	c. Taipei

episodes.title: Woman Finds Good Use for Broken Glass
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Woman Finds Good Use for Broken Glass

	In the U.S., some glass is recycled. But most glass goes to landfills. Glass

	can take one million years to break down. That’s not good for the

	environment! But one woman is recycling glass.

	在美國，有些玻璃會被回收，但大部分的玻璃最後都會出現在垃圾掩埋場。玻璃需要一百萬年才能被分解，這很傷害環境！但現在，有一位女子正在努力回收玻璃。

	The woman recycles broken glass from car windows. Some people know about her.

	They tell her about new broken car windows. She goes to the cars. She sweeps

	up the broken glass. She puts it in a box.

	這名女子會回收破掉的車窗玻璃。有一些人知道她會這麼做，所以當他們發現碎掉的車窗的時候就會通知她。她會用掃把把碎玻璃掃起來，再裝進箱子裡。

	At home, the woman cleans the glass. She puts it in an oven for glass. It

	melts into little circles. She makes beautiful earrings with them!

	回到家後，這名女子會把玻璃洗乾淨，放進專門的爐子裡燒。融化後會變成一顆一顆玻璃珠，她再拿來做成漂亮的耳環！

	The woman also recycles glass bottles. She makes flower vases. She makes

	candle holders and other things. They are pretty.

	她也會回收玻璃瓶，再做成花瓶、燭台跟其他的漂亮的作品。

	People like to buy the things the woman makes. They want something good to

	come from broken car windows. They want to help the environment too.

	很多人喜歡買她的玻璃作品！他們希望破掉的玻璃窗能變成有用的東西，也希望能同時幫助到環境。

	The woman's mom and dad taught her to take care of the environment. That is

	why she likes to recycle.

	這名女子的爸爸媽媽從小就教她怎麼愛護環境，所以她很喜歡做回收！

	Taiwan recycles a lot of glass and other things. Do you like to recycle?

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	玻璃需要非常長的時間才能分解，有人想出各種再利用的方式。

	1) pretty 好看的。

	What a pretty flower vase! 好美的花瓶!

	Isn’t it nice? 好看吧?

	It’s made from recycled glass. 它是回收玻璃做的。

	2) broken 破裂的。

	You mean this used to be broken windows or bottles? 這以前是破掉的窗戶或瓶子?

	Yeah, now it’s come alive. 對，現在它又活過來了。

	3) melt 熔化。

	Where did you find the vase? 你在哪裡找到花瓶的?

	There’s a little shop near the park. 公園附近有個小店。

	They melt old glass to make colorful lamps too. 他們也熔化舊玻璃來做彩色的燈。

	4) thing 東西。

	I have to see that place. 我得去看看那個地方。

	They must have things I like. 一定有我喜歡的東西。

	What have you learned today?

	pretty好看的 broken破裂的 melt熔化 thing東西

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. What happens to most glass in the U.S.?

	a. It is melted.

	b. It is recycled.

	c. It goes to a landfill.

	2. Where is the woman's broken glass from?

	a. Vases

	b. Car windows

	c. Candle holders

	3. Who taught the woman to take care of the environment?

	a. Her teachers

	b. Her mom and dad

	c. Her friends

	Answers

	1. c

	2. b

	3. b

	People like to buy the things the woman makes. They want something good to

	come from broken car windows. They want to help the environment too.

	很多人喜歡買她的玻璃作品！他們希望破掉的玻璃窗能變成有用的東西，也希望能同時幫助到環境。

	The woman's mom and dad taught her to take care of the environment. That is

	why she likes to recycle.

	這名女子的爸爸媽媽從小就教她怎麼愛護環境，所以她很喜歡做回收！

	Taiwan recycles a lot of glass and other things. Do you like to recycle?

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
sections.vocabulary:
Vocabulary

	玻璃需要非常長的時間才能分解，有人想出各種再利用的方式。

	1) pretty 好看的。

	What a pretty flower vase! 好美的花瓶!

	Isn’t it nice? 好看吧?

	It’s made from recycled glass. 它是回收玻璃做的。

	2) broken 破裂的。

	You mean this used to be broken windows or bottles? 這以前是破掉的窗戶或瓶子?

	Yeah, now it’s come alive. 對，現在它又活過來了。

	3) melt 熔化。

	Where did you find the vase? 你在哪裡找到花瓶的?

	There’s a little shop near the park. 公園附近有個小店。

	They melt old glass to make colorful lamps too. 他們也熔化舊玻璃來做彩色的燈。

	4) thing 東西。

	I have to see that place. 我得去看看那個地方。

	They must have things I like. 一定有我喜歡的東西。

	What have you learned today?

	pretty好看的 broken破裂的 melt熔化 thing東西

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
sections.quiz:
Quiz

	1. What happens to most glass in the U.S.?

	a. It is melted.

	b. It is recycled.

	c. It goes to a landfill.

	2. Where is the woman's broken glass from?

	a. Vases

	b. Car windows

	c. Candle holders

	3. Who taught the woman to take care of the environment?

	a. Her teachers

	b. Her mom and dad

	c. Her friends

episodes.title: Kids Are the Chess Pieces on this Chessboard
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Kids Are the Chess Pieces on this Chessboard

	Qipan is a village in Yunlin. "Qipan" means chessboard. And yes, Qipan loves

	Chinese chess! The game is good for the brain. Players have to listen, think,

	and plan.

	在雲林的棋盤村，很多村民都喜歡下象棋！這種遊戲對大腦很好，因為玩家必須懂得聆聽、思考跟做計畫。

	Every year, Qipan has a national Chinese chess competition. The kids at

	Qishan Elementary School in Qipan were excited! They wanted to tell everyone

	about the competition!

	棋盤村每年都會舉辦全國象棋公開賽。棋山國小的學生非常興奮，想要讓大家趕快知道這個消息！

	So the kids made a big Chinese chessboard in their playground. It did not

	have big round chess pieces. The kids were the chess pieces!

	他們在學校的操場做了一個巨大的棋盤，棋盤上沒有圓形的棋子，因為學生自己就是棋子！

	Two teams were on the chessboard. One team wore black shirts and pants. The

	other team wore red shirts and pants. Each kid also wore a round chess piece.

	學生分成兩隊站在棋盤上，一隊穿著黑色，另一隊穿著紅色。每個人身上還掛著圓形的棋子作為標示。

	Teachers told the kids where to move on the chessboard. Some kids moved too

	early. Some kids moved to the wrong place. Some kids laughed when they were

	face to face! They had fun!

	老師用麥克風指示場上的學生們如何移動。有些人太早移動，有些人走錯位置，還有一些人在面對面的時候笑場，但大家都玩得很開心！

	A month later, four hundred people played in the competition. It was free.

	There were many prizes. Everyone was happy!

	一個月後，總共有四百個人參加了正式的象棋比賽。參加比賽不用報名費，獲勝者還能得到很多獎品，每個人都玩得很開心！

	Do you want to play in Qipan's competition next year?

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	象棋也可以組成隊伍比賽，參加的人就是棋子。

	1) wrong 錯誤的。

	Do you play Chinese chess? 你會不會下象棋?

	I tried it once… then I gave up. 我試過一次就放棄了。

	Why? 為什麼?

	Because I made all the wrong moves. 因為每一步我都走錯了。

	2) early 很早。

	Even my horse looked confused. 連我的馬都很困惑。

	You quit too early! 你放棄得太早啦!

	Chinese chess is a really interesting game. 象棋真的很有趣。

	3) competition 比賽。

	Ah, I see what this is about. 我知道你想做什麼了。

	What? 什麼?

	You want me to join the competition, don’t you? 你想要我參加比賽，對吧?

	I do! 對!

	4) prize 獎品。

	There are many great prizes! 有很多棒棒獎品!

	I’d hate to see you miss them! 我不想看到你錯過。

	來一起下象棋，但是先讀單字。

	wrong錯誤的 early很早 competition比賽 prize獎品

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. What is the name of the village?

	a. Weiqi

	b. Qipan

	c. Qizi

	2. What is the game good for?

	a. The brain

	b. The arms

	c. The legs

	3. What were the colors of the two teams?

	a. Black and white

	b. White and red

	c. Black and red

	Answers

	1. b

	2. a

	3. c

episodes.title: Making Butter Makes Running Better
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

Making Butter Makes Running Better

Narrator: A woman and her friend are running. They are having fun. Her
backpack is shaking. Something inside is moving. It is cream and a little
salt.
有一名女子跟她的朋友正在開心的跑步。她揹著一個後背包，包包裡的東西不停地晃來晃去。原來，背包裡面裝的是鮮奶油跟一點點鹽！

One hour later, the run is done.

Woman: Phew! OK, let us check …

Narrator: And, the cream is butter now!
一個小時後，他們跑完了。包包裡面的鮮奶油竟然變成奶油了！

Cream has lots of fat. When you shake the cream hard, the fat sticks
together. The cream gets thicker and thicker. After some time, it becomes
butter!
鮮奶油裡有很多脂肪，當大力搖晃鮮奶油的時候，脂肪就會慢慢凝固在一起，讓鮮奶油變得濃稠。過了一段時間之後，鮮奶油就會變成奶油！

Running is a great way to make butter. Every step shakes the cream. It goes
up and down again and again. Then it becomes butter!
跑步其實是製作奶油的好方法。每一步都會讓鮮奶油不停搖晃，上上下下地晃動很多次，最後就變成奶油了！

The woman puts lots of butter on some bread. She shares it with her friend.
They eat it. It is delicious! Mmmm-mm!
那位女子把很多奶油塗在麵包上，跟她的朋友一起分享。她們吃了之後，覺得非常好吃！

The woman and her friend make a video about making butter. They put it
online. Millions of people watch it! Now other runners are making butter too.
Some runners are making ice cream!
這名女子跟她的朋友還拍了一支做奶油的影片，上傳到網路上。結果有好幾百萬人觀看！現在，其他跑步的人也開始做奶油了。有些人甚至開始做冰淇淋！

Making butter is easy. You need these things: cream, salt, and your running
shoes! Making butter makes running better!
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Vocabulary
跑步可以製造牛油或是冰淇淋，你有興趣試試看嗎?

1.	running shoes 慢跑鞋。
Nice running shoes! 好看的慢跑鞋!
Trying to run more? 想要多跑跑嗎?
No. It’s just because they look good. 不會。只是因為它好看。

2.	better 比較好。
Nothing wrong with that. 那也沒錯。
Also, they’re better for my feet. 而且對我的腳也比較好。
Yeah, compared with those high heels of yours. 對，跟你那些高跟鞋相比。

3.	become 變成。
But seriously, I can help you if you really want to be a runner.
不過說真的，假如你真的想當跑者，我可以幫你。
Wow, since when did you become so friendly? 哇，你幾時變得這麼友善了?

4.	hour 小時。
I run for two hours every day. 我每天跑兩個鐘頭。
That’s quite amazing! 滿驚人的!

來讀單字。
running shoes慢跑鞋   better比較好    become變成    hour小時
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Quiz

1. What was moving in the woman's backpack?
a. A water bottle
b. Cream and salt
c. Butter

2. How long was the run?
a. One hour
b. Two hours
c. Three hours

3. Why does cream become butter when you shake it?
a. The cream gets hot.
b. The salt goes away.
c. The fat sticks together.

Answers
1. b
2. a
3. c

episodes.title: Octopuses Are Taking Over!
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Octopuses Are Taking Over!

	What is in the ocean in the south of England? They have big heads! They have

	eight arms! Aaaahhh! Octopuses are taking over! There are too many!

	英國南部的海洋裡有什麼生物呢？牠們有大大的頭，還有八隻像手臂的腕足！原來，是章魚正在佔領這片海域！

	Why are there so many octopuses? The ocean is changing. It is getting warmer.

	Warm water is good for them. So more and more of them come!

	章魚突然變多是因為海水升溫後，溫暖的水域很適合章魚生活，就有越來越多章魚游過來！

	Octopuses are changing ocean life there. They are eating everything! They eat

	shrimp, crabs, and small fish! Now birds, fish, and other ocean animals have

	less food.

	章魚也正在改變那裡的海洋生態。牠們吃掉海洋中的蝦子、螃蟹，還有小魚！章魚的胃口很好，但這樣導致鳥類、魚類跟其他的海洋生物能吃的食物正在減少。

	Fishermen cannot catch the fish they need. Their nets are full of octopuses!

	漁夫們很困擾！他們抓不到想要的魚，因為拉上來的漁網裡全都是章魚！

	Some people had a smart idea. In Spain and Italy, people love to eat octopus.

	Maybe people in England can eat it too! Some restaurants are cooking octopus

	dishes now.

	有一些人想到了一個聰明的解決辦法。西班牙跟義大利人很喜歡吃章魚料理，也許英國人也可以試試！現在，有些當地的餐廳已經開始推出章魚料理了。

	Warmer oceans are bringing changes everywhere. What are the changes for

	Taiwan?

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	海水溫度上升，讓海洋生物也起了變化。

	1. arm 手臂。

	When you see an octopus on TV, 你在電視上看到章魚，

	what comes to mind? 會怎麼想?

	That it’s kind of ugly…with its 8 arms. 我覺得它的八條手臂好難看。

	2. food 食物。

	Oh, I thought you’d first think, 我以為你會先想，“Yum, good food!” 有好吃的。

	I have eaten octopus. And it is delicious. 我是吃過章魚，確實好吃。

	3. catch 抓住。

	But before it’s cooked, it won't catch my attention. 但是煮熟之前，它不會引起我的注意。

	So you only like it when it’s served on a plate. 所以你只有在它端上桌時才喜歡。

	4. smart 聰明的。

	Octopuses are very smart, you know. 你可知章魚非常聰明。

	Well, I don’t mind if my food is smarter than me. 我不介意桌上的菜比我聰明。

	你有吃過章魚嗎?

	arm手臂 food食物 catch抓住 smart聰明的

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. Why are there many octopuses now?

	a. No one eats them.

	b. The ocean is warming.

	c. Fishermen catch them.

	2. How are the octopuses changing ocean life?

	a. They scare fish.

	b. They eat everything.

	c. They swim all day.

	3. What are some restaurants there cooking now?

	a. Octopus dishes

	b. Crab dishes

	c. Small fish dishes

	Answers

	1. b

	2. b

	3. a

	So you only like it when it’s served on a plate. 所以你只有在它端上桌時才喜歡。

	4. smart 聰明的。

	Octopuses are very smart, you know. 你可知章魚非常聰明。

	Well, I don’t mind if my food is smarter than me. 我不介意桌上的菜比我聰明。

	你有吃過章魚嗎?

	arm手臂 food食物 catch抓住 smart聰明的

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
sections.quiz:
Quiz

	1. Why are there many octopuses now?

	a. No one eats them.

	b. The ocean is warming.

	c. Fishermen catch them.

	2. How are the octopuses changing ocean life?

	a. They scare fish.

	b. They eat everything.

	c. They swim all day.

	3. What are some restaurants there cooking now?

	a. Octopus dishes

	b. Crab dishes

	c. Small fish dishes

episodes.title: Boy Crushes Cans to Help People
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Boy Crushes Cans to Help People

	A 13-year-old boy in the U. K. likes to help people. He buys food for a

	foodbank. Some people cannot buy food. The foodbank gives them food.

	一名在英國的13歲男孩很喜歡幫助別人。他會捐食物給食物銀行，這種銀行是幫助救濟買不起飯吃的人。

	The boy wants to give the foodbank more food! But he is not rich. So the boy

	recycles drink cans. He gets money for food this way. He asked companies for

	their cans. They said yes. He gets the cans after school and on weekends.

	他想提供更多食物給食物銀行，但是沒有那麼多的錢。

	所以，他開始回收飲料罐，再用賣回收的錢買食物來捐。他向各個公司索取空罐子，然後用週末跟放學後的時間來收集。

	Then the boy crushes the cans. This makes them smaller. This gives him more

	space for cans.

	男孩把罐子壓扁。因為罐子變小了，讓他有更多空間存放罐子。

	Crushing the cans is not easy! The boy's mom and dad helped. They crushed the

	cans with their car! Then someone gave him a big crushing machine.

	要把罐子壓扁並不輕鬆。男孩的爸媽來幫忙！他們開車壓扁那些罐子！還有人送這名男孩一台大型壓罐機。

	The boy has recycled cans for three years. He has recycled one and a half

	million cans! He got more than six hundred thousand Taiwan dollars! Every

	dollar helped people!

	男孩回收了三年的飲料罐！總共回收了一百五十萬個罐子，賣了超過六十萬台幣。這些錢他都拿去幫助別人！

	The boy also does other things. He plays video games. He spends time with his

	family. But he likes helping people so much, he does not stop!

	這名男孩也會做其他的事情，像是玩電玩，和陪伴家人。但是，他實在太喜歡幫助別人了，根本停不下來！

	Do you like to help people?

	________________________________________

	Vocabulary

	汽水罐壓扁了可以賣錢，少年用這種方法賺錢買食物來捐贈。

	1. recycle 回收。

	Hey, you just threw the can away? 你就那樣把罐子丟掉?

	You wanted to keep it? 你想留著它?

	No, but you should recycle it. 不，但是你應該回收。

	2. company 公司。

	How? Do you see a recycling bin around here? 怎麼回收? 你看到附近有回收箱嗎?

	No. But I’d give it to a company that collects cans. 沒有，不過我會把它交給收集罐子的公司。

	3. weekend 周末。

	So first you carry sticky cans home with you... 所以你先把黏答答的罐子帶回家...

	Yeah. 對。

	and you can’t go to the company on weekends. 而且你不能周末時去那家公司。

	4. spend 花費。

	Yeah, I go on Monday. 對，我星期一去。

	I’d rather spend that time waiting for the recycling truck. 我寧願花時間等回收車。

	今天你學到哪些單字?

	recycle回收 company公司 weekend周末 spend花費

	________________________________________

	Quiz

	1. How does the boy get money for food?

	a. He helps people.

	b. He plays video games.

	c. He recycles cans.

	2. How does the boy make the cans smaller?

	a. He crushes them.

	b. He drives on them.

	c. He recycles them.

	3. How long has the boy been recycling cans?

	a. 3 years

	b. 6 years

	c. 13 years

episodes.title: Dogs Show Scientists a Way to Save Lives
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Dogs Show Scientists a Way to Save Lives

	Narrator: A woman in England had a dog. One day, the dog smelled the woman's

	mouth. Her dog smelled it again and again!

	英國有一位女士養了隻狗。有一天，這隻狗不斷的聞她的嘴巴，聞了一次又一次！

	The woman thought maybe her mouth smelled bad. So she went to the dentist.

	Dentist: Say “Ahhhh.”

	Woman: “Ahhhh.”

	Narrator: But her teeth were okay.

	這位女士認為可能是自己的嘴巴有味道，所以她就去看牙醫。但是，她的牙齒沒有任何問題！

	The dog kept smelling the woman’s mouth. So the woman went to the doctor. The

	doctor did some tests. The woman had cancer. The doctor said the dog saved

	her life!

	狗還是一直聞她的嘴巴，所以她就去看醫生。醫生做完了檢查後，發現她得了癌症。醫生說，是這隻狗救了她的命！

	No one taught the woman's dog how to smell cancer. But dogs can be taught to

	do this. That is great! But it would be hard to have a dog in every hospital.

	沒有人教這隻狗怎麼在人身上聞到癌症。不過狗其實可以接受訓練，學會聞出癌症的味道。太厲害了！但是，要讓每一間醫院都有一隻受過訓練的狗實在不容易。

	So one scientist looked at how dogs smell cancer. Then he made a machine. It

	uses AI. He taught it to smell cancer. It is being tested now. That is great!

	It would be easy to have this machine in every hospital!

	因此，有位科學家在研究狗狗聞出癌症的方法後，發明了一種使用 AI「聞」出癌症的機器！這台機器目前還在測試階段，但如果成功了，以後每一家醫院都能使用！

	The scientist is also making very small machines to smell cancer. He hopes

	our smartphones can have them one day!

	這位科學家還在研究更小型的機器。他希望有一天手機也能幫助我們檢查癌症！

	Dogs showed scientists a way to find cancer. That will save many lives!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	狗的嗅覺遠超過人類，甚至聞得出來人類的疾病。

	1. test 檢驗。

	Should I get a cancer screening test? 我應該去做一個癌症篩檢嗎?

	Why? Are you worried about something? 為什麼呢? 你在擔心什麼嗎?

	Not really. 倒也沒有。

	2. mouth 嘴巴。

	It’s just that my mouth hurts sometimes. 只是有時候我的嘴巴會痛。

	Maybe it’s because you talk too much? 也許是因為你太多話了?

	I wish. But I know that’s not it. 我也希望，但我知道不是。

	3. dentist 牙醫。

	And there’s something wrong with my teeth too. 而且我的牙齒也有毛病。

	Then you should see a dentist. 那你應該看牙醫。

	4. easy 容易的。

	But I don’t like my dentist. 可是我不喜歡我的牙醫。

	You’re not exactly an easy patient. 你也不是個容易的病人。

	我們來一起讀今天的單字。

	test檢驗 mouth嘴巴 dentist牙醫 easy容易的

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. Why did the woman go to the dentist?

	a. She had a bad toothache.

	b. She thought her mouth smelled bad.

	c. She wanted to get her teeth cleaned.

	2. Who taught the dog how to smell cancer?

	a. A scientist

	b. The woman

	c. No one

	3. What did one scientist make?

	a. A machine that smells cancer

	b. A cancer hospital

	c. A smartphone that has cancer

	Answers

	1. b

	2. c

	3. a

episodes.title: These Birds Do Not Fly Away from a Fight
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	These Birds Do Not Fly Away from a Fight

	What is going on? Is it a fight? Is it a game? Or is it something else?

	到底發生什麼事了？這兩隻鳥在打架嗎，還是他們在玩遊戲？

	Two birds roll on the ground. They push each other with their wings. Then one

	bird holds the other down. The other bird tries to escape.

	有兩隻鳥在地上滾來滾去，用翅膀互相推擠。其中一隻鳥被壓住後，一直想逃跑！

	A third bird watches nearby. It chirps and chirps. Is it worried about the

	two birds? Is it cheering for one? Or maybe it is the referee.

	旁邊還有第三隻鳥看著這個場面，不停地叫。牠在擔心那兩隻鳥嗎？還是在替其中一隻加油呢？還是說，牠其實是裁判？

	Many people are watching these three birds. No one knows what the birds are

	doing. These birds are not scared of people. They did not fly away. The two

	birds keep fighting.

	很多人都在圍觀，但沒有人知道這三隻鳥到底在做什麼。那兩隻鳥一直爭鬥，完全不怕人，也沒有飛走。

	These birds are common mynas. Common mynas first came to Taiwan as pets. But

	they fight a lot. They are noisy. So their owners let them go free.

	這些打架的鳥叫做八哥，以前被作為寵物鳥引進台灣。可是，因為牠們很愛吵鬧跟打架，有些主人就把牠們放生了。

	Common mynas push out Taiwan's crested mynas. There are not many crested

	mynas now. But there are many common mynas. We cannot catch them all. This is

	not good for nature in Taiwan.

	外來的八哥會趕走台灣本土的冠八哥。普通八哥比冠八哥的數量多很多，我們也沒辦法把八哥全部抓起來。這個情況可能會傷害到台灣的自然環境！

	So if you have a pet you do not want, do not let it go free!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	外來種的家八哥很強悍，讓台灣原生種的八哥數量大減。

	1. fight 打架。

	What’s all that noise? 什麼吵鬧聲啊?

	There are birds fighting. 鳥在打架。

	One is trying to push the other away. 一隻想把另外一隻趕走。

	2. cheer 加油。

	For defending its home? 為了保護自己家?

	Probably. 也許是。

	Wow, the smaller one is so mean! 哇，小的那隻好兇!

	I should cheer for the big one. 我應該替大的加油。

	3. fly away 飛走。

	No use. The small one is winning. 沒用，小的贏了。

	Has the other one flown away? 另外那隻飛走了?

	Yep. 對。

	4. scared 害怕的。

	We stand so close, but they’re not scared. 我們站得這麼近，牠們都不怕。

	They’re too busy. 牠們太忙了。

	你有注意過天空的鳥兒嗎?

	fight打架 cheer加油 fly away飛走 scared害怕的

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. How many birds is the crowd watching?

	a. Two birds

	b. Three birds

	c. Four birds

	2. What kind of bird is the crowd watching?

	a. Common mynas

	b. Crested mynas

	c. Javan mynas

	3. What did the fighting birds do when the crowd watched?

	a. They flew away.

	b. They kept fighting.

	c. They ran away.

	Answers

	1. b

	2. a

	3. b

	Yep. 對。

	4. scared 害怕的。

	We stand so close, but they’re not scared. 我們站得這麼近，牠們都不怕。

	They’re too busy. 牠們太忙了。

	你有注意過天空的鳥兒嗎?

	fight打架 cheer加油 fly away飛走 scared害怕的

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
sections.quiz:
Quiz

	1. How many birds is the crowd watching?

	a. Two birds

	b. Three birds

	c. Four birds

	2. What kind of bird is the crowd watching?

	a. Common mynas

	b. Crested mynas

	c. Javan mynas

	3. What did the fighting birds do when the crowd watched?

	a. They flew away.

	b. They kept fighting.

	c. They ran away.

episodes.title: Star’s Light Shows Scientists a Surprise
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Star’s Light Shows Scientists a Surprise

	One day, scientists looked at a star. Before, the star's light stayed the

	same. But then it went off and on many times!

	科學家們正在觀察一顆星星。這顆星的光以前都很穩定，但是最近它開始閃爍個不停！

	The scientists studied the star. They got a surprise! They found the star's

	light was not going off and on! It stayed the same!

	科學家研究之後很驚訝！其實那顆星的光並沒有變化！

	Lots of dust and rocks were between the Earth and the star. The dust and

	rocks moved. So sometimes the scientists did not see the star's light. It is

	like when clouds hide the sun's light from us.

	在地球和這顆恆星之間，有很多灰塵跟石頭。它們會移動，有可能擋住星光，就像雲會把太陽光遮住一樣。

	The dust and rocks were made by a big crash. BOOM! Two planets crashed! These

	planets were eleven thousand light years away from Earth. That is very, very

	far away.

	那些灰塵跟石頭是一次巨大的撞擊造成的。距離地球一萬一千光年之外的兩顆行星相撞，還好離我們非常遙遠。

	Scientists say a big rock crashed into the Earth long ago. That crash made

	our moon! Maybe this new crash will make a new moon!

	科學家說，很久以前也有一顆大隕石墜毀在地球，月亮就是從那次撞擊形成的！所以這次新的撞擊，也可能有新月亮。

	Now a big new telescope can find many more crashes. Then scientists can learn

	more about moons and planets. This will help them find planets we can live

	on.

	現在，有一台新的大型望遠鏡，可以發現更多這樣的撞擊事件。科學家想更了解月球跟行星的資訊，尋找適合人類居住的星球。

	Space always has a surprise to show us!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	科學家發現，星光閃爍其實是太空岩石遮住了它的光。

	1. star 恆星。

	Look at that super bright star! 你看那顆特別亮的星星。

	Do you know what it is? 你知道那是什麼嗎?

	Mars, maybe…? 也許是火星?

	It couldn’t be Mars. Mars is red. 不會是火星，火星是紅色。

	2. planet 行星。

	Let me see what my app has to say. 讓我看看app怎麼說。

	It says Venus. 它說是金星。

	That’s right。說對了。

	That planet usually shows up in the west. 那顆行星通常在西方出現。

	3. space 太空。

	You’ve studied space? 你研究過太空?

	Only a little. I like space movies. 只有一點點。我喜歡太空電影。

	4. sun 太陽。

	So, Venus is not a star at all. 所以金星根本不是恆星。

	No. It looks bright because it reflects light from the sun.

	沒錯。它看起來亮，因為它反射太陽的光。

	今天的單字很有趣喔!

	star恆星 planet行星 space太空 sun太陽

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. What did the star's light do?

	a. Went off and on

	b. Stayed the same

	c. Went off

	2. What was made by a big crash?

	a. A new star

	b. A new moon

	c. Dust and rocks

	3. How far away were the two planets?

	a. Eleven thousand kilometers

	b. Eleven thousand light years

	c. Eleven thousand years

	Answers

	1. b

	2. c

	3. b

episodes.title: These Delivery Women Do More Than Deliver Narrator: Eh
episodes.transcript:
These Delivery Women Do More Than Deliver Narrator: Eh

	? There is someone at the door! Who is it?

	Delivery woman: How are you today, sir?

	Narrator: Ah! It is the delivery woman! She is smiling. She is wearing a uniform

	. And she is holding some very

	small drinks. Someone rang the doorbell! Opening the door, it was the delivery woman! She was smiling, wearing a uniform, and holding several small bottles of drinks.

	These women work for a beverage company in Japan. They have many customers. The women

	go to their customers' homes. They go once a week. Delivery woman: How are

	you feeling today? Narrator : Some customers have been buying the drinks for many years. Many of the customers are older. Some live alone. Some do not see many people. Some may have no other visitors ! The delivery women are kind and friendly. They talk with their customers. Delivery woman: How are you today, madam? How are you feeling today, sir? Customer: Very well, thank you! Narrator: One older customer says a kind "How are you today?" helps a lot. Delivery woman: Madam, how are you feeling today? Narrator: It makes her feel good all day! The beverage delivery ladies are very kind and friendly, and they chat with customers. One elderly lady said that a gentle greeting made her happy all day! The beverage company has 80,000 delivery women. They work in Japan, Brazil, Mexico , and many countries in Asia. They have worked in Taiwan for 60 years! These delivery women do more than just deliver drinks. They help their older customers feel less alone! ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ Vocabulary: The beverage delivery ladies also bring friendly greetings. 1. deliver: to deliver goods or drinks. Are you hungry? Want some snacks? I'm starving! Great, let's have some food delivered. But it's midnight! 2. delivery. Even delivery people need rest. Don't worry. Some of them work all night. 3. buy. Maybe we should just buy something at the convenience store. I don't want to go out. No, neither do I. 4. drink. So can I order now? Yeah, I'd like three drinks, two hamburgers and large fries. Wow! Today's words are very common. deliver, delivery, buy, drink

	1. Who do the delivery women work for?

	a. A drink company

	b. A food company

	c. The post office

	2. Who are many of the customers?

	a. Students

	b. Visitors

	c. Older people

	3. What else do the delivery women do?

	a. Talk with customers

	b. Buy drinks

	c. Deliver mail

	Answers

	1. a

	2. c

	3. a

episodes.title: A Summer of Sports in Taiwan for Kids
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	A Summer of Sports in Taiwan for Kids

	This year, Taiwan has a great summer of sports for kids!

	今年夏天，台灣會有很多很精彩的兒童運動活動喔！

	A big sports event is in Kaohsiung this month. It is the Kids Games. This is

	the fourth year of this event.

	這個月，高雄會舉辦一場大型運動比賽，叫做「小小英雄運動會 」。今年是這個活動舉辦的第四年！

	The Kids Games are for three to six-year-old kids.

	They can take part in 13 sports, such as martial arts, fencing, boxing, and

	tug-of-war! Tug-of-war is a new game this year.

	參加的選手都是三歲到六歲的小朋友。他們可以報名十三種不同的運動項目，像是武術、擊劍、拳擊跟今年新增的拔河！

	Another big sports event is in Hualien in August. It is the International

	Children’s Games. This is the 58th year of this event.

	除此之外，花蓮八月還有另一場大型活動，叫做「國際少年運動會」。今年是這個活動的第五十八屆！

	These Games are for 12- to 15-year-old kids. Kids from Taiwan and around the

	world are going to Hualien!

	這場運動會的選手是十二歲到十五歲的小朋友。來自世界各地的小朋友都會到花蓮共襄盛舉！

	The kids take part in one sport, such as swimming, soccer, taekwondo, or

	basketball!

	They will also learn about Hualien and Taiwan. And they will make new friends!

	參賽的小朋友可以選擇參加一種運動賽事，例如游泳、足球、跆拳道或籃球。他們在認識花蓮跟台灣的同時，還能交到新朋友！

	The 2026 Kids Games in Kaohsiung are on June 13th and 14th.

	The 2026 Hualien International Children’s Games are from August 1st to 6th.

	Go Taiwan! Go kids!

	________________________________________

	Vocabulary

	今年暑假有好幾項運動大會，給不同年齡的青少年參加。

	1. sports 運動。

	I’m thinking of sending my son to a sports summer camp. 我在考慮把我兒子送去運動夏令營。

	What kind of sports? 哪一種運動?

	Soccer and swimming. 足球和游泳。

	2. children 兒童。

	Nice combo.真不錯的綜合。One on land, and one in water! 一個在陸地，一個在水裡。

	I know, right? 可不是?

	And both are great for younger children. 並且兩者對幼兒都好。

	3. boxing 拳擊。

	Running and kicking will make their legs strong. 跑步和踢球會讓孩子的腿強健起來。

	Yeah, but I enjoyed boxing when I was a kid. 我小時候喜歡拳擊。

	You were a boxer?! 你當年是拳擊手?

	I was. 我是。

	4. take part in 參加。

	Did you take part in any boxing events? 有沒有參加過任何拳擊比賽?

	No. I’d like to keep my teeth. 沒有，我想保住牙齒。

	來一起讀單字。sports運動 children兒童 boxing拳擊 take part in參加

	________________________________________

	Quiz

	1. Where are the Kids Games?

	a. Hualien

	b. Taoyuan

	c. Kaohsiung

	2. When are the Hualien International Children’s Games?

	a. June

	b. July

	c. August

	3. At what event can kids take part in tug-of-war?

	a. The Olympics

	b. The Kids Games

	c. The International Children’s Games

	Answers

	1. c

	2. c

	3. b

	3. At what event can kids take part in tug-of-war?

	a. The Olympics

	b. The Kids Games

	c. The International Children’s Games

episodes.title: Sidewalk Art for Rainy Days
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Sidewalk Art for Rainy Days

	How does rain make you feel? Rain makes some people sad.

	下雨會讓你有什麼感覺？有些人在雨天心情低落。

	An artist in the U.S. lives in a rainy city. He wants art and rain to make

	people happier.

	美國一名藝術家住在一個多雨的城市。他希望藝術能讓大家開心一點。

	The artist made a new paint. He cuts out words or pictures on cardboard. Then

	he puts the cardboard on a sidewalk. He sprays his paint on the cut-out

	parts. He takes off the cardboard. But, nothing is on the sidewalk!

	他先在紙板上挖出他要的英文字或圖案，然後把紙板平放在人行道上。接著把他發明的新顏料噴在挖空的部分，再把紙板拿開。結果地上空空如也，看不到圖案。

	There is nothing because there is no rain. When it rains, you can see the

	art!

	原來因為地是乾的，所以什麼都看不到。等到下雨的時候，地上的畫就會出現！

	The artist's city asked him to make art. He makes art near bus stops. Waiting

	in the rain makes some people sad. But now they see art: beautiful waves, sea

	lions, and more! They feel happy!

	他的城市請他創作更多作品，於是他把很多圖案畫在公車站附近，大家雨天等車心情不好的時候，只要看到美麗的海浪或海獅，就高興一些。

	The paint goes away after a few months. That is okay. It does not hurt the

	earth. Artists can make new art!

	這種顏料幾個月後就會消失，也不傷害環境。藝術家還能再畫別的地面圖畫！

	Now many cities have art with this paint. New Taipei did last year! Zhongshan

	Art Park says rain there becomes "a playful part of the art."

	現在很多城市都有這種雨天藝術！連新北市去年也有，讓雨水參與藝術的創作。

	Sidewalk art for rainy days makes people happy!

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	藝術家常常有辦法讓人開心。

	1. art 藝術。

	Have you ever looked at a piece of art and felt happy? 你有沒有過看到藝術品，覺得很快樂?

	Well, some artworks really touched me. 有的藝術品會讓我很感動。

	2. beautiful 美麗的。

	For example? 比如說呢?

	“The Thinker” by Rodin. 羅丹的[沉思者]。

	I know that sculpture! 我知道那座雕刻!

	It’s beautiful but a bit sad.它很美，但是有點傷感。

	3. artist 藝術家。

	I saw an artist friend’s glass works a while ago. 我之前看到一個藝術家朋友的玻璃作品。

	They are all about the sea and the sky. 都是表現大海跟天空。

	4. put 放在。

	I brought one home and put it on my desk. 我帶了一個回家放在桌上。

	You like it a lot? 你很喜歡它?

	Yeah. I can lose myself in it. 對，我可以迷失在其中。

	What kind of art do you like?

	art藝術 beautiful美麗的 artist藝術 put放在

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. When can people see art made with this paint?

	a. When there is wind

	b. When they wear glasses

	c. When there is rain

	2. Where does this artist make art?

	a. Near bus stops

	b. In front of schools

	c. On buildings

	3. What does Zhongshan Art Park say rain becomes?

	a. "A helpful part of the art"

	b. "A playful part of the art"

	c. "A wonderful part of the art"

	Answers

	1. c

	2. a

	3. b

sections.story:
________________________________

	Sidewalk Art for Rainy Days

	How does rain make you feel? Rain makes some people sad.

	下雨會讓你有什麼感覺？有些人在雨天心情低落。

	An artist in the U.S. lives in a rainy city. He wants art and rain to make

	people happier.

	美國一名藝術家住在一個多雨的城市。他希望藝術能讓大家開心一點。

	The artist made a new paint. He cuts out words or pictures on cardboard. Then

	he puts the cardboard on a sidewalk. He sprays his paint on the cut-out

	parts. He takes off the cardboard. But, nothing is on the sidewalk!

	他先在紙板上挖出他要的英文字或圖案，然後把紙板平放在人行道上。接著把他發明的新顏料噴在挖空的部分，再把紙板拿開。結果地上空空如也，看不到圖案。

	There is nothing because there is no rain. When it rains, you can see the

	art!

	原來因為地是乾的，所以什麼都看不到。等到下雨的時候，地上的畫就會出現！

	The artist's city asked him to make art. He makes art near bus stops. Waiting

	in the rain makes some people sad. But now they see art: beautiful waves, sea

	lions, and more! They feel happy!

	他的城市請他創作更多作品，於是他把很多圖案畫在公車站附近，大家雨天等車心情不好的時候，只要看到美麗的海浪或海獅，就高興一些。

	The paint goes away after a few months. That is okay. It does not hurt the

	earth. Artists can make new art!

	這種顏料幾個月後就會消失，也不傷害環境。藝術家還能再畫別的地面圖畫！

	Now many cities have art with this paint. New Taipei did last year! Zhongshan

	Art Park says rain there becomes "a playful part of the art."

	現在很多城市都有這種雨天藝術！連新北市去年也有，讓雨水參與藝術的創作。

	Sidewalk art for rainy days makes people happy!

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
sections.vocabulary:
Vocabulary

	藝術家常常有辦法讓人開心。

	1. art 藝術。

	Have you ever looked at a piece of art and felt happy? 你有沒有過看到藝術品，覺得很快樂?

	Well, some artworks really touched me. 有的藝術品會讓我很感動。

	2. beautiful 美麗的。

	For example? 比如說呢?

	“The Thinker” by Rodin. 羅丹的[沉思者]。

	I know that sculpture! 我知道那座雕刻!

	It’s beautiful but a bit sad.它很美，但是有點傷感。

	3. artist 藝術家。

	I saw an artist friend’s glass works a while ago. 我之前看到一個藝術家朋友的玻璃作品。

	They are all about the sea and the sky. 都是表現大海跟天空。

	4. put 放在。

	I brought one home and put it on my desk. 我帶了一個回家放在桌上。

	You like it a lot? 你很喜歡它?

	Yeah. I can lose myself in it. 對，我可以迷失在其中。

	What kind of art do you like?

	art藝術 beautiful美麗的 artist藝術 put放在

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
sections.quiz:
Quiz

	1. When can people see art made with this paint?

	a. When there is wind

	b. When they wear glasses

	c. When there is rain

	2. Where does this artist make art?

	a. Near bus stops

	b. In front of schools

	c. On buildings

	3. What does Zhongshan Art Park say rain becomes?

	a. "A helpful part of the art"

	b. "A playful part of the art"

	c. "A wonderful part of the art"

episodes.title: Young Amis People Keep the Amis Ways Alive
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Young Amis People Keep the Amis Ways Alive

	In Hualien, there is a very old village. It's Taibalang Tribal Village.

	People of the Amis tribe live there.

	花蓮的太巴塱（ㄌㄤˇ）部落中住著許多阿美族人。

	The village is next to two rivers. They are full of crabs!

	部落旁有兩條河，河中很多螃蟹。

	In the Amis language, "Taibalang" means "crab." The village was named for the

	crabs in the rivers.

	在阿美族語中，太巴塱就是螃蟹的意思。這就是太巴塱部落名字的起源。

	Taibalang has many old wood carvings. These are pictures cut into wood. There

	are many carvings of crabs!

	太巴塱有很多古老的木雕，而且螃蟹圖案的木雕特別多！

	There are also carvings of other animals and people. The people are hunting,

	fishing, and dancing! The carvings show the ways of the Amis people.

	木雕上除了會出現各種動物之外，也會有阿美族人豐富的日常生活！

	Many young people leave the village to work. But every summer, they come

	back. They help the village get ready for a big festival!

	離開部落工作的年輕人會在夏天回來，一起幫忙舉辦祭典。

	Elders teach young people how to help. Everyone has a job to do. They do

	things the Amis way. Helping the village keeps the ways of the Amis people

	alive.

	部落的長輩負責傳授經驗。這樣子，來幫忙的年輕人才能將阿美族的傳統延續下去。

	If you go to Hualien, go to Taibalang Tribal Village. Learn about the ways of

	the Amis people!

	________________________________________

	Vocabulary

	阿美族太巴塱部落，很希望維繫他們的傳統。

	1. way 方式。

	Living in an old village by the river…. 住在河邊的古老村落裡...

	Isn’t that a nice way of living? 那不是很好的生活方式?

	2. hunt 打獵。

	I don’t know about that. 這我不知道。

	People there hunt rabbits and catch crabs? 那裏的人獵殺兔子，吃螃蟹?

	Why not? 為什麼不可以?

	3. young 年輕的。

	And older people can teach the young how to do things. 年紀大的可以教導年輕人做事情。

	What kinds of things? 做怎樣的事?

	4. wood 木頭。

	Like…how to make a boat with wood. 比如說怎麼樣用木頭來造船。

	So where’s this village of yours? 所以你這個村落在哪裡?

	I have yet to find it. 我還在找。

	Let’s go visit Taibalang Tribe together!

	來讀今天的單字。

	way方式 hunt打獵 young年輕的 wood木頭

	________________________________________

	Quiz

	1. What does "Taibalang" mean in Amis language?

	a. Carving

	b. Crab

	c. River

	2. Where is Taibalang Tribal Village?

	a. Yilan

	b. Yunlin

	c. Hualien

	3. What are "wood carvings"?

	a. Birds in trees

	b. People who build buildings

	c. Pictures cut into wood

	Answers

	1. b

	2. c

	3. c

episodes.title: Pingtung’s Park of Playgrounds
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Pingtung’s Park of Playgrounds

	It has sand and stairs. It has metal bars and puzzles. Happy kids are running

	around. Some are swinging up in the air! What is this place? It is a

	playground!

	公園裡有沙坑，有攀爬架跟益智遊戲！小朋友跑來跑去，有的盪鞦韆盪得好高。

	In Pingtung, Balu Park has opened. It is more than fifty thousand square

	meters. It cost almost one hundred twenty million Taiwan dollars!

	這是屏東最新開的巴轆公園，面積一萬五千坪，建造經費一億兩千萬台幣。

	The park has fun playgrounds! In one, kids can climb on a jungle gym. It has

	three big slides. Kids and adults can slide on them!

	公園裡有很多好玩的遊樂設施！其中一區有給小朋友玩的大型攀爬架，還有三個大人小孩都能溜的特大溜滑梯！

	The park has swings, a very big sandbox, and a roller-skating rink! It has a

	fitness area, walking paths, and a pond. Wow! There are so many things there!

	除了鞦韆、超大沙坑跟直排輪場，健身區、步道跟池塘也都一應俱全。

	People of all ages can enjoy Balu Park. Bring your mom and dad. Bring your

	grandma and grandpa! It is a good place for people with disabilities too.

	不管幾歲的人都可以去巴轆公園玩得很開心。你可以帶爸爸媽媽，阿公阿嬤一起去，這裡對身心障礙者也很友善！

	This park was a factory before. Now it is a healthy place. You can play,

	exercise, or go for a relaxing walk.

	巴轆公園的地點曾經是工廠，現在變成了健康快樂的公園。快來玩耍、運動，或散步吧！

	So, get out of your house! Move your body! Enjoy some sunshine. Have fun at

	Balu Park!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	屏東這個新的遊樂場，是孩童的快樂園地。

	1. swing 鞦韆。

	I can’t resist the swing. 我抵抗不了鞦韆的誘惑。

	Is it really that fun? 真有那麼好玩?

	Very much so! 非常好玩!

	Once you start swinging, it feels like being a kid again. 你開始盪鞦韆就覺得回到了童年

	。

	2. slide 滑梯。

	All your worries are gone. 無憂無慮。

	You just want to go higher. 只想盪得更高。

	I prefer the slide. 我比較喜歡溜滑梯。

	Going down a slide feels so good! 往下溜好痛快!

	3. kid 兒童。

	Come to think of it, I didn’t play enough as a kid. 回想起來我小時候玩得不夠。

	4. playground 遊樂場。

	Well, we can hang out at a playground every weekend. 我們可以每個周末都去遊樂場玩。

	To make up for lost time? 彌補失去的時光嗎?

	Yeah. 對。

	Are you having fun?

	來讀單字。

	swing鞦韆 slide滑梯 kid兒童 playground遊樂場

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. Who can slide on the slides?

	a. Kids can, but adults cannot

	b. Adults can, but kids cannot

	c. Kids and adults can

	2. What can kids climb on?

	a. A jungle gym

	b. A pond

	c. A sandbox

	3. What was the park before?

	a. A factory

	b. A farm

	c. A playground

	Answers

	1. c

	2. a

	3. a

episodes.title: The Dolphin of Venice
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	The Dolphin of Venice

	Last summer, a young dolphin came to Venice, Italy. It is a bottlenose

	dolphin. Its nose looks like a bottle!

	去年夏天，一隻年輕的海豚來到了義大利的威尼斯。牠的鼻子跟嘴巴長長的，看起來就像瓶子，所以也叫做「瓶鼻海豚」。

	Most dolphins swim in groups. But this one swims alone. That is okay. Some

	dolphins do this.

	大部分的海豚都會成群結隊的游泳，但這隻海豚沒有跟大家一起！但別擔心，有些海豚本來就喜歡單獨活動。

	The dolphin swims near a famous place in Venice. Many people from around the

	world go there.

	Venice is a city on water. It has many boats. Sometimes the dolphin swims

	near the boats.

	這隻海豚經常在威尼斯的著名景點附近游泳。威尼斯是一座有很多船的水上城市，有時候海豚也會游到船旁邊。

	The dolphin is famous too. It jumps! It flips in the air! How wonderful!

	People love to watch it!

	這隻海豚很有名！大家都很喜歡看牠跳出水面，在空中表演翻轉！

	Scientists watch the dolphin every week. They want to know if it is safe.

	They say it looks healthy. It catches fish to eat.

	科學家每個星期都會觀察這隻海豚，確認牠是否安全。他們說這隻海豚看起來很健康，也會自己抓魚來吃！

	But the scientists are worried. Some boats get close to the dolphin.

	People on the boats feed it. Some try to touch it. Some try to play with it.

	Some boats go too fast near it. All of these can hurt the dolphin.

	但是科學家們很擔心！船離海豚太近了，船上的乘客會餵海豚吃東西，或是摸牠、跟牠玩耍，還有一些船隻在海豚附近開得很快。這些都可能傷害到海豚！

	The dolphin is wonderful to watch. People must be kind to it. They must not

	get close. Then the dolphin can stay safe.

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	一隻在威尼斯迷途的海豚，吸引了許多注意。

	1. jump 跳。

	Dolphins are so cute! 海豚真可愛! I really want to see them jumping in the ocean!

	好想看牠們在海裡跳!

	That’s easy! 那很簡單! There are dolphin and whale watching boats for that.

	有賞鯨豚船可以搭。

	2. feed 餵食。

	I know! In Yilan, right? 我知道，在宜蘭對不對?

	Yep! And if you’re lucky, 對，而且你幸運的話，the dolphins might swim so close that you

	could almost feed them. 海豚會游得很近，近到你幾乎可以餵牠們。

	3. wonderful 美妙的。

	Really?! That would be wonderful! 真的?那不是太棒了?

	No, I’m kidding. 不，我在開玩笑。We should never get so close to those animals.

	我們不該那麼靠近那些動物。

	4. hurt 傷害。

	The boat could hurt them. 船隻可能會傷害牠們。

	你有在海上見過海豚嗎? jump跳 feed餵食 wonderful美妙的 hurt傷害

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. What does the dolphin eat?

	a. Bottles

	b. Pasta

	c. Fish

	2. How does this dolphin swim?

	a. Alone

	b. With people

	c. In a dolphin group

	3. Why are scientists worried?

	a. The dolphin looks healthy.

	b. Boats go too fast near the dolphin.

	c. The water is too dirty.

	Answers

	1. c

	2. a

	3. b
