	Scientists watch the dolphin every week. They want to know if it is safe.

	They say it looks healthy. It catches fish to eat.

	科學家每個星期都會觀察這隻海豚，確認牠是否安全。他們說這隻海豚看起來很健康，也會自己抓魚來吃！

	But the scientists are worried. Some boats get close to the dolphin.

	People on the boats feed it. Some try to touch it. Some try to play with it.

	Some boats go too fast near it. All of these can hurt the dolphin.

	但是科學家們很擔心！船離海豚太近了，船上的乘客會餵海豚吃東西，或是摸牠、跟牠玩耍，還有一些船隻在海豚附近開得很快。這些都可能傷害到海豚！

	The dolphin is wonderful to watch. People must be kind to it. They must not

	get close. Then the dolphin can stay safe.

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
sections.vocabulary:
Vocabulary

	一隻在威尼斯迷途的海豚，吸引了許多注意。

	1. jump 跳。

	Dolphins are so cute! 海豚真可愛! I really want to see them jumping in the ocean!

	好想看牠們在海裡跳!

	That’s easy! 那很簡單! There are dolphin and whale watching boats for that.

	有賞鯨豚船可以搭。

	2. feed 餵食。

	I know! In Yilan, right? 我知道，在宜蘭對不對?

	Yep! And if you’re lucky, 對，而且你幸運的話，the dolphins might swim so close that you

	could almost feed them. 海豚會游得很近，近到你幾乎可以餵牠們。

	3. wonderful 美妙的。

	Really?! That would be wonderful! 真的?那不是太棒了?

	No, I’m kidding. 不，我在開玩笑。We should never get so close to those animals.

	我們不該那麼靠近那些動物。

	4. hurt 傷害。

	The boat could hurt them. 船隻可能會傷害牠們。

	你有在海上見過海豚嗎? jump跳 feed餵食 wonderful美妙的 hurt傷害

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
sections.quiz:
Quiz

	1. What does the dolphin eat?

	a. Bottles

	b. Pasta

	c. Fish

	2. How does this dolphin swim?

	a. Alone

	b. With people

	c. In a dolphin group

	3. Why are scientists worried?

	a. The dolphin looks healthy.

	b. Boats go too fast near the dolphin.

	c. The water is too dirty.

episodes.title: The Lion-Dancing Police
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	The Lion-Dancing Police

	In Thailand, a man took some things from a house. It was not his house. And

	those things cost a lot of money! They cost almost two million Taiwan

	dollars!

	泰國一名男子從別人家裡偷走了東西，那些東西價值將近兩百萬台幣！

	The police looked for the man. They looked everywhere. But they did not find

	him.

	警察努力追緝這名竊賊 ，然而到處都找過了，卻沒有找到他。

	The man lived near a temple. It was having a big festival. Maybe he would go.

	這名男子住在一間寺廟附近。那間寺廟正在舉辦大型慶典，警方認為他可能參加。

	Some people danced in lion costumes at the festival. The police wanted to

	dance in a lion costume too! Then the man would not see them.

	慶典中有舞獅這個項目。警察打算也去舞獅，這樣男子就不會發現他們。

	Two police officers put on a big lion costume. They danced and danced. They

	looked like the other lion dancers!

	兩名警察穿上舞獅的服裝，溜進舞獅團隊，看起來和其他的表演者一模一樣！

	Then the man came to the festival! The police saw him. They danced closer and

	closer to him. Then they jumped out of the lion costume. The man was

	surprised. They caught him!

	結果那名男子真的來到慶典！警察發現他之後，一邊舞獅一邊慢慢靠近。接著，警察突然脫掉戲服， 讓這個竊賊大吃一驚！警察立刻將他逮捕。

	The police were very smart. They wore a lion costume. They danced to catch

	the man. That was like a movie!

	這些聰明的警察的行動，簡直像電影！

	Everyone at the festival was surprised! It was the coolest police catch!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	泰國警察為了抓到竊賊，想出了好辦法。

	1. festival 節慶。

	Would you like to make some extra money? 你想不想賺一點外快?

	Okay, what’s the job? 好啊，是做什麼?

	There’s a festival this weekend. 這周末有個慶典。

	2. dance 跳舞。

	Mazu is coming out of her temple to go around the city. 媽祖要從廟裡出來繞境。

	They need one more person to dance in front of her palanquin.

	他們需要多一個人在她的神轎前面跳舞。

	3. costume 戲服。

	You do remember I’m not a good dancer, right? 你記得我不大會跳舞吧?

	No worries. You’ll be wearing a costume and a mask. 不擔心，你會穿著戲服，戴著面具。

	4. dollar 元。

	Oh, so I won’t have to embarrass myself? 所以我不會丟臉?

	Exactly. And you’ll earn $1,000 Taiwan dollars! 是，而且還可以賺一千元!

	今天你學到了四個單字。

	festival節慶 dance跳舞 costume戲服 dollar元

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. Where did the man take things from?

	a. A house

	b. His house

	c. A temple

	2. Where did the police wear a lion costume?

	a. A festival

	b. A park

	c. A school

	3. Why did the police wear the lion costume?

	a. To dance a lot

	b. To catch the man

	c. To surprise everyone

	Answers

	1. a

	2. a

	3. b

episodes.title: Boy Swims to Save Family
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Boy Swims to Save Family

	A thirteen-year-old boy, his mom, and his younger brother and sister went to

	the beach. They had fun! They paddled a small boat. They rode two

	paddleboards.

	一個十三歲的男孩和他的媽媽跟弟弟妹妹去海邊玩。他們一起划小船，玩立式划槳，非常開心！

	But the wind pushed the family too far from the beach! They needed help!

	但是，強風把這一家人吹得離海岸越來越遠。他們需要幫助！

	The boy took the boat to get help. But it was broken! He lost his paddle. He

	fell into the water.

	小男孩划著小船想去求救，但船身受損，他的船槳也不見了，他還不幸落水。

	The boy held on to the broken boat. Then he saw something swim under him… Oh

	no! He let go of the boat. He had to get to the beach. He swam four

	kilometers!

	男孩緊抓著壞掉的小船，突然看見水中有東西游來游去。他嚇了一大跳，立刻放開小船努力往海岸游。他總共游了四公里！

	The boy got to the beach. He ran to his mom’s bag. He found her phone. He

	called for help! He was very tired. He passed out…

	男孩終於抵達海灘後，跑去找媽媽的包包，用手機打電話求救。但是他太累了，在成功求救後馬上就昏倒在沙灘上。

	The boy woke up in a hospital. He was very worried. Then he got a phone call.

	After 10 hours in the ocean, his family was safe! A rescue boat found them…

	14 kilometers from the beach!

	男孩在醫院醒來後，非常擔心他的家人。這時，電話響了！他的家人在海上漂流十個小時後，終於在離海灘十四公里遠的地方被救援船找到了。

	Everyone jumped for joy! The boy's long, hard swim saved his family! He was a

	hero!

	________________________________________

	Vocabulary

	這個十三歲的男孩運氣真糟糕，但是他竭盡全力，終於救了家人。

	1. boat 船。

	The ocean looks beautiful today. 今天大海看起來真美!

	Let’s rent a boat! 我們租一艘船吧!

	Okay, but you paddle. 可以，但是由你來划船。

	2. rescue 拯救。

	Sure. The wind is perfect, and the water is so calm. 當然，風力剛剛好，水面又這麼平靜。

	That’s often what people say before needing rescue. 人們需要救難之前都這麼講。

	3. paddle 槳。

	Oh no! My paddle fell into the water! 糟了，我的槳掉進水裡了!

	My God! How could this happen?! 天哪，怎麼會發生這種事!

	4. phone 電話。

	Hurry, call for help! 趕快求救!

	But I don’t have my phone with me! 可是我沒帶電話!

	We are doomed! 我們完蛋了!

	還記得我們剛剛講的單字嗎?

	boat船 rescue拯救 paddle槳 phone電話

	________________________________________

	Quiz

	1. What pushed the boy and his family too far from the beach?

	a. His mom

	b. A rescue boat

	c. The wind

	2. What did the boy hold on to?

	a. His family

	b. His mom’s bag

	c. The broken boat

	3. Where did the boy wake up?

	a. On the beach

	b. In the ocean

	c. In a hospital

	Answers

	1. c

	2. c

	3. c

episodes.title: You Can Fly on a Cute Plane
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	You Can Fly on a Cute Plane

	Many kids like cute characters. Some grownups like them too. Some characters

	are in comic books or video games. Some are on trading cards and stickers.

	Many are toys too.

	很多大人跟小朋友都喜歡可愛的角色。漫畫書或電玩裡的可愛角色會被印在卡片跟貼紙上，也會被做成玩具！

	Taiwanese airlines know people like these characters. One airline painted a

	Japanese cat character on seven planes! They painted her friends too. These

	planes are cute!

	因為台灣的航空公司知道大家喜歡這些角色，其中一間公司就把一隻來自日本貓咪的角色跟她的朋友們畫在七架飛機上。這些彩繪過的飛機超級可愛！

	Another Taiwanese airline painted little monster characters on two planes.

	The first plane has been flying for four years. It is cute!

	另一家台灣航空公司則把小怪獸角色畫在兩架飛機上。第一架飛機已經飛了四年，很受大家歡迎。

	This year's plane is cute too. The airline painted thirteen monster

	characters on it. One is yellow. It has round black eyes. It has red cheeks.

	It is holding balloons. Do you know its name?

	今年新的彩繪飛機也很可愛！飛機上畫了十三個怪獸角色，其中一個是黃色的，有圓圓的黑眼睛、紅紅的臉頰，手上還拿著氣球。你知道牠叫什麼名字嗎？

	Thirty-three people painted this plane! It was a big job!

	彩繪飛機是個大工程，總共有三十三個人一起幫這架飛機上色！

	In the plane, the characters are on kids' meal boxes. How fun! They are on

	paper cups, napkins, and other things. You can buy a pen with them on it too!

	除了在機身外，這些可愛角色也會在紙杯、餐巾紙、跟兒童餐的包裝上。你還可以買印有這些角色的筆喔！

	This plane flies to Japan, the U.S., Australia, and New Zealand! Have you

	seen these planes? Do you want to fly on them?

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	航空公司喜歡用動漫人物來裝飾自家的飛機，讓乘客開心。

	1. comic book 漫畫書。

	Come and look at that plane! 快來看那一架飛機!

	It looks like it’s from a comic book! 好像漫畫書裡出來的!

	Yeah, it has cartoon characters all over it! 對，上面都是卡通人物。

	2. airline 航空公司。

	I wonder what airline it is. 我想知道它是哪一家航空公司。

	I can’t read the words on the side. 機身上的字都看不清。

	3. grownup 成年人。

	Forget the words. 別管那些字了。

	I’m looking for my favorite character. 我在找我最喜歡的人物。

	Aren’t we supposed to be grownups? 我們不是成年人嗎?

	Why are we so excited? 為什麼這麼興奮?

	4. another 另一個。

	Because we’re all kids inside. 因為我們內心都是小孩!

	Now here comes another plane! 又來了另外一架飛機!

	你喜歡看漫畫嗎?

	comic book漫畫書 airline航空公司 grownup成年人 another另一個

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. What is painted on seven planes?

	a. A video game

	b. A Japanese cat

	c. A trading card

	2. How many monster characters are on this year's plane?

	a. 13

	b. 23

	c. 33

	3. What can you buy in this year's plane?

	a. A paper cup

	b. A pen

	c. A balloon

	Answers

	1. b

	2. a

	3. b

	Come and look at that plane! 快來看那一架飛機!

	It looks like it’s from a comic book! 好像漫畫書裡出來的!

	Yeah, it has cartoon characters all over it! 對，上面都是卡通人物。

	2. airline 航空公司。

	I wonder what airline it is. 我想知道它是哪一家航空公司。

	I can’t read the words on the side. 機身上的字都看不清。

	3. grownup 成年人。

	Forget the words. 別管那些字了。

	I’m looking for my favorite character. 我在找我最喜歡的人物。

	Aren’t we supposed to be grownups? 我們不是成年人嗎?

	Why are we so excited? 為什麼這麼興奮?

	4. another 另一個。

	Because we’re all kids inside. 因為我們內心都是小孩!

	Now here comes another plane! 又來了另外一架飛機!

	你喜歡看漫畫嗎?

	comic book漫畫書 airline航空公司 grownup成年人 another另一個

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
sections.quiz:
Quiz

	1. What is painted on seven planes?

	a. A video game

	b. A Japanese cat

	c. A trading card

	2. How many monster characters are on this year's plane?

	a. 13

	b. 23

	c. 33

	3. What can you buy in this year's plane?

	a. A paper cup

	b. A pen

	c. A balloon

episodes.title: Fire at a Geopark
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Fire at a Geopark

	Parks are great places to learn about nature. Taiwan has many interesting

	parks.

	公園很適合學習有關大自然的一切，台灣有很多有趣的公園。

	In some of these parks, the land is very interesting. A few of these parks

	are called geoparks. Some have cool rocks. Some have volcanoes. In Pingtung,

	one has fire!

	有些公園的地形很特別，因此被叫做地質公園。有的地質公園有很酷的岩石，有的有火山。屏東有一個地質公園裡有火！

	At Hengchun Chuhuo Geopark, you can see little fires! They are gas fires. But

	there are no gas pipes. The gas comes out of the ground. Then it catches on

	fire!

	恆春的出火公園可以看到小小的天然瓦斯火焰！瓦斯從地下溢出來，就開始燃燒！

	The fires are inside a big circle. The fire circle is in a bigger circle of

	water. At night, the fires look like they are in the water! And water looks

	like it is in the fires! Wow!

	這些火圍在一個大圓圈裡，外面還有一圈水。到了夜晚看起來像火在水中，水裡有火，很特別!

	The geopark has more. It has places to look at the stars. It has forests and

	walking paths. It has art in the visitor center too!

	這個地質公園有地方可以看星星，有森林跟步道，遊客中心裡也有藝術品。

	The geopark has been there for a long time. But now it is much better. The

	paths are safer. They keep you and the land safe. But be careful! Follow the

	rules!

	這個地質公園已經有悠久歷史，不過現在公園的步道更進步，可以保護遊客跟土地。大家遊玩的時候，還是要遵守規定！

	Go and learn more about nature at Hengchun Chuhuo Geopark!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	屏東的出火地質公園有很多好看的東西。

	1. a few 一些。

	When was the last time you went to Yehliu Geopark? 你上次什麼時候去野柳地質公園?

	Hmm…a few years ago. 幾年前吧。

	2. path 步道。

	Want to see the Queen’s head again? 想再去看女王頭嗎?

	Sure. She’s not going to be there forever. 當然，她不會永遠在那裏。

	And we can walk the path leading to the lighthouse. 我們還可以走步道去燈塔。

	3. rock 石頭。

	That lighthouse is always closed. 那座燈塔都關著。True, but the view from there is

	amazing! 沒錯，不過那裏的景觀超棒!

	I thought you wanted to look at the rocks. 我以為你想去看石頭。

	4. interesting 有趣的。

	I do. But the ocean, the birds and the seafood are interesting too!

	沒錯，但是大海，鳥兒跟海鮮也很有趣。

	Ah, seafood. I knew it! 海鮮，我就知道!

	今天你學到哪些單字? a few一些 path步道 rock石頭 interesting有趣的

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. Where is this geopark?

	a. Pingtung

	b. Taitung

	c. Hualien

	2. What kind of fires does this geopark have?

	a. Forest fires

	b. Volcano fires

	c. Gas fires

	3. What is safer in this geopark now?

	a. Art

	b. Paths

	c. Stars

	Answers

	1. a

	2. c

	3. b

episodes.title: Gold for Water Pipes
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Gold for Water Pipes

	Someone in Japan gave gold to a city! No one knows who the person is. The

	gold was a big surprise. The person gave 21 kilograms of gold!

	有人送了日本一座城市二十一公斤的黃金！贈送的人隱姓埋名，黃金是意外的驚喜。

	The city will sell the gold. It can get about 113 million Taiwan dollars!

	市政府要把黃金賣掉，可以得到大約一億一千三百萬台幣！

	This person wants the city to fix its water pipes. Water pipes bring water to

	homes. The pipes are underground. Fixing them costs a lot of money.

	送禮的人希望市政府可以修理自來水管。修這些地下水管要花很多錢。

	The city has many old water pipes. Every year, some break. Water comes out.

	Sometimes it makes big holes in the ground! The holes are dangerous. Cars and

	people can fall in!

	這座城市有很多老舊水管，每年都有水管破掉，水流了滿地。有時候路上還會出現大洞，行人跟車輛可能掉進去。

	The city's water is clean. But old pipes make it smell. Eew! It smells like

	swimming pool water. It smells stronger in the summer. Ugh! Some people do

	not want to drink it.

	這座城市的水很乾淨，但是老水管會讓水不好聞。夏天的時候更明顯，讓人不想喝。

	The money from the gold will fix two kilometers of pipes. That is great! But

	the city has 260 kilometers of old pipes to fix.

	賣黃金的錢可以修理兩公里的水管，但是這座城市總共有二百六十公里的老舊水管。

	It is important for us to care about our water. How is your city's water?

	________________________________

	Vocabulary

	日本這座城市獲得黃金贈禮，但是必須用來修水管。

	1. fix 修理。

	What? No water? 什麼啊，沒水?

	You’ve got to be kidding! 開什麼玩笑!

	Uh-oh. I’ll call the water company. 我來打電話給自來水公司。

	So? What happened? 結果呢? 發生了什麼事?

	An underground water pipe is broken. 一根地下管線破了。

	They’re fixing it now. 他們正在修。

	2. swim 游泳。

	Great… and what do we do without water? 很好，那我們沒水怎麼辦?

	Let’s go swimming! 我們去游泳吧!

	There’s a pool just two Metro stations away. 捷運坐兩站就有游泳池。

	3. cost 花費。

	That’s brilliant! 真聰明!

	Then we can take a shower there! 然後可以在那裏洗澡!

	And it only costs 100 NT. 只要一百塊。

	4. drink 喝。

	And we can buy some drinking water on our way back. 回家路上還可以買喝的水。

	來跟我讀今天的單字。

	fix修理 swim游泳 cost花費 drink喝

	________________________________

	Quiz

	1. What did the person give to a city?

	a. Water

	b. Coins

	c. Gold

	2. Why do the pipes need to be fixed?

	a. They are big.

	b. They are old.

	c. They are small.

	3. What does the city's water smell like?

	a. Swimming pool water

	b. Big holes

	c. The ground

	Answers

	1. c

	2. b

	3. a

episodes.title: A Temple Goes on a Ride
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	A Temple Goes on a Ride

	Taiwan has all kinds of temples. It has big temples and small temples. It has

	old temples. It has temples in cities. It has temples in the mountains. And

	there, they stay.

	台灣有各式各樣的寺廟。寺廟有大有小，有新有舊，有在市區的也有在山林間的。

	But sometimes, a temple is made in one place. But it will be in another place.

	有時候，寺廟會在某個地方建好，再搬到另一個地方。

	Pingtung has a big temple factory. Its workers build beautiful temples. Big

	machines lift the roofs and other temple parts and put them on trucks.

	屏東有一間很大的寺廟工廠。工人在那裡建漂亮的寺廟，用吊車把寺廟的結構零件放到卡車上。

	One day, people saw a big truck. Something big and beautiful was on it. Was

	it a castle? No, it was a temple roof! The roof was tall and wide.

	有一天人們看到卡車上面載著富麗堂皇的東西，原來那是個寺廟的屋頂！

	The truck drove very slowly. It drove on two lanes. A car drove behind the

	truck. A yellow light on the car roof flashed and flashed. The driver watched

	everything. He made sure everything was safe.

	這台卡車占用兩個車道，開得非常緩慢。卡車後面還有一輛汽車跟著，車頂上的黃燈不停地閃爍。汽車司機負責注意周遭環境，確保一切安全。

	The truck took the roof to Hsinchu. It took two days! More temple parts came.

	Workers put the temple together there.

	卡車總共花了兩天時間，才把寺廟屋頂運送到新竹！在寺廟的其他零件也送到之後，工人就在新竹把寺廟組裝起來！

	Most temples stay in one place. But this temple went on a long, slow truck

	ride!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	新竹這座廟宇，是先在屏東製造它的各個部分，再運到當地蓋起來。

	1) build 建造。

	Would you help me build my doll house this weekend? 你這周末能不能幫我做娃娃屋?

	Again? You’re still not done with it? 又要嗎?你還沒有做好?

	2) make sure 確定。

	No, I want to make sure everything is perfect. 沒有，我要確定一切都很完美!

	But you started building it last year! 但是你從去年就開始做了!

	3) slowly 緩慢地。

	Yeah, I’m doing it very slowly. 對，我很慢很慢的做。

	Your dolls will be old by the time the house is finished! 等你的娃娃屋完成，你的娃娃都老了!

	4) put together 組裝。

	Ha ha, very funny! 很好笑! Luckily, my dolls never grow old. 還好我的娃娃會永保青春。

	Alright, I’ll go and put the parts together on Sunday. 好吧，我星期天去把零件拼好。

	Let’s read the words.

	build 建造 make sure 確定 slowly 緩慢地 put together 組裝

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. How many lanes did the truck drive on?

	a. One lane

	b. Two lanes

	c. Three lanes

	2. What was behind the truck?

	a. A police car with blue lights

	b. A castle with beautiful lights

	c. A car with a yellow light

	3. Where did the truck take the roof?

	a. Tainan

	b. Hsinchu

	c. Pingtung

	Answers

	1. b

	2. c

	3. b

episodes.title: A School for Learning How to Do Dream Jobs
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	A School for Learning How to Do Dream Jobs

	Do you like anime or comics? How about games or esports? Lots of teens like

	them very much. Some dream of jobs in anime, comics, games, or esports! But…

	where can they learn how to do these dream jobs?

	你喜歡動畫或漫畫，電腦遊戲或是競賽嗎？很多青少年喜愛這些東西，也希望做跟它們有關聯的工作！但是，要去哪裡學相關的技能呢？

	They can learn at New Taipei City's ACGE school. What does ACGE stand for?

	"A" is for anime. "C" is for comics. "G" is for games. And "E" is for...

	esports!

	他們可以去新北市的 ACGE 學院！ACGE 代表什麼？A 是動畫（anime），C 是漫畫（comics），G 是遊戲（games），E

	則是競賽電玩（esports）。

	New Taipei City has taught more than five thousand people how to do jobs in

	ACGE. But companies need many more workers!

	這所學校收過五千多個學生，教他們如何做 ACGE 領域的工作，但還是不夠。這些產業需要更多人才!

	The school teaches people who are fifteen or older. Students learn how to

	make characters and stories for anime or comics. They learn how to build

	computers, work with AI, and much more!

	新北ACGE產業學院歡迎十五歲以上的學生，學習怎麼設計動畫裡的角色跟故事，也學組裝電腦、使用 AI，以及很多其他技能！

	Students also meet people with interesting jobs in ACGE. They meet voice

	actors and cosplayers. They meet esports casters, coaches, and referees!

	學生還有機會遇見這些行業的工作人員，像是配音員、角色扮演者，電競主播、教練跟裁判！

	Do you know someone who wants a job in anime, comics, games, or esports? Tell

	them they can learn how to do their dream job!

	________________________________________

	Vocabulary

	你想要從事動漫或是電玩相關的工作嗎? 現在有學校可以教你喔.

	1. dream job 夢想的工作。

	Do you know what my dream job is? 你知道我的夢想工作是什麼嗎?

	Let’s see… A zookeeper? 我想想看...動物園管理員

	Wow, how did you know that!? 哇，你怎麼知道?

	Easy, you love animals! 很簡單，你喜歡動物。

	2. referee 裁判。

	I do, but not all animals. 是沒錯，不過不是所有的動物。

	What about you? 你呢?

	Me? Maybe a soccer referee for the World Cup. 我? 世界盃足球賽的裁判吧。

	3. learn 學習。

	That’s cool! 很酷喔!

	But you need to learn all the rules. 不過你得學會所有的規則。

	4. meet 見面。

	That’s no problem. 那沒問題。

	And I’ll get to meet those handsome players! 我也會碰到那些帥帥的球員!

	來一起讀單字。

	dream job夢想的工作 referee裁判 learn學習 meet會面

	________________________________________

	Quiz

	1. What does "ACGE" stand for?

	a. Anime, cars, games, and esports

	b. Anime, comics, games and emails

	c. Anime, comics, games, and esports

	2. Where is the school?

	a. Taipei

	b. New Taipei

	c. In companies

	3. Who does the school teach?

	a. People who are fifteen or older

	b. People with interesting jobs

	c. AI

	Answers

	1. c

	2. b

	3. a

episodes.title: Dog Finds Little Boy for Police
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Dog Finds Little Boy for Police

	A family could not find their little boy. No one could find him. Everyone was

	worried. The boy was three years old.

	有一家人的小孩不見了！大家都找不到他，小孩才三歲，讓人非常擔心。

	The police tried hard to find the boy. They sent a drone up to the sky! It

	did not find him. They flew a helicopter! They did not see him. They walked

	near the boy's home. They did not find him.

	警察努力尋找這個小男孩，還出動空拍機跟直升機，但是都沒有看到他的蹤影。他們在這個小朋友家附近搜索，仍然一無所獲。

	Then a policeman saw a dog. It barked at him. The policeman thought it wanted

	to tell him something. He thought the dog was telling him to hurry and come

	with it. So he went with the dog.

	突然，警察看到一隻狗對他叫個不停。他覺得狗狗在叫他快點跟著牠走！於是，他就跟在這隻狗後面。

	The dog took the policeman to a house. It went to the back of the house. So

	the policeman did too. The dog barked at a car there.

	狗狗帶著警察來到一棟房子的後面，然後對著一輛汽車狂吠。

	The dog found the boy! He was in the car! He could not get out. The policeman

	helped him. Everyone was happy!

	原來小男孩就在車子裡，他沒辦法打開車門鎖，所以出不來。警察把他救出來後，大家都很開心！

	No one knows anything about the dog. No one knows its name. No one knows who

	its owner is.

	沒人認識那條狗，也不知道牠是誰的。

	But we do know one thing. It's a good dog!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	聰明狗兒幫助警察找到了失蹤的小孩。

	1) walk 走路。

	Look what I found! 你看我找到的。

	My Gosh, Jane, where did you find it? 天哪，你在哪裡找到的?

	I was walking back from 7-11, 我從Seven走回來，

	and this kitten just followed me! 這隻小貓就跟著我。

	2) take 帶。

	Don't let it come in yet. 不要讓牠進來。

	Take it to the vet first. 先帶牠去看獸醫。

	He can check if it has a chip. 獸醫會檢查牠有沒有晶片。

	3) owner 主人。

	You think this little thing has an owner? 你覺得這個小東西有主人?

	It's possible. 有可能。

	What if it doesn't have a chip? 要是牠沒有晶片呢?

	Then you can give it to the police. 那你可以把牠交給警察。

	4) police 警察。

	Police!? It's a kitten, not a criminal! 警察!? 牠是一隻小貓，不是罪犯!

	If you let it in, it'll steal all your milk!

	如果你讓牠進來，牠會偷走你所有的牛奶!

	Are you a cat or dog owner?

	walk走路 take帶 owner主人 police警察

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. How old was the boy?

	a. One year old

	b. Two years old

	c. Three years old

	2. Where did the policeman find the boy?

	a. In a house

	b. In a car

	c. In a helicopter

	3. Who is the dog's owner?

	a. The policeman

	b. The little boy

	c. No one knows

	Answers

	1. c

	2. b

	3. c

episodes.title: Little Bird Causes Long Wait on Plane
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Little Bird Causes Long Wait on Plane

	Narrator: When people take a plane, they sit down. Then they wait for the

	plane to fly. But sometimes they have to wait and wait!

	大家上了飛機之後坐好，等待飛機起飛。但有時候，可能要等了又等！

	One day, a plane was in Hong Kong. It was going to Kaohsiung. The plane was

	almost ready to fly. But then, everyone got a big surprise. Something else

	flew!

	一架飛機準備從香港去高雄。就在飛機要起飛的時候，乘客非常驚訝地發現，有東西在飛!

	A small bird was flying in the plane! It was brown and gray. It was a

	sparrow! Whose was it? It was no one's!

	原來是一隻麻雀在機艙裡飛來飛去！這隻麻雀不是主人帶來的喔！

	The sparrow did not want to sit down. It flew over everyone.

	這隻麻雀不肯乖乖地待著。牠到處亂飛。

	The sparrow was from Hong Kong. But it did not have a passport! It did not

	have a plane ticket! It could not go to Kaohsiung!

	麻雀來自香港，牠沒有護照，也沒有機票，牠不能去高雄！

	Some people took pictures. Some tried to catch it. The flight attendants

	helped with walkie-talkies.

	Flight attendant: It's here! No, it's there!

	Narrator: But the sparrow flew fast! It was hard to catch!

	有一些人忙著拍照，有一些人想抓住麻雀。空服員用對講機說[在這裡]，或[在那裏]。但是麻雀飛得很快，很難抓到！

	Then a man caught the sparrow. He took it outside. The long wait was over.

	Everyone clapped!

	最後，一名男子終於抓到了這隻麻雀，把牠帶到飛機外面。漫長的等待終於結束了，大家都熱烈鼓掌！

	If you see a bird flying in a plane, what will you do?

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	起飛之前麻雀飛進了飛機，讓乘客嚇一大跳!

	1. passport 護照。

	They need an ID. 他們需要身分證。

	Here, give them my passport. 來，給他們我的護照。

	You carry your passport around every day? 你每天帶著護照出門?

	Yeah. 對。

	2. plane ticket 機票。

	I never know when I'll be flying somewhere.

	我永遠不知道什麼時候會飛到某個地方。

	But you still need to buy a plane ticket! 但是你還是需要買機票!

	3. fast 快速的。

	That's fast and easy these days. 這年頭買票又快又容易。

	Just a few clicks, and you're good to go. 只要按幾個鍵就好了。

	4. ready 準備好。

	I could never do that. 我完全不行。

	I usually need three months to get ready. 我通常需要準備三個月。

	Three months?! 三個月?!

	來一起讀單字。

	passport護照 plane ticket機票 fast快速的 ready準備好

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. Where was the plane?

	a. Hong Kong

	b. Taipei

	c. Kaohsiung

	2. What bird flew in the plane?

	a. A pigeon

	b. A sparrow

	c. A crow

	3. What did the flight attendants use?

	a. Passports

	b. Plane tickets

	c. Walkie-talkies

	Answers

	1. a

	2. b

	3. c

episodes.title: Small Town to Get University
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Small Town to Get University

	Inuit are Indigenous peoples. They have their own language. They have their

	own ways of doing things. They hunt. They fish. And they live in very, very

	cold places.

	因紐特人是原住民，他們有自己的語言和生活方式。他們住在天寒地凍的地方，以捕魚跟打獵維生。

	Many Inuit live in north Canada. Inuit have lived there for thousands of

	years. The north is mostly ice and snow. Polar bears live there! Winters are

	very long and dark.

	因紐特人已經在加拿大的北方生活了好幾千年。那裡的冬天漫長而黑暗，四周都是冰雪，還有北極熊！

	Students there leave home to go to university. They go south to a city. But a

	new Inuit university will open in four years! It will be in a small Inuit

	town in the north.

	當地的學生如果要上大學，通常要離開家鄉，到南方的城市去。不過，四年後將會有一所新的因紐特大學！這所大學位於北方一個小小的因紐特鎮。

	One hundred students will study there. They will learn about Inuit ways and

	language.

	這所大學會有一百多名學生，在那裏學習因紐特的生活方式跟語言。

	The small town is getting ready. It has to plan carefully. There are no roads

	to the town! Everything comes by plane!

	這個小鎮現在正在做各種準備。因為沒有通往小鎮的道路，所以任何物資都要用飛機才能運過去！

	People in the town are excited. This university is very important. Students

	from other places will learn about the Inuit. And Inuit students will be able

	to study near their home!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	因紐特人住在加拿大遙遠的北方，有獨特的生活方式。

	1. polar bear 北極熊。

	I'm going to Alaska this summer. 我今年夏天要去阿拉斯加。

	Alaska? Wow! 阿拉斯加，哇!

	I want to see polar bears. 我要看北極熊。

	From very far away, I hope. 希望你是從遠處看。

	2. winter 冬季。

	Of course. Bears look much cuter in photos. 當然，照片裡的熊可愛多了!

	Too bad you won't see those long, dark winter nights.

	真可惜你看不到又長又黑的冬天晚上。

	3. ice 冰塊。

	That's fine with me. 我還好。

	I'll still get plenty of ice and snow. 還是可以看到好多冰雪。

	Sure, it's Alaska after all. 當然，畢竟是阿拉斯加。

	4. go fishing 去釣魚。

	I may even go fishing there! 我甚至可能去釣魚!

	Yeah, you may catch a seal! 對，可能釣到一隻海豹!

	許多動物園裡也有北極熊。

	polar bear北極熊 winter冬季 ice冰塊 go fishing去釣魚

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. Where do many Inuit people in Canada live?

	a. In cold places

	b. In warm places

	c. In hot places

	2. How many students will study at the university?

	a. One hundred students

	b. Four hundred students

	c. One thousand students

	3. How does everything come to the town?

	a. By car

	b. By train

	c. By plane

	Answers

	1. a

	2. a

	3. c

sections.story:
________________________________

	Small Town to Get University

	Inuit are Indigenous peoples. They have their own language. They have their

	own ways of doing things. They hunt. They fish. And they live in very, very

	cold places.

	因紐特人是原住民，他們有自己的語言和生活方式。他們住在天寒地凍的地方，以捕魚跟打獵維生。

	Many Inuit live in north Canada. Inuit have lived there for thousands of

	years. The north is mostly ice and snow. Polar bears live there! Winters are

	very long and dark.

	因紐特人已經在加拿大的北方生活了好幾千年。那裡的冬天漫長而黑暗，四周都是冰雪，還有北極熊！

	Students there leave home to go to university. They go south to a city. But a

	new Inuit university will open in four years! It will be in a small Inuit

	town in the north.

	當地的學生如果要上大學，通常要離開家鄉，到南方的城市去。不過，四年後將會有一所新的因紐特大學！這所大學位於北方一個小小的因紐特鎮。

	One hundred students will study there. They will learn about Inuit ways and

	language.

	這所大學會有一百多名學生，在那裏學習因紐特的生活方式跟語言。

	The small town is getting ready. It has to plan carefully. There are no roads

	to the town! Everything comes by plane!

	這個小鎮現在正在做各種準備。因為沒有通往小鎮的道路，所以任何物資都要用飛機才能運過去！

	People in the town are excited. This university is very important. Students

	from other places will learn about the Inuit. And Inuit students will be able

	to study near their home!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
sections.vocabulary:
Vocabulary

	因紐特人住在加拿大遙遠的北方，有獨特的生活方式。

	1. polar bear 北極熊。

	I'm going to Alaska this summer. 我今年夏天要去阿拉斯加。

	Alaska? Wow! 阿拉斯加，哇!

	I want to see polar bears. 我要看北極熊。

	From very far away, I hope. 希望你是從遠處看。

	2. winter 冬季。

	Of course. Bears look much cuter in photos. 當然，照片裡的熊可愛多了!

	Too bad you won't see those long, dark winter nights.

	真可惜你看不到又長又黑的冬天晚上。

	3. ice 冰塊。

	That's fine with me. 我還好。

	I'll still get plenty of ice and snow. 還是可以看到好多冰雪。

	Sure, it's Alaska after all. 當然，畢竟是阿拉斯加。

	4. go fishing 去釣魚。

	I may even go fishing there! 我甚至可能去釣魚!

	Yeah, you may catch a seal! 對，可能釣到一隻海豹!

	許多動物園裡也有北極熊。

	polar bear北極熊 winter冬季 ice冰塊 go fishing去釣魚

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	1. Where do many Inuit people in Canada live?

	a. In cold places

	b. In warm places

	c. In hot places

	2. How many students will study at the university?

	a. One hundred students

	b. Four hundred students

	c. One thousand students

	3. How does everything come to the town?

	a. By car

	b. By train

	c. By plane

episodes.title: Six-Year-Old Kid Lifts Big Barbell
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Six-Year-Old Kid Lifts Big Barbell

	Do you like to do what your parents do? Many kids do. One six-year-old girl

	does. Her mom goes to the gym. So the girl goes, with her mom. Her mom does

	strength training. So, the girl does!

	很多小朋友喜歡模仿他們爸爸媽媽的行為。這個六歲的小女孩會跟她媽媽一起去健身房，並且跟媽媽一起做力量強化訓練！

	The girl learned how to lift barbells safely. Barbells are long bars with

	circles at the ends. One day, she wanted to lift a heavy barbell. Her mom

	watched.

	槓鈴是一根兩端有圓形鐵片的桿子。在健身房，這個女孩學會了如何安全的舉槓鈴！有一天，她想挑戰一個很重的槓鈴，她的媽媽就在旁邊看著。

	The girl stood in front of the barbell. She bent down from her hips. She bent

	her knees. Then, she picked up the barbell with her hands. She stood and

	lifted it to her hips!

	小女孩站在槓鈴前，彎下身體，再彎曲膝蓋，接著用雙手把槓鈴抓起來。她慢慢站直，最後成功把槓鈴舉到臀部的位置！

	This six-year-old lifted 35 kilograms! Strength training made her strong!

	這個六歲的小女孩竟然舉起了 35 公斤的槓鈴！力量強化訓練讓她身體變強壯。

	Other kids do strength training with their parents too. Some do squats.

	Squats are like sitting down and then standing up from a chair ... again and

	again! But there is no chair! Strength training helps make kids stronger.

	Scientists say this can be good for kids.

	也有其他的小朋友會跟爸媽一起做力量強化訓練，有些人會訓練深蹲。力量強化訓練可以幫助小朋友變得更強壯。科學家也認為這對孩子是有幫助的！

	But, if you try strength training, an adult should watch you. Then you can

	get stronger safely!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	小朋友也可以練舉重，但是需要專業人士指導。

	1. lift 舉起。

	I've finally joined a gym. 我終於加入健身房了。

	Have you found a trainer too? 你也找了教練嗎?

	A trainer? 教練?

	Yeah, someone who can tell you how to lift weights. 對，他會告訴你怎麼樣舉重。

	2. pick up 拿起來。

	But I already know how to do that. 可是我已經知道怎麼做了。

	Really? 真的嗎?

	Yeah, you just pick up the dumbbell… 對啊，你就把啞鈴舉起來，

	and try not to drop it. 然後不要讓它掉地上。

	3. train 訓練。

	No. There should be a better way of weight training.

	不對，應該有更好的重訓方式。

	Like what? 比如說怎樣?

	Like choosing the right weight. 比如說選擇對的舉重量。

	4. kilogram 公斤。

	How much are you lifting right now? 你現在舉多少?

	Five kilograms. 五公斤。

	That's too heavy. 那太重了。

	我們一起來讀單字。

	lift舉起 pick up拿起來 train訓練 kilogram公斤

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. Where did the girl lift the barbell to?

	a. Her hips

	b. Her knees

	c. Her hands

	2. How many kilograms did the girl lift?

	a. 6 kilograms

	b. 25 kilograms

	c. 35 kilograms

	3. What do some kids do for strength training?

	a. Sit on a chair

	b. Do squats again and again

	c. Stand on a barbell

	Answers

	1. a

	2. c

	3. b

episodes.title: Long Python from Long Ago Found in Taiwan
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Long Python from Long Ago Found in Taiwan

	New living animals are often found in Taiwan. But sometimes people find new

	animals from long ago here too.

	在台灣，人們常會新發現已經存在的動物。偶而也會發現很久以前存在，卻一直不為人知的種類。

	Some of these animals lived hundreds of thousands of years ago. Their bones

	are found in the ground.

	那些動物有些生活在幾十萬年前，化石到現在才被挖掘出來。

	There is a good place to find animal bones from long ago. It is in Tainan.

	Some of the animals found there are so cool!

	台南是個可以找到古老動物化石的好地方。其中有些動物很酷喔!

	Experts found the bones of a big cat there. Maybe it was bigger than a lion!

	This cat had long teeth. Experts found some teeth and bones of very big

	crocodiles there too. Maybe they were six or seven meters long! Whoa!

	科學家在那裡發現一種大型貓科動物，體型可能比獅子還大，有很長的牙齒。他們也找到鱷魚的牙齒跟骨頭，這種巨大的鱷魚，身長大約有六到七公尺！

	Someone found a snake bone from long ago there too. Now, experts say the

	snake was four meters long! That is longer than any snake in Taiwan today!

	還發現蛇的骨頭，那種蛇生活在久遠之前的古代。牠大約有四公尺那麼長，比現在台灣的任何蛇都要長！

	This snake is a kind of python. No pythons have been found in Taiwan before.

	Experts thought pythons did not live here. Now they know pythons did!

	牠是蟒蛇的一種。以前專家都認為台灣沒有蟒蛇，現在才知道其實是有的！

	Hundreds of thousands of years ago, Taiwan had big cats and big crocodiles …

	and very long pythons! How sssssscary!

	________________________________________

	Vocabulary

	台南發現大型肉食動物的化石，例如鱷魚，蟒蛇等等。

	1. ground 地面。

	Look what I found! 你看我找到什麼!

	Where did you find it? 你在哪裡找到的?

	In the ground, when I was planting tomatoes. 我種番茄時在地下發現的。

	2. bone 骨頭。

	I think those are human bones. 我覺得它是人類骨頭。

	No way! You're trying to scare me, right? 不會吧!你在嚇唬我對不對?

	Look, they're big. 你看它很大。

	3. snake 蛇。

	Bigger than cat bones. 比貓的骨頭大。

	Maybe they're from a snake. 也許是一條蛇的。

	A snake? You have snakes in your garden? 蛇? 你家院子裡有蛇?

	I'm not sure. 我不確定。

	4. expert 專家。

	But I think I'll stop digging now! 但我可不要再挖了。

	Yeah, and you'd better take the bones to experts.

	對，而且你最好把骨頭帶給專家看看。

	Please read the words with me.

	ground地面 bone骨頭 snake蛇 expert專家

	________________________________________

	Quiz

	1. Where is the good place to find bones from long ago?

	a. In Tainan

	b. In Taichung

	c. In Taitung

	2. How long was the snake from long ago?

	a. 4 meters long

	b. 6 meters long

	c. 8 meters long

	3. Which animal had not been found in Taiwan before?

	a. A cat

	b. A crocodile

	c. A python

	Answers

	1. a

	2. a

	3. c

	c. A python

episodes.title: These Very Small Robots Swim and Dance
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	These Very Small Robots Swim and Dance

	Scientists in the U.S. made a very small robot. How small is it? Well, it's

	hard to see!

	美國的科學家發明了一種微小的機器人，小到連肉眼都很難看見！

	This robot gets power from the sun. It has a motor inside. But the motor is

	very, very small. It cannot push the robot in water.

	這種小機器人用太陽能發電。機器人裡面有馬達，但馬達太小了，沒辦法在水中推動機器人！

	But the robot can swim! It makes electricity. It sends the electricity into

	the water. That makes the water move. The moving water pushes the robot!

	即便如此，機器人仍然會游泳！它自己發電，把電力送到水裡，流動的水會推著機器人前進。

	The robot can do many things. It has a computer inside! It can move by

	itself. It does not need anyone to make it move.

	這個小不點能做很多事情。它有一個微型電腦，還可以自己移動，不需要人操作。

	The robot can find how hot or cold water is. It can tell people. But the

	robot does not say words. It does not write words. It dances in the water!

	它也會測量水溫並回報這些資訊。但它不會寫字，也不會說話，所以用跳舞來表達！

	The scientists watch the robot dance. The dance tells them how hot or cold

	the water is. Other dances tell them other things.

	科學家看到機器人的舞蹈就知道水溫的高低。它的跳舞動作都有不同的含意。

	Does this robot cost a lot? Well, three of them cost one Taiwan dollar! What?!

	這種機器人會不會很貴？其實，三台這種微型機器人只要一塊錢台幣！

	One day a robot like this may do things inside you to help you!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	微型機器人雖然小到幾乎看不見，卻能做很多事。

	1) swim 游泳。

	The sun is so hot today! 今天太陽好熱!

	Yeah, perfect weather for swimming. 是游泳的好天氣!

	Is your swimming pool outside? 你的游泳池在室外?

	It is. 是的。

	2) sun 太陽。

	And the water is kept warm by solar power. 太陽能讓池水保溫。

	So the sun does all the work for you? 所以太陽替你做所有工作?

	Pretty much! 差不多。

	3) by itself 它自己。

	It heats the water by itself. 太陽能系統自己把水弄熱。

	Wow, that's cool! 好酷喔!

	No, that's warm. 不對，是溫暖。

	4) cost 花費。

	Cool idea, warm water. 很酷的主意，溫暖的池水。

	Exactly. 正是。

	And it doesn't cost much. 而且沒花多少錢。

	Do you swim in summertime?

	swim游泳 sun太陽 by itself它自己 cost花費

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. What does the robot use to swim?

	a. A motor

	b. Electricity

	c. Swim caps

	2. How does the robot tell scientists something?

	a. It speaks.

	b. It writes.

	c. It dances.

	3. How much do three of these robots cost?

	a. One Taiwan dollar

	b. One million Taiwan dollars

	c. One billion Taiwan dollars

	Answers

	1. b

	2. c

	3. a

	美國的科學家發明了一種微小的機器人，小到連肉眼都很難看見！

	This robot gets power from the sun. It has a motor inside. But the motor is

	very, very small. It cannot push the robot in water.

	這種小機器人用太陽能發電。機器人裡面有馬達，但馬達太小了，沒辦法在水中推動機器人！

	But the robot can swim! It makes electricity. It sends the electricity into

	the water. That makes the water move. The moving water pushes the robot!

	即便如此，機器人仍然會游泳！它自己發電，把電力送到水裡，流動的水會推著機器人前進。

	The robot can do many things. It has a computer inside! It can move by

	itself. It does not need anyone to make it move.

	這個小不點能做很多事情。它有一個微型電腦，還可以自己移動，不需要人操作。

	The robot can find how hot or cold water is. It can tell people. But the

	robot does not say words. It does not write words. It dances in the water!

	它也會測量水溫並回報這些資訊。但它不會寫字，也不會說話，所以用跳舞來表達！

	The scientists watch the robot dance. The dance tells them how hot or cold

	the water is. Other dances tell them other things.

	科學家看到機器人的舞蹈就知道水溫的高低。它的跳舞動作都有不同的含意。

	Does this robot cost a lot? Well, three of them cost one Taiwan dollar! What?!

	這種機器人會不會很貴？其實，三台這種微型機器人只要一塊錢台幣！

	One day a robot like this may do things inside you to help you!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
sections.vocabulary:
Vocabulary

	微型機器人雖然小到幾乎看不見，卻能做很多事。

	1) swim 游泳。

	The sun is so hot today! 今天太陽好熱!

	Yeah, perfect weather for swimming. 是游泳的好天氣!

	Is your swimming pool outside? 你的游泳池在室外?

	It is. 是的。

	2) sun 太陽。

	And the water is kept warm by solar power. 太陽能讓池水保溫。

	So the sun does all the work for you? 所以太陽替你做所有工作?

	Pretty much! 差不多。

	3) by itself 它自己。

	It heats the water by itself. 太陽能系統自己把水弄熱。

	Wow, that's cool! 好酷喔!

	No, that's warm. 不對，是溫暖。

	4) cost 花費。

	Cool idea, warm water. 很酷的主意，溫暖的池水。

	Exactly. 正是。

	And it doesn't cost much. 而且沒花多少錢。

	Do you swim in summertime?

	swim游泳 sun太陽 by itself它自己 cost花費

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
sections.quiz:
Quiz

	1. What does the robot use to swim?

	a. A motor

	b. Electricity

	c. Swim caps

	2. How does the robot tell scientists something?

	a. It speaks.

	b. It writes.

	c. It dances.

	3. How much do three of these robots cost?

	a. One Taiwan dollar

	b. One million Taiwan dollars

	c. One billion Taiwan dollars

episodes.title: Ride a Fortune-Telling Bus
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Ride a Fortune-Telling Bus

	Are you in Taipei? Ride on Buses 611 or 287. These buses can tell you good

	things that will happen to you. They tell fortunes!

	如果你在台北的話，可以去搭搭看 611 或

	287號公車！這兩路公車會告訴你未來可能會發生的好事！

	Many buses have stop buttons. These buses do too. People press them when they

	want to get off the bus.

	一般公車都有下車鈴，乘客要下車就按一下。

	But the buttons on these buses are different. The yellow buttons have a blue

	circle and then a purple circle around them. The purple circle has fortunes

	on it: "get one hundred on a test," "find love," "stay healthy," and more!

	但是這兩路公車的下車鈴不一樣。黃色下車鈴外面有個藍色圓圈，圓圈外圍是紫色圈，寫著「考試一百分」、「下車遇到愛」、或是「平安又健康」等句子。

	How does it work? Press the button. You will see a light go around in the

	blue circle. It slowly stops at your fortune!

	要怎麼算命呢？只要一按下車鈴，藍色圓圈裡的小燈就開始轉動，最後停在一個句子旁！

	One bus rider pressed the button. The fortune said "win the lottery." The bus

	doors opened. A lottery store was there!

	一名乘客按了下車鈴，藍色燈停在「彩券中大獎」旁邊。剛好公車車門一開，就是一家彩券行！

	Fortune-telling buses are fun to ride. But do not press the button more than

	one time. Press it when you get off the bus. It is a stop button!

	算命公車很好玩，不過只要在下車的時候按一次按鈕就好了，畢竟它本來就是下車鈴！

	Are the fortunes for fun? Or are they real? Ride one of these buses and find

	out!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	算命公車是為了給乘客一點小小娛樂，讓心情輕鬆一下。

	1. for fun 為了好玩。

	Do you really believe in fortune-telling? 你真的相信算命?

	Kind of. But mostly I do it for fun. 有一點，不過大部分是為了好玩。

	2. bus 公車。

	So what did he say this time? 這次他怎麼說?

	He said I should take a taxi to my interview instead of taking a bus.

	他說我應該搭計程車去面試，而不是搭公車。

	3. real 真實的。

	Seriously? Are you going to listen to him? 真的喔?你要聽話嗎?

	Sure. I paid him 500 NT! 當然，我付了他五百塊!

	It's real money! 那個錢可不假。

	4. lottery 樂透彩。

	Can I ask him about the lottery? 我可不可以問他彩券的問題?

	No, don't do that! 不行，不要那樣!

	That's not how it works. 算命不是那樣的。

	來一起讀單字。

	for fun為了好玩 bus公車 real真實的 lottery樂透彩

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. Which city's buses have the new stop buttons?

	a. Taipei

	b. Taoyuan

	c. Tainan

	2. What color is the circle with the fortunes on it?

	a. Yellow

	b. Blue

	c. Purple

	3. When do bus riders press the button?

	a. When they want to get on the bus

	b. When they want to get off the bus

	c. When they want to know their fortune

	Answers

	1. a

	2. c

	3. b

episodes.title: Taiwan's Last Ferry Paddled by Hand
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

Taiwan's Last Ferry Paddled by Hand

The Xindian River is in New Taipei. People cross this river every day. They
go to school. They go to work. Many people drive on a bridge. But some ride
the ferry.
新店溪位於新北市，很多人每天上學、上班都要過這條河。有些人開車，也有人選擇搭渡船到對岸。

This ferry is a small wooden boat. The ferryman stands at the back. He moves
the ferry with a long paddle. One end is in his hands. The other is in the
water.
新店溪的渡船是一艘小木船。船夫站在船尾，用一支長長的槳來划船，一端在船夫的手裡，另一端在水裡。

People get on the ferry. They sit. Then the ferryman paddles. The ride is
five or six minutes.
乘客上船坐好後，船夫就開始划槳。整趟旅程大約只需要五、六分鐘。

There were nine ferries a long time ago. Then bridges were built. This ferry
is Taiwan's last ferry paddled by hand! The ferryman wants it to keep going.
But his job is hard.
很久以前，這裡一共有九艘渡船。大橋落成之後乘客減少，這艘船成為台灣最後一艘用人力划的渡船！船夫希望繼續下去，但這份工作很辛苦。

The ferryman starts at six in the morning. He stops at seven at night! He
works seven days a week! He gets a one-day holiday every year. Summers are
hot. Winters are windy. No one wants his job!
船夫每天早上六點開始工作，到晚上七點才休息。一週工作七天，每年只放一天假。夏天很熱，冬天風很大，所以沒有人想要這個工作。

Now tourists ride the ferry too. Riding the ferry costs thirty Taiwan
dollars. Kids under six ride for free!
現在很多觀光客會來搭這艘船。船票是三十元台幣，六歲以下的小朋友免費！

This summer, take a ride with the ferryman!
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Vocabulary
用人力划的渡船就快絕跡了，最後一艘在新店。

1.	river 河流。
The best biking trails in Taipei are along the river.
台北最好的自行車道都在河邊。
Oh, like the Tamsui River? 像淡水河嗎?
Yeah, and the Keelung River too. 對，還有基隆河。

2.	summer 夏天。
A long time ago, my dad and I used to ride there together,
很久以前我爸爸會跟我一起騎車，
enjoying the summer breeze. 享受夏日涼風。

3.	windy 颳風的。
What about in winter? 冬天呢?
We wouldn't go then. 我們冬天不會去。
It gets too windy. 風太大了。

4.	drive 駕駛。
Do you still go biking? 你現在還騎車嗎?
Not anymore. 不騎了。
I drive now… same breeze, no effort. 我現在開車，一樣的涼風，卻不需要用力。

你對河流認識多少？
river河流    summer夏天    windy颳風的    drive駕駛
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Quiz

1. How does the ferryman move the ferry?
a. With a motor
b. With a paddle
c. With a rope

2. How long is the ferry ride?
a. 5 minutes
b. 9 minutes
c. 30 minutes

3. How many days a week does the ferryman work?
a. 3 days
b. 5 days
c. 7 days

Answers
1. b
2. a
3. c

episodes.title: Brave Baby Monkey Makes Friends
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Brave Baby Monkey Makes Friends

	A baby monkey is famous online. His name is Punch.

	有一隻小猴子在網路上非常有名，名叫 Punch。

	Punch lives in a zoo in Japan. He does not have a mother. Zookeepers take

	care of him.

	Punch 住在日本的一座動物園。他沒有媽媽，從小由飼養員照顧。

	At first, Punch had no monkey friends. He had an orange orangutan friend. But

	it was a stuffed animal.

	一開始，Punch 沒有任何猴子朋友。他有一個橘色的紅毛猩猩朋友，但那只是玩偶。

	The stuffed orangutan was bigger than Punch. But Punch held it all the time.

	He hugged it when he slept. People online said Punch and his orangutan were

	very cute together!

	這隻玩偶比 Punch 還大，但

	Punch一直抱著它，連睡覺的時候也不放開。網友都覺得他們很可愛！

	But Punch was lonely. So he tried to make friends with the other monkeys at

	the zoo. Some were not nice to him. They pushed him away. This made him sad.

	不過Punch還是很孤單。他努力跟動物園裡的其他的猴子交朋友。有一些猴子對他不太友善，還把他推開，這讓他很難過。

	But Punch was brave. He kept trying. He learned how to play with the other

	monkeys. Slowly, he made friends!

	但Punch很勇敢！他不斷的嘗試，學會怎麼跟其他的猴子一起玩，慢慢也有了朋友！

	Now Punch sometimes holds his stuffed orangutan. But he plays with his monkey

	friends. People online are happy for him. Some give him more stuffed animals.

	He shares them with his friends.

	現在，Punch有時候還是會抱著玩偶，也會和朋友一起玩耍。網友都替他高興，有些人還送他更多玩偶讓他跟朋友分享。

	Sometimes making friends is hard. You may feel lonely. But being brave helps

	you make new friends!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	小猴子有了真正的朋友，不再那麼依賴絨毛玩具。

	1. lonely 寂寞的。

	Welcome back! 歡迎回來!

	Hi, so good to see you! 看到你真好!

	You must feel lonely without us. 沒有我們你一定很寂寞。

	2. sad 悲傷的。

	Of course I missed you guys. 我當然很想念你們囉!

	But I was so busy I didn’t have time to be sad. 不過我也忙到沒空悲傷。

	3. share 分享。

	You have to share your stories with us. 你一定要跟我們分享你的故事。

	Oh, I’ve got tons of great stories! 我有很多很棒的故事。

	4. sometimes 有時候。

	You know I traveled across 9 countries? 你知道我去了九個國家?

	Sometimes I had friends with me, 有時候跟朋友一起，

	but sometimes it was just me. 有時候只有我。

	Wow, big adventures! 哇，大探險!

	Do you sometimes feel lonely?

	lonely寂寞的 sad悲傷的 share分享 sometimes有時候

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. Where does Punch live?

	a. In a house

	b. In a forest

	c. In a zoo

	2. At first, who was Punch’s friend?

	a. A zookeeper

	b. Another monkey

	c. A stuffed orangutan

	3. What did Punch want to do?

	a. Make friends with other monkeys

	b. Get more stuffed animals

	c. Find his mother

	Answers

	1. c

	2. c

	3. a

	1. lonely 寂寞的。

	Welcome back! 歡迎回來!

	Hi, so good to see you! 看到你真好!

	You must feel lonely without us. 沒有我們你一定很寂寞。

	2. sad 悲傷的。

	Of course I missed you guys. 我當然很想念你們囉!

	But I was so busy I didn’t have time to be sad. 不過我也忙到沒空悲傷。

	3. share 分享。

	You have to share your stories with us. 你一定要跟我們分享你的故事。

	Oh, I’ve got tons of great stories! 我有很多很棒的故事。

	4. sometimes 有時候。

	You know I traveled across 9 countries? 你知道我去了九個國家?

	Sometimes I had friends with me, 有時候跟朋友一起，

	but sometimes it was just me. 有時候只有我。

	Wow, big adventures! 哇，大探險!

	Do you sometimes feel lonely?

	lonely寂寞的 sad悲傷的 share分享 sometimes有時候

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
sections.quiz:
Quiz

	1. Where does Punch live?

	a. In a house

	b. In a forest

	c. In a zoo

	2. At first, who was Punch’s friend?

	a. A zookeeper

	b. Another monkey

	c. A stuffed orangutan

	3. What did Punch want to do?

	a. Make friends with other monkeys

	b. Get more stuffed animals

	c. Find his mother

episodes.title: Taiwan's Newest Mountain Guides
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Taiwan's Newest Mountain Guides

	Taroko National Park is in Xiulin Township. The park has many mountains!

	Twenty-seven are three thousand meters tall or taller!

	位於秀林鄉的太魯閣國家公園內有很多高山，其中有 27 座山高達三千公尺以上。

	Taroko is named for the Truku people. They are indigenous peoples. Most

	people living in Xiulin are Truku.

	太魯閣這個名字來自太魯閣族，是台灣的原住民。秀林鄉居民大多都是太魯閣族人。

	Tourists love Taroko. They hike its paths. They climb its mountains. But

	mountains can be dangerous. So Xiulin is training Truku people to be mountain

	guides.

	很多遊客喜歡在太魯閣地區走步道或是爬山，但是高山總有危險。因此秀林鄉正在訓練太魯閣族人成為登山嚮導。

	The new guides are learning about nature. They are learning how to find and

	help lost people. They are learning how to read maps, camp, make fires, and

	much more!

	這些嚮導學習自然知識，也學習怎麼尋找與幫助迷路的登山客。他們會看地圖、露營、生火等等技能！

	These guides will help keep people safe on mountains. They will know the

	paths. They will know where to hike and climb safely. When the weather

	changes, they will be able to help. When there is an emergency, they will be

	able to save lives!

	這些嚮導可以保障登山客或是遊客的安全。他們認得山路，也知道哪裡可以安全攀登。天氣發生變化的時候也能幫忙。遇到緊急狀況，嚮導甚至可以救人一命。

	The Truku people of Xiulin are working hard to keep us safe in Taroko

	National Park.

	The next time you are on a mountain, get a guide!

	________________________________________

	Vocabulary

	受過訓練的太魯閣高山嚮導，對登山客有很大的幫助。

	1. climb 攀爬。

	Let’s go climb Xiangshan this Sunday. 我們這星期天去爬象山吧。

	Climb? You mean like walking up a bunch of stairs? 爬山?

	你的意思是爬一堆樓梯?

	Yeah, pretty much, nothing too steep. 差不多，階梯並不陡。

	2. path 小徑。

	Wait, I thought it was just an easy hike. 等等，我以為只是輕鬆健行。

	It is! You can’t find an easier path than Xiangshan.

	確實是，你找不到比象山更輕鬆的了。

	3. able 能夠。

	Even so, I won’t be able to hike more than 20 minutes.

	就算那樣我最多也只能走二十分鐘。

	What?! 什麼啊?!

	And I’m taking snack breaks. 而且我要點心休息時間。

	4. next time 下一次。

	Forget it. I’ll catch you next time. 算了，我下次再找你。

	來一起讀單字。

	climb攀爬 path小徑 able能夠 next time下次

	________________________________________

	Quiz

	1. Where is Taroko National Park?

	a. Jiaoxi Township

	b. Xiulin Township

	c. Xiushui Township

	2. Who is the township training to be guides?

	a. Most people

	b. Tourists in Taroko

	c. Truku people

	3. What do these guides do?

	a. Keep people safe on mountains

	b. Make paths on mountains

	c. Find more tall mountains

	Answers

	1. b

	2. c

	3. a

episodes.title: Woman Finds Surprise in Egg Tart
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Woman Finds Surprise in Egg Tart

	Egg tarts are delicious. Millions and millions are eaten every year! But a

	woman in Kaohsiung did not eat hers.

	蛋塔味道香甜，每年大家會吃掉好幾百萬個蛋塔！但是高雄一位女士卻沒有吃到。

	The woman bought some egg tarts from a restaurant. She took them home. They

	were cold.

	Her family told her to microwave them. They taste better when they are hot,

	right?

	女士在一家店買了蛋塔，帶回家後發現已經冷掉了。家人說她可以用微波爐加熱，熱熱的蛋塔比較好吃！

	But the woman was hungry. She wanted to eat an egg tart now! 

	Then, she saw something black on it. She broke it into two pieces. And she

	pulled out a battery!

	但她實在太餓了，想馬上把蛋塔吃掉，竟然拉出整顆電池！

	Batteries can hurt our stomachs. And they can start fires in microwave ovens.

	Batteries can explode in them too!

	電池如果吃下去會傷害身體，放進微波爐還可能起火爆炸！

	How did the battery get into the egg tart?

	A restaurant cook was making some egg tarts. The cook used a timer. It fell

	on the tarts. The battery from the timer went into one!

	電池怎麼會跑進蛋塔裡？原來是廚師在做蛋塔時，用了計時器。它不小心掉到蛋塔上，裡面的電池就掉進其中一個蛋塔裡了！

	The restaurant's rules say to throw away food when something falls in it. But

	the cook did not throw away the egg tarts.

	店裡規定，有東西掉進食物裡就要丟掉。但那位廚師沒有把蛋塔丟掉！

	The woman was lucky! She did not eat the egg tart. And she did not microwave

	it!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	這位女士經歷了蛋塔驚魂記，不過她至少毫髮無傷。

	1. hot 熱的。

	Careful, that food is really hot! 小心，那盤食物很燙!

	I know, but I'm too hungry to wait. 我知道，但是我太餓了，等不及了。

	2. hurt 傷害。

	You're going to hurt your tongue again. 你又會燙到舌頭。

	It's fine… 還好吧... Oh! Okay, maybe not fine. 也許不大好。

	3. microwave oven 微波爐。

	That's the thing with microwave ovens. 這是微波爐的缺點。It's hot on the

	outside but still cold on the inside. 外面很燙，但是裡面還是冷的。

	4. start 開始。

	I should learn to cook, that's for sure. 我肯定應該學做菜。You can start with

	popcorn.你可以從爆米花開始。Popcorn? Please - I'm way better than that!

	爆米花? 拜託! 我比那厲害多了!

	你有用過微波爐嗎? hot熱的 hurt傷害 microwave oven微波爐 start開始

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. Why didn't the woman microwave the egg tart?

	a. She was hungry.

	b. She was scared.

	c. She was tired.

	2. What was in the egg tart?

	a. A stomach

	b. A timer

	c. A battery

	3. How did the woman find it?

	a. She ate the egg tart.

	b. The cook told her about it.

	c. She broke the tart into two pieces.

	Answers

	1. a

	2. c

	3. c

episodes.title: Workers
episodes.transcript:
Workers

	on Labor Day How

	much money have you spent today? It's more than you think! Think about brushing your teeth. You need a toothbrush and toothpaste. They cost money. Want to rinse your mouth? That's not free either ! Water costs money . Lots of things cost money. People need money to live. So… they get a job. People who work for money are workers. Another word for work is labor . May 1st is Labor Day in Taiwan. That is today! It is a day for workers.

	 

	On Labor Day, some workers march together. They march for better and safer work.

	On Labor Day, some workers take to the streets to protest for better and safer working conditions.

	People who work to earn money are called laborers. May 1st is Taiwan's "Labor Day," which is today! This is a holiday for laborers to celebrate together.

	On Labor Day, some workers march together. They march for better and safer work.

	On Labor Day, some workers take to the streets to protest for better and safer working conditions.

	People who work to earn money are called laborers. May 1st is Taiwan's "Labor Day," which is today! This is a holiday for laborers to celebrate together.

	On Labor Day, some workers march together. They march for better and safer work.

	On Labor Day, some workers take to the streets to protest for better and safer working conditions.

	Workers carry signs. These signs express what they want.

	They might say things like "equal pay," " fewer working hours," or "save

	our jobs." Workers everywhere are worried about AI now. AI may take their jobs . AI also creates jobs . But many are low-paying jobs. This year, workers' signs will be about AI. They will say things like "humans first, not AI" or "make AI good for workers too." What will workers march for when you grow up? ________________________________________ Vocabulary: May Day is a holiday celebrated by workers worldwide. 1. grow up: to mature. I'm so tired. I need a vacation! You know, when I was growing up, I never thought I'd end up an office worker. 2. how much. And yet…here you are. Yeah…here I am. Tell me, how much money do we really need to live? 3. everywhere. More than you think. The cost of living is going up everywhere. 4. pay. That's the problem. My pay never feels enough Please review the vocabulary with me. grow uphow mucheverywhere pays wages_________________________________________ Quiz 1. When is Labor Day in Taiwan? a. March 1st b. May 1st c. September 1st 2. What do workers carry with them when they march? a. Toothbrushes b. Computers c. Signs 3. What are workers worried about this year? a. AI b. Water c. Growing up Answers 1. b 2. c 3. a

episodes.title: Kigali Is Bringing Back Its Wetlands
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Kigali Is Bringing Back Its Wetlands

	Wetlands are land covered in water. Taiwan has many wetlands. Go for a walk

	in one. You will lose your boots in the mud!

	Wetlands are full of life! Many animals and plants live there.

	濕地是被水覆蓋的土地，有很多動物跟植物住在那裡！走在濕地上，只要一不小心鞋子就可能會陷在泥巴裡！

	Wetlands keep us safe. When it rains, wetlands take in water. This helps stop

	floods.

	But climate change is hurting wetlands. It is changing when rain comes and

	how much rain falls.

	It is bringing warmer weather. About one-fourth of the world's wetlands are

	gone. Another one-fourth are very sick.

	濕地能夠保護我們。下雨的時候雨水會被濕地吸收！但是，氣候變遷正在傷害濕地，降雨的時間跟雨量也都在改變。現在全世界大約四分之一的濕地已經消失，另外四分之一狀況不佳。

	Kigali is a city in Rwanda. It has heavy rain and lots of floods. Floods

	destroy homes and businesses. They hurt people.

	非洲國家盧安達的基加利市常常下大雨，也很容易發生洪水。洪水破壞房屋跟商店，也會傷害居民。

	Kigali had many wetlands. But they were used for fishing and farming.

	Now, people there want to bring the wetlands back! They are building islands,

	lakes, and ponds. They are planting plants. They are making rivers!

	以前基加利有很多濕地，但都變成漁業跟農業用地。現在當地人想要濕地回來。他們建造小島、挖掘湖泊跟池塘，並且栽種植物，讓河流重新出現！

	One of Kigali's wetlands has been saved! It has water, life, and a forest! It

	helps a lot with floods. Five more wetlands will be saved this year!

	其中一個濕地已經被救回來了！那裡有水、有生命、有森林，能有效減少洪水的發生。基加利預計今年還會再恢復五個濕地！

	Wetlands save lives. Let's all keep our wetlands safe!

	Vocabulary

	在非洲的基加利市，政府和人民合作搶救濕地。

	o island 島嶼。

	Going birdwatching next weekend? 下個周末要去賞鳥嗎?

	Yeah, this time we're heading to the Matsu islands. 對，這次我們要去馬祖。

	o water 水。

	Aren't those just tiny islands? 不就是很小的幾個島?

	Small, yeah, but packed with water birds. 是很小，但是有很多水鳥。

	o full 充滿的。

	I don't get it. What's so interesting about birds? 我真不懂，鳥怎麼會有趣?

	Just wait till you see them flying over the islands;

	你等看到牠們飛越小島就知道了，the whole place is so full of life!

	整個地方都生氣蓬勃!

	o rain 下雨。

	Okay, that does sound cool. 好吧，聽起來是很酷。

	And after a little rain, the birds will look for food. It's cute!

	而且下過雨牠們會找食物，很可愛。

	我們一起讀單字。island島嶼 water水 full充滿的 rain下雨

	Quiz

	1. What are wetlands?

	a. Land covered in water

	b. Water covered with land

	c. Land covered with life

	2. What is hurting wetlands?

	a. Plants

	b. Climate change

	c. Animals

	3. Where is Kigali?

	a. Romania

	b. Rwanda

	c. Russia

	Answers

	1. a

	2. b

	3. b

sections.story:
________________________________

	Kigali Is Bringing Back Its Wetlands

	Wetlands are land covered in water. Taiwan has many wetlands. Go for a walk

	in one. You will lose your boots in the mud!

	Wetlands are full of life! Many animals and plants live there.

	濕地是被水覆蓋的土地，有很多動物跟植物住在那裡！走在濕地上，只要一不小心鞋子就可能會陷在泥巴裡！

	Wetlands keep us safe. When it rains, wetlands take in water. This helps stop

	floods.

	But climate change is hurting wetlands. It is changing when rain comes and

	how much rain falls.

	It is bringing warmer weather. About one-fourth of the world's wetlands are

	gone. Another one-fourth are very sick.

	濕地能夠保護我們。下雨的時候雨水會被濕地吸收！但是，氣候變遷正在傷害濕地，降雨的時間跟雨量也都在改變。現在全世界大約四分之一的濕地已經消失，另外四分之一狀況不佳。

	Kigali is a city in Rwanda. It has heavy rain and lots of floods. Floods

	destroy homes and businesses. They hurt people.

	非洲國家盧安達的基加利市常常下大雨，也很容易發生洪水。洪水破壞房屋跟商店，也會傷害居民。

	Kigali had many wetlands. But they were used for fishing and farming.

	Now, people there want to bring the wetlands back! They are building islands,

	lakes, and ponds. They are planting plants. They are making rivers!

	以前基加利有很多濕地，但都變成漁業跟農業用地。現在當地人想要濕地回來。他們建造小島、挖掘湖泊跟池塘，並且栽種植物，讓河流重新出現！

	One of Kigali's wetlands has been saved! It has water, life, and a forest! It

	helps a lot with floods. Five more wetlands will be saved this year!

	其中一個濕地已經被救回來了！那裡有水、有生命、有森林，能有效減少洪水的發生。基加利預計今年還會再恢復五個濕地！

	Wetlands save lives. Let's all keep our wetlands safe!
sections.vocabulary:
Vocabulary

	在非洲的基加利市，政府和人民合作搶救濕地。

	o island 島嶼。

	Going birdwatching next weekend? 下個周末要去賞鳥嗎?

	Yeah, this time we're heading to the Matsu islands. 對，這次我們要去馬祖。

	o water 水。

	Aren't those just tiny islands? 不就是很小的幾個島?

	Small, yeah, but packed with water birds. 是很小，但是有很多水鳥。

	o full 充滿的。

	I don't get it. What's so interesting about birds? 我真不懂，鳥怎麼會有趣?

	Just wait till you see them flying over the islands;

	你等看到牠們飛越小島就知道了，the whole place is so full of life!

	整個地方都生氣蓬勃!

	o rain 下雨。

	Okay, that does sound cool. 好吧，聽起來是很酷。

	And after a little rain, the birds will look for food. It's cute!

	而且下過雨牠們會找食物，很可愛。

	我們一起讀單字。island島嶼 water水 full充滿的 rain下雨
sections.quiz:
Quiz

	1. What are wetlands?

	a. Land covered in water

	b. Water covered with land

	c. Land covered with life

	2. What is hurting wetlands?

	a. Plants

	b. Climate change

	c. Animals

	3. Where is Kigali?

	a. Romania

	b. Rwanda

	c. Russia

episodes.title: Wasabi on the Alishan Mountains
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Wasabi on the Alishan Mountains

	Have you tried wasabi? It is a spicy green paste. The paste comes from the

	root of wasabi plants. Wasabi plants grow in humid, cold places. They can

	take two years to grow!

	你吃過芥末嗎？芥末是一種綠色的、很嗆的調味醬，它是用山葵的根做出來的。山葵喜歡濕冷的環境，生長期長達兩年！

	The Tsou people farmed wasabi. They grew it high on the Alishan mountains.

	But the land was Taiwan's. A forest was there before.

	鄒族人以前會在阿里山很高的山上種山葵。不過，那塊地更早是森林，而且是公有地。

	Nine years ago, Taiwan stopped letting farmers grow wasabi there. It wanted

	the forest and wild animals to come back. Soon, young Tsou farmers left

	Alishan. They went to work in cities.

	九年前，政府為了復育森林跟野生動物，不再讓原住民在那裡種山葵。很多年輕的鄒族農民於是離開了阿里山，到城市工作。

	But now some Tsou people are farming wasabi again! The new farms are lower on

	the mountains. The air is not as cold. There are more insects. The Tsou

	people work with scientists. They found a new kind of wasabi plant. The paste

	is sweet and spicy. Chefs tried it. They liked it!

	現在，鄒族人又開始種植山葵了。但是新的地點比較靠近山腳，天氣不夠涼冷，又有很多昆蟲！鄒族人跟科學家合作，找到新的山葵品種，做出來的芥末香甜辛辣，受到很多廚師喜愛！

	Now the forest and wild animals are back. The Tsou people are farming wasabi

	again. This is a win-win for Taiwan and the Tsou people!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	芥末來自山葵的根莖，現在台灣也有在阿里山上栽培的新鮮山葵。

	1. city 城市。

	I'm done with the city. 我受夠城市了!

	I want to be a farmer. 我想去當農夫。

	You? A farmer? 你當農夫?

	You can't live a day without your air-conditioner! 沒有冷氣你一天都活不下去!

	2. mountain 山。

	That's because it's too hot. 那是因為天氣太熱。

	I'll go somewhere cold. 我會去很冷的地方。

	In the mountains? 在山上嗎?

	Yeah, somewhere nice and beautiful. 對，在很美的地方。

	3. grow 種植。

	And grow… peaches? 然後種水蜜桃?

	Nah, too much trouble. 不，太麻煩了。

	I'll grow radishes.我種蘿蔔。

	You don't even like radishes! 你甚至不愛蘿蔔!

	4. plant 種植。

	That's just the beginning. 那只是開始。

	I'll plant roses later on. 之後我要種玫瑰花。

	還記得剛剛的單字嗎?

	city城市 mountain山 grow種植 plant種植

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. Where does wasabi grow?

	a. In cold places

	b. In dry places

	c. In hot places

	2. How long do wasabi plants take to grow?

	a. 2 years

	b. 9 years

	c. 20 years

	3. Why did Taiwan stop letting farmers grow wasabi high in the mountains?

	a. To make a wild animal zoo

	b. To make a road to the top

	c. To make the forest come back

	Answers

	1. a

	2. a

	3. c

episodes.title: Scientists Find New Way Some Dogs Learn Toy Names
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Scientists Find New Way Some Dogs Learn Toy Names

	Most dogs can learn some words like "sit," "stay," or "fetch." But for most

	dogs, learning the names of toys is hard.

	大多數的狗可以學會一些簡單的指令，聽得懂[坐下]、[別動]

	或[撿回來]。但是要學會玩具的名字就困難了。

	Some dogs learn when they are playing with the toys. Some learn when they are

	learning how to do something. Dogs may learn the name "ball" when they are

	learning to fetch a ball.

	有一些狗在遊戲過程中能學會玩具的名稱，有些是在訓練過程中學會的。比如說學習怎麼撿球的時候，就可能記住「球」這個玩具。

	Some dogs can learn many names. Scientists found that some of these dogs can

	learn names another way too!

	但是也有例外。科學家發現，有些狗用別的辦法學會很多名字。

	The dog owners held a new toy. They talked about it with someone in their

	family. They said the name of the toy a few times.

	狗主人手上拿著一個新玩具跟家人聊天，順便說出這個玩具的名稱好幾次。

	The dogs saw the toy and heard the people talk. But the owners were not

	teaching the dogs the name. They did not look at the dogs. They did not talk

	to the dogs! The dogs listened and learned!

	主人不需要教狗狗，也不用看著牠們，或是對牠們說話。狗只是看到玩具，聽到人在討論，就能學會！

	A few days later, the owners said the toy name. The dogs fetched the toy!

	幾天後，主人只要說出玩具的名稱，狗就能把它拿過來！

	Scientists want to know why these dogs are very good learners. But these dogs

	are hard to find.

	科學家好奇這些狗為什麼學習能力那麼強，但其實這些狗很稀有。

	Does your dog know many toy names?

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	聰明的狗狗可以用不同的方式，學會玩具的名稱。

	1. toy 玩具。

	My boss told me not to play with my toy car during the meeting.

	我的老闆叫我開會不要玩小汽車。

	What? Did he say why? 什麼，他有沒有解釋?

	Yeah.有。

	2. talk 談話。

	He said, "You are not five." 他說[你又不是五歲]。

	Fair point…so why were you doing it? 有道理。那你為什麼玩?

	Because talking to him is stressful! 因為跟他講話壓力很大!

	3. listen 注意聽。

	My toy car helped me listen to what he's saying.

	小汽車幫我注意聽他的講話內容。

	Then you should tell him that! 那你告訴他啊!

	4. learn 學習。

	No. Maybe I can learn another way to focus.

	不了。也許我可以學會用別的辦法加強注意。

	Good! That's a smart choice. 很好，聰明的選擇。

	你常常玩哪一種玩具?

	toy玩具 talk談話 listen注意聽 learn學習

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. What is hard to learn for most dogs?

	a. Words like "sit"

	b. Toy names

	c. Fetching a ball

	2. What did scientists find out?

	a. Dogs learn faster than their owners.

	b. Some dogs listen and learn names.

	c. Words like "stay" are easy to learn.

	3. What do scientists want to know about dogs that are good learners?

	a. Why they are good learners

	b. Why they are hard to find

	c. Why they fetch toys

	Answers

	1. b

	2. b

	3. a

episodes.title: Taiwan's Famous Puppets to Tell New Stories for Kids
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Taiwan's Famous Puppets to Tell New Stories for Kids

	Puppets are dolls that people move. Some people love puppets! They have

	puppet shows. They tell stories and jokes with their puppets.

	木偶是由人來操控的娃娃。有一些藝術家很喜歡木偶，用它們演戲，講故事、說笑話。

	Taiwan's most famous puppet shows are budaixi. They use glove puppets. People

	put the puppets on their hands. Their fingers make the puppets move.

	台灣最有名的木偶表演叫做布袋戲。演出者把木偶戴在手上，用手指讓它們動起來。

	Budaixi came to Taiwan more than 300 years ago. People went from city to city

	with their puppets.

	布袋戲在三百多年前傳到台灣，戲班子帶著木偶巡迴各地表演。

	Budaixi are on TV now! B?d?ix? TV shows have bright lights and exciting

	music! The puppets are beautiful! The shows are famous!

	布袋戲現在在電視上也看得到。電視版的布袋戲有燈光和精彩音樂，木偶也做得很精緻，所以很受歡迎。

	Last year, Taiwan's arts center had a budaixi story contest. It wanted

	stories for kids. Six stories won prizes!

	去年台灣傳統藝術中心舉辦了一場比賽，徵求適合兒童的布袋戲，最後一共有六個作品得獎。

	The first prize winner is "Giant Ali." The writer knew an Amis story about a

	scary monster. But in her story, the monster is kind. Another winning story

	is about Guishan Island in Yilan.

	冠軍劇本叫做《巨人阿里》。作者從阿美族的怪物傳說得到靈感，但她的劇本裡面的怪物都是友善的。另一個得獎故事則是跟宜蘭的龜山島有關！

	Three winning stories will be shown in Taipei in August! How about enjoying

	budaixi this summer?

	*布袋戲

	________________________________________

	Vocabulary

	布袋戲在台灣很受歡迎，歷久不衰，現在還有給兒童看的布袋戲。

	1. puppet show 布袋戲。

	Ooo, a puppet! Fancy. 一個木偶，真稀奇。

	Did you make it yourself? 自己做的嗎?

	Of course not. 當然不是。 My teacher made it. 我的老師做的。

	We're prepping for a puppet show. 我們準備演一齣布袋戲。

	2. monster 怪獸。

	Nice. Do you have a name for it? 真好，你的木偶有名字嗎?

	I call it Wugui, meaning turtle. 我叫它烏龜。

	It looks more like a monster. 看起來更像怪獸。

	3. kind 和善的。

	Hey, it's a very kind monster! 是很友善的怪獸!

	So what's the show about? 布袋戲在演什麼?

	A super scary story! 很可怕的故事!

	4. last year 去年。

	You must come and watch! 你一定要來看!

	I watched one last year. 我去年看過一齣。

	It was really bad. 很糟糕。

	你有沒有看過布袋戲?

	puppet show布袋戲 monster怪獸 kind和善的 last year去年

	________________________________________

	Quiz

	1. What kind of puppets do people put on their hands?

	a. Shoe puppets

	b. Sock puppets

	c. Glove puppets

	2. Who had a contest last year?

	a. Monsters

	b. Taiwan's arts center

	c. Amis people

	3. How many winning stories will be shown in Taipei this August?

	a. 3 stories

	b. 6 stories

	c. 300 stories

	Answers

	1. c

	2. b

	3. a

	Budaixi are on TV now! B?d?ix? TV shows have bright lights and exciting

	music! The puppets are beautiful! The shows are famous!

	布袋戲現在在電視上也看得到。電視版的布袋戲有燈光和精彩音樂，木偶也做得很精緻，所以很受歡迎。

	Last year, Taiwan's arts center had a budaixi story contest. It wanted

	stories for kids. Six stories won prizes!

	去年台灣傳統藝術中心舉辦了一場比賽，徵求適合兒童的布袋戲，最後一共有六個作品得獎。

	The first prize winner is "Giant Ali." The writer knew an Amis story about a

	scary monster. But in her story, the monster is kind. Another winning story

	is about Guishan Island in Yilan.

	冠軍劇本叫做《巨人阿里》。作者從阿美族的怪物傳說得到靈感，但她的劇本裡面的怪物都是友善的。另一個得獎故事則是跟宜蘭的龜山島有關！

	Three winning stories will be shown in Taipei in August! How about enjoying

	budaixi this summer?

	*布袋戲

	________________________________________
sections.vocabulary:
Vocabulary

	布袋戲在台灣很受歡迎，歷久不衰，現在還有給兒童看的布袋戲。

	1. puppet show 布袋戲。

	Ooo, a puppet! Fancy. 一個木偶，真稀奇。

	Did you make it yourself? 自己做的嗎?

	Of course not. 當然不是。 My teacher made it. 我的老師做的。

	We're prepping for a puppet show. 我們準備演一齣布袋戲。

	2. monster 怪獸。

	Nice. Do you have a name for it? 真好，你的木偶有名字嗎?

	I call it Wugui, meaning turtle. 我叫它烏龜。

	It looks more like a monster. 看起來更像怪獸。

	3. kind 和善的。

	Hey, it's a very kind monster! 是很友善的怪獸!

	So what's the show about? 布袋戲在演什麼?

	A super scary story! 很可怕的故事!

	4. last year 去年。

	You must come and watch! 你一定要來看!

	I watched one last year. 我去年看過一齣。

	It was really bad. 很糟糕。

	你有沒有看過布袋戲?

	puppet show布袋戲 monster怪獸 kind和善的 last year去年

	________________________________________
sections.quiz:
Quiz

	1. What kind of puppets do people put on their hands?

	a. Shoe puppets

	b. Sock puppets

	c. Glove puppets

	2. Who had a contest last year?

	a. Monsters

	b. Taiwan's arts center

	c. Amis people

	3. How many winning stories will be shown in Taipei this August?

	a. 3 stories

	b. 6 stories

	c. 300 stories

episodes.title: Tires on Two Taichung Trees
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Tires on Two Taichung Trees

	In Taichung, there are two mango trees in front of a house. Some people

	driving or walking by see the trees. They stop. They look at the trees again.

	There is something strange around the bottom of the trees…

	台中有一戶人家門口種了兩棵芒果樹。大家經過的時候都會停下來看兩眼，因為芒果樹的底部有點怪怪的。

	The strange things are car tires! But the tires are not cut. How did they get

	there? Everyone wanted to know the answer.

	奇怪的東西是輪胎！所有人都很好奇，輪胎沒有切割過的痕跡，所以它們是怎麼套在樹幹上的？

	The tree branches are big. Tires cannot go on the trees from the top. The

	roots are deep. Tires cannot go on the trees from the bottom.

	芒果樹枝葉茂密，扎根也很深，無論是從樹的上面還是下面，輪胎都沒辦法穿過去。

	Maybe someone used magic to put the tires there! Or maybe someone put lots of

	lotion on the tires!

	也許是有人用魔法? 或者是有人把乳液抹在輪胎上！

	The owner of the house knew the answer. Twenty years ago, the trees were

	small. His father planted them in the tires. He wanted to keep the trees safe

	from dogs.

	那間房子的主人知道答案。二十年前，這兩棵芒果樹還很矮小。為了防止狗狗尿尿，主人的爸爸就把輪胎套著樹幹加以保護！

	Now, the trees are more than six meters tall. Do the tires keep the trees

	safe from dogs now? Well, some dogs still try to... you know... water them!

	現在，芒果樹已經長到六公尺高了。但就算長到這麼高，還是擋不住有一些狗狗想幫樹「澆水」！

	Have you seen a tire around a tree? Take a look around!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	樹幹底下居然圍著一個輪胎，這確實讓人好奇。

	1. top 最上面。

	Look at that tower! 你看那座塔!

	How tall do you think it is? 你認為它有多高?

	From top to bottom? 從最上面到底下嗎?

	Yeah. 對。

	I'd say 90 meters. 我想有九十公尺。

	2. answer 答案。

	Hey! Did you secretly check my phone? 嘿，你是不是偷看我的手機?

	No way! Wait, did I get it right? 才沒有! 等等，我說對了喔?

	Super close. The answer is 92 meters! 非常接近了。答案是九十二公尺!

	3. deep 深的。

	Yes! See, I do know things. 看吧，我也是懂不少東西的。

	How deep is the tower's foundation? 那座塔的地基有多深?

	4. safe 安全的。

	With so many earthquakes here, my guess is 30 meters.

	這裡有好多地震，我猜三十公尺。

	Just to keep the tower safe.好維持塔的安全。

	今天的單字很簡單。

	top最上面 answer答案 deep深的 safe安全的

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. What were the strange things around the mango trees?

	a. Tires

	b. Roots

	c. Branches

	2. Who knew the answer about the strange things?

	a. The owner of the house

	b. People walking by the trees

	c. The owner's dogs

	3. What was the answer about the strange things?

	a. Someone used lotion.

	b. Someone used magic.

	c. Someone planted trees in them.

	Answers

	1. a

	2. a

	3. c

episodes.title: Miaoli Man’s Vietnamese Tea
episodes.transcript:
Miaoli Man’s Vietnamese Tea

	 

	In Vietnam, some old trees grow high in the mountains. Some of the trees are more than one hundred years old! Going to these trees takes many hours.

	越南的高山上，有一些歲數超過百年的大樹，想見到這些樹要花好幾個小時才到得了！

	 

	Fifteen years ago, a man from Miaoli went to Vietnam. He drank some tea. It was made from the leaves of these old trees. He loved it!

	苗栗一名男子十五年前去到越南，喝了用這種樹的葉子泡出來的茶後，非常喜歡。

	 

	The tea was healthy to drink. But it was bitter. The local people liked it. But many other people did not.

	這個茶對身體很好，但喝起來很苦澀。當地人喜歡這種茶，其他人可一點也不。

	 

	The man wanted to make a delicious tea from these tree leaves. He wanted to take the bitter taste away.

	這名男子想用這些樹葉做出更好喝、不會苦澀的茶！

	 

	The man's family made tea in Taiwan. He tried tea-making ways from Taiwan. He used fresh tea leaves. He used machines. He watched the weather. 

	他自己的家族就在台灣製作茶葉，因此他開始在越南使用家鄉的產茶方法。他用新鮮的茶葉，先進的機器，還觀察天氣的變化。

	 

	Making his tea delicious was very hard. Sometimes the man cried. But he did not give up.

	過程非常困難，但是他即便他有時候累到哭，也沒有放棄！

	 

	Slowly, the tea tasted better and better. Famous people in Vietnam buy the man's tea from him now. He does not sell it in shops.

	在他的努力之下，原本苦澀的茶變得越來越好喝！現在，很多越南的知名人士會直接來跟他買茶，商店裡還買不到喔！ 

	 

	Taiwan's tea-making ways helped the man in Vietnam. He made a bitter tea into a delicious tea!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	 

	Vocabulary

	來自台灣的製茶師傅，用稀有的越南古老茶樹的樹葉，做出美味的茶。

	 

	1. drink 喝。

	Would you like some coffee? 你要來一點咖啡嗎? 

	No, thank you. 不了，謝謝你。

	Now I drink tea. 我現在喝茶。

	 

	2. famous 有名的。

	Really? I’ve got some great tea from India. 真的哦，我有來自印度的好茶。

	It’s a famous brand. 是很有名的牌子。

	Nice, let’s give it a try. 真好，我們來嚐一嚐。

	 

	3. give up 放棄。

	Mmmm, this is really good! 這個茶真好喝! 

	It’s funny seeing you drink tea. 看你喝茶有點好笑。

	Why did you give up coffee? 你怎麼放棄了咖啡? 

	My sleep was getting worse. 我的睡眠越來越糟。

	 

	4. better 更好的。

	And tea helps you sleep better? 茶會讓你睡得好些? 

	Not really. But at least I don’t feel like a zombie.

	 

	也不會，但至少我不覺得像個殭屍。

	Try to use these words: drink喝    famous有名的    give up放棄    better更好的

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	 

	Quiz

	 

	1. How did the tea taste at first?

	a. Bitter

	b. Old

	c. Sweet

	 

	2. Where is the man from?

	a. Vietnam

	b. Japan

	c. Taiwan

	 

	3. Who buys the man's tea?

	a. His family

	b. Famous people

	c. People in shops

	 

	Answers

	1. a

	2. c

	3. b

episodes.title: Bear Lives Under House
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Bear Lives Under House

	In the U.S., many black bears live in forests. But one bear lived under a

	house!

	美國有很多黑熊住在森林裡。但有一頭熊竟然住在一棟房子的底下！

	A big fire burned the bear's forest. There was no place for it to live there.

	It found a man's house. Under the house, it was dark. So the bear stayed

	there for more than one month!

	一場森林大火把這頭熊原本的棲息地燒掉了，牠無處可去，最後找到這名男子的房屋。房屋底下的空間很暗，熊熊就在那裏住了一個多月！

	The man did not want the bear there. It was dangerous for him and his house!

	This bear was about two hundred thirty kilograms. When it moved around, it

	broke many things!

	房子的主人不想要熊住在那裡，牠有230公斤重，在房屋下面活動的時弄壞東西，對房屋或者是主人造成危害。

	The man called for help. Some people came. They try to catch bears. They

	tried to make the bear come out. But the bear stayed under the house.

	這名男子打電話求救，抓熊專家抵達，想把熊嚇出來，但是沒有成功。

	Other people came. They try to help bears. One man went under the house! He

	went behind the bear! And the bear came out!

	另外一群人來了。其中一人爬到房子的下面，繞到熊熊的背後，終於把熊趕出去了！

	The bear came back one time. But now there is a mat where he got in before.

	It has electricity. Zap zap! It scared the bear away!

	這頭熊後來還想再回來，但現在房屋的底下入口處有個通電的腳踏墊，只要一碰到就會被電，把熊嚇走！

	Kids, if there is a bear under your house, do not go there! Call for help!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	這頭黑熊找到好地方棲身，卻給主人帶來麻煩。

	1. dark 黑暗的。

	It's getting dark, 天越來越黑了，

	and we still don't know where we are. 我們還是不知道身在何方。

	You're right. We are totally lost. 你說得對，我們完全迷路了。

	2. call for 請求。

	Should we call for help? 我們要求救嗎?

	No, let me figure it out. 不要，讓我想想辦法。

	3. move around 到處活動。

	Figure it out? 想辦法?

	In this dark forest? 在這個黑森林裡?

	Calm down. I'll move around a bit and find a way.

	鎮定一點。我到處走一下，看看有沒有路。

	4. break 弄斷。

	Don't leave me here alone. 不要把我單獨留在這裡。

	Come on, don't scare yourself. 好啦，不要自己嚇自己!

	Did you hear that? 你有沒有聽到?

	Something broke a branch. 有東西弄斷了樹枝。

	Help!! 救命!

	你有迷路的經驗嗎?

	dark黑暗的 call for請求 move around到處活動 break弄斷

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. Why did the bear live under the man's house?

	a. It found lots of food there.

	b. A big fire burned its forest.

	c. The man wanted it to live there.

	2. What happened when the bear moved around under the house?

	a. People came to the house.

	b. It made the man happy.

	c. It broke things.

	3. What does the mat have?

	a. Electricity

	b. Honey

	c. Fire

	Answers

	1. b

	2. c

	3. a
