sections.vocabulary:
Vocabulary

	這頭黑熊找到好地方棲身，卻給主人帶來麻煩。

	1. dark 黑暗的。

	It's getting dark, 天越來越黑了，

	and we still don't know where we are. 我們還是不知道身在何方。

	You're right. We are totally lost. 你說得對，我們完全迷路了。

	2. call for 請求。

	Should we call for help? 我們要求救嗎?

	No, let me figure it out. 不要，讓我想想辦法。

	3. move around 到處活動。

	Figure it out? 想辦法?

	In this dark forest? 在這個黑森林裡?

	Calm down. I'll move around a bit and find a way.

	鎮定一點。我到處走一下，看看有沒有路。

	4. break 弄斷。

	Don't leave me here alone. 不要把我單獨留在這裡。

	Come on, don't scare yourself. 好啦，不要自己嚇自己!

	Did you hear that? 你有沒有聽到?

	Something broke a branch. 有東西弄斷了樹枝。

	Help!! 救命!

	你有迷路的經驗嗎?

	dark黑暗的 call for請求 move around到處活動 break弄斷

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
sections.quiz:
Quiz

	1. Why did the bear live under the man's house?

	a. It found lots of food there.

	b. A big fire burned its forest.

	c. The man wanted it to live there.

	2. What happened when the bear moved around under the house?

	a. People came to the house.

	b. It made the man happy.

	c. It broke things.

	3. What does the mat have?

	a. Electricity

	b. Honey

	c. Fire

episodes.title: Taylor Swift in the Songwriters Hall of Fame
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Taylor Swift in the Songwriters Hall of Fame

	Some singers do not write their songs. But pop star Taylor Swift writes her

	songs. She is a songwriter!

	有些歌手不會自己作曲，但流行歌曲巨星泰勒絲，是自己寫歌的創作型歌手！

	Taylor Swift writes songs about her life. She writes about her family. She

	writes about her friends. She writes about her boyfriends too! Her songs tell

	stories.

	泰勒絲常常在歌曲中提到她的親友跟男朋友。她把自己的生活寫進歌裡，就像在說故事一樣。

	The Songwriters Hall of Fame honors the best writers of songs in English.

	They can be honored after 20 years of songwriting.

	「詞曲作者名人堂」專門表揚最佳的英文歌曲創作者。想進入這個名人堂，需要有20年的作曲資歷！

	Taylor Swift's first album was in 2006. That was 20 years ago!

	泰勒絲2006年發行第一張專輯，到現在剛好滿20年！

	So this year, the Songwriters Hall of Fame honored Taylor Swift. She is the

	youngest woman to be honored!

	今年「詞曲作者名人堂」給了她這項榮譽，她是名人堂中最年輕的女性得獎者！

	This was the second time the Songwriters Hall of Fame honored Taylor Swift.

	In 2010, it gave her an award for being a very good young songwriter. She was

	20 years old! She was the youngest woman to win that award!

	這其實不是她第一次得獎。早在2010年，泰勒絲就拿過優秀年輕作曲家獎，當時才20歲，也是最年輕的女性得獎者！

	Great job, Taylor Swift! Keep writing your songs!

	________________________________________

	Vocabulary

	泰勒絲才華橫溢，能唱能作曲，年紀輕輕就獲得許多獎項。

	1. youngest 最年輕的。

	Look at that girl on stage. 你看舞台上那個女孩。

	Uh-hum.

	She’s the youngest singer there. 她是那裏最年輕的歌手。

	No kidding. She looks so calm! 真的喔，她看起來好鎮定!

	2. win 贏得。

	And she sings very well, too. 她也唱得非常好。

	She may win the whole contest! 她可能贏得整場比賽呢!

	3. song 歌曲。

	Her songs are quite unusual. 她的歌滿特別的。

	I know, right? 可不是?

	That’s because she writes her own songs. 那是因為她的歌都自己寫。

	4. write 寫作。

	So she writes about memories and dreams? 所以她都寫回憶跟夢境?

	She does. And so much more. 沒錯，還有很多別的。

	Are you a fan of Taylor Swift? 來讀讀今天的單字。

	youngest 最年輕的 win 贏得 song 歌曲 write 寫作

	________________________________________

	Quiz

	1. What are people who write songs called?

	a. Songwriters

	b. Singing writers

	c. Strong writers

	2. When did Taylor Swift’s first album come out?

	a. 2000

	b. 2006

	c. 2020

	3. Who is the youngest woman to be honored by this Hall of Fame?

	a. Mariah Carey

	b. Missy Elliott

	c. Taylor Swift

	Answers

	1. a

	2. b

	3. c

episodes.title: Old Vehicle Carries New Rocket
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Old Vehicle Carries New Rocket

	A rocket stands on a launch pad. That is where rockets take off. The rocket

	is 100 meters tall. NASA made it. NASA is the U.S. space agency.

	火箭矗立在發射台上，準備發射升空。這枚火箭高達100公尺，是美國太空總署製造的。

	NASA made the rocket 7 kilometers from the launch pad. So how did it get

	there?

	太空總署組裝火箭的地方，距離發射台有七公里，但它是怎麼運去發射台的呢？

	A vehicle carried it. Vehicles carry people and things. Cars, trucks and

	rockets are vehicles. The vehicle for the rocket is big. It is bigger than a

	baseball infield! It weighs 3 million kilograms! No other vehicle can carry

	the rocket. And, it is 63 years old!

	火箭是用一台大型運輸車載過去的。這台運輸車非常大，比棒球場的內野還大，重達三百萬公斤！這台車已經有63年的歷史了，除了它以外沒有其他車能載得了火箭。

	The new rocket stood on this old vehicle. The vehicle moved slowly. Many

	people came to watch. They took pictures.

	全新的火箭就放在這台老車上，慢慢往前移動。很多人來觀看並且拍照記錄這一刻。

	The vehicle took 12 hours to go to the launch pad! But it carried the rocket

	safely there. And, on April 1st, the rocket took off to go around the moon!

	走了整整12個小時，火箭終於安全地送到發射台！在今年4月1號，火箭成功升空，飛向月球！

	Many people helped make the rocket. Many people helped it take off. But the

	old vehicle was a big help too!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	這枚火箭在繞月球飛行一圈之後，已經回到了地球。

	1. take off 起飛。

	Come quickly! 快來!

	The rocket is about to take off! 火箭要起飛了!

	Wait! I want to take pictures! 等一下，我要照相!

	2. moon 月球。

	Wow, that's amazing! 哇，真精采!

	Yeah, it's going to the moon. 它要去月球。

	Will it land on the moon? 會不會降落在月球上?

	Nope. 不會。

	3. launch 發射。

	Then why did NASA launch it? 那太空總署為什麼要發射那枚火箭?

	To study the moon up close! 好近距離研究月亮啊!

	4. carry 搭載。

	Imagine that. 想想看。Just sitting there while a spaceship carries you into

	space.

	就坐在那兒，讓太空船載著你進入太空。

	今天的單字你是不是都記住了?

	take off起飛 moon月球 launch發射 carry搭載

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. What space agency made the rocket?

	a. TASA

	b. KASA

	c. NASA

	2. What do vehicles do?

	a. Carry people and things

	b. Take pictures

	c. Play baseball

	3. How long did it take to go to the launch pad?

	a. 7 hours

	b. 12 hours

	c. 63 hours

	Answers

	1. c

	2. a

	3. b

episodes.title: The Green Museumbrary Is Open
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	The Green Museumbrary Is Open

	Narrator: Do you like going to museums? How about libraries? Well, how about

	a museumbrary? Hm? What?!

	你喜歡參觀美術館或是圖書館嗎? 假如兩個合併在一起呢?

	The Taichung Green Museumbrary is an exciting new place. It is in a big green

	park. It is part museum! It is part library!

	台中綠美圖就是這樣一個二合一的地方! 它一部分是美術館，另一部分是圖書館。

	The number of kids who read books is going down. Screens on phones, tablets,

	and TVs can take up a lot of time! The Green Museumbrary can help you learn

	with no screens. You can learn about the world! You can read cool books!

	現代兒童比較少看書了，因為手機，電腦跟電視佔用了太多時間。綠美圖讓人不看螢幕也能學習各種知識，培養美感。

	The Green Museumbrary is big. It has eight buildings. They have lots of

	places to see. Find the place for kids and the place for teens. Walk on the

	sky bridge! Go up to the roof garden!

	綠美圖很大喔，有八棟建築，你可以去尋找兒童區跟青少年區，還可以走走天橋，去屋頂花園逛逛!

	You can get lost in the buildings. But that is okay.

	Girl: Excuse me, can you tell me how to get to the information desk?

	Museumbrary Staff: Sure, no problem! Let me show you how to get there …

	Narrator: Find someone wearing a Museumbrary uniform. That person will help

	you.

	萬一迷路了，別著急，可以隨時詢問穿著綠美圖制服的工作人員。

	The museum and the library open and close at different times. Check the

	website before you go!

	圖書館跟美術館部分每天開放跟關閉的時間不同，記得先查一下綠美圖網站。

	Go and have fun. You can learn something new!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	綠美圖是台中最新的圖書館和美術館，特別歡迎兒童。

	1. exciting 讓人興奮的。

	I'm going to the library to check out a book. 我要去圖書館借一本書。

	A book? Just one? 一本書? 只有一本?

	That's not very exciting. 那不夠讓人開心。

	2. read 閱讀。

	Hey, I like to read, learn, and relax! 嘿，我喜歡閱讀跟學習，還有放鬆。

	I'd rather go to a park. 我寧願去公園。

	It's more fun. 那比較好玩。

	3. roof garden 屋頂花園。

	The library is fun. 圖書館很好玩。

	And the library also has a roof garden! 而那個圖書館還有屋頂花園。

	4. close 關門。

	Now that's very interesting! 那就有趣了。

	When does your library close? 你的圖書館什麼時候關?

	What?! Are you going too? 什麼?你也要去?

	Of course! 當然!

	Do you prefer a library or a park?

	來跟我一起讀單字。

	exciting讓人興奮的 read閱讀 roof garden屋頂花園 close關門

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. Where is the Green Museumbrary?

	a. Taipei

	b. Taoyuan

	c. Taichung

	2. Where is the garden?

	a. On the roof

	b. In the kids' place

	c. Under the sky bridge

	3. How can you find out when the museum and library are open?

	a. Call the museum on Mondays

	b. Check the website

	c. Get lost in the buildings

	Answers

	1. c

	2. a

	3. b

episodes.title: Stinky Tofu on a Mountain in Keelung
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Stinky Tofu on a Mountain in Keelung

	On a mountain in Keelung, there is a stinky tofu shop. One man runs it. His

	name is A-hsing. Many trees are around the small shop. It has lots of signs

	outside. A-hsing wrote them.

	基隆山上有一家臭豆腐店，老闆兼廚師，名叫阿興，他的小店外面有很多樹叢，大大的標誌都是他手寫的。

	Eating at this shop is not easy. First, people have to shout the password

	outside. Can you guess it?

	來這裡吃臭豆腐需要講通關密語，才能吃到。是什麼密語你猜到了嗎?

	The password is "A-hsing! I want stinky tofu!" You have to shout this a few

	times. If you do not, maybe A-hsing will not come out!

	沒錯，就是:[阿興，我要吃臭豆腐]，而且要大聲叫好幾次，否則老闆可能不會出現。

	The shop has many stinky tofu dishes. Some are fried and crispy. Others are

	soft like pudding.

	這家店有多種不同的臭豆腐吃法，有的是油炸的酥脆口感，有的滑嫩像布丁。

	You can choose how stinky your tofu is. There is stinky, very stinky, or

	extra stinky tofu!

	連臭味也可以選，中臭，大臭，或是特別臭!

	Some people think eating stinky tofu on a mountain is strange. But some drive

	a long way to eat it! People say it smells strong. But it is fun to try!

	Woohoo!

	有人覺得把店開在偏僻的山上很奇怪，也有人願意大老遠專程來吃。有人說味道實在太強烈，但它是有趣的經驗。

	If you eat this stinky tofu in the city, maybe your neighbors will not like

	the smell. But on this mountain in Keelung, A-hsing's tofu is a stinky star!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	這家基隆臭豆腐店遠近馳名，去吃一趟可不容易。

	1. smell 氣味。

	What are you cooking? 你在燒什麼菜?

	The smell is… strong. 氣味好重。

	Oh, it's stinky tofu. I just bought it. 是臭豆腐，我剛剛買的。

	2. extra 多出來的。

	It smells like something that's not from this world.

	它聞起來像是來自另外一個世界。

	Haha! Sorry. 真抱歉。

	I added extra spices. 我多加了調味料。

	3. shop 商店。

	Is it from that shop you often talk about? 是你常常講的那家店買的?

	Yeah, that's the one. 對，就是那家。

	4. strange 奇怪的。

	It's strange that people actually love it. 真奇怪有人真的喜歡。

	I get it. 我懂。That's exactly how I felt when you were eating durian.

	你吃榴槤時我就是那種感覺。

	你愛吃哪些食物呢?

	smell氣味 extra多出來的 shop商店 strange奇怪的

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. Where is this stinky tofu shop?

	a. A beach

	b. A mountain

	c. A night market

	2. What do people have to do to eat at the shop?

	a. Knock on the door

	b. Use a QR code

	c. Shout the password

	3. What can people choose at the shop?

	a. How stinky their tofu is

	b. How long they will drive

	c. How much they will pay for a dish

	Answers

	1. b

	2. c

	3. a

	Stinky Tofu on a Mountain in Keelung

	On a mountain in Keelung, there is a stinky tofu shop. One man runs it. His

	name is A-hsing. Many trees are around the small shop. It has lots of signs

	outside. A-hsing wrote them.

	基隆山上有一家臭豆腐店，老闆兼廚師，名叫阿興，他的小店外面有很多樹叢，大大的標誌都是他手寫的。

	Eating at this shop is not easy. First, people have to shout the password

	outside. Can you guess it?

	來這裡吃臭豆腐需要講通關密語，才能吃到。是什麼密語你猜到了嗎?

episodes.title: Company Says Its Robots Will Do Our Work
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Company Says Its Robots Will Do Our Work

	A company makes cars. But now it wants to make robots! These robots have a

	head, two arms, and two legs. They look a little like humans. They move like

	humans.

	一家汽車製造公司想做機器人，有頭，有四肢，看起來像人，動作也像人。

	The company wants to make one million robots every year. It says the robots

	will do lots of things. They will clean our homes. They will do work for

	companies.

	這家公司準備每年製造一百萬個機器人，會打掃家裡，也會在公司工作。

	The company's boss thinks everyone will want a robot. He says one robot will

	cost from $640,000 Taiwan dollars to one million Taiwan dollars.

	公司老闆相信大家都想要機器人，每個的售價從六十四萬台幣到一百萬不等。

	The company's boss also says robots will help people a lot. He says people

	will not have to work! He says robots will be able to do all the work.

	他說有了機器人，人類就不必親自工作了，機器人可以代勞。

	But people can do many things. So some people say robots will not be able to

	do everything people can. Robots can do some things now. They can serve

	popcorn. They can play ping pong. But will they be able to do everyone's job?

	但是機器人真的有那麼能幹，會做所有的事情嗎?

	他現在可以做爆米花，可以打桌球，但是接替人類的工作，行嗎?

	What do you think? Will a robot be able to do everything for you one day?

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	一家公司想要製造許多機器人，協助人類做大部分的工作。

	1. play 打球。

	If you had a robot, what would you have it do?

	假如你有個機器人，你會要它做哪些事?

	Hmmmm, play tennis with me every night, 每天晚上陪我打網球，

	and let me win! 並且讓我贏!

	2. have to 必須。

	And it has to look like a human, 當 然，而且要它看起來很像人，

	with arms and legs…and a friendly face. 有手臂跟腿，跟一張友善的臉。

	3. clean 清潔打掃。

	What else do you want it to do? 你還想要它做什麼?

	Clean my home and tell me jokes. 打掃我家，講笑話給我聽。

	4. say 說話。

	What about you? 你呢?

	I just want it to follow me around saying, "You're doing great!"

	我只要它到處跟著我，告訴我: [你做得很棒!]

	Do you need a robot?

	來複習單字。

	play打球 have to必須 clean清潔打掃 say說話

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. What do the company's robots look a little like?

	a. People

	b. Cars

	c. Dogs

	2. What does the company's boss say people will not have to do?

	a. Buy a robot

	b. Serve popcorn

	c. Work

	3. What can the company's robots do now?

	a. Play ping pong

	b. Do everyone's job

	c. Drive the company's cars

	Answers

	1. a

	2. c

	3. a

episodes.title: School Starts Every Day with Dance Party
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	School Starts Every Day with Dance Party

	 

	How does your school day start?

	你每天的上學日怎麼開始？

	 

	Most kids start their school day in a classroom. They sit at their desks. The teacher checks which kids are there.

	大多數的小朋友一到學校會先進教室，坐在座位上等老師點名、上課。

	 

	Some kids start their school day in the school's cafeteria. They eat a healthy breakfast.

	也有些小朋友會先去學校餐廳，吃一頓健康早餐。

	 

	At one school in the UK, kids start every school day with some dancing! Kids, parents, and staff meet in the playground. They play music. They have a fun dance party!

	英國一所學校，小朋友每天到校後會先跳舞！學生、家長跟老師會一起到操場，放音樂，舉辦一場開心的舞會！

	 

	The school's dance parties started a few years ago. Everyone was getting ready for a big school dance. The kids were excited!

	天天辦舞會的活動是幾年前開始的。當時，學校要辦一個大舞會，大家都很期待。

	 

	The kids wanted to show everyone their best dance moves at the dance! The staff wanted to help them practice. So they played music every morning! 

	學生想在舞會上表現最棒的舞步，老師也想幫他們練習，所以每天早上都會放音樂讓大家跳舞。

	 

	Everyone loved dancing in the morning. Parents and staff danced too! The principal saw everyone loved the dance parties. So the music and dancing stayed!

	大家都喜歡早上跳舞，連家長跟老師也來加入！校長看到了，就把這個活動保留下來。

	 

	Dancing is a kind of exercise. It gets us moving. It’s good for our bodies. It gives us lots of energy!

	跳舞要全身都動起來，是很棒的運動，讓我們充滿活力！

	 

	Try it! Start your day by dancing, and see how good you feel!

	________________________________________

	 

	Vocabulary

	跳舞讓人快樂，英國這所小學的學生每天都跳舞。

	 

	1. every morning 每天早上。

	Do you like dancing? 你喜不喜歡跳舞? 

	I do, but these days, it’s mostly at the gym. 喜歡，不過現在都是在健身房跳。

	I dance in the park every morning! 我是每天早上在公園裡跳。

	 

	2. move 動作。

	Oh, I’ve seen that! 我有看過。

	Line dancing, right? 排舞，對吧? 

	Everyone doing the same moves? 大家都做一樣的動作? 

	That’s the one. 就是那個。

	 

	3. music 音樂。

	Come join us sometime. 你找時間來加入吧。

	We dance to great music! 我們跟著很棒的音樂跳!

	 

	4. playground 遊戲場。

	Where do you do it? 在哪裡? 

	On the big playground over there—hard to miss! 就在那裏的大遊戲場，很難找不到。

	 

	來跳舞吧!

	every morning每天早上    move動作    music音樂    playground遊戲場

	________________________________________

	 

	Quiz

	 

	1. Where do most kids start their school day?

	a. The classroom

	b. The cafeteria

	c. The playground

	 

	2. When does the UK school have a fun dance party?

	a. Friday nights

	b. Every school day

	c. Holidays

	 

	3. What does dancing give us lots of?

	a. Breakfast

	b. Energy

	c. Music

	 

	Answers

	1. a

	2. b

	3. b

episodes.title: The Last Elephant in the Forest
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	The Last Elephant in the Forest

	In South Africa, an elephant lives in a forest. Long ago, the forest was full

	of elephants. Now she is the last elephant there.

	在南非的森林裡住著一頭大象。很久以前，森林裡有很多大象，但如今只剩下她。

	Elephants like to be with other elephants. People say this elephant is lonely.

	大象是群居動物，喜歡和同伴相處。這隻大象很孤單！

	Elephants can live for a long time. This elephant is about fifty years old.

	She might be alone for twenty more years!

	雖然她已經五十歲了，不過大象壽命很長，這頭大象可能還要再孤單的活上二十年！

	A group had a plan. They planned to bring three elephants to the forest. The

	cost was more than nine million Taiwan dollars. The group had this money. The

	three elephants were ready!

	一個愛動物組織想幫忙，他們計畫帶三頭大象到這片森林陪伴孤單的大象，總費用超過九百萬台幣！錢和大象都準備就緒。

	South Africa checked the plan. It took a long time. The group waited and

	waited. But the three elephants could not wait. There was another forest for

	them. So the group stopped the plan.

	但是南非政府審查這個計畫花了很久時間，大家等了又等，那三隻大象等不下去了，他們去了另外一座森林，原本的計畫也叫停。

	The last elephant in this forest keeps walking alone every day. But many

	people care about her. They hope other elephants will come to be with her one

	day.

	人們好希望有一天會有其他的大象來陪她。

	They hope this forest can be full of elephants again!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	孤獨的大象需要同伴，人類似乎幫不了忙。

	1. full of 滿滿的。

	Wow, this place is full of people today! 哇，今天這裡都是人!

	You don't like crowds? 你是不喜歡人多?

	No, I'm okay. 不會，我還好。

	2. alone 單獨的。

	They make me feel less alone. 他們讓我覺得沒那麼孤單。

	You've got your family around you all the time! 你有家人總是圍繞著你!

	Not all the time. 並沒有總是。

	3. wait 等待。

	Fair enough. 那倒是。

	So what do you want to do here? 所以你在這兒想做什麼?

	If you don't mind waiting, we can line up for that donut shop.

	要是你不介意等，我們可以去排那家甜甜圈。

	4. take 花時間。

	Fine. But if it takes more than 30 minutes, you're buying.

	好，但是假如超過三十分鐘，由你付錢。

	It's a deal. 就這麼辦。

	今天的單字你記住了嗎?

	full of滿滿的 alone單獨的 wait等待 take花時間

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. How many elephants are in this forest?

	a. One elephant

	b. Three elephants

	c. Nine elephants

	2. Why did the group stop their plan?

	a. Three elephants could not wait

	b. One elephant could not wait

	c. The group had no money

	3. What do people hope for?

	a. No more elephants

	b. Three baby elephants

	c. A forest full of elephants

	Answers

	1. a

	2. a

	3. c

sections.story:
________________________________

	The Last Elephant in the Forest

	In South Africa, an elephant lives in a forest. Long ago, the forest was full

	of elephants. Now she is the last elephant there.

	在南非的森林裡住著一頭大象。很久以前，森林裡有很多大象，但如今只剩下她。

	Elephants like to be with other elephants. People say this elephant is lonely.

	大象是群居動物，喜歡和同伴相處。這隻大象很孤單！

	Elephants can live for a long time. This elephant is about fifty years old.

	She might be alone for twenty more years!

	雖然她已經五十歲了，不過大象壽命很長，這頭大象可能還要再孤單的活上二十年！

	A group had a plan. They planned to bring three elephants to the forest. The

	cost was more than nine million Taiwan dollars. The group had this money. The

	three elephants were ready!

	一個愛動物組織想幫忙，他們計畫帶三頭大象到這片森林陪伴孤單的大象，總費用超過九百萬台幣！錢和大象都準備就緒。

	South Africa checked the plan. It took a long time. The group waited and

	waited. But the three elephants could not wait. There was another forest for

	them. So the group stopped the plan.

	但是南非政府審查這個計畫花了很久時間，大家等了又等，那三隻大象等不下去了，他們去了另外一座森林，原本的計畫也叫停。

	The last elephant in this forest keeps walking alone every day. But many

	people care about her. They hope other elephants will come to be with her one

	day.

	人們好希望有一天會有其他的大象來陪她。

	They hope this forest can be full of elephants again!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
sections.vocabulary:
Vocabulary

	孤獨的大象需要同伴，人類似乎幫不了忙。

	1. full of 滿滿的。

	Wow, this place is full of people today! 哇，今天這裡都是人!

	You don't like crowds? 你是不喜歡人多?

	No, I'm okay. 不會，我還好。

	2. alone 單獨的。

	They make me feel less alone. 他們讓我覺得沒那麼孤單。

	You've got your family around you all the time! 你有家人總是圍繞著你!

	Not all the time. 並沒有總是。

	3. wait 等待。

	Fair enough. 那倒是。

	So what do you want to do here? 所以你在這兒想做什麼?

	If you don't mind waiting, we can line up for that donut shop.

	要是你不介意等，我們可以去排那家甜甜圈。

	4. take 花時間。

	Fine. But if it takes more than 30 minutes, you're buying.

	好，但是假如超過三十分鐘，由你付錢。

	It's a deal. 就這麼辦。

	今天的單字你記住了嗎?

	full of滿滿的 alone單獨的 wait等待 take花時間

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
sections.quiz:
Quiz

	1. How many elephants are in this forest?

	a. One elephant

	b. Three elephants

	c. Nine elephants

	2. Why did the group stop their plan?

	a. Three elephants could not wait

	b. One elephant could not wait

	c. The group had no money

	3. What do people hope for?

	a. No more elephants

	b. Three baby elephants

	c. A forest full of elephants

episodes.title: A Man and His Umbrella
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	A Man and His Umbrella

	A man walked down a street in Yilan. He was holding an umbrella over his head.

	一名男子撐著傘走過宜蘭的街道。

	Was it starting to rain? No, there were no clouds in the sky. Was the

	umbrella a sun umbrella? Well, it was a sunny day…

	當天並沒有下雨，是個大晴天。所以那把傘是陽傘嗎?

	People looked at the umbrella. Then they looked again! There was something

	different about this umbrella. It had a handle. It had a pole. It had ribs.

	But there was no cloth covering the umbrella. So it was not a sun umbrella.

	那把傘吸引了許多人的注意。它有傘骨，有傘柄，可是上面沒有傘布! 這是怎麼回事?

	The man was carrying an umbrella on his arm too. That umbrella had cloth on

	it. But he did not use it. He kept holding up the umbrella with no cloth.

	男子的手臂上掛著一把有傘布的傘，卻沒有用。他撐的傘只有骨架。

	One person said this umbrella was cool. Another person said maybe the man was

	holding up air.

	有人覺得他的傘很酷，也有人說他撐著空氣。

	No one knew why the man was holding up this umbrella. But everyone was kind.

	They did not laugh. They did not point a finger at him. They let him be

	himself.

	大家都不懂他為什麼要用那把傘，但是沒有嘲笑他，只是默默的看著他走過去。

	Why was the man holding up an umbrella with no cover? What do you think?

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	男子撐的傘，頂多只有裝飾作用。還是他在表演?

	1. street 街道。

	Going out for a walk? 出去散步?

	Yeah. There’s a new coffee shop down the street. 對，街上新開了一家咖啡館。

	I want to check it out. 我要去看看。

	2. sunny 晴朗的。

	You’d better take an umbrella with you. 你最好帶把傘。

	But it’s sunny outside. 可是外面有太陽。

	For now. Just wait–it’ll rain. 現在有，等下就會下雨。

	3. cover 遮住。

	Did Google tell you that? 谷歌跟你說的?

	No, my nose did. 不是，我的鼻子說的。

	No worries, I’ve got a hoodie. It’ll cover me.

	不擔心，我有連身帽，會遮住我。

	4. carry 攜帶。

	You just hate carrying an umbrella. 你就是討厭帶傘。

	Exactly. 正是。

	Do you take an umbrella when you go out?

	來一起讀今天的單字。

	street街道 sunny晴朗的 cover遮住 carry攜帶

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. Where was the man walking?

	a. Keelung

	b. Taipei

	c. Yilan

	2. How was the weather that day?

	a. It was rainy.

	b. It was cloudy.

	c. It was sunny.

	3. How many umbrellas did the man have?

	a. One umbrella

	b. Two umbrellas

	c. Three umbrellas

	Answers

	1. c

	2. c

	3. b

episodes.title: Surprise in Space
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Surprise in Space

	Seven astronauts were living on the International Space Station. It is four

	hundred kilometers above Earth!

	有七位太空人住在距離地球大約四百公里的國際太空站。

	One day, two astronauts got ready to go on a spacewalk. On spacewalks,

	astronauts go outside the station. They fix things or try new things.

	有一天，兩位太空人準備做太空漫步。太空漫步就是到太空站外面修理設備或是做實驗。

	But they had a bad surprise. One astronaut felt very sick! They did not go on

	the spacewalk.

	但是突然發生意外! 其中一人覺得身體很不舒服，所以他們沒有進行太空漫步。

	The astronauts had trained a lot on Earth. They were calm. They worked

	together. They knew what to do.

	這些太空人在地球上受過很多訓練，他們知道該怎麼冷靜的合作，解決問題。

	They used a machine. It looked inside the astronaut's body. They talked to

	doctors on Earth. The doctors wanted the astronaut to come back to Earth

	soon.

	他們用機器檢查那位太空人的身體後，跟在地球的醫生聯絡。醫生說，越快回到地球越好。

	People on Earth worked fast. They got a spaceship ready to go to the station.

	That was a big job!

	地球上的專家趕快行動，準備一艘要飛到太空站的太空船。這可是一件大工程！

	Four astronauts got ready to leave the station. Then they flew safely back to

	Earth on the spaceship.

	四位太空人搭著這艘太空船，安全回到地球。

	Doctors were waiting for them. And everyone was okay!

	醫生在地球等待太空人歸來，問題也順利解決！

	Astronauts train a lot. They are ready for surprises. They can help each

	other in space!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	在遙遠的太空站發生意外，要返回地球可不簡單。

	1. space 太空。

	Hey, would you like to watch a movie tonight? 今晚想去看電影嗎?

	The one about space ?那部太空電影嗎?

	Yeah.對。

	2. spacewalk 太空漫步。

	Wonderful! I’ll go with you. 太棒了，我跟你去。

	What is it about space that you like so much? 太空究竟有什麼讓你那麼喜歡?

	I love seeing astronauts go on spacewalks and dodge space rocks.

	我喜歡看太空人做太空漫步，躲避太空石頭。

	3. calm 冷靜的。

	But you don’t want to be an astronaut? 但是你不想當太空人?

	No. Never. 絕對不想。

	I can’t stay calm out there.我在那裏沒辦法保持冷靜。

	4. what to do 怎麼做。

	I wouldn’t know what to do if an accident happens.

	要是意外發生，我不知道該怎麼辦。

	你想飛進太空嗎?來讀單字。

	space太空 spacewalk太空漫步 calm冷靜的 what to do怎麼做

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. Where were the astronauts living?

	a. A spaceship

	b. The space station

	c. The moon

	2. Where are spacewalks done?

	a. Inside the station

	b. Outside the station

	c. In a spaceship

	3. What did people on Earth do?

	a. Get a spaceship ready

	b. Get on a spaceship

	c. Go to the space station

	Answers

	1. b

	2. b

	3. a

episodes.title: Deer Cowboys to Help Kenting
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Deer Cowboys to Help Kenting

	Formosan sika deer are cute. Taiwan is lucky to have them. The last wild one

	was seen about sixty years ago!

	台灣很幸運，擁有可愛的梅花鹿。但是最後一隻野生的梅花鹿，生活在六十年前。之後就沒有再看見了。

	About forty years ago, Kenting National Park got 22 Formosan sika deer from

	the Taipei Zoo. Now there are 3,600 deer in the park!

	台北動物園四十年前給了墾丁國家公園22隻梅花鹿。現在那裏已經有3,600隻梅花鹿！

	But that is too many deer for the park. They chew on trees. They eat plants.

	And wild dogs try to catch them. So the deer run to the road. Sometimes cars

	hit them…

	但梅花鹿太多了，造成麻煩。鹿會啃樹皮、吃植物，被野狗追趕的時候會跑到馬路上，有時候還會被汽車撞到。

	Park workers want 50 deer to be taken to another park this year. The other

	park has 20 deer!

	公園的工作人員希望今年可以把50隻鹿送到另外一個公園，那裡現在只有20隻鹿。

	But it is not easy to catch deer safely. And no one wants them to get hurt.

	要安全地捕捉鹿並不容易，大家也不希望梅花鹿在這個過程中受傷！

	So park workers are teaching some people how to catch a deer safely. These

	people will throw a rope around the deer's neck. They will be deer cowboys!

	工作人員教人如何安全捕捉梅花鹿。他們會用繩索套住鹿的脖子，就像牛仔一樣！

	Deer will be taken to the other park every year. This is good for Kenting

	National Park and the Formosan sika deer in both parks!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	墾丁公園的梅花鹿數量太多，對當地的生態和遊客都造成困惱。

	1. this year 今年。

	So, are you planning another national park trip this year?

	你今年打算去另外一個國家公園嗎?

	Yeah! Hopefully one with fewer people this time. 是的，我希望這次人比較少。

	2. too many 太多。

	You went to Kenting last year, right? 你去年去墾丁，對吧?

	I did… and way too many tourists there. 對，那兒的遊客實在太多了。

	3. want 想要。

	Maybe try one on an outlying island-like Penghu National Park.

	也許你可以試試外島，例如澎湖國家公園。

	I've always wanted to go fishing there! 我一直想去那裏釣魚!

	4. catch 抓到。

	Fishing? 釣魚? I don't know anything about that. 我對釣魚一無所知。

	But sure, go catch a big one for me! 不過好啊，抓一條大的給我!

	你拜訪過台灣哪些國家公園?

	this year今年 too many太多 want想要 catch抓到

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. How many deer are in this park?

	a. 22

	b. 50

	c. 3,600

	2. What are park workers teaching some people to do?

	a. Chew on trees

	b. Catch deer

	c. Catch wild dogs

	3. Where will some deer be taken to?

	a. Another park

	b. The Taipei Zoo

	c. Kenting National Park

	Answers

	1. c

	2. b

	3. a

	this year今年 too many太多 want想要 catch抓到

sections.quiz:
Quiz

	1. How many deer are in this park?

	a. 22

	b. 50

	c. 3,600

	2. What are park workers teaching some people to do?

	a. Chew on trees

	b. Catch deer

	c. Catch wild dogs

	3. Where will some deer be taken to?

	a. Another park

	b. The Taipei Zoo

	c. Kenting National Park

episodes.title: Free School Lunches in Taiwan
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Free School Lunches in Taiwan

	Narrator: What did you eat for lunch? Some people say:

	Auntie: You are what you eat.

	Narrator: Does that mean if you eat a sausage, you are a sausage?! No, no,

	no.

	你今天午餐吃什麼呢？有些人說「吃什麼像什麼」，但這不代表我們吃香腸就會變成香腸了！

	When we eat healthy food, we feel good. Healthy food is good for us. It’s

	good for our bodies and brains. It gives us more energy. That’s what people

	mean when they say:

	Auntie: You are what you eat!

	Narrator: Thanks, Auntie!

	當我們吃健康食物，身體與大腦會獲得很多能量，整體就變得健康。這就是「吃什麼像什麼」！

	Schools in Taiwan want to help kids eat healthy food. But it can cost a lot

	of money!

	學校希望學生們多吃健康食物，但是那些食物可不便宜！

	Some people think free school lunches can help. They are worried. They say

	some families do not have money for healthy food. They think schools should

	help students eat healthy food every day.

	有些家庭負擔不起，因此有人認為免費的營養午餐，會很有幫助！他們覺得學校應該確保學生天天都能吃得健康。

	But some people do not think free school lunches can help. They are worried

	too. They say some schools do not have money to buy healthy food. They think

	schools will give students food that is not healthy.

	但是也有人擔心經費不足的學校，沒辦法供應學生營養午餐，於是就給學生吃一些便宜而不健康的東西。

	Next year, most schools in Taiwan will have free school lunches. Will this

	help students eat healthy food? What do you think?

	________________________________________

	Vocabulary

	學校的營養午餐，對很多小朋友來說是重要的一餐。

	1. lunch 午餐。

	What are we having for lunch? 我們中飯吃什麼?

	Something healthy. 健康的東西。

	You don’t mean vegetable soup and cheese, right?

	你的意思不是指青菜湯跟起司吧?

	Hey, they are healthy! 那些是很健康啊!

	2. body 身體。

	Maybe, but they make me twice as hungry. 也許，但是會讓我的肚子加倍餓。

	Okay, how about an egg, fish and tomato sandwich?

	好吧，那來個蛋跟魚，還有番茄的三明治如何?

	Good for your body and brain. 對你的身體跟腦部都很好。

	3. give 給予。

	And also give you a lot of energy. 也會給你滿滿能量。

	4. energy 能量。

	I can sure use more energy. 我確實需要更多能量。

	Great! One sandwich coming right up! 好極了!一個三明治馬上就來。

	來複習今天的單字。

	lunch午餐 body身體 give給予 energy能量

	________________________________________

	Quiz

	1. What does Auntie say?

	a. You are what you see.

	b. You are what you eat.

	c. You are what you say.

	2. What does healthy food give us?

	a. More sausages

	b. Less brains

	c. More energy

	3. What do schools in Taiwan want kids to eat?

	a. Food that is healthy

	b. Food that is not healthy

	c. Food that costs a lot of money

	Answers

	1. b

	2. c

	3. a

episodes.title: Sheep Find Beautiful Snack
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Sheep Find Beautiful Snack

	A farm in Nantou has many cherry trees. Every year, the trees have many pink

	flowers. They are called cherry blossoms. Spring is the best time to see

	these beautiful blossoms.

	南投有一個農場有很多櫻花樹。春天是最適合賞櫻的季節，春天一到，樹上都會開滿粉紅色的櫻花。

	But this year, the sheep on the farm have another plan. To them, the blossoms

	look like delicious snacks!

	但是今年這座農場裡的羊群，認為櫻花看起來像好吃的點心！

	The sheep walk around the farm. They take small bites of the cherry blossoms.

	They eat some blossoms here. They eat some blossoms there.

	羊群在農場裡走動，邊走邊吃櫻花。這裡吃一點，那裡也吃一點。

	Soon, many cherry blossoms are gone! The wind did not blow them away. The

	sheep ate them!

	沒有多久，櫻花的數量就變少了！櫻花不是被風吹落，而是被羊群吃掉了！

	These sheep eat the cherry blossoms they can reach first. But they are smart.

	They also jump to get higher ones. They try very hard! Each sheep tries to

	get the last blossom!

	這些羊會先吃離牠們比較近的花朵，但是牠們很聰明，也會跳起來吃比較高的花。牠們很努力的跳啊跳，每隻羊都想吃到最後一朵花！

	People go to the farm to see cherry blossoms. And this year, they go to see

	the sheep too! They watch these sheep jump and eat the blossoms. It is fun!

	They laugh and take pictures.

	原本只想賞花的遊客現在也會來看這些羊！大家看到跳來跳去的羊，覺得很有趣，還會笑著幫牠們拍照。

	Have you seen cherry blossoms this spring? If you have not, hurry up! Or some

	sheep might eat them first!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	人類喜歡賞花，但是在羊群的眼中，花兒卻是美味的食物。

	1. cherry blossom 櫻花。

	Where do you usually go for cherry blossoms? 你通常去哪裡賞櫻?

	Well, I like cherries, but the blossoms? 我愛吃櫻桃，但是櫻花?

	Not so much. 就沒那麼喜歡了。

	2. pink 粉紅的。

	Don’t you think they’re beautiful? 你不覺得它很漂亮?

	Okay, they are pretty. 好吧，是很美。

	The pink ones are my favorite. 我最喜歡粉紅色的。

	3. flower 花。

	Then why not go see them? 那為什麼不去看?

	No, I wouldn’t go out of my way just for flowers. 不去，我不想專程去賞花。

	4. delicious 美味的。

	You’re not a romantic person, are you? 你不是個浪漫的人，對吧?

	I bake delicious cherry pies. 我會烤美味的櫻桃派。

	Does that make me romantic? 這樣算不算浪漫?

	今天的單字很可愛。

	cherry blossom櫻花 pink粉紅的 flower花 delicious美味的

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. Where is the farm?

	a. Yilan

	b. Nantou

	c. Hualien

	2. When is the best time to see cherry blossoms?

	a. Winter

	b. Spring

	c. Fall

	3. Why are many cherry blossoms gone on the farm?

	a. The sheep ate them.

	b. The wind blew them away.

	c. Birds ate them.

	Answers

	1. b

	2. b

	3. a

	c. Birds ate them.

episodes.title: Man Wants Big Home for Birds
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Man Wants Big Home for Birds

	In Kenya, a boy lived near a lake in a big park. Many birds lived there too.

	在肯亞，有個小男孩住在湖邊，這個湖在大公園裡。

	The boy liked watching the birds. Sometimes a bird was hurt, sick, or hungry.

	He tried to help them.

	湖邊有很多鳥，小男孩喜歡看這些鳥。當發現受傷、生病、或是肚子餓的鳥，他總是想辦法幫忙。

	The boy grew up. He went to live in Nairobi. Nairobi is a loud, busy city.

	Cars drive fast. Buildings have many windows. And power lines are everywhere.

	小男孩長大後，搬去了奈洛比。奈洛比是個吵雜忙碌的城市，路上的車子開得很快，建築物有很多窗戶，並且到處都是電線。

	The young man often saw hurt birds. They hit windows. They hit power lines.

	But no one helped them.

	這名男子常常看到受傷的鳥。有的鳥會撞到窗戶或是電線，可是都沒有人伸出援手。

	So the man helps birds again. He feeds them. He cares for them. But his home

	is very small. He cannot keep the birds until they get better.

	於是他又開始幫助這些鳥，照顧牠們，還餵牠們吃東西。不過他的家很小，沒辦法讓鳥住到完全康復。

	The man often walks with a bird on his head or shoulders. People call him the

	Nairobi Birdman.

	這名男子走在路上時，頭頂或肩膀上往往停著一隻鳥，所以大家都叫他「奈洛比鳥人」。

	The man wants to take care of more birds. He wants to have a big home for

	them. It will be a safe place for them to get better.

	這名男子希望照顧更多小鳥，也希望有比較大的家，可以讓鳥安全地休息、慢慢好起來！

	With some help, maybe the Nairobi Birdman can have a big home for birds. Then

	this young man can help more birds!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	喜歡鳥類的小男孩，長大之後仍然努力幫助他的鳥朋友。

	1. watch 注意看。

	I can't go shopping this weekend. 我這周末不能去逛街。

	I'm going birdwatching. 我要去賞鳥。

	Where are you going? 去哪裡?

	The Botanical Garden. 植物園。

	2. city 城市。

	In Taipei city? 在台北市嗎?

	Yeah. 對。

	Birds stay there even with so many people?! 人那麼多，鳥兒還待在那裏?

	They love it! There's a pond and many trees. 牠們很喜歡呢!

	那裏有池塘，有好多樹。

	3. place 地方。

	It's a perfect place for birds. 對鳥來說很完美。

	4. feed 餵食。

	Do you feed them? 你會餵牠們嗎?

	Nope. They're better at finding food than I am. 不，牠們找食物可比我行。

	Have you ever gone birdwatching?

	watch注意看 city城市 place地方 feed餵食

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. Where did the boy live?

	a. Near a lake

	b. In the city

	c. In Nairobi

	2. How do birds get hurt in the city?

	a. They fall from trees.

	b. They hit power lines.

	c. They eat too much.

	3. What do people call the man?

	a. The Kenyan Birdboy

	b. The Nairobi Citybird

	c. The Nairobi Birdman

	Answers

	1. a

	2. b

	3. c

episodes.title: Some Warm Clothes Can Make Kids Itch
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Some Warm Clothes Can Make Kids Itch

	The weather is getting warmer all over Taiwan. But sometimes it is cold. What

	do you wear then? Hmmmm. Clothes with fleece inside are soft and warm…

	天氣變涼的時候，穿有刷毛的衣服既柔軟又保暖！

	But wearing fleece can cause problems for kids. They can get red, itchy skin!

	This is not comfortable. For some kids, it hurts!

	可是，刷毛的衣服有時會讓小朋友的皮膚很不舒服！他們的皮膚會變紅、發癢，甚至會痛。

	Moms and dads were worried. Why was their kid's skin itchy? Some of them took

	their kid to the doctor.

	很多爸爸媽媽很擔心！為了知道小朋友皮膚癢的原因，他們還帶孩子去看醫生。

	Food was not making these kids itch. Bug bites were not making them itch.

	Doctors said fleece clothes were making kids itch!

	原來，小朋友皮膚癢不是因為食物過敏或是被昆蟲咬，而是因為穿了刷毛的衣服！

	When kids run and play, their clothes rub their skin. When they wear fleece

	next to their skin, kids can get hot and itchy. Kids also sweat. This makes

	their itchy skin itch more!

	當小朋友奔跑、玩耍的時候，衣服會摩擦他們的皮膚。穿刷毛的衣服時，皮膚就會被摩擦的又紅又癢！如果小朋友流汗的話，那就更癢了！

	So when the weather is cold, what can you do? Doctors say wearing 100% cotton

	clothes is the best. Wear them next to your skin. Then you can wear fleece or

	other warm clothes on top of your cotton clothes.

	那麼天氣冷的時候到底該怎麼穿呢？醫生建議，可以在最裡面穿一件100%棉質的衣服，再套刷毛或其他保暖的衣服！

	You will be warm this way. And your skin will not itch!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	有些保暖的衣物，可能會引起兒童皮膚過敏。

	1. weather 天氣。

	Wearing a sweater today was a bad idea. 今天穿毛衣真糟糕! It's way too warm!

	太熱了!

	Yeah, the weather's messing with you. 你被天氣給耍了。

	2. itch 發癢。

	This morning was cold, and now I'm melting and itching!

	今天早上還很冷，現在我都要融化了，還很癢!

	You'd better lose that sweater. 你最好脫掉那件毛衣。

	3. cotton 棉花。

	I've got a cotton shirt in my bag. 我包包裡有棉襯杉。

	You can borrow it if you don't mind. 可以借你，如果你不介意的話。

	4. best 最好的。

	Is it clean? 乾淨嗎?

	It smells okay. 聞起來還好。

	That's not very convincing… 聽起來不大有說服力。

	But yeah, I guess that's the best I can get right now.

	不過好吧，現在最好也只能這樣。

	今天的單字你記住了嗎?

	weather天氣 itch發癢 cotton棉花 best最好的

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. What made kids' skin itchy?

	a. Bug bites

	b. Fleece clothes

	c. Food

	2. What makes itchy skin itch more?

	a. Red skin

	b. Doctors

	c. Sweat

	3. What should you wear next to your skin?

	a. Itchy clothes

	b. Fleece clothes

	c. Cotton clothes

	Answers

	1. b

	2. c

	3. c

sections.story:
________________________________

	Some Warm Clothes Can Make Kids Itch

	The weather is getting warmer all over Taiwan. But sometimes it is cold. What

	do you wear then? Hmmmm. Clothes with fleece inside are soft and warm…

	天氣變涼的時候，穿有刷毛的衣服既柔軟又保暖！

	But wearing fleece can cause problems for kids. They can get red, itchy skin!

	This is not comfortable. For some kids, it hurts!

	可是，刷毛的衣服有時會讓小朋友的皮膚很不舒服！他們的皮膚會變紅、發癢，甚至會痛。

	Moms and dads were worried. Why was their kid's skin itchy? Some of them took

	their kid to the doctor.

	很多爸爸媽媽很擔心！為了知道小朋友皮膚癢的原因，他們還帶孩子去看醫生。

	Food was not making these kids itch. Bug bites were not making them itch.

	Doctors said fleece clothes were making kids itch!

	原來，小朋友皮膚癢不是因為食物過敏或是被昆蟲咬，而是因為穿了刷毛的衣服！

	When kids run and play, their clothes rub their skin. When they wear fleece

	next to their skin, kids can get hot and itchy. Kids also sweat. This makes

	their itchy skin itch more!

	當小朋友奔跑、玩耍的時候，衣服會摩擦他們的皮膚。穿刷毛的衣服時，皮膚就會被摩擦的又紅又癢！如果小朋友流汗的話，那就更癢了！

	So when the weather is cold, what can you do? Doctors say wearing 100% cotton

	clothes is the best. Wear them next to your skin. Then you can wear fleece or

	other warm clothes on top of your cotton clothes.

	那麼天氣冷的時候到底該怎麼穿呢？醫生建議，可以在最裡面穿一件100%棉質的衣服，再套刷毛或其他保暖的衣服！

	You will be warm this way. And your skin will not itch!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

episodes.title: Small Crabs Do a Big Cleanup
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Small Crabs Do a Big Cleanup

	Mangrove forests grow where the land and the sea meet. They are muddy!

	紅樹林生長在陸地與海的交界處，那裡都是泥巴地。

	In Colombia, the mud in a mangrove forest is dirty. It has many very small

	pieces of plastic in it. But, fiddler crabs are very busy there!

	在哥倫比亞的一片紅樹林裡面，地上的泥巴藏了很多小塑膠碎片跟忙個不停的招潮蟹。

	Maybe you have seen fiddler crabs in Taiwan. They are about three to five

	centimeters wide. Male crabs have one big claw and one small claw. Female

	crabs have two small claws. They live in mud. Every day, they eat mud.

	你也許在台灣也見過招潮蟹！牠們只有大約三到五公分寬。公的招潮蟹有一隻大螯跟一隻小螯，母蟹則有兩隻小螯。招潮蟹躲在泥巴裡，每天都吃泥巴裡的微小生物。

	Scientists studied some fiddler crabs in Colombia. When these crabs eat mud,

	they eat plastic too. This cleans the mud. There is more plastic in the crabs

	than in the mud!

	科學家研究這些哥倫比亞的招潮蟹，發現牠們在吃泥巴的時候也會把塑膠一起吃進去，讓泥巴變乾淨了。

	The crabs' stomach breaks plastic into smaller pieces. It does this in a few

	days. It does this faster than sunlight! It does this faster than ocean waves

	too! But too much plastic is bad for the crabs.

	招潮蟹的胃可以把塑膠分解成更小的碎片，而且速度比用陽光或海浪分解快很多。不過，吃太多塑膠對螃蟹還是不好！

	These small crabs are helping us. But they need our help too. Please recycle

	plastic. If you cannot, then throw it away in the right place!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	科學家發現招潮蟹有清潔環境的功能，並且效率高。

	1. big 大的。

	What are these little creatures? 這些小東西是什麼啊? They look funny!

	看起來很好玩!

	They are fiddler crabs. 是招潮蟹。See, one claw is very big, the other is

	small. 你看，一隻螯很大，一隻很小。

	2. smaller 比較小的。

	Even the body is smaller than the claw. 連身體都比它的螯小。Why? 為什麼?

	These are male crabs. 這些是公蟹。They use the big claws to fight.

	牠們用大螯來戰鬥。

	3. land 陸地。

	Can they swim if I throw them into the sea? 如果丟進海裡，牠們會游泳嗎? No,

	don't do that. 不會，不要那樣。They live on land. 牠們住在陸地上。

	4. mud 泥巴。

	And they eat mud. 並且吃泥巴。

	Yuck! 好難吃。

	I know. But they like it. 我知道，不過牠們喜歡。

	今天的單字你記住了嗎? big大的 smaller比較小的 land陸地 mud泥巴

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. What kind of claws do male fiddler crabs have?

	a. One small claw, one big claw

	b. Two small claws

	c. Two big claws

	2. What has more plastic?

	a. Forest mud

	b. Mangrove trees

	c. Fiddler crabs

	3. What happens to the plastic inside the crabs?

	a. It becomes food.

	b. It breaks into smaller pieces.

	c. It becomes a claw.

	Answers

	1. a

	2. c

	3. b

episodes.title: Watch and Do in Miaoli
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Watch and Do in Miaoli

	Have you been to Mingde Reservoir in Miaoli? It has fun things to watch and

	do.

	你去過苗栗的明德水庫嗎？那裡以後會有很多好玩的新活動喔！

	You can watch people ziplining high in the air! They are eighteen years old

	or older. Hey! Your mom and dad can do this!

	在明德水庫可以看到有人在玩高空滑索，不過要滿十八歲才能玩。也許你的爸媽可以去玩玩看！

	Ziplining is fun to watch. People start six stories up! Don't worry! The

	zipline is safe! People zip three hundred fifty meters to a small island!

	高空滑索看起來超級刺激！但別擔心，這個活動並不危險！玩滑索的人會從六層樓高的地方出發，一路滑到一座小島上。

	The view from the zipline is beautiful. People can see the reservoir below.

	Lots of trees are around it. Maybe people can see birds flying near them!

	沿途可以看到非常美麗的景色，包括下面的水庫和四周茂密的森林，說不定還能看到鳥在旁邊飛翔。

	You can also watch people riding a bike… in the air! They are also eighteen

	years old or older. Your mom and dad can do this too! Don't worry! The bike

	is safe. Lines at the top and bottom hold it.

	你也可以看到有人在空中騎腳踏車！這也要滿十八歲才能玩，你的爸爸媽媽可以參加。別怕，空中腳踏車有繩子固定著，所以很安全。

	There are things you can do. You can ride a boat across the reservoir. And

	soon, you can ride a bike on a bike path. It goes around the reservoir!

	當然，也有你可以玩的活動，像是坐船遊湖！之後，水庫周圍還會有腳踏車道，可以騎腳踏車繞一整圈。

	Miaoli's Mingde Reservoir has fun things to watch and do!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	明德水庫會有很酷的遊樂設施，歡迎遊客以後去玩。

	1. meter 公尺。

	Wow, we're already a hundred meters up! 哇，我們已經爬升了一百公尺!

	It feels like we're flying. 我感覺像在飛。

	Uh…I just feel dizzy! 我只覺得頭暈。

	2. in the air 在空中。

	Don't you find it exciting? 你不覺得很刺激嗎?

	We're hanging in the air! 我們懸在半空中。

	Don't remind me, please.拜託不要提醒我。

	3. tree 樹。

	You probably shouldn't look below, 你也許不該往下看，

	but there are so many trees! 不過有好多樹喔!

	I just want both feet on the ground. 我只想要兩隻腳踩在地上。

	4. ride 搭乘。

	Relax, we'll be down soon. 放輕鬆，我們馬上就要下去了。

	Next time let's ride the bus. 下次我們搭公車吧。

	來跟我一起讀今天的單字。

	meter公尺 in the air在空中 tree樹 ride搭乘

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. Where can people go high in the air?

	a. Liyutan Reservoir

	b. Mingde Reservoir

	c. Yongheshan Reservoir

	2. Where does the zipline go?

	a. To an island

	b. To a boat

	c. To a bike path

	3. What can people see below the zipline?

	a. A big school

	b. Many clouds

	c. The reservoir

	Answers

	1. b

	2. a

	3. c

episodes.title: Man Carries Dogs in His Backpack to Help Them
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Man Carries Dogs in His Backpack to Help Them

	Dogs are great pets. Many people have dogs. They take their dogs for walks.

	But a man in the U.S. also does something else with dogs.

	狗是很棒的寵物，很多人喜歡帶狗出門散步！美國有一名男子帶狗散步的理由很特別。

	Every week, this man carries a dog in his backpack. There is a new dog every

	time! The man walks. The dog looks around. They take the train. They go to a

	park. They go to a toy store!

	他每個星期會把一隻不同的狗放進背包裡帶出門。人跟狗一起走路、搭火車，去公園，甚至是去玩具店。

	The man does all of this to help the dog. The dog is not his. It lives in a

	place for animals with no homes.

	他這樣做是為了幫助這些狗。這些狗不是他的，而是住在收容所裡無家可歸的狗。

	People do not see a dog in a backpack every day. Seeing one makes them happy.

	They look at the dog. They want to pet it.

	大家看到有人把狗放在背包裡都會覺得很新奇、很開心，也會想摸摸狗。

	Maybe people will think the dog is funny and nice. Maybe someone will give it

	a new home! The label on the backpack says "Adopt me."

	這個背包上寫著:領養我吧。也許有人看到後會覺得這隻狗很可愛，願意帶牠回家。

	The man makes a video of the dog's fun day. He puts it online. Millions of

	people see it. And someone adopts the dog!

	這個男子也會把狗狗有趣的一天拍成影片上傳到網路，讓數百萬的人都看得到，其中總會有人願意領養！

	Because of this man, many dogs have a happy life in a new home!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	為了幫助被棄養的狗兒找到家，一名男子想出了有用的辦法。

	1. adopt 收養。

	Would you like to adopt a stray dog? 你想養一隻流浪狗嗎?

	Definitely not! I already have two kids. 一點也不想。我已經有兩個小孩了。

	2. every time 每一次。

	But every time you see a dog, 但是你每次看到狗，you want to pet it!

	都想去摸摸牠!

	Well, I just want to have some fun with it. 我只是想跟牠玩玩。

	3. fun 樂趣。

	If you had a dog at home, you could have more fun.

	如果你自己家就有狗，可以玩更多。

	Haha, yeah… and double the chaos! 是啊，混亂也會加倍。

	4. because 因為。

	But why are you asking me this? 但是你為什麼現在問這個?

	Because there's a dog in the park looking at us right now.

	因為公園裡就有一條狗正在看著我們。

	來讀單字。

	adopt收養 every time每一次 fun樂趣 because因為

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. What does the man carry dogs in?

	a. A backpack

	b. His arms

	c. A bag

	2. Why does the man carry dogs?

	a. To take them into a store

	b. To make them healthy

	c. To help them find new homes

	3. What does the label say?

	a. "Help me"

	b. "Adopt me"

	c. "Love me"

	Answers

	1. a

	2. c

	3. b

sections.story:
________________________________

	Man Carries Dogs in His Backpack to Help Them

	Dogs are great pets. Many people have dogs. They take their dogs for walks.

	But a man in the U.S. also does something else with dogs.

	狗是很棒的寵物，很多人喜歡帶狗出門散步！美國有一名男子帶狗散步的理由很特別。

	Every week, this man carries a dog in his backpack. There is a new dog every

	time! The man walks. The dog looks around. They take the train. They go to a

	park. They go to a toy store!

	他每個星期會把一隻不同的狗放進背包裡帶出門。人跟狗一起走路、搭火車，去公園，甚至是去玩具店。

	The man does all of this to help the dog. The dog is not his. It lives in a

	place for animals with no homes.

	他這樣做是為了幫助這些狗。這些狗不是他的，而是住在收容所裡無家可歸的狗。

	People do not see a dog in a backpack every day. Seeing one makes them happy.

	They look at the dog. They want to pet it.

	大家看到有人把狗放在背包裡都會覺得很新奇、很開心，也會想摸摸狗。

	Maybe people will think the dog is funny and nice. Maybe someone will give it

	a new home! The label on the backpack says "Adopt me."

	這個背包上寫著:領養我吧。也許有人看到後會覺得這隻狗很可愛，願意帶牠回家。

	The man makes a video of the dog's fun day. He puts it online. Millions of

	people see it. And someone adopts the dog!

	這個男子也會把狗狗有趣的一天拍成影片上傳到網路，讓數百萬的人都看得到，其中總會有人願意領養！

	Because of this man, many dogs have a happy life in a new home!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

episodes.title: Kids Help Big Festival Continue
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Kids Help Big Festival Continue

	There's a big festival in Neimen in Kaohsiung. It is the Song Jiang Battle

	Ritual!

	在高雄內門區，有一個盛大的活動叫做宋江陣。

	How did it start? Well, long ago, Taiwan was dangerous. There were thieves in

	the mountains! There were pirates sailing the seas!

	很久以前，台灣是個危險的地方。山區有盜賊，海上還有海盜。

	Neimen's people wanted to be safe. So they worked hard. They exercised in

	groups. They got strong. And they learned how to fight!

	內門的人為了保護自己的安全，努力鍛鍊身體，還要學習戰鬥！

	Now many groups take part in the festival. Some do battle rituals from long

	ago. Some dance. Some sing. Some play music!

	每年都有很多團隊參加宋江陣。有人會表演傳統的陣頭，也有人跳舞唱歌或是奏樂。

	Some people in the groups paint their faces. They hold swords or other

	weapons. They wear colorful clothes.

	另外還有人會在臉上塗抹顏色，穿上鮮豔的服裝，手裡拿著刀劍或是其他武器。

	Kids take part in the festival too. This helps the festival continue for many

	years. This year, groups from Renfeng Elementary School, Fude Elementary

	School, and Zhuangjing Elementary School are taking part!

	今年，仁豐國小、福德國小和莊敬國小的學生都有參與宋江陣。小朋友的參與讓這個活動能夠一直傳承下去。

	The festival is exciting! People from all over Taiwan and the world go to it!

	來自台灣和世界各地的遊客都想參加這個精彩的活動!

	The Song Jiang Battle Ritual is until April fifth. Go and see it! Kids help

	it continue… for you!

	________________________________________

	Vocabulary

	高雄的宋江陣是充滿民俗風味的慶典，也有很多小朋友參加。

	1. colorful 多采多姿的。

	Got any plans for the summer? 夏天怎麼過你有計畫嗎?

	Yeah, I'm going to a colorful sea festival. 有，我要去參加繽紛的海洋節。

	2. pirate 海盜。

	Nice! Boats, sailors and lots of seafood? 真好，有船，有水手，還有很多海鮮?

	Absolutely! And some people even dress up like pirates and fight! 絕對有!

	有些人還會打扮成海盜戰鬥呢!

	3. sing 唱歌，dance 跳舞。

	You watch boats go by all day 白天就看船隻開過去…

	And party all night? 晚上就開派對?

	Yeah, singing, dancing and just having a good time. 對，唱歌跳舞，開心玩耍。

	4. take part in 參加。

	I want to take part in it too! 我也要參加!

	今天你學到哪幾個單字?

	colorful 多采多姿的 pirate 海盜 sing, dance 唱歌跳舞 take part in

	參加

	________________________________________

	Quiz

	1. Where is Neimen?

	a. Taitung

	b. Kaohsiung

	c. Pingtung

	2. What people were in the mountains long ago?

	a. Pirates

	b. Thieves

	c. Kids

	3. What do some people in the groups hold?

	a. Colorful clothes

	b. Painted faces

	c. Swords or other weapons

	Answers

	1. b

	2. b

	3. c

episodes.title: Koala Rides Bus to Safety
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Koala Rides Bus to Safety

	Oh no! A wild animal is in danger in the city. Would you help it?

	一隻野生動物在城市裡碰到危急情況了！如果是你，會幫忙嗎？

	In Australia, koalas hug trees. But one day, a koala was hugging a light

	pole. Cars drove by fast. This was dangerous for the koala!

	在澳洲，無尾熊會抱在樹幹上。但有一天，一隻無尾熊卻抱著路燈的柱子。旁邊的車子開得很快，可能會撞到無尾熊！

	A bus driver drove by. He was worried. The koala might fall! So he stopped.

	He carried it onto the bus.

	一位公車司機開車經過，擔心牠可能會從柱子上掉下來，於是司機停下車，把無尾熊抱到公車上。

	Then the koala rode the bus! It hugged a yellow pole in the bus.

	無尾熊抱著車上的黃色杆子，坐了一趟公車！

	An animal rescuer came and took the koala. An animal doctor checked it. It

	was healthy!

	一位動物救援人員前來帶走無尾熊，獸醫也幫牠做了檢查，發現牠其實很健康！

	Now the koala is in a big park. The park keeps wild animals safe. Every koala

	is important. There are not many now. They are endangered.

	現在，這隻無尾熊住在保護野生動物的公園裡。無尾熊是瀕危動物，所以每一隻無尾熊都很重要。

	If you go to Australia, animal rescuers want you to know something. Do not

	touch wild koalas! They are cute. But they have very sharp claws. They can

	bite too!

	如果你到澳洲旅行，千萬不要碰野生的無尾熊。牠們看起來很可愛，但爪子非常尖銳，也可能會咬人。

	If a koala is hurt, call and wait for help. Put a towel over it. The dark

	keeps them calm.

	如果看到受傷的無尾熊，要打電話求助，然後等待專業人員來處理。你也可以用毛巾蓋住無尾熊，毛巾下的黑暗會讓牠不緊張。

	Wanting to help is good. Knowing how to help is better!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	野生動物有時候很需要人類幫忙，就像這個故事裡的無尾熊。

	1. fast 快的。

	Hey, look, there's a baby bird on the ground! 你看地上有隻小鳥!

	Poor little guy! 可憐的小東西!

	We've gotta help it! 我們一定要幫忙!

	And do it fast! 並且要動作快。

	There are stray cats around. 這附近有流浪貓。

	2. touch 觸摸。

	But we can't touch it. 但是我們不能碰牠。

	Why not? 為什麼不行?

	Bird flu, remember? 禽流感，記得嗎?

	Then what do we do? 那我們怎麼辦?

	3. rescuer 救難人員。

	We should call the Wild Bird Society's hotline. 應該打電話給野鳥學會熱線。

	They'll send rescuers. 他們會派救難人員過來。

	4. healthy 健康的。

	This little thing looks pretty healthy, though. 這小傢伙看起來倒是滿健康的。

	Yeah, maybe it just took a wrong turn. 對啊，也許牠只是轉錯了彎。

	今天有哪些單字?

	fast快的 touch觸摸 rescuer救難人員 healthy健康的

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. What was the koala hugging at first?

	a. A car

	b. A tree

	c. A light pole

	2. Who helped the koala?

	a. A truck driver

	b. A taxi driver

	c. A bus driver

	3. Who checked the koala?

	a. An animal doctor

	b. An animal dentist

	c. An animal rescuer

	Answers

	1. c

	2. c

	3. a

episodes.title: Cow Uses Tools to Scratch Her Back
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Cow Uses Tools to Scratch Her Back

	We use tools every day. Tools help us do things more easily. We use rakes to

	clean up leaves in gardens. We use brooms to clean floors.

	我們每天都會用工具做事，讓生活更輕鬆！我們會用掃把掃地或是鐵耙清理樹葉。

	Some animals use tools. Monkeys use sticks and stones to get food. Elephants

	use tree branches to scratch themselves. But most animals do not use tools.

	猴子會拿樹枝和石頭採集食物，大象則會用樹枝幫自己抓癢。不過，大部分的動物其實都不用工具。

	Cows use trees to scratch their sides. But they cannot scratch their backs or

	bellies.

	牛會磨蹭樹枝來抓癢，但是只能搔到身體側邊，搆不到牠的背或是肚子。

	Now scientists have seen a cow in Austria. She can scratch her back and

	belly! She uses sticks, rakes, and brooms! She picks them up with her tongue.

	Then she holds them with her mouth.

	不過在奧地利，科學家最近發現有一頭牛會用工具來給自己的背跟肚子搔癢！牠會先用舌頭把樹枝、耙子、或是掃把拿起來，再用嘴巴咬住來抓癢。

	The cow also changes the way she uses her tools. She uses a broom to scratch

	her back hard. She uses the broomstick to scratch her belly softly.

	這頭牛還懂得變換工具，牠會用掃把的刷毛用力抓背，用掃把的木柄輕輕抓自己的肚子。

	Scientists are amazed. People have had cows for ten thousand years. This cow

	is the first to use tools!

	科學家都大為震驚。牛跟人類一起生活有一萬年了，這可能是第一頭會用工具的牛！

	The cow is famous now. She helps people see cows in a new way. Who knows?

	Maybe other cows can learn to use tools too!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	我們常常以為只有人類會使用工具，但是有些動物也很行呢。

	1. way 方式。

	I've been sitting too much. 我坐太多了!

	Look at my belly! 你看我的肚子!

	Maybe you could change the way you work. 你也許可以改變一下工作的方式。

	2. back 背部。

	By lying on the floor? 躺在地上工作嗎?

	No! By standing. 不是，你可以站著。

	My back will hurt if I stand too long. 我站太久會背痛。

	3. use 使用。

	And I can't use my computer like that. 而且我沒辦法那樣用電腦。

	Sure you can. 你當然可以。

	You just need a new desk. 只需要一張新的桌子。

	4. amazed 驚訝的。

	You would be amazed how much better you would feel.

	你會覺得好很多，讓你嚇一跳。

	Okay, I'll give it a try. 好吧，我來試試看。

	你平常用什麼工具? 來一起讀單字。

	way方式 back背部 use使用 amazed驚訝的

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. Which animals use sticks to get food?

	a. Dogs

	b. Horses

	c. Monkeys

	2. Where does the cow live?

	a. Austria

	b. America

	c. Australia

	3. Which tool does the cow use to scratch hard?

	a. A rake

	b. A stick

	c. A broom

	Answers

	1. c

	2. a

	3. c

sections.story:
________________________________

	Cow Uses Tools to Scratch Her Back

	We use tools every day. Tools help us do things more easily. We use rakes to

	clean up leaves in gardens. We use brooms to clean floors.

	我們每天都會用工具做事，讓生活更輕鬆！我們會用掃把掃地或是鐵耙清理樹葉。

	Some animals use tools. Monkeys use sticks and stones to get food. Elephants

	use tree branches to scratch themselves. But most animals do not use tools.

	猴子會拿樹枝和石頭採集食物，大象則會用樹枝幫自己抓癢。不過，大部分的動物其實都不用工具。

	Cows use trees to scratch their sides. But they cannot scratch their backs or

	bellies.

	牛會磨蹭樹枝來抓癢，但是只能搔到身體側邊，搆不到牠的背或是肚子。

	Now scientists have seen a cow in Austria. She can scratch her back and

	belly! She uses sticks, rakes, and brooms! She picks them up with her tongue.

	Then she holds them with her mouth.

	不過在奧地利，科學家最近發現有一頭牛會用工具來給自己的背跟肚子搔癢！牠會先用舌頭把樹枝、耙子、或是掃把拿起來，再用嘴巴咬住來抓癢。

	The cow also changes the way she uses her tools. She uses a broom to scratch

	her back hard. She uses the broomstick to scratch her belly softly.

	這頭牛還懂得變換工具，牠會用掃把的刷毛用力抓背，用掃把的木柄輕輕抓自己的肚子。

	Scientists are amazed. People have had cows for ten thousand years. This cow

	is the first to use tools!

	科學家都大為震驚。牛跟人類一起生活有一萬年了，這可能是第一頭會用工具的牛！

	The cow is famous now. She helps people see cows in a new way. Who knows?

	Maybe other cows can learn to use tools too!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
sections.vocabulary:
Vocabulary

	我們常常以為只有人類會使用工具，但是有些動物也很行呢。

	1. way 方式。

	I've been sitting too much. 我坐太多了!

	Look at my belly! 你看我的肚子!

	Maybe you could change the way you work. 你也許可以改變一下工作的方式。

	2. back 背部。

	By lying on the floor? 躺在地上工作嗎?

	No! By standing. 不是，你可以站著。

	My back will hurt if I stand too long. 我站太久會背痛。

	3. use 使用。

	And I can't use my computer like that. 而且我沒辦法那樣用電腦。

	Sure you can. 你當然可以。

	You just need a new desk. 只需要一張新的桌子。

	4. amazed 驚訝的。

	You would be amazed how much better you would feel.

	你會覺得好很多，讓你嚇一跳。

	Okay, I'll give it a try. 好吧，我來試試看。

	你平常用什麼工具? 來一起讀單字。

	way方式 back背部 use使用 amazed驚訝的

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Quiz

	1. Which animals use sticks to get food?

	a. Dogs

	b. Horses

	c. Monkeys

	2. Where does the cow live?

	a. Austria

	b. America

	c. Australia

	3. Which tool does the cow use to scratch hard?

	a. A rake

	b. A stick

	c. A broom

episodes.title: Teens Make Chopstick Robot Kits for Kids Everywhere
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Teens Make Chopstick Robot Kits for Kids Everywhere

	Kids learn by doing. Sometimes doing things is not easy. This is good! Kids

	learn how to solve problems then.

	小朋友可以動手做來學習。親自動手的過程中遇到困難，他們就能學會解決問題。

	Five years ago, four teenagers wanted to help kids learn how to solve

	problems. Making robots is a good way to learn. So they wanted to make robot

	kits for schools.

	有四名青少年想幫助小朋友學習如何解決問題。製造機器人是很好的學習方式，所以他們決定推出機器人組合包。

	But some schools do not have much money. So the teenagers put chopsticks in

	their robot kits! The kits have other parts. These parts put the chopsticks

	together and make them move!

	有些學校的經費不多，他們想到用筷子來做機器人的主要材料。組合包裡面有零件可以把筷子組裝在一起，讓機器人動起來！

	Now kids in eleven countries make many kinds of chopstick robots! Some robots

	walk and some draw. Some throw things and some catch things.

	現在，有十一個國家的孩子用這些組合包做出各種筷子機器人。有的機器人會走路，有的會畫畫，還有的可以丟東西或接東西。

	Kids have fun! If their robot does not work, that is okay! They can solve the

	problem and try again!

	孩子們玩得很開心，就算機器人不會動也沒關係，他們可以找出問題，再試一次。

	Now the four teenagers are young men. Last year, they won a big prize for

	students. They won because they want to help kids everywhere learn with the

	robot kits. The prize came with one million U.S. dollars!

	這四個青少年現在已經是青年，他們因為這個機器人計畫獲得一項大獎，還贏了一百萬美元的獎金！

	Now the young men's robot kits can help kids everywhere learn how to solve

	problems!

	________________________________________

	Vocabulary

	努力幫助小孩的青少年，自己也贏得讚賞和肯定。

	1. school 學校。

	My son is making a robot for a school contest! 我兒子在做機器人參加學校比賽。

	Isn’t he like 7 years old? 他不是七歲嗎?

	He’s 9 now. 他現在九歲。

	2) do 做。

	He’s not doing it all by himself, is he? 他不會是自己一個人做吧?

	No. I’m helping him. 對，我有幫忙。

	That’s even more impressive. 那更厲害了。

	Right? I didn’t know I was so good at this. 是吧?我都不知道我這麼棒。

	3) part 零件。

	So you’ve finished the robot? 所以你已經完工了?

	Um….we’ve finished the parts. 我們做完了零件。

	Like legs and arms. 腿和手臂。

	4) prize 獎品。

	Well, I hope you win a big prize! 希望你們贏得大獎!

	Yeah, if the robot can move. 要是那個機器人能動的話。

	你想做一個機器人嗎?

	school學校 do做 part零件 prize獎品

	________________________________________

	Quiz

	1. How many teenagers wanted to help kids learn how to solve problems?

	a. Four

	b. Eleven

	c. One million

	2. What did the teenagers make to help kids?

	a. Robot toys

	b. Robot kits

	c. Robot teachers

	3. When did the young men win a big prize?

	a. This year

	b. Last year

	c. Next year

	Answers

	1. a

	2. b

	3. b

episodes.title: Flood Brings Clean Water to a Town
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Flood Brings Clean Water to a Town

	In South Sudan, there is a town. Getting water was very hard work. They

	filled big yellow cans with water. Water is heavy. It took a long time to

	walk home.

	在南蘇丹，有一個小鎮。那裡的人用黃色的大水罐裝水。水很重，把水弄回家是辛苦工作，而且回家的路又很漫長。

	In 2020, there was a big flood. Dirty water came from the river. It filled

	the streets. It went into homes. It made many people sick. People were

	scared.

	2020

	年，河水氾濫成災，骯髒的洪水沖進小鎮的街道和家裡，很多人因此生病，大家都非常害怕。

	People came to help the town. They built a new water plant. It cleans water.

	It uses the sun for power. It is high up in the town. It cannot be flooded.

	工作人員來這個小鎮幫忙，建了一座用太陽能發電的淨水廠。這座淨水廠建在小鎮的高處，所以不會被洪水淹到。

	Now the town has clean water. It has many water stations. Women work at them.

	People can drink for free. They pay a little money for a big yellow can of

	clean water.

	現在，小鎮有乾淨的水可以用了。鎮上設置了很多取水站，還有專門的人員管理！大家可以在取水站免費喝水，如果要裝滿一大桶水，也只需要付一點點錢。

	The town's schools have clean water too. Children can study longer there.

	小鎮的學校現在也有了乾淨的水，小朋友就可以在學校待更久，更專心讀書。

	The town still has floods sometimes. But now it has clean water for everyone!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	淨水廠大大改善了這個非洲小鎮的生活。

	1. flood 淹水。

	Wow, if this heavy rain continues, the street might get flooded.

	哇，假如這樣繼子續下大雨，這條街會淹水的。

	Yeah, it often happened when I was a little girl. 對，我小時候經常淹水。

	2. walk 走路。

	What did you do? 那你怎麼辦?

	I walked home barefoot. 我就打光腳走回家。

	So you were holding your shoes? 手裡拿著鞋子嗎?

	Sure, shoes were expensive! 當然，鞋子很貴呢!

	3. dirty 髒的。

	But the water was dirty! 但是水很髒。

	Very dirty. Yellow mud everywhere! 是很髒，到處都是黃泥巴。

	4. sick 生病的。

	That sounds awful! You could get sick. 聽起來真糟糕，你可能會生病。

	No. I was lucky. 沒有，我運氣很好。

	今天的單字你記住了幾個?

	flood淹水 walk走路 dirty髒的 sick生病的

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. Where is the town?

	a. South Sudan

	b. South Africa

	c. South Korea

	2. What do people fill with water?

	a. A water plant

	b. Big yellow cans

	c. Water stations

	3. Why can kids study longer in school?

	a. They have more homework.

	b. The school is high up in the town.

	c. They have clean water at school.

	Answers

	1. a

	2. b

	3. c

episodes.title: Taiwanese Workers Make New Home in America
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Taiwanese Workers Make New Home in America

	A Taiwanese company is building factories in America. The company needs about

	one thousand of its Taiwanese workers to work there. So the workers went to

	America with their families.

	台灣一家大公司在美國設立了工廠，一千多名台灣的員工於是帶著家人移居美國。

	Many of these families live near each other. Their apartment building has a

	big swimming pool! It has a place to exercise!

	他們住得都很近，附近有游泳池，還有地方做運動!

	Families do things with other families. The city did not have many Chinese

	restaurants. So people learned how to cook together. Now they can make the

	food they eat in Taiwan!

	台灣家庭彼此幫忙，當地沒什麼中式餐廳，所以他們一起學做台灣料理，這樣至少可以吃到家鄉味。

	Families also go to playgrounds with other families. Sometimes they meet at

	one family's home. The kids play and the adults talk.

	大家還會約好一起去遊樂場，也舉行家庭聚會，小孩玩耍，大人聊天。

	The Taiwanese workers and their families are changing their part of the city.

	It is a little like Taiwan now. There are more Chinese restaurants. There are

	boba shops! Other businesses have Mandarin speakers.

	這些台灣員工改變了當地的樣貌，那個城市現在有點像台灣，甚至還有賣珍珠奶茶!

	有一些商店雇用會講國語的店員。

	Families are buying houses there. This American city is their new home!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	為了工作，一大群台灣的公司員工遠赴美國開始新生活。

	1. city 城市。

	I heard you're leaving the city next month. 聽說你下個月要離開了。

	I am. My company is sending some workers to Kaohsiung.

	沒錯，我的公司要送一些員工去高雄。

	2. family 家人。

	For how long? 去多久呢?

	About a year, I think. 我想大概一年吧。

	How does your family feel about it? 你的家人覺得如何?

	They're not very happy. 他們不大開心。

	3. live 居住。

	But I like the idea of living in another place for a while.

	可是我喜歡這個主意，住別的地方一段時間。

	True! Kaohsiung has great weather and amazing food. 真的!

	高雄天氣好，東西好吃。

	4. house 房子。

	Yeah, I may even buy a house there, 我甚至可能買房子，

	make Kaohsiung my second home. 讓高雄成為我第二個家。

	今天的單字每天都用的到。

	city城市 family家人 live居住 house房子

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. Who do the Taiwanese workers work for?

	a. A Japanese company

	b. An American company

	c. A Taiwanese company

	2. What did people learn how to do together?

	a. Cook

	b. Clean

	c. Eat

	3. What does the city have now?

	a. Mandarin schools

	b. Boba shops

	c. Taiwanese supermarkets

	Answers

	1. c

	2. a

	3. b

	For how long? 去多久呢?

	About a year, I think. 我想大概一年吧。

	How does your family feel about it? 你的家人覺得如何?

	They're not very happy. 他們不大開心。

	3. live 居住。

	But I like the idea of living in another place for a while.

	可是我喜歡這個主意，住別的地方一段時間。

	True! Kaohsiung has great weather and amazing food. 真的!

	高雄天氣好，東西好吃。

	4. house 房子。

	Yeah, I may even buy a house there, 我甚至可能買房子，

	make Kaohsiung my second home. 讓高雄成為我第二個家。

	今天的單字每天都用的到。

	city城市 family家人 live居住 house房子

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
sections.quiz:
Quiz

	1. Who do the Taiwanese workers work for?

	a. A Japanese company

	b. An American company

	c. A Taiwanese company

	2. What did people learn how to do together?

	a. Cook

	b. Clean

	c. Eat

	3. What does the city have now?

	a. Mandarin schools

	b. Boba shops

	c. Taiwanese supermarkets

episodes.title: A 17-Year-Old Boy May Save Elephants with AI
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	A 17-Year-Old Boy May Save Elephants with AI

	Rainforests have insects, birds, frogs, monkeys and more. Some rainforests in

	Africa have African forest elephants. They eat fruit. This helps new trees

	grow.

	雨林裡有很多動物，例如昆蟲、鳥、青蛙、猴子等等。有些非洲的雨林還住著大象。

	But some people hunt these elephants. They use guns. They sell the elephants'

	long ivory tusks.

	但是有些人會用槍來獵殺這些大象，把象牙賣出去。

	Scientists want to keep these elephants safe. They put many microphones in

	rainforests. They listened for gunshots.

	科學家想保護大象，所以在雨林裡面放了很多麥克風來收集聲音，想追尋槍聲。

	But listening for gunshots was very hard. Tree branches broke. Rain fell.

	Monkeys called. All of these can sound like gunshots!

	但要分辨槍聲可不簡單。樹枝斷裂、下雨、猴子叫聲，聽起來都像槍聲。

	A 17-year-old boy made an AI program. It uses the scientists' microphones. It

	listens for gunshots.

	一名 17 歲的男孩做了一個 AI 程式，用那些麥克風收集到的資訊來分辨槍響。

	The AI knows what sounds are gunshots. It knows what sounds are not gunshots.

	The AI also knows where the gunshots are. This lets police catch the hunters.

	AI

	聽得出來哪些聲音來自獵槍，哪一些不是，並且判斷槍聲的位置。這樣一來，警察就能找到獵人並且抓住他們！

	This boy's AI may be used to keep African forest elephants safe!

	________________________________________

	Vocabulary

	一名會寫AI程式的少年，貢獻力量保護森林裡的大象。

	1. hard 困難的。

	I do hope to visit a rainforest someday! 我真希望有一天去雨林玩一玩。

	The Amazon? 亞馬遜嗎?

	The Amazon, or maybe Africa. 亞馬遜，或是非洲。

	That shouldn't be too hard. 那應該不難。

	2. monkey 猴子。

	But what do you want to see there? 但是你去那兒想看什麼?

	Wildlife, of course. 當然是野生動物。

	Birds, monkeys, even iguanas. 鳥類，猴子，甚至是蜥蜴。

	3. safe 安全的。

	And spiders, snakes, and a tiger that might eat you!

	還有蜘蛛，蛇，會吃掉你的老虎!

	Hey, my guide will keep me safe. 我的導遊會保護我。

	4. animal 動物。

	As for me, I'd rather see the animals from far away.

	我呢，只想從遠遠的地方看動物。

	Are you an animal lover?

	來讀今天的單字。

	hard困難的 monkey猴子 safe安全的 animal動物

	________________________________________

	Quiz

	1. What do African forest elephants eat?

	a. Frogs

	b. Insects

	c. Fruit

	2. What do African forest elephants help grow?

	a. Scientists

	b. Gunshots

	c. New trees

	3. Who made an AI program to find gunshots?

	a. A 17-year-old boy

	b. Scientists

	c. Hunters

	Answers

	1. c

	2. c

	3. a

episodes.title: Families Cannot Eat Jollof Rice Every Week in Nigeria
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Families Cannot Eat Jollof Rice Every Week in Nigeria

	In Nigeria, many people love jollof rice. This food is red. It is spicy! It

	tastes very good.

	在奈及利亞，很多人都喜歡吃加羅夫飯。這道紅色的菜餚又辣又美味！

	Every family's jollof rice is a little different. People make it with rice,

	tomatoes, peppers, onion, and spices. They cook it for a long time.

	加羅夫飯裡面有米、番茄、辣椒、洋蔥、和各種香料。每個家庭做出來的加羅夫飯都有一點不一樣！

	Families eat jollof rice with chicken or beef. They also eat it with fried

	plantains.

	加羅夫飯通常會搭配雞肉或牛肉一起吃，也會配炸大蕉。

	Families ate jollof rice every week. Some families ate it three times a week!

	But now, jollof rice costs a lot of money. Many families cannot eat it every

	week. They cannot eat it every month!

	原本大家每星期都會吃加羅夫飯，有些家庭甚至一個星期吃三次。但是現在，這道菜變得太貴了，很多人吃不起！

	So now some families make a new rice dish. It does not cost a lot of money.

	They make it with fish. They do not make it with tomatoes or chicken. This

	rice dish tastes good. But it is not as tasty as jollof rice.

	因此，很多家庭選擇做另一道比較便宜的菜飯。他們用魚，不用番茄和雞肉。雖然味道不如加羅夫飯，但是也十分美味！

	Families cannot eat jollof rice every week. Many families make jollof rice

	and chicken for Christmas now. They make it for parties too.

	如今，許多家庭只有在聖誕節或是聚會時，才會吃到有雞肉的加羅夫飯。

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	比較便宜的菜飯，慢慢取代了奈及利亞的加羅夫飯。

	1. rice 米飯。

	What are you cooking? 你在煮什麼?

	Smells amazing! 好香喔!

	I've just made fried rice with onion and spices. 我剛剛做了洋蔥跟香料炒飯。

	2. beef 牛肉。

	Now I'm making beef and tomato stew. 現在我正在燉番茄牛肉。

	I love both of them! 兩個我都喜歡!

	3. dish 菜色。

	Then you're in luck! 那你走運了。

	Maybe I can cook these dishes more often. 也許我可以多做幾次那兩道菜。

	4. chicken 雞。

	That'll be great! 真棒! I can cook too. 我也會煮。

	I'll make chicken soup for you. 我來為你做個雞湯。

	Are you sure? 你確定嗎?

	Of course! It'll be tasty. 當然，會很好吃的。

	你喜歡怎樣的食物?

	rice米飯 beef牛肉 dish菜色 chicken雞

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. What do people often eat with jollof rice?

	a. Chicken

	b. Fish

	c. Pork

	2. Why do families make a new dish now?

	a. Jollof rice costs too much.

	b. The new dish is not tasty.

	c. People do not like jollof rice.

	3. When do many families eat jollof rice now?

	a. Every week

	b. Every month

	c. Christmas

	Answers

	1. a

	2. a

	3. c

episodes.title: Most People in Taiwan Need More Calcium
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Most People in Taiwan Need More Calcium

	Do you like milk, yogurt, or cheese?

	你喜歡牛奶、優格、或是起司嗎？

	If you do, that's great! Your bones need these foods. Your teeth need them!

	These foods have lots of calcium.

	這些食物裡面有滿滿的鈣質，是我們骨頭所需要的重要營養素！

	Calcium is important for your body. Maybe you know it helps your bones and

	teeth grow. But did you know it helps your muscles move too?

	鈣質可以讓骨頭和牙齒健康生長，也可以幫助我們的肌肉收縮。

	In Taiwan, kids from one year old to three years old get all of the calcium

	they need. That's great!

	在台灣，一到三歲的小朋友普遍能攝取足夠的鈣質。

	But, kids from four years and up, and adults, do not get all of the calcium

	they need! They get half!

	但四歲以上的小朋友跟很多大人，都有鈣質嚴重攝取不足的問題

	What happens when your body needs more calcium? Maybe your bones do not grow

	as long or strong as they can. Maybe your teeth are not strong. Or maybe your

	muscles get too tight sometimes. Ouch!

	身體缺乏鈣質會出現什麼問題呢？鈣質不足不但會影響骨頭的健康生長，讓牙齒變得脆弱，也有可能導致肌肉緊繃、痠痛！

	But calcium is easy to get! Drink some milk! Eat yogurt and cheese! Black

	sesame and small dried fish also have lots of calcium. Many other foods do

	too. And sunlight helps your body take in more calcium.

	好消息是，鈣質一點都不難取得！牛奶、優格、起司、黑芝麻、小魚乾、和很多其他的食物裡都有滿滿的鈣質。多曬太陽也可以幫助鈣質的吸收喔！

	So, feed your bones, teeth, and muscles some calcium today!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	鈣質對身體很重要，需要多加注意。

	1. bone 骨頭。

	Guess how many bones we have in our body. 猜猜看我們的身體有幾根骨頭。

	Hmmm… A thousand? 一千根?

	Nope. 不對。

	Ten thousand? 一萬根?

	No! We’d be too heavy! 不對，那太重啦!

	2. muscle 肌肉。

	Just tell me. 告訴我吧。

	Two hundred and six. 兩百零六根。

	That’s not a lot. 並不多。

	Well, don't forget we also have muscles. 別忘了我們還有肌肉。

	3. tooth 牙齒。

	What about our teeth? 那牙齒呢?

	I lost one tooth yesterday! 我昨天少了一顆牙。

	4. grow 生長。

	That’s awful! 真糟糕!

	Yeah, my dentist took it out. 對啊，我的牙醫把它給拔了。

	Will it grow back? 會長回來嗎?

	Ha ha! I wish! 哈，我也希望。

	來一起讀單字。

	bone骨頭 muscle肌肉 tooth牙齒 grow生長

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. Who gets all the calcium they need in Taiwan?

	a. Kids from one year old to three years old

	b. Kids from four years and up

	c. Adults

	2. Which food has lots of calcium?

	a. Chicken

	b. Yogurt

	c. Bananas

	3. What helps your body take in more calcium?

	a. Indoor light

	b. Moonlight

	c. Sunlight

	Answers

	1. a

	2. b

	3. c

	b. Moonlight

episodes.title: Working Together to Catch Salmon
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Working Together to Catch Salmon

	In the Pacific Ocean near Canada, dolphins swim. They swim in groups. They

	hunt for food.

	海豚在靠近加拿大的太平洋中，成群結隊地尋找食物。

	These dolphins are good at finding salmon. But they cannot catch salmon.

	Salmon are too big for them. The dolphins are about two and a half meters

	long. Salmon are about one meter long!

	海豚很會找鮭魚，要吞下鮭魚卻有困難，因為海豚的身體沒有比鮭魚大多少。

	Orcas swim nearby. They are dolphins too. But they are very big. They are

	seven or eight meters long! They are fast and strong.

	虎鯨也是一種海豚，身體卻大很多，有七八公尺長，不但強壯，而且行動敏捷。

	These orcas eat lots of salmon. And, they are very good at hunting for

	salmon. But scientists say these orcas and dolphins hunt for salmon together!

	The dolphins swim in front. They find a salmon. Then the orcas swim in front.

	They catch it! Hunting is easier together.

	虎鯨擅長追捕鮭魚，也吃很多鮭魚。科學家注意到虎鯨跟海豚會合作，海豚游在前面，發現獵物之後虎鯨跟著捕捉。

	The orcas eat first. Pieces of the salmon fall. The dolphins eat these

	pieces. The orcas let the dolphins stay and eat.

	虎鯨狼吞虎嚥時，魚的碎片會落在海裡，海豚就可以享用了。

	Scientists are surprised. Orcas do not share their food. But these orcas

	share their food with these dolphins!

	科學家很驚訝，因為虎鯨平常不會分享食物，這些虎鯨卻願意讓海豚共餐。

	Hm … Maybe these orcas can eat more salmon this way!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	科學家發現，有些虎鯨和海豚會合作獵取食物!

	1. ocean 海洋。

	I dreamed of swimming with dolphins in the ocean! 我夢見跟海豚在海裡游泳!

	That's a cool dream! 好酷的夢!

	Isn't it wonderful? 可不是很奇妙!

	I didn't want to wake up. 我都不想醒來。

	2. swim 游泳。

	You swam with sea turtles before. 你以前跟海龜一起游泳過。

	I did. In the Galapagos. 對，在加拉巴哥群島。

	They were in front of me and behind me. 牠們在我前面跟後面。

	3. surprised 驚訝的。

	I was very surprised to see them. 我看到牠們好驚訝!

	They were not afraid of me at all! 牠們完全不怕我!

	4. maybe 也許。

	Maybe they wanted to be friends. 也許牠們想做朋友。

	Or maybe they were trying to find out if they could eat me.

	或許也想知道，能不能把我吃掉。

	你有沒有在海裡游泳過?

	ocean海洋 swim游泳 surprised驚訝的 maybe也許

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. Why can't the dolphins catch salmon?

	a. Salmon are too big.

	b. The dolphins are too slow.

	c. Orcas eat a lot of salmon.

	2. When hunting together, which swim in front first?

	a. Orcas

	b. Salmon

	c. Dolphins

	3. Why are scientists surprised?

	a. These dolphins eat salmon.

	b. These orcas share their food.

	c. Salmon are one meter long.

	Answers

	1. a

	2. c

	3. b

sections.story:
________________________________

	Working Together to Catch Salmon

	In the Pacific Ocean near Canada, dolphins swim. They swim in groups. They

	hunt for food.

	海豚在靠近加拿大的太平洋中，成群結隊地尋找食物。

	These dolphins are good at finding salmon. But they cannot catch salmon.

	Salmon are too big for them. The dolphins are about two and a half meters

	long. Salmon are about one meter long!

	海豚很會找鮭魚，要吞下鮭魚卻有困難，因為海豚的身體沒有比鮭魚大多少。

	Orcas swim nearby. They are dolphins too. But they are very big. They are

	seven or eight meters long! They are fast and strong.

	虎鯨也是一種海豚，身體卻大很多，有七八公尺長，不但強壯，而且行動敏捷。

	These orcas eat lots of salmon. And, they are very good at hunting for

	salmon. But scientists say these orcas and dolphins hunt for salmon together!

	The dolphins swim in front. They find a salmon. Then the orcas swim in front.

	They catch it! Hunting is easier together.

	虎鯨擅長追捕鮭魚，也吃很多鮭魚。科學家注意到虎鯨跟海豚會合作，海豚游在前面，發現獵物之後虎鯨跟著捕捉。

	pieces. The orcas let the dolphins stay and eat.

	虎鯨狼吞虎嚥時，魚的碎片會落在海裡，海豚就可以享用了。

	share their food with these dolphins!

	Hm … Maybe these orcas can eat more salmon this way!
