episodes.title: A Post Office Stops Delivering Letters
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	A Post Office Stops Delivering Letters

	When was the last time you mailed a letter? Some people have never mailed a

	letter!

	你上一次寄信是什麼時候呢？有一些人甚至從來沒有寄過信！

	A long time ago, people mailed many letters. Post offices were busy!

	以前大家都會寫信寄信，郵局總是很忙碌。

	But now, many people send emails. Or they send texts. Not many people mail

	letters.

	現在很多人改用電子郵件或傳訊息聯絡，寄信的人變得越來越少。

	25 years ago in Denmark, the post office was busy with letters. About 270

	letters were mailed for each man, woman, and child! In 2024, almost 19

	letters were mailed for each person.

	二十五年前，丹麥的郵局還很忙。平均每個人一年會寄大約 270 封信。不過到了 2024

	年，平均每人一年只會寄 19 封信。

	But Denmark's post office is busy now too. It has more and more packages to

	deliver. People there love to shop online!

	雖然信變少了，但丹麥的郵局依然很忙。這是因為當地人很喜歡用網路買東西，所以要寄送的包裹變多了！

	Denmark's post office started four hundred years ago. It delivered letters

	and packages. But now it does not deliver letters! On December 30th, 2025,

	the post office delivered the last letter!

	丹麥的郵局有四百年的歷史。本來郵局同時負責寄信和送包裹，但他們現在不再處理信件。去年

	12 月 30 號郵局送出最後一封信，之後丹麥人必須靠快遞公司來送信。

	Now people in Denmark cannot use their post office to mail letters. They have

	to use a delivery company!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	丹麥人民要寄信，已經不能依賴郵局了。

	1. post office 郵局。

	Where are you off to? 你去哪?

	The post office. I need to send a package. 去郵局，我要去寄包裹。

	Oh, how mysterious! 好神秘!

	2. send 寄送。

	I thought Valentine's Day was over. 我以為情人節已經過了。

	It's not for my Valentine, okay? 不是要寄給情人好嗎?

	I'm sending back a coat I bought. 我要把我買的外套寄回去。

	3. never 從不。

	See? That's why I never shop for clothes online.

	你看，這就是為什麼我從來不上網買衣服。

	You have to try things on first. 你一定得先試穿。

	4. last time 上一次。

	Oh, I know now. 現在我知道了。

	Last time I had to send back two pairs of shoes! 上次我還得退兩雙鞋呢!

	你有去過郵局嗎?

	post office郵局 send寄送 never從不 last time上一次

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. What were Denmark's post offices busy with 25 years ago?

	a. Packages

	b. Letters

	c. E-mails

	2. Why does this post office have more packages to deliver?

	a. People shop online.

	b. Packages cost more money.

	c. People send texts.

	3. What do people in Denmark use to send letters now?

	a. The post office

	b. A delivery company

	c. Texts

	Answers

	1. b

	2. a

	3. b

episodes.title: Zhongli Goat Runs Free on Streets
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Zhongli Goat Runs Free on Streets

	A goat ran this way and that way on the streets of Taoyuan!

	有一隻山羊在桃園的路上跑來跑去！

	It all began at the oldest temple in Zhongli. Renhai Temple was two hundred

	years old! There was lots of music! There were many dancers from Taiwan and

	Japan!

	事情要從中壢最老的一間廟說起。仁海宮兩百週年那天，廟裡有音樂、也有來自台灣跟日本的舞者表演。

	The temple also had a contest. It wanted to find the best goat in Zhongli!

	廟方還辦了一場比賽，要選出中壢最好的山羊。

	But that night, the winning goat ran away! It ran fast! It ran on the right

	side of the street! Then it ran on the left side of the street! It ran across

	other streets. It ran in front of cars!

	但是當天晚上，得獎的山羊竟然逃跑了！牠一下跑到馬路右邊，一下又跑到左邊，甚至直接跑到車子前面。

	The roads were dark. It was hard for drivers to see the goat! They had to

	turn fast! They did not want to hit it! Luckily, no one was hurt!

	因為天色很暗，駕駛很難看清楚那隻山羊，只能緊急轉彎避開牠。不過幸好沒人受傷！

	The goat's owner looked for the goat. It took forty minutes to catch it. But

	the goat did not want to go home. It wanted to keep running free!

	山羊的主人花了四十分鐘才終於抓到牠。山羊好像不想回家，還想繼續在外面自由奔跑！

	Renhai Temple's winning goat is home with its owner. And drivers in Taoyuan

	are safe from the goat... for now.

	________________________________________

	Vocabulary

	一隻驚惶亂竄的山羊，讓主人追了好一陣子。

	1. fast 快速地。

	Slow down! You are driving too fast! 慢一點，你開太快了!

	Relax, I'm a great driver. 放心，我很會開車。

	I just don't always know which way I'm going. 我只是不見得知道該走哪裡。

	2. left 左邊的。

	You should stay on the left side. 你應該待在左邊。

	We are turning left in a minute. 我們馬上就要左轉了。

	3. right 右邊的。

	Okay, okay, I'm turning left here. 好啦，我在這裡左轉。

	Wait, the hotel is on the right side! 等一下，飯店在我們右邊!

	No worries, we're parking across from it! 別擔心，我們要停在它對面。

	4. hit 撞上。

	Whew! We're finally here! 我們終於到了!

	Yeah, without hitting anyone. 對啊，沒撞到任何人。

	來一起讀單字。

	fast快速地 left左邊的 right右邊的 hit撞上

	________________________________________

	Quiz

	1. How old is Renhai Temple in Zhongli?

	a. 200 years old

	b. 202 years old

	c. 222 years old

	2. What kind of goat did the temple want to find?

	a. The fastest goat

	b. The best goat

	c. The most beautiful goat

	3. When did the goat run away?

	a. In the morning

	b. At lunchtime

	c. At night

	Answers

	1. a

	2. b

	3. c

episodes.title: Big Lazy Susan Makes Friends
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Big Lazy Susan Makes Friends

	In a small town in the U.S., there is a restaurant near a train station. The

	restaurant has four tables. But it is not small. The tables are big and

	round.

	美國一個小鎮的火車站旁，有一間餐廳。這間餐廳有四張圓形的大桌子。

	Fifteen people can sit at each table. And, some people do not know each

	other! Visitors from other places sit with people from the town. Workers sit

	with families. Everyone meets new people.

	每張圓桌都可以坐十五個人，來自各地的陌生人與當地人坐在一起，互相認識，也有全家人來用餐。

	The waiters put food on the big Lazy Susan on each table. People spin it to

	get food. Some homes and restaurants in Taiwan have tables with Lazy Susans!

	服務生把食物放在餐桌中間的轉盤上，大家可以轉動它來拿菜。台灣很多餐廳也有這種桌子，有的大家庭也使用。

	The restaurant's food is hot and tasty. Many people love the fried eggplant.

	People eat and talk. They share stories. They laugh. They become friends!

	餐廳的食物很好吃，炸茄子尤其受歡迎！大家邊吃飯邊聊天，談笑之間就成了朋友。

	Long ago, restaurants near train stations started putting many people at one

	table. Lazy Susans let the restaurants feed people fast. Not many restaurants

	do this now.

	從前火車站附近的餐廳經常用這種餐桌，這樣可以讓很多人更快吃飯。但是，現在這樣的餐廳現在已經不多了。

	But at this restaurant, the big tables with Lazy Susans and good food keep

	doing one big thing. They bring people together!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	上面有轉盤的圓形大餐桌，很適合一群人共餐，但是現在不流行了。

	1. share 分享。

	My mom always says, "Don't eat and talk." 我媽媽總是說，吃飯時別講話。

	And you never listen. 而你從來不聽。

	I can't help it. 我忍不住。

	I always have stories to share! 我都有故事要分享!

	2. food 食物。

	Can't the stories wait until after you finish chewing?

	你不能等到咀嚼完再講故事?

	No! The food is hot, the story is fresh … perfect timing.

	不能。菜是熱的，故事新鮮，時機正好。

	3. together 一起。

	So it's a combo meal? 所以是個套餐?

	Exactly. Food and stories together. 正是那樣! 吃飯跟故事一起。

	4. laugh 笑。

	Fine. Just don't laugh when you eat and talk. 好吧，但你邊吃邊講話時可不准笑。

	Please don't eat and talk at the same time.

	來一起讀單字。

	share分享 food食物 together一起 laugh笑

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. What is on the table?

	a. A TV

	b. A waiter

	c. A Lazy Susan

	2. What food do many people love at this restaurant?

	a. Fried fish

	b. Fried eggplant

	c. Fried eggs

	3. What do people do when they are eating at this restaurant?

	a. Talk and laugh

	b. Cook and clean

	c. Sing and dance

	Answers

	1. c

	2. b

	3. a

sections.story:

	restaurant has four tables. But it is not small. The tables are big and

	round.

	美國一個小鎮的火車站旁，有一間餐廳。這間餐廳有四張圓形的大桌子。

	Fifteen people can sit at each table. And, some people do not know each

	other! Visitors from other places sit with people from the town. Workers sit

	with families. Everyone meets new people.

	每張圓桌都可以坐十五個人，來自各地的陌生人與當地人坐在一起，互相認識，也有全家人來用餐。

	The waiters put food on the big Lazy Susan on each table. People spin it to

	get food. Some homes and restaurants in Taiwan have tables with Lazy Susans!

	服務生把食物放在餐桌中間的轉盤上，大家可以轉動它來拿菜。台灣很多餐廳也有這種桌子，有的大家庭也使用。

	The restaurant's food is hot and tasty. Many people love the fried eggplant.

	People eat and talk. They share stories. They laugh. They become friends!

	餐廳的食物很好吃，炸茄子尤其受歡迎！大家邊吃飯邊聊天，談笑之間就成了朋友。

	Long ago, restaurants near train stations started putting many people at one

	table. Lazy Susans let the restaurants feed people fast. Not many restaurants

	do this now.

	從前火車站附近的餐廳經常用這種餐桌，這樣可以讓很多人更快吃飯。但是，現在這樣的餐廳現在已經不多了。

	But at this restaurant, the big tables with Lazy Susans and good food keep

	doing one big thing. They bring people together!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
sections.vocabulary:
Vocabulary

	上面有轉盤的圓形大餐桌，很適合一群人共餐，但是現在不流行了。

	1. share 分享。

	My mom always says, "Don't eat and talk." 我媽媽總是說，吃飯時別講話。

	And you never listen. 而你從來不聽。

	I can't help it. 我忍不住。

	I always have stories to share! 我都有故事要分享!

	2. food 食物。

	Can't the stories wait until after you finish chewing?

	你不能等到咀嚼完再講故事?

	No! The food is hot, the story is fresh … perfect timing.

	不能。菜是熱的，故事新鮮，時機正好。

	3. together 一起。

	So it's a combo meal? 所以是個套餐?

	Exactly. Food and stories together. 正是那樣! 吃飯跟故事一起。

	4. laugh 笑。

	Fine. Just don't laugh when you eat and talk. 好吧，但你邊吃邊講話時可不准笑。

	Please don't eat and talk at the same time.

	來一起讀單字。

	share分享 food食物 together一起 laugh笑

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
sections.quiz:
Quiz

	1. What is on the table?

	a. A TV

	b. A waiter

	c. A Lazy Susan

	2. What food do many people love at this restaurant?

	a. Fried fish

	b. Fried eggplant

	c. Fried eggs

	3. What do people do when they are eating at this restaurant?

	a. Talk and laugh

	b. Cook and clean

	c. Sing and dance

episodes.title: Crabs Make Octopus Play Piano
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Crabs Make Octopus Play Piano

	A Swedish musician bought a live octopus. He did not take it to his kitchen.

	He took it to his music studio! He put it in a big fish tank.

	一位瑞典的音樂家買了一隻活章魚。他沒有把章魚拿去廚房，而是把牠帶到工作室，放進大水族箱裡。

	The musician wanted to teach the octopus how to play music! He made a small

	piano. He put it in the tank. But the octopus did not play the piano.

	音樂家想教章魚彈奏音樂。他做了一架小鋼琴，放進魚缸裡，但章魚完全不理這台鋼琴。

	So the musician used bubbles. The octopus had to play a musical note. Then

	bubbles came out of the piano! Oooo! Soon, the octopus started to play one

	note. Then it played two notes.

	音樂家想到可以用氣泡來訓練章魚。只要按下琴鍵，就會冒出氣泡。章魚覺得很有趣，於是慢慢學會按一兩個琴鍵。

	But the musician wanted the octopus to play more notes. Now he uses small

	crabs. The octopus loves to eat them!

	但音樂家希望章魚彈更多音符！章魚非常愛吃螃蟹，所以音樂家改用小螃蟹當做獎勵。

	The octopus plays notes. It sees a crab. The crab slowly comes down a tube.

	Then the crab comes out!

	只要章魚按下幾個琴鍵，就會有螃蟹從管子慢慢下來出現在牠面前，然後被章魚吃掉！

	The musician taught the octopus for six months. It can play a song with him

	now!

	章魚的鋼琴訓練持續了六個月。現在，章魚已經可以和音樂家合奏一首曲子了！

	Does the octopus love to play the piano? Nobody knows. But it loves to eat

	crabs!

	我們沒有辦法知道章魚到底喜不喜歡彈鋼琴，但可以確定的是，章魚真的很愛吃螃蟹！

	Hmmm. What else can people teach an octopus?

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	章魚據說有高智商，吸引很多人來研究。

	1. music 音樂。

	An octopus knows how to play music. 有一隻章魚知道怎麼玩音樂。

	Can you believe that? 你相信嗎?

	No, I can't. 我不信。

	It's like saying a fish can play the flute. 那就好像說魚會吹笛子.

	2. teach 教導。

	But it's true! 是真的啊!

	A musician taught an octopus to play the piano. 一名音樂家教會了章魚彈鋼琴。

	I know octopuses are smart. 我知道章魚很聰明。

	3. piano 鋼琴。

	Exactly! So why not the piano? 是啊，那為什麼不能彈鋼琴?

	I'll believe it when I see it. 我要看到才會相信。

	4. love 喜愛。

	You love playing the piano. 你喜歡彈鋼琴。

	I do. 對。

	And even with eight arms, it's not that easy! 就算有八隻手臂，它也不簡單!

	這些單字短而常用。

	music音樂 teach教導 piano鋼琴 love喜愛

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. Where did the musician take the octopus to?

	a. His kitchen

	b. His music studio

	c. His bathroom

	2. Which does the octopus play?

	a. Piano

	b. Drum

	c. Guitar

	3. What does the octopus love to eat?

	a. Bubbles

	b. Tubes

	c. Crabs

	Answers

	1. b

	2. a

	3. c

episodes.title: Man Rides Wooden Bike Down the UK
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Man Rides Wooden Bike Down the UK

	A man from Ethiopia lives in England. He was bored. He missed his family. So

	he tried something new. He learned how to ride a bike.

	一名來自衣索比亞的男子現在居住在英國。他覺得很無聊，很想家，所以他學會騎腳踏車後，決定試著做一點不一樣的事情。

	The man wanted to make a bike from wood. He used strong wood. He recycled a

	flip-flop. He made the brake with it!

	他想用木頭做一台腳踏車！他選了很結實的木頭，還用舊拖鞋做成煞車。

	A friend had an idea. The man could ride his bike from the north to the south

	of the UK! That is like riding down three and a half Taiwans!

	朋友給了他建議，這名男子騎著木頭腳踏車從英國最北邊一路騎到最南邊！這段距離差不多有3.5

	個台灣那麼長。

	It was hard. The wind and rain were cold. Sometimes he did not have food.

	這趟旅程十分艱難，天氣又冷又濕，有時候甚至要餓肚子。

	But it was great too. Many nice new friends gave the man food and a place to

	stay. He stayed in homes, garages, barns, and cars! Some people sent him

	money for a hotel room!

	不過，這段旅程也有很棒的地方。他在路上認識了很多新朋友，這些好心的人請他吃飯，還提供地方給他住。也有人直接給他錢，讓他住旅館！

	The wooden bike looked funny. But people liked it. Sometimes it broke. People

	helped him fix it.

	這台木頭腳踏車看起來奇形怪狀，但大家都很喜歡它。有時候腳踏車壞了，路人也會幫忙修理。

	After a few months, the man came to the south of the UK. Friends met him with

	food and music. He is happy now.

	He has a new family of friends in the UK!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	這名衣索匹亞人不但自製腳踏車，還從英國最北騎到最南邊。

	1. recycled 回收的。

	Hey, have you seen that funny wooden bike outside?

	你看到外面那輛怪怪的木頭腳踏車嗎?

	Yes! My friend gave it to me.有啊，是我朋友送我的。

	It's made from recycled wood.用回收的木頭做的。

	2. brake 煞車。

	Did you actually ride it? 你有真的騎它嗎?

	Of course. The brake works well, so it's safe. 當然，它的煞車很管用，很安全。

	3. learn 學習。

	Where did your friend get the idea? 你的朋友怎麼想到這個主意?

	Of making a wooden bike? 做腳踏車嗎?

	He said he learned it from his family. 他說跟家人學的。

	4. family 家人。

	Sounds cool. 好酷喔。

	A family that makes things out of wood. 會做木頭東西的家庭。

	你呢? 愛不愛騎腳踏車?

	recycled回收的 brake煞車 learn學習 family家人

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. What did the man learn?

	a. How to ride a bike

	b. How to use flip-flops

	c. How to miss his family

	2. Where in the UK did the man ride?

	a. From east to west

	b. From south to north

	c. From north to south

	3. Who helped the man on his ride?

	a. Taiwan

	b. New friends

	c. His mom

	Answers

	1. a

	2. c

	3. b

episodes.title: U.S. Sells Last New Pennies
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	U.S. Sells Last New Pennies

	Have you seen U.S. money? Like Taiwan's money, U.S. money is called "dollar."

	One U.S. dollar has 100 cents.

	你有看過美國的錢幣嗎？美國錢叫做美元，一美元等於一百美分。

	The one-cent coin is called a penny. The penny looks a lot like Taiwan's

	one-dollar coin. The two coins are brown. They are about the same size.

	一美分硬幣看起來很像台灣的一元硬幣，都是咖啡色的，大小也差不多。

	Some people like coins very much. They try to get new coins, old coins, or

	rare coins. Rare means there are almost no others. The U.S. stopped making

	pennies in 2025. So the last pennies are new and rare.

	有一些人非常喜歡收集硬幣。他們會到處找新的、舊的，或是很稀有的硬幣。美國2025

	年停止製造一美分硬幣，所以最後出廠的硬幣不但稀有，也是全新的。

	The U.S. sold the last pennies. Pennies were made for 232 years, so it sold

	232 sets. One set has three pennies. Let's see… That is 696 pennies.

	美國把最後一批一美分硬幣拿出來賣。一美分硬幣已經生產了 232 年，所以他們賣了

	232 套，一套有3枚硬幣，一共是 696 枚。

	But one penny in each set is made of gold! That is very rare!

	但是，每一套硬幣裡面都有一枚是用黃金做的！這些就非常稀有了。

	So how much did these 696 pennies sell for? They sold for 530 million Taiwan

	dollars! Whoa!

	結果這些套幣到底賣了多少錢? 總共賣了五億三千萬台幣！

	Goodbye, new pennies!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	一分錢的美元硬幣，去年十一月停止生產，最後一批特製的套幣也賣光了。

	1. gold 黃金。

	I found a gold coin in my drawer. 我在我的抽屜裡找到一枚金幣。

	Real gold? 真的黃金嗎?

	That’s what it says. 它上面是這麼說的。

	I’m pretty sure it’s made of gold. 我確定是黃金做的。

	2. size 尺寸。

	It's small. 它很小。

	The size of one Taiwanese dollar. 大小跟台幣一塊錢一樣。

	Still, it’s gold! 但它是黃金!

	Let me check my drawers too! 我也要看看我的抽屜!

	3. dollar 元。

	Should I sell it? 我應該賣掉嗎?

	How much is it worth? 它值多少錢?

	No idea. Perhaps five hundred Taiwan dollars? 不知道。也許五百塊台幣?

	4. sell 賣。

	A small coin that can sell for $500? 一枚小硬幣可以賣五百塊?

	請跟我一起讀單字。

	gold黃金 size尺寸 dollar元 sell賣

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. How many cents is one penny?

	a. 1 cent

	b. 10 cents

	c. 100 cents

	2. What are the last pennies?

	a. Rare

	b. Old

	c. Big

	3. How much did the last U.S. pennies sell for?

	a. 530 Taiwan dollars

	b. 530,000 Taiwan dollars

	c. 530,000,000 Taiwan dollars

	Answers

	1. a

	2. a

	3. c

	美國把最後一批一美分硬幣拿出來賣。一美分硬幣已經生產了 232 年，所以他們賣了

	232 套，一套有3枚硬幣，一共是 696 枚。

	But one penny in each set is made of gold! That is very rare!

	但是，每一套硬幣裡面都有一枚是用黃金做的！這些就非常稀有了。

	So how much did these 696 pennies sell for? They sold for 530 million Taiwan

	dollars! Whoa!

	結果這些套幣到底賣了多少錢? 總共賣了五億三千萬台幣！

	Goodbye, new pennies!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
sections.vocabulary:
Vocabulary

	一分錢的美元硬幣，去年十一月停止生產，最後一批特製的套幣也賣光了。

	1. gold 黃金。

	I found a gold coin in my drawer. 我在我的抽屜裡找到一枚金幣。

	Real gold? 真的黃金嗎?

	That’s what it says. 它上面是這麼說的。

	I’m pretty sure it’s made of gold. 我確定是黃金做的。

	2. size 尺寸。

	It's small. 它很小。

	The size of one Taiwanese dollar. 大小跟台幣一塊錢一樣。

	Still, it’s gold! 但它是黃金!

	Let me check my drawers too! 我也要看看我的抽屜!

	3. dollar 元。

	Should I sell it? 我應該賣掉嗎?

	How much is it worth? 它值多少錢?

	No idea. Perhaps five hundred Taiwan dollars? 不知道。也許五百塊台幣?

	4. sell 賣。

	A small coin that can sell for $500? 一枚小硬幣可以賣五百塊?

	請跟我一起讀單字。

	gold黃金 size尺寸 dollar元 sell賣

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
sections.quiz:
Quiz

	1. How many cents is one penny?

	a. 1 cent

	b. 10 cents

	c. 100 cents

	2. What are the last pennies?

	a. Rare

	b. Old

	c. Big

	3. How much did the last U.S. pennies sell for?

	a. 530 Taiwan dollars

	b. 530,000 Taiwan dollars

	c. 530,000,000 Taiwan dollars

episodes.title: Man Cleans Clothes for People with No Home
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Man Cleans Clothes for People with No Home

	Clean clothes make us feel good. They smell good. They make us look good. And

	they feel good on us!

	穿著乾淨的衣服會讓人心情變好。乾淨的衣服既舒服又好看！

	An American man was a police officer. He helped people. He is not a police

	officer now. But he wants to keep helping people. The man helps people who do

	not have a home. It is hard for them to wash their clothes.

	有一名退休的美國警察喜歡幫助有需要的人，尤其是無家可歸的人，因為他們沒有辦法洗衣服！

	The man has a bus. He put three washing machines and three clothes dryers in

	the bus. He drives to the same places every week. People know when and where

	to find him.

	於是，他在一輛巴士上裝了三台洗衣機跟三台烘衣機。每個星期，他都會把公車開到固定的地點，方便大家找他洗衣服。

	The man washes, dries, and folds these people's clothes for free! In about

	three months, the man washed more than nine hundred kilograms of clothes! And

	these clean clothes helped some people find a job.

	他會免費為那些無家可歸的人洗衣服、烘乾，然後摺好！在短短的三個月內，他洗了超過九百公斤的衣服。穿上乾淨的衣服之後，有一些人甚至找到了工作！

	Now the man wants another bus. He wants more washing machines and clothes

	dryers. He needs people to drive the bus. They will wash clothes for

	schoolkids who do not have a home.

	現在，他希望有第二輛公車放更多洗衣機跟烘衣機，也想找司機來幫忙開公車。這樣一來，就能為無家可歸的學童洗衣服。

	Everyone feels good wearing clean clothes. This man's idea helps many people

	feel good!

	________________________________________

	Vocabulary

	能夠穿乾淨的衣服是很大的福氣，一名好心人免費幫街友洗衣。

	1. wash 洗。

	I have so many clothes to wash! 我有好多衣服要洗!

	That’s exactly what a washing machine is for. 洗衣機正是做這件事用的。

	2. dry 弄乾。

	I know, but I still have to dry them and fold them.

	我知道啊，可是我還得把它烘乾，摺起來。

	Come on, let me give you a hand.來吧，我來幫你忙。

	3. clean 乾淨的。

	Aw, that’s so nice of you! 你真好!

	I’m happy to help. 我很樂意幫忙。

	Clean clothes always smell and feel good. 乾淨衣服好聞又舒服。

	4. job 工作。

	Come to think of it, maybe I should find a job that has something to do with

	clothes. 想來我也許應該找一個 跟衣服有關的工作。

	還記得今天的單字嗎?

	wash洗 dry弄乾 clean乾淨的 job工作

	________________________________________

	Quiz

	1. Who does the man help?

	a. Police officers who have a home

	b. People who do not have a home

	c. People who have a home

	2. Where did the man put the washing machines and clothes dryers?

	a. Under the bus

	b. On top of the bus

	c. In the bus

	3. What does the man want now?

	a. A job

	b. Free clothes

	c. Another bus

	Answers

	1. b

	2. c

	3. c

episodes.title: A Pole to Poke with Snack Sticks
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	A Pole to Poke with Snack Sticks

	The Dongnan Night Market is in Yunlin. Many food stalls there sell delicious

	snacks on bamboo sticks.

	在雲林的東南夜市裡，很多攤販會賣插在竹籤上的美味小吃。

	Some food stalls sell corn on sticks. Some sell meat on sticks. Others sell

	sweet potato balls on sticks.

	賣烤玉米的，烤肉串的，或是地瓜球的攤販，都會用到竹籤！

	When some people finish their snacks, they drop their sticks on the ground.

	Bamboo sticks are sharp. Other people step on them. The sticks can hurt their

	feet!

	很多人吃完東西後，就把竹籤隨手丟在地上。在人來人往的夜市中，地上尖尖的竹籤可能會刺傷人！

	One man saw people getting hurt. His food stall does not sell snacks on

	sticks. But he wanted to keep people safe. He had a smart idea. He built a

	tall pole with straw and wood.

	一名攤販發現有人因為竹籤受傷，想到了一個聰明的解決辦法。他豎起一根用稻草跟木頭做的柱子！

	When people finish eating, they poke their sticks into the pole. Now fewer

	sticks are on the ground. The night market is cleaner. Walking is safer.

	大家吃完東西之後，可以把竹籤戳進這個柱子裡面。這樣一來，地上的竹籤減少了，夜市變得比較乾淨，走路也比較安全！

	People like the pole. Many say it is simple and helpful. Some say it is fun.

	Others say it could be made into a straw man! The man says he will think

	about it.

	大家很喜歡這個簡單、有趣的柱子，還有人提議要把柱子做成稻草人的形狀！

	One man's simple idea is making the night market safer and cleaner for

	everyone! Now go and poke the pole!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	尖尖的竹籤可能造成傷害，用心的攤販主人想辦法改變大家的使用習慣。

	1. people 人群。

	You’re late. 你遲到了。

	Sorry, the night market was full of people.真抱歉，夜市擠滿了人。

	I had to stand in line for everything. 每樣東西都得排隊等。

	2. food 食物。

	But look what I got. 不過你看我買的。

	Wow, pig’s ears and chicken feet! 豬耳朵，還有雞腳!

	Did you get them from that food stall I told you about?

	你是在我跟你講的那一攤買的嗎?

	Yep, that’s the one. 對，就是那家。

	3. corn 玉米。

	And I got some corn too. 我還買了幾支玉米。

	Corn is the best snack! 玉米是最棒的零食!

	4. sweet potato 地瓜。

	I heard their sweet potatoes are good too. 聽說他們的地瓜也不錯。

	你喜歡逛夜市嗎?來讀單字。

	people人群 food食物 corn玉米 sweet potato地瓜

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. What do some people do with their sticks at the night market?

	a. Burn them

	b. Drop them on the ground

	c. Eat them with corn

	2. Why did the man make the pole?

	a. To keep people safe

	b. To sell more sticks

	c. To make fewer snacks

	3. What is the pole made of?

	a. Plastic and paper

	b. Bamboo

	c. Straw and wood

	Answers

	1. b

	2. a

	3. c

episodes.title: Taiwan Lantern Festival is Here
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Taiwan Lantern Festival is Here

	Today is the last day of the Lunar New Year holiday. That means it is the

	first day of the Taiwan Lantern Festival in Chiayi!

	今天是農曆新年的最後一天，這也代表嘉義的台灣燈會正式開始了！

	There is someone new at the festival. He is famous! He is short! He has blue

	eyes and brown hair! He has a big mustache under his big nose! He wears blue

	overalls and a red cap. The letter "M" is on his cap. Oh, and he is from a

	video game. Who is he?

	今年的燈會出現了一位家喻戶曉的角色。他個子不高，有藍色眼睛、棕色頭髮，還有大鬍子！他穿著藍色吊帶褲，戴著紅色帽子，帽子上寫了字母「M」。你猜到是誰了嗎？

	This famous guy is in one part of the festival. But the festival has sixteen

	parts! They all have amazing lanterns.

	這個角色出現在燈會的其中一個展區。燈會一共有十六個展區，每區都有很精彩的花燈！

	Some lanterns show cool stories of the Tsou people. Some show the delicious

	food Chiayi grows. Some show new things made by its young people.

	有一些燈籠呈現鄒族的故事，有些介紹嘉義的在地美食，還有一些展示出年輕人的創意！

	Other lanterns show how Chiayi is changing. And some show how Chiayi cares

	about the Earth.

	從燈籠中，能看見嘉義的發展與轉變，一些環境保護相關的花燈也展現出嘉義人的生態關懷。

	The festival has Taiwan's exciting lantern contest too!

	燈會現場還能看到台灣花燈比賽！

	You can see all this until March fifteenth. Someone wearing blue overalls and

	a red cap is waiting for you there! Happy Lantern Festival!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	農曆春節假期之後，大家就要準備吃元宵賞花燈了。

	1. part 部分。

	I love Lantern Festivals! 我喜歡燈節!

	There's something magical about them. 它有一種魔力。

	Totally agree. 我完全同意。

	I think it's the best part of the holiday season. 我覺得它是春節最棒的部分。

	2. make 製作。

	Last year I even saw several lanterns made by inmates.

	我去年還看到幾個囚犯做的花燈。

	Can you imagine that? 你能想像嗎?

	3. change 改變。

	Wow, sitting in jail and making lanterns…哇，坐在監獄裡，動手做花燈...

	That really changed the way I think about inmates.

	真的讓我改變了對囚犯的想法。

	4. story 故事。

	Yeah, it would make a great story, wouldn't it? 這會是很好的故事，不是嗎?

	Inmates, lanterns, light, hope…囚犯，花燈，光明，希望...

	你記得剛剛聽到的單字嗎?

	part部分 make製作 change改變 story故事

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. Where is the Taiwan Lantern Festival?

	a. Changhua

	b. Chiayi

	c. Yilan

	2. What does the famous guy have?

	a. A big mustache

	b. A small nose

	c. Red eyes

	3. How many parts does the festival have?

	a. 1

	b. 15

	c. 16

	Answers

	1. b

	2. a

	3. c

episodes.title: Do Not Stop Sea Turtle Fights
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Do Not Stop Sea Turtle Fights

	Some divers were at a beach in Xiaoliuqiu. They heard loud splashes!

	They saw two big things push each other. The things bit each other. They hit

	each other. Were monsters fighting?!

	在小琉球的沙灘邊，幾名潛水客聽到很大的潑水聲。他們發現有兩個大東西正在互相推擠。牠們咬來咬去，攻擊對方，是怪物在打架嗎?

	They were not monsters. They were sea turtles!

	Maybe they were fighting for space. Sea turtles like to have their own space.

	其實牠們不是怪物，而是兩隻海龜。牠們也許在搶地盤，因為海龜喜歡有自己的空間。

	The divers were worried. But they did not stop the fight.

	Why not? Well, in Taiwan, we cannot touch sea turtles.

	潛水客擔心海龜受傷，並沒有出手阻止。為什麼呢？因為在台灣，人是不能碰海龜的！

	Taiwan wants to keep sea turtles safe. There are not many now.

	Touching sea turtles can hurt them. Their skin has sticky stuff on it. When

	people touch this stuff, sea turtles can get sick. And they can get scared

	and swim into something dangerous.

	台灣想保護為數不多的海龜。但是人類碰到海龜的皮膚，可能會導致海龜生病，或是驚嚇到牠，害牠亂了方向，撞上危險的東西。

	So people who touch sea turtles may have to pay a big fine!

	For one turtle, the fine is three hundred thousand Taiwan dollars. For two,

	it is six hundred thousand Taiwan dollars!

	This means not touching sea turtles is very important!

	如果有人碰了海龜，就要付高額的罰款。碰一隻海龜可能會罰到三十萬元，如果碰了兩隻，罰金還會加倍！所以，千萬不要碰海龜喔！

	Sea turtles need help. This time, the divers helped by not stopping the fight!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	海龜非常可愛，在台灣被列為保育類動物，需要保護。

	1. swim 游泳。

	The sea looks perfect today! 今天的海看起來真完美! I can't wait to swim!

	我等不及要游泳了!

	Are you sure? 你確定嗎? I heard there are turtles in this

	area.聽說這個區域有海龜。

	2. hurt 傷害。

	Wait, so I can swim with turtles?! 等等，我可以跟海龜一起游!? That would be

	amazing! 太棒了!

	Don't touch them, though. You might hurt them. 可不要碰牠，可能會有傷害。

	3. push 推擠。

	I'd never hurt a turtle! 我絕對不會傷害烏龜! I'm an animal lover! 我愛護動物!

	The last time I saw you, 我上次看到你， you were pushing two ants to make

	them fight. 你正在催兩隻螞蟻打架。

	4. fight 打架。

	They were NOT fighting. 牠們不是在打架。They were just… talking.只是在講話。

	今天的單字都是動詞。swim游泳 hurt傷害 push推擠 fight打架

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. What things were fighting?

	a. Monsters

	b. Sea turtles

	c. Divers

	2. Why is it important not to touch sea turtles?

	a. They may get sick.

	b. They may bite.

	c. They may fight.

	3. How much is the fine for touching one sea turtle?

	a. Three hundred Taiwan dollars

	b. Three thousand Taiwan dollars

	c. Three hundred thousand Taiwan dollars

	Answers

	1. b

	2. a

	3. c

episodes.title: Playful Dog Goes to Basketball Game
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Playful Dog Goes to Basketball Game

	In basketball, players are on a court. They bounce the ball. They throw it.

	They want the ball to go into the basket. When it does, the crowd cheers!

	打籃球時，球員在場上拍球、傳球、投球，努力讓球射進籃框。球一進去，觀眾就歡呼。

	A university in Yunlin had a basketball game. But then a black dog ran onto

	the court. It wanted to play!

	雲林一所大學舉辦了一場籃球賽。比賽進行到一半，一隻黑狗突然跑進球場，想一起玩球！

	People cannot bring their pets to games. Whose dog was it? No one knew. How

	did the dog get in? No one knew. The dog was a surprise!

	比賽時，寵物是禁止入場的。但是沒有人知道狗主人是誰，也不知道牠怎麼跑進來的。這隻狗是個意外的驚喜！

	The black dog ran to a player. It chewed on the player's right shoe. And then

	it chewed on his left shoe! It jumped onto the player. The crowd laughed at

	the playful dog.

	這隻頑皮的黑狗跑到一名球員身邊，咬他右腳的球鞋，接著又咬他左邊的鞋，還跳到他身上。觀眾看到這一幕全都笑了。

	The player tried to move away from the dog. But the dog wanted to chew the

	player's shoes more! The player stood and stood. Then the DJ playing music at

	the game saved him. The DJ took the excited dog off the court. A coach took

	care of the dog, and the game started again.

	球員想把黑狗趕開，但是牠緊咬不放。最後，負責播音樂的 DJ

	救了球員，把興奮的狗帶離球場。後來換教練接手照顧狗狗，比賽才繼續進行。

	No one was mad at the playful black dog. It made them smile!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	喜歡粉紅色球鞋的狗，讓籃球比賽多了笑料。

	1. player 球員。

	Hey, want to play ball tonight? 你今晚想打球嗎?

	Not really. I'm tired.不大想，我累了。

	But we need one more player.但是我們還需要一個球員。

	2. left，right 左邊，右邊。

	Okay, but don't throw the ball at my face again!

	好吧，但是不要又把球扔到我的臉。

	I didn't last time. 我上次也沒有。You ran right into it! 是你剛好撞上的!

	Because you yelled "Left!" and pointed right.因為你叫左邊，卻手指右邊。

	3. jump 跳。

	Come on! No one jumps as high as you do! 來啦，沒有人像你跳那麼高! Alright,

	but no jumping tonight.好，但是今晚不跳。

	4. cheer 歡呼。

	So what are you going to do? 那你要做什麼?

	I'll just cheer you on.我只替你們加油。

	player球員 left，right左邊，右邊 jump跳 cheer歡呼

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. Where was the basketball game?

	a. At an elementary school

	b. At a high school

	c. At a university

	2. What did the dog chew?

	a. A basketball

	b. A player's shoes

	c. A player's cap

	3. Who took the dog away?

	a. A coach

	b. A player

	c. A DJ

	Answers

	1. c

	2. b

	3. c

episodes.title: Millions Save Axolotl Money, But Axolotls Need Saving
episodes.transcript:
Millions Save Axolotl Money, But Axolotls Need Saving

	 

	Do you remember the axolotl? Axolotls are small amphibians. Young amphibians breathe with gills. Fish do this too. Most grown-up amphibians breathe with lungs. We do this too. 

	美西螈是一種小型兩棲動物。兩棲動物小時候會像魚一樣用鰓呼吸，長大後就會用肺呼吸。

	 

	But axolotls never grow up. They keep their gills. They are tadpoles all their lives. They are very cute. And they are Mexico's favorite animal! 

	但是美西螈永遠不會長大，牠們一輩子都維持蝌蚪狀態，用鰓呼吸。很多人覺得美西螈非常可愛，牠們是墨西哥最受歡迎的動物！

	 

	Gorda is an axolotl. She lives in the axolotl museum in Mexico City. She is famous! She is on Mexico's 50-peso bill. People say it is the most beautiful bill in the world. 

	Gorda 是一隻有名的美西螈，住在墨西哥市的美西螈博物館。Gorda 的照片印在墨西哥的 50 披索鈔票上。有人說這是世界上最漂亮的鈔票。

	 

	Many people love the axolotl bill. They keep it. They do not spend it. Thirteen million Mexicans keep one or more!

	很多人喜歡這張鈔票，捨不得把鈔票用掉。有大約一千三百萬名墨西哥人收藏這種鈔票。

	 

	Some people pay more than 50 pesos for some axolotl bills. These bills are some of the first ones made. So people want them more.

	有人願意花超過 50 披索來買早期發行的鈔票，這些紙鈔特別值錢！

	 

	Gorda's picture on the bill is important. Real axolotls need to be saved. But animals cannot be saved if people do not know about them.

	美西螈需要被保護，但是如果大家不了解，就無法保護他們。鈔票上的Gorda 可以讓更多人認識美西螈！

	 

	And now people know!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	 

	墨西哥這個很原始的小動物，讓很多人著迷。

	 

	1. Mexican 墨西哥的。

	I've never seen Mexican banknotes before. 我從來沒有看過墨西哥紙鈔。

	Really? I have. 真的喔，我有。I've also seen bills from Costa Rica. 我也看過哥斯大黎加的。

	 

	2. favorite 最喜歡的。

	Fancy! Have you traveled to both places? 真不錯呢，兩個地方你都去過? 

	Yeah, years ago. 對，很多年前了。They are my favorite countries. 它們是我最喜歡的國家。

	 

	3. keep 保存。

	And Costa Rican bills are the most beautiful. 而且哥斯大黎加鈔票最漂亮了。I still keep some of them. 我還保存了一些。

	 

	4. remember 記得。

	Because they have flowers on them? 因為上面有花朵? 

	Flowers, animals, bright colors… 花朵，動物，鮮豔的顏色。

	You really remember them well! 你記得好清楚! 

	Yeah, I like money. 是啊，我喜歡錢。

	 

	請跟我讀單字。Mexican墨西哥的    favorite最喜歡的    keep保存    remember記得

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	 

	Quiz

	 

	1. How much money is the axolotl bill?

	a. One peso

	b. Thirteen pesos

	c. Fifty pesos

	 

	2. Where does Gorda live?

	a. In a museum

	b. In a zoo

	c. On a bill

	 

	3. What do 13 million Mexicans do with an axolotl bill?

	a. Spend it

	b. Keep it

	c. Give it food

	 

	 

	 

	 

	 

	 

	 

	 

	Answers

	1. c

	2. a

	3. b

	3. bMillions Save Axolotl Money, But Axolotls Need Saving

	 

	Do you remember the axolotl? Axolotls are small amphibians. Young amphibians breathe with gills. Fish do this too. Most grown-up amphibians breathe with lungs. We do this too.

	Gorda is an axolotl. She lives in the axolotl museum in Mexico City. She is famous! She is on Mexico's 50-peso bill. People say it is the most beautiful bill in the world. 

	Gorda 是一隻有名的美西螈，住在墨西哥市的美西螈博物館。Gorda 的照片印在墨西哥的 50 披索鈔票上。有人說這是世界上最漂亮的鈔票。

	很多人喜歡這張鈔票，捨不得把鈔票用掉。有大約一千三百萬名墨西哥人收藏這種鈔票。

	有人願意花超過 50 披索來買早期發行的鈔票，這些紙鈔特別值錢！

	美西螈需要被保護，但是如果大家不了解，就無法保護他們。鈔票上的Gorda 可以讓更多人認識美西螈！

	 

	And now people know!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	 

	墨西哥這個很原始的小動物，讓很多人著迷。

	 

	1. Mexican 墨西哥的。

	4. remember 記得。

	Because they have flowers on them? 因為上面有花朵? 

	Flowers, animals, bright colors… 花朵，動物，鮮豔的顏色。

	Quiz

	 

	1. How much money is the axolotl bill?

	a. One peso

	b. Thirteen pesos

	c. Fifty pesos

	 

	2. Where does Gorda live?

	a. In a museum

	b. In a zoo

	c. On a bill

	 

	3. What do 13 million Mexicans do with an axolotl bill?

	a. Spend it

	b. Keep it

	c. Give it food

	 

	 

	 

	 

	 

	 

	 

	 

	Answers

	1. c

	2. a

	3. bMillions Save Axolotl Money, But Axolotls Need Saving

	 

	Do you remember the axolotl? Axolotls are small amphibians. Young amphibians breathe with gills. Fish do this too. Most grown-up amphibians breathe with lungs. We do this too.

	但是美西螈永遠不會長大，牠們一輩子都維持蝌蚪狀態，用鰓呼吸。很多人覺得美西螈非常可愛，牠們是墨西哥最受歡迎的動物！

	 

	Gorda is an axolotl. She lives in the axolotl museum in Mexico City. She is famous! She is on Mexico's 50-peso bill. People say it is the most beautiful bill in the world. 

	Gorda 是一隻有名的美西螈，住在墨西哥市的美西螈博物館。Gorda 的照片印在墨西哥的 50 披索鈔票上。有人說這是世界上最漂亮的鈔票。

	 

	Many people love the axolotl bill. They keep it. They do not spend it. Thirteen million Mexicans keep one or more!

	很多人喜歡這張鈔票，捨不得把鈔票用掉。有大約一千三百萬名墨西哥人收藏這種鈔票。

	 

	Some people pay more than 50 pesos for some axolotl bills. These bills are some of the first ones made. So people want them more.

	有人願意花超過 50 披索來買早期發行的鈔票，這些紙鈔特別值錢！

	 

	Gorda's picture on the bill is important. Real axolotls need to be saved. But animals cannot be saved if people do not know about them.

	美西螈需要被保護，但是如果大家不了解，就無法保護他們。鈔票上的Gorda 可以讓更多人認識美西螈！

	 

	And now people know!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	 

	墨西哥這個很原始的小動物，讓很多人著迷。

	 

	1. Mexican 墨西哥的。

	I've never seen Mexican banknotes before. 我從來沒有看過墨西哥紙鈔。

	Really? I have. 真的喔，我有。I've also seen bills from Costa Rica. 我也看過哥斯大黎加的。

	 

	2. favorite 最喜歡的。

	Fancy! Have you traveled to both places? 真不錯呢，兩個地方你都去過? 

	Yeah, years ago. 對，很多年前了。They are my favorite countries. 它們是我最喜歡的國家。

	 

	3. keep 保存。

	And Costa Rican bills are the most beautiful. 而且哥斯大黎加鈔票最漂亮了。I still keep some of them. 我還保存了一些。

	 

	4. remember 記得。

	Because they have flowers on them? 因為上面有花朵? 

	Flowers, animals, bright colors… 花朵，動物，鮮豔的顏色。

	You really remember them well! 你記得好清楚! 

	Yeah, I like money. 是啊，我喜歡錢。

	 

	請跟我讀單字。Mexican墨西哥的    favorite最喜歡的    keep保存    remember記得

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	 

	Quiz

	 

	1. How much money is the axolotl bill?

	a. One peso

	b. Thirteen pesos

	c. Fifty pesos

	 

	2. Where does Gorda live?

	a. In a museum

	b. In a zoo

	c. On a bill

	 

	3. What do 13 million Mexicans do with an axolotl bill?

	a. Spend it

	b. Keep it

	c. Give it food

	 

	 

	 

	 

	 

	 

	 

	 

	Answers

	1. c

	2. a

	3. b

episodes.title: Superheroes in Our Daily Lives
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Superheroes in Our Daily Lives

	Superheroes help people! But we do not see them in our daily lives. Seeing a

	superhero is a surprise!

	Does this surprise make more people kind? Scientists in Italy studied this.

	英雄會幫助別人，但平常看不到這樣的人，所以一旦見到，大家都會覺得又驚又喜。碰到超級英雄會不會讓人變得更善良？有幾位義大利的科學家做了一個研究。

	Pregnant women are going to have a baby. Some people are kind to pregnant

	women on trains.

	So the study had two women who looked pregnant. The women got on trains. The

	trains had no free seats.

	大家通常會對孕婦比較有禮貌，也會在火車上讓座給她們。於是，科學家找了兩位女士來參加實驗，讓她們扮演孕婦並搭乘已經客滿的火車。

	The first woman took 70 trains! Twenty-nine people were kind. They gave her

	their seat!

	第一位女士一共搭了七十班火車。其中有二十九個善良的人主動把座位讓給她。

	The second woman and a man dressed like Batman took 68 trains! Batman stood

	three meters from the woman.

	They did not talk to each other. Forty-one people gave her their seat!

	第二位女士搭了六十八班火車。搭車時，她旁邊站著一位打扮成蝙蝠俠的男士。蝙蝠俠離她大約三公尺遠，也沒有對話。結果，有四十一個人讓座給這位女士！

	More people were kind when Batman was there!

	The scientists say we do not see things around us in our daily lives. Maybe

	we are talking, thinking, or using our phones. But a surprise makes us see!

	And sometimes we see people we can help.

	蝙蝠俠的出現讓更多人釋出善意！科學家說，我們在生活中常常因為在聊天、想事情、或者滑手機而沒有注意到周圍。突然出現的驚喜會讓我們更注意周遭環境，有時候也會發現需要幫助的人。

	Let's look around and be kind! We can be superheroes in our daily lives!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	蝙蝠俠會讓人想做善事，這是不是很有趣?

	1. seat 座位。

	Do you see that gray-haired man? 你看到那個白頭髮的男人嗎?

	Yeah. 看到了。

	You should give him your seat. 你應該讓座給他。

	Why me? 為什麼該我? You can do it yourself. 你也可以讓啊。

	2. look 看起來。

	I can't. 我不行。He'll be embarrassed. 他會不好意思。

	And he won't be if it's me because…? 假如是我他就不會，理由是...?

	You look much younger. 你看起來年輕多了。

	3. stand 站著。

	Wow, thank you. 謝謝你啊。

	Do it, please! Don't let him stand there. 拜託讓座，別讓他站在那裏。

	4. talk 談話。

	Fine. I'll talk to him.好吧，我去跟他說。But if he says no, I'm blaming

	you.但是假如他拒絕，我要怪你。

	在公車或是捷運上，你會讓座嗎? seat座位 look看起來 stand站著 talk談話

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. Where are the scientists?

	a. India

	b. Italy

	c. Mali

	2. Which superhero did the scientists use?

	a. Batman

	b. Batwoman

	c. Superman

	3. How were people kind to the woman who looked pregnant?

	a. They said she looked pregnant.

	b. They told the superhero to help her.

	c. They gave her their seat.

	Answers

	1. b

	2. a

	3. c

sections.story:
________________________________

	Superheroes in Our Daily Lives

	Superheroes help people! But we do not see them in our daily lives. Seeing a

	superhero is a surprise!

	Does this surprise make more people kind? Scientists in Italy studied this.

	英雄會幫助別人，但平常看不到這樣的人，所以一旦見到，大家都會覺得又驚又喜。碰到超級英雄會不會讓人變得更善良？有幾位義大利的科學家做了一個研究。

	women on trains.

	Let's look around and be kind! We can be superheroes in our daily lives!

episodes.title: AI Machine Wins Cooking Contest
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	AI Machine Wins Cooking Contest

	AI is amazing! It can do so much. It can make music. It can find answers

	fast. It can make good food!

	AI 可以完成很多事情，比如說創作音樂，也可以很快回答問題，甚至還能烹飪。

	In Taichung, a university had a cooking contest. A chef and an AI cooking

	machine were in the contest. They made Hakka stir-fry. It has pork, squid,

	and celery.

	一所台中的大學舉辦了一場廚師競賽。一位真人廚師還有一台會燒菜的 AI

	機器比賽做客家小炒，裡面有豬肉、魷魚跟芹菜。

	The chef made the dish in six minutes. Some people took care of the AI

	machine. It told them when to put the pork, squid, and celery in it. The

	machine made the dish in four minutes!

	廚師花了六分鐘做好客家小炒。AI

	機器由幾個人操作，機器會告訴他們什麼時候放豬肉、魷魚跟芹菜。結果機器只花了四分鐘就完成這道菜了！

	Thirteen students tasted the dishes. They did not know which dish the chef

	made or which dish the AI machine made. Six people liked the chef's dish

	more. But seven people liked the AI machine's dish more. The machine won!

	有十三位學生來當評審，他們不知道這兩盤菜是誰做的。有六個人喜歡廚師做的菜，但是有七個人比較喜歡

	AI 機器做的，AI 機器贏了！

	In Taiwan, many restaurants need more workers. Some restaurants may get AI

	machines to help with cooking. The machines cook fast. They do not need to

	rest. And the food they make tastes good.

	台灣很多餐廳都缺人手，因此有一些餐廳也許會用 AI

	機器來幫忙。這些機器不用休息，而且煮菜又快又好吃！

	Maybe you will eat food made by an AI machine soon! Will you know a machine

	made it?

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	人工智慧做菜雖然需要真人操作，但是不用花腦筋。

	1. do 做。

	I'm so tired. 我好累。I wish I had an AI helper at home.

	我好希望家裡有個人工智慧幫手。

	To do everything for you? 幫你做所有家事?

	Not everything. 不用做所有事。Just buy groceries, cook and clean.

	只要買菜煮飯打掃。

	2) amazing 很棒的。

	So a chef and a vacuum cleaner in one machine.

	所以就是一台機器裡面有大廚跟吸塵器。

	Yeah, wouldn't that be amazing! 對啊，那不是很棒嗎?

	3) machine 機器。

	I'd like a machine that can drive me around.

	我想要一部機器是可以載著我到處逛。

	Like a taxi? 就像計程車?

	Yeah, it also plays my favorite music. 對，還可以放我最喜歡的音樂。

	4) rest 休息。

	And I can just rest. 我只休息就對了。

	你想要AI幫你讀英文單字嗎? do做 amazing很棒的 machine機器 rest休息

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. Where was the contest?

	a. At a hotel

	b. At a university

	c. At a restaurant

	2. What is in Hakka stir-fry?

	a. Pork

	b. Beef

	c. Chicken

	3. How many people liked the AI machine's dish more?

	a. 6

	b. 7

	c. 13

	Answers

	1. b

	2. a

	3. b

episodes.title: Giving Toys a New Life
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Giving Toys a New Life

	What do you do when your toys break? Do you throw them away? Wait! Too many

	toys are thrown away. Take them to a toy hospital! That is better for the

	Earth!

	壞掉的玩具，先不要急著丟！你可以把它帶去玩具醫院修復，對地球也比較友善！

	In Taoyuan, Zhongpu Elementary School has a toy hospital. The toy doctors

	wear white coats with small cute toys on them!

	桃園的中埔國小有一間玩具醫院。玩具醫生穿著白色工作服，上面有可愛的小玩具。

	Kids bring a toy to fix. They get a paper. They write their name on it. They

	write what the toy is made of: plastic, wood, or something else. They write

	what needs to be fixed. Then the toy goes into a waiting room. This is like

	hospitals for people!

	小朋友會把壞掉的玩具拿來修。他們在一張紙上寫下自己的名字，還有玩具的材質跟需要修理的地方。寫好後，玩具就會被送到等候區，就像真的醫院一樣。

	Many of the toy doctors are older adults. They like working with kids and

	helping the Earth.

	很多玩具醫生是年紀比較大的長輩，他們喜歡跟小朋友相處，也想要幫助地球。

	Some of the toy doctors are kids! Some like taking toys apart. Now they can!

	And no one gets mad!

	也有小朋友當玩具醫生！在玩具醫院，他們可以把玩具拆開來，不會有人生氣！

	In four months, the toy doctors fixed 200 toys! They use parts from toys that

	cannot be fixed.

	玩具醫生們只用了四個月，就修好了兩百個玩具！

	Older adults and kids give toys a new life at Zhongpu Elementary School's toy

	hospital. That is good for the Earth!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	玩具醫生讓壞掉的玩具起死回生，不需要扔掉。

	1. cute 可愛的。

	What a cute choo-choo train! 好可愛的小火車! A gift for someone?

	送什麼人的禮物嗎?

	Yep, a very important someone: me! 對，很重要的人，我。

	2. toy 玩具。

	Ohh! Still young at heart, I see. 還很有童心呢，我懂了。

	Toys don't have an age limit. 玩具又沒有年齡限制。

	3. take apart 拆開。

	And this one isn't just for looking at. 而且這個不是光用來看的。I can take it

	apart and build it again. 我可以把它拆開再組裝起來。

	4. fix 修理。

	Wow! I also admire people who can fix broken toys.

	我也很佩服會修理壞掉玩具的人。

	Well, you're talking to one. 你正在跟這樣一個人講話呢。

	你有心愛的玩具嗎? 來讀一遍單字。cute可愛的 toy玩具 take apart拆開

	fix修理

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. Where is the toy hospital?

	a. Taipei

	b. Taoyuan

	c. Taichung

	2. What do kids write on the paper they get?

	a. Who the toy maker is

	b. How old the toy is

	c. What the toy is made of

	3. Who are some of the toy doctors?

	a. Kids

	b. Doctors for people

	c. Teachers

	Answers

	1. b

	2. c

	3. a

	玩具醫生讓壞掉的玩具起死回生，不需要扔掉。

	1. cute 可愛的。

	What a cute choo-choo train! 好可愛的小火車! A gift for someone?

	送什麼人的禮物嗎?

	Yep, a very important someone: me! 對，很重要的人，我。

	2. toy 玩具。

	Ohh! Still young at heart, I see. 還很有童心呢，我懂了。

	Toys don't have an age limit. 玩具又沒有年齡限制。

	3. take apart 拆開。

	And this one isn't just for looking at. 而且這個不是光用來看的。I can take it

	apart and build it again. 我可以把它拆開再組裝起來。

	4. fix 修理。

	Wow! I also admire people who can fix broken toys.

	我也很佩服會修理壞掉玩具的人。

	Well, you're talking to one. 你正在跟這樣一個人講話呢。

	你有心愛的玩具嗎? 來讀一遍單字。cute可愛的 toy玩具 take apart拆開

	fix修理

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
sections.quiz:
Quiz

	1. Where is the toy hospital?

	a. Taipei

	b. Taoyuan

	c. Taichung

	2. What do kids write on the paper they get?

	a. Who the toy maker is

	b. How old the toy is

	c. What the toy is made of

	3. Who are some of the toy doctors?

	a. Kids

	b. Doctors for people

	c. Teachers

episodes.title: Swordfish vs. Spearfishing
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Swordfish vs. Spearfishing

	Swordfish are big fish! They swim very fast. They have long, sharp noses.

	Their noses look like swords.

	旗魚很大，游得也很快。牠們有又長又尖的鼻子，看起來就像一把劍。

	Swordfish live in the ocean. They swim near Taiwan. Catching them is not

	easy. Some fishers use a very long, sharp spear. This way of fishing is

	called spearfishing.

	台灣附近的海域也有旗魚，但要抓到牠們並不容易！有一些漁夫會用魚叉來抓魚，這種捕魚方式叫做「叉魚」。

	Fishers stand high up at the front of a spearfishing boat. They hold a spear.

	They wait for a fish. Then they throw it at the fish.

	漁夫會拿著魚叉站在高高的船頭，等到魚一出現，立刻把魚叉對準牠扔過去。

	These fishers fight the fish and the ocean. It is dangerous. But some think

	it is exciting! The waves are strong. The fish are also strong!

	漁夫同時要對付起伏的海浪和捕魚，既危險又刺激！

	Few fishers use spears now. So a fish market in Keelung made a place to try

	spearfishing. It looks like the front of a spearfishing boat!

	現在漁夫已經很少用那種方式抓魚了。因此，基隆一個魚市場做了像漁船船頭的體驗區，讓大家在那裡體驗用魚叉捕魚的感覺。

	There was a spear. It was heavy. But when people held it the right way, it

	felt lighter. People held the spear. Then they looked down. They saw a big

	swordfish jumping out of the ocean! Hey, it was painted on the ground!

	魚叉雖然很重，但是用正確的方法握著就會覺得它比較輕！在體驗區握著魚叉往下看，可以看到一條畫在地面上的大旗魚跳出海面！

	Many people have tried spearfishing now, thanks to Keelung's fishers!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	旗魚味道鮮美，要抓到牠可不容易。

	1. fishing boat 漁船。

	Have you ever been on a fishing boat? 你有搭過漁船嗎?

	No, but I'd love to try it someday. 沒有，不過我真希望哪天能試一下。

	I was on a squid-fishing boat last month. 我上個月坐了抓小卷的船。

	2. wave 海浪。

	No way, was it exciting? 不會吧，很刺激嗎?

	At first, yeah. 剛開始的時候是。

	But then the waves got crazy and I got super seasick!

	但是後來浪變得太大，害我超暈船!

	3. catch 抓到。

	But did you catch any squid? 但是有抓到小卷嗎?

	We did, tons of them! 有，抓到好多!

	4. wait for 等待。

	And we cooked them on the boat and ate them. 就在船上煮了吃.

	So what are we waiting for? 那我們還等什麼?

	Let's go again this weekend! 這個周末再去吧!

	來一起讀單字。

	fishing boat 漁船 wave 海浪 catch 抓到 wait for 等待

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. What do some fishers use to catch swordfish?

	a. A sword

	b. A spear

	c. Small fish

	2. Where was the fish market held?

	a. Chenggong

	b. Kaohsiung

	c. Keelung

	3. What could people try at the market?

	a. Spearfishing

	b. Painting fish

	c. Sword fighting

	Answers

	1. b

	2. c

	3. a

episodes.title: Mobile Game Helps Indigenous Group
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Mobile Game Helps Indigenous Group

	Kid: Yes! I'm going to win this game!

	Mom: Hey! Put that phone down!

	Kid: Awww … Mom!

	Narrator: Do you play mobile games? They are fun! Many kids like to play

	them. Adults do too!

	你有在玩手機遊戲嗎？很多小孩跟大人都喜歡玩手機遊戲！

	The Nyiyaparli are an Indigenous group in Australia. They made a mobile game.

	It is fun! Everyone can play it! And it is saving the group's language.

	在澳洲，有一個原住民族叫做

	Nyiyaparli。他們做了一個大家都可以玩的手機遊戲，好拯救他們的語言！

	The group is more than 41,000 years old. It has about 400 people now. But its

	language is in danger! Fewer than ten people speak it well. Most are older.

	If its language goes away, the group will not know a lot about being

	Nyiyaparli.

	這個原住民族已經存在超過四萬一千年，如今只剩下大約四百位族人。會說族語的人不到十個，多半是老人家。如果這個語言消失了，Nyiyaparli的文化也會跟著不見！

	But now, kids and adults are playing the game. They are learning the language!

	但現在，小孩和大人都開始一邊玩這個遊戲，一邊學習族語！

	In the game, the players are outside. They go to the group's important

	places. They catch animals like cockatoos and kangaroos! They hear Nyiyaparli

	speakers say animal names and other words.

	在遊戲裡，玩家像是在戶外探險一樣，拜訪族人重要的場所，也會抓鳳頭鸚鵡那樣的動物。玩家還會聽見Nyiyaparli族人用自己的語言講動物的名字跟其他的單字！

	More Nyiyaparli are learning their language now. Their new mobile game is

	saving their very old language! How cool!

	________________________________________

	Vocabulary

	用手遊來學語言，是不是可以事半功倍?

	1. mobile 行動的。

	Whoa, your eyes are so red! 你的眼睛好紅!

	Playing mobile games all night again? 又是整晚玩手遊?

	Guilty. 被你抓包了。

	But this time I really nailed it. 不過這次我真的辦到了!

	2. win 贏得。

	Oh yeah? Did you win something big? 是嗎?你贏了大的?

	Yeah, it was my biggest ever! 我贏了有史以來最大的!

	3. adult 成年人。

	You know, I don't get it. 我真搞不懂。

	Those games are for kids. 那種遊戲是給小孩玩的。

	Are you kidding? Tons of adults play them! 開玩笑，一堆大人都在玩!

	4. speak 說。

	Because they can win real prizes. 因為可以贏真的獎品。

	Ooo! Now you're speaking my language! 這下你說到我心裡了。

	請跟我讀單字。

	mobile行動的 win贏得 adult成年人 speak說

	________________________________________

	Quiz

	1. How old is the Nyiyaparli group?

	a. 10 years old

	b. 400 years old

	c. 41,000 years old

	2. What does the group want to save?

	a. Its mobile game

	b. Its language

	c. Its animals

	3. What do players do in the game?

	a. Catch animals

	b. Talk with Nyiyaparli speakers

	c. Go inside

	Answers

	1. c

	2. b

	3. a

episodes.title: Woman Gets New Hand
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Woman Gets New Hand

	We use our hands every day. We use them to play sports. We use them to clap.

	We use them for many things! But many of us do not think about our hands very

	much.

	我們每天都會動手做很多事，但是卻很少注意自己的手。

	Eight years ago, a woman in the UK got very sick. Doctors had to cut off her

	hands. They did this to save her life.

	八年前，英國有一個女人生了重病。為了救她的命，醫生只好把她的雙手截肢。

	The woman's life was hard with no hands. Then last year, doctors gave her a

	new hand! The hand is real. It looks like her hand. She can move it. She can

	feel things with it!

	沒有手的生活很不方便！但去年，醫生幫她接上了一隻新的手。這隻手看起來就像她原本的手一樣，不只能動，還有知覺。

	The woman can do many things with no help now. She can brush her teeth. She

	can put on makeup. She can brush her hair. She can open doors.

	有了新的手，她可以自己刷牙、化妝、梳頭髮，還可以自己開門。

	Best of all, the woman can hold her six-year-old granddaughter's hand. She

	loves to do this. She likes to hold (and eat!) ice cream cones. She also

	likes to cook marshmallows over a fire!

	最棒的是，她終於能牽著六歲孫女的手！她也喜歡拿著冰淇淋甜筒吃，或是自己烤棉花糖來吃。

	This woman is happy with her new hand. She says it is the best gift she has

	gotten!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	曾經雙手截肢的病人，得到新的手，也獲得新生。

	1. move 移動。

	Hey, what happened to your arm? 你的手臂怎麼了?

	Why the cast? 為什麼打石膏?

	I broke a bone. 我斷了一根骨頭。

	The doctor said I can't move it for a while. 醫生說我暫時不能動到它。

	2. ago 之前。

	Oh no, how did that happen? 真糟糕，是怎麼回事?

	I was just walking when a scooter hit me 3 days ago.

	我三天前走路時被一輛機車撞到。

	3. with 用。

	Yikes, that must have hurt a lot! 一定很痛吧?

	Yeah, it was crazy! 痛死了!

	At least you can still eat, right? 你至少還可以吃東西吧?

	Sure, with a spoon. 當然，用湯匙。

	4. cook 煮。

	Noodles are a nightmare, though. 麵條就很麻煩了。

	So I only cook canned soup. 所以我只做罐頭湯。

	今天的單字短而常用，來讀一遍。

	move移動 ago之前 with用 cook煮

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. What happened to the woman eight years ago?

	a. She got a new hand.

	b. She got very sick.

	c. She fell down.

	2. Why did doctors cut off the woman's hands?

	a. To save her life

	b. To study her hands

	c. To give her new hands

	3. What is the best thing the woman can do with her new hand?

	a. Eat ice cream

	b. Brush her teeth

	c. Hold her granddaughter's hand

	Answers

	1. b

	2. a

	3. c

episodes.title: Cleaning Up the Ocean with AI
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Cleaning Up the Ocean with AI

	The Pacific Ocean is Earth's biggest ocean. But there is something big and

	bad there. It is the Great Pacific Garbage Patch. It has a lot of trash. It

	is as big as forty-four Taiwans!

	太平洋是世界上最大的海域，垃圾也特別多。垃圾形成的大片漂流物，有四十四個台灣那麼大！

	This trash has plastic bags, plastic bottles, plastic toys, and more in it.

	It catches fish and birds.

	這些垃圾包括各種塑膠製品，也會困住經過的鳥類跟魚類。

	Sunlight and ocean waves break the plastic. The plastic doesn't go away. But

	the plastic pieces get smaller and smaller. Fish and birds eat them. They

	think they are eating food.

	塑膠被海浪分解後不會消失。塑膠會變成很小的微粒，然後被鳥跟魚當成食物吃下肚。

	Some people are cleaning ocean trash. They use boats. The boats use big nets.

	The nets catch the trash. Then the boats bring the trash back to land.

	有些人會用船和魚網清理海上的垃圾。這些被撈起來的垃圾會被帶回岸上。

	These people want to catch more trash. So, they are using AI now. It looks at

	lots of information about the ocean. It finds trash. It tells the boats where

	the trash is. Now the boats can clean up more trash. They can make the ocean

	safer for animals.

	現在，他們開始用AI偵測垃圾在海中的位置。有了這個資訊，船隻可以更快的清理垃圾，確保海洋生物的安全！

	Maybe one day, the ocean will be clean again!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	海洋垃圾越來越多，對動物和人類都有影響。

	1. garbage 垃圾。

	Look at all that garbage on the beach! 你看看海灘上的垃圾!

	It's awful! 真恐怖 !

	At least it's on land, not in the ocean. 至少它在陸地上，不在海裡。

	2. trash 垃圾。

	If there are big waves, it'll get in the water. 假如有大浪，它就在水裡了。

	And then it becomes ocean trash. 就變成了海洋垃圾。

	3. smaller 比較小。

	I know. 我知道啊。

	And all those bottles will get smaller and smaller. 那些瓶子越變越小.

	And eaten by fish! 然後被魚吃掉!

	We eat fish… 我們把魚吃下肚...

	4. clean up 清理。

	It'll be like we're eating a lot of microplastic. 就好像在吃一堆塑膠微粒。

	Let's clean up the trash. 先清這些垃圾吧。

	You're right. 你說對了。

	今天學到哪些單字?

	garbage垃圾 trash垃圾 smaller比較小 clean up清理

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. What is the big bad thing in the Pacific Ocean?

	a. The Giant Pacific Garbage Pile

	b. The Great Pacific Garbage Patch

	c. The Great Pacific Trash Pile

	2. What breaks the plastic in the ocean?

	a. Sunlight and waves

	b. Sunlight and fish

	c. Sunlight and salt

	3. What can AI do?

	a. Find trash

	b. Catch trash

	c. Catch fish

	Answers

	1. b

	2. a

	3. a

sections.story:
________________________________

	Cleaning Up the Ocean with AI

	The Pacific Ocean is Earth's biggest ocean. But there is something big and

	bad there. It is the Great Pacific Garbage Patch. It has a lot of trash. It

	is as big as forty-four Taiwans!

	太平洋是世界上最大的海域，垃圾也特別多。垃圾形成的大片漂流物，有四十四個台灣那麼大！

	This trash has plastic bags, plastic bottles, plastic toys, and more in it.

	It catches fish and birds.

	這些垃圾包括各種塑膠製品，也會困住經過的鳥類跟魚類。

	Sunlight and ocean waves break the plastic. The plastic doesn't go away. But

	the plastic pieces get smaller and smaller. Fish and birds eat them. They

	think they are eating food.

	塑膠被海浪分解後不會消失。塑膠會變成很小的微粒，然後被鳥跟魚當成食物吃下肚。

	Some people are cleaning ocean trash. They use boats. The boats use big nets.

	The nets catch the trash. Then the boats bring the trash back to land.

	有些人會用船和魚網清理海上的垃圾。這些被撈起來的垃圾會被帶回岸上。

	These people want to catch more trash. So, they are using AI now. It looks at

	lots of information about the ocean. It finds trash. It tells the boats where

	the trash is. Now the boats can clean up more trash. They can make the ocean

	safer for animals.

	現在，他們開始用AI偵測垃圾在海中的位置。有了這個資訊，船隻可以更快的清理垃圾，確保海洋生物的安全！

	Maybe one day, the ocean will be clean again!

episodes.title: Learning How to Use a Phone
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Learning How to Use a Phone

	What did you do when you got your first smartphone? Did you read about how to

	use it? Did you ask someone for help?

	第一次有智慧型手機時，你做了什麼？有人教你嗎?

	Or, maybe you didn't need any help! Maybe you saw your mom or dad use their

	phones and learned.

	還是你看爸媽怎麼用就學會了呢?

	But many older people don't know how to use smartphones. They don't know

	about apps. Their children and grandchildren can't text or video call them.

	This makes them sad.

	但是，很多長輩不知道怎麼使用手機。不會用手機講話或跟家人視訊，讓他們很難過。

	But India has a program. It teaches people how to use smartphones.

	印度現在有一堂課在教大家怎麼用手機！

	The oldest student is 105 years old. He started one year ago. Before, he

	read the news in newspapers. And he could not video call his family.

	有一位學生已經105歲了！他一年前才開始上這堂課，他以前沒辦法在手機上看新聞或是跟家人視訊。

	Now he watches the news online. And he knows how to video call his family!

	This makes him happy!

	上了這堂課之後，他不但能跟家人視訊，也會上線看新聞！

	Using a smartphone helps this man. Can you teach someone how to use one?

	Share what you know and help them!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	智慧型手機功能眾多，其實大家都需要學習。

	1. newspaper 報紙。

	My newspapers didn't arrive this morning. 我的報紙今天早上沒來。

	You're still reading print newspapers?! 你還在看紙本的報紙喔?

	Yeah, it's easier for me.是，對我來說比較簡單。

	2. online 線上。

	But you can read news online. 但是你可以上網看新聞。

	Just get an app. 下載一個應用程式。

	3. need 需要。

	I tried but I needed help from my children. 我有試，但是需要孩子幫忙。

	Did they help? 他們有幫上忙嗎?

	No, they said I could ask my grandchildren. 沒有，他們說我可以去問孫子孫女。

	4. learn 學習。

	You know you can learn from AI, right? 你知道可以跟AI學吧?

	Will it teach me step by step? 會一步一步教我嗎?

	Yeah, it will. 會。

	今天的單字很簡單。

	newspaper報紙 online線上 need需要 learn學習

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. How old is the oldest student in India's program?

	a. 75

	b. 100

	c. 105

	2. When did the man start the program?

	a. One week ago

	b. One month ago

	c. One year ago

	3. Where does the man get the news from now?

	a. Newspapers

	b. Online

	c. Radio

	Answers

	1. c

	2. c

	3. b

episodes.title: Alex Climbs Taipei 101
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Alex Climbs Taipei 101

	Alex is very good at climbing. He climbs rocks and walls. He climbs with no

	ropes. This way is called free solo.

	Alex 很會攀岩。他可以不用繩索攀爬岩石跟牆面。這種攀爬方式叫做「徒手獨攀」。

	Alex is from America. He is forty years old. He has climbed for many years.

	He likes hard climbs.

	這位40歲的美國人有多年的攀岩經驗，而他特別喜歡挑戰困難的路線！

	Alex came to Taiwan to climb Taipei 101! It is the tallest building in

	Taiwan. Before, it was the tallest in the world.

	Alex 來到台灣，要挑戰台北 101摩天大樓。台北 101

	是台灣最高的建築，以前也曾經是世界最高的大樓。

	Many people watched Alex. Lots of people watched from the streets near Taipei

	101. Some watched from the eighty ninth floor of the building! And people

	around the world watched him on TV.

	一月25號當天，很多人在附近街道上觀看Alex的壯舉，也有人在台北 101

	的八十九樓看他。世界各地的人也經由電視轉播看到這一幕。

	Alex moved slowly. Some parts were hard. But he stayed calm.

	Alex慢慢地向上爬，即便中途碰到許多困難也保持冷靜！

	The climb took about ninety minutes. Then, Alex stood at the top! He said it

	was a beautiful way to see Taipei. And he said the climb was fun!

	90分鐘之後，Alex成功登頂！他說攀爬的過程很有趣，從頂端看見的台北也非常美麗。

	Taiwan's president said "congratulations!" He said the climb made everyone's

	heart go faster!

	總統也恭喜他挑戰成功，並且說這場精彩活動讓大家緊張又興奮。

	Many people in Taiwan are proud. People around the world saw Alex's climb.

	And they saw the fun and beauty of Taiwan!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	Alex 是第一個不用任何裝備，成功攀登台北101的人。

	1. hard 困難的。(室內聲音)

	Are you sure we're climbing this rock today? 你確定我們今天要爬這塊石頭?

	Yeah, why? 對啊，為什麼問?

	You said you wanted to try a hard one. 你說過要試試看一個難爬的。

	2. tallest 最高的。

	I know. But this is the tallest one in the gym!

	我知道，但這是運動館裡面最高的石頭!

	So you want to quit? 所以你要放棄?

	No! 不是!

	3. calm 平靜的，或是鎮定的。

	Okay, then stay calm and remember to breathe. 好，那你保持鎮定，記住要呼吸。

	4. at the top 在頂端。

	Hurray, I'm at the top!! 我登頂了!

	Congratulations! Now I just want to go down. 恭喜你，現在我只想下去。

	來讀今天的字彙:

	hard困難的 tallest最高的 calm平靜的，或是鎮定的 at the top在頂端

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. What does "free solo" mean?

	a. Climb alone

	b. Climb with no ropes

	c. Climb one building

	2. How long did the climb take?

	a. 40 minutes

	b. 90 minutes

	c. 101 minutes

	3. What did Alex say about the climb?

	a. It was fun.

	b. It is called free solo.

	c. It was the tallest in the world.

	Answers

	1. b

	2. b

	3. a

	3. What did Alex say about the climb?

	a. It was fun.

	b. It is called free solo.

	c. It was the tallest in the world.

episodes.title: New Dinosaur Found in Shop
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	New Dinosaur Found in Shop

	Long ago, there were many kinds of dinosaurs. T. rex is the most famous. But

	experts say there are thousands we do not know about! They always look for

	new kinds.

	很久以前，地球上有很多種恐龍。除了最有名的暴龍之外，還有上千種恐龍沒有被發現！因此，專家一直在找新種的恐龍。

	One expert found a dinosaur bone in a shop in England. It was not like the

	bones of all other animals. It had spikes! Spikes are hard and long. They

	have a sharp end.

	有一位專家在英國的一間店裡發現了一塊恐龍骨頭。這塊骨頭很特別，上面有又硬又長的刺。

	At first, she thought someone had made a fake bone. But the bone was real!

	起初她以為這是假的骨頭，但她後來發現竟然是真的！

	Experts found more bones in Morocco. They found the dinosaur had spikes on

	its neck, spikes on its head, spikes on its back, and spikes on its tail!

	之後，科學家在摩洛哥又找到更多這種恐龍的骨頭，而且牠的脖子、頭、背和尾巴上，全都有刺！

	This new dinosaur is called Spicomellus afer! "Spicomellus" means collar of

	spikes. This is what the neck spikes are. And "afer" means Africa.

	這種恐龍叫「Spicomellus

	afer」。「Spicomellus」的意思是「有刺的項圈」，也就是牠脖子上的刺，「afer」則是「非洲」的意思。

	The dinosaur was about four meters long. Its longest spikes were one meter

	long!

	這種恐龍大約有四公尺長，最長的刺竟然有一公尺那麼長！

	Experts think the spikes kept these dinosaurs safe from bigger dinosaurs.

	That's not all. They think the dinosaurs showed their handsome spikes to get

	a partner!

	專家認為，這些刺不但可以保護他們不被更大的恐龍攻擊，還可以用來吸引伴侶！

	Maybe you will find a dinosaur in a shop too!

	________________________________________

	Vocabulary

	這個新發現的恐龍品種，讓科學家大開眼界。

	1. neck 脖子。

	Look at that giraffe! 你看那隻長頸鹿!

	That neck is so long, 那麼長的脖子，

	and the head is so tiny. 那麼小的頭。

	I know, right? 對啊。

	I keep wondering how many bones are in that neck.

	我一直在想牠的脖子有幾根骨頭。

	2. tail 尾巴。

	And look at the spots. 而且你看牠的斑點。

	They are everywhere, even on the tail! 全身都有，連尾巴上也有。

	3. animal 動物。

	When I was little, I didn't believe an animal could look like that.

	我小時候根本不相信動物會長這樣。

	4. Africa 非洲。

	You're looking at it now. 你現在正看著牠。

	Yeah, and it's so far away from its home in Africa. 對啊，牠離非洲的家好遠喔。

	I hope it's happy here. 我希望牠在這裡過得快活。

	來跟我讀今天的單字。

	neck脖子 tail尾巴 animal動物 Africa非洲

	________________________________________

	Quiz

	1. What is the most famous dinosaur?

	a. Littlefoot

	b. Spicomellus afer

	c. T. rex

	2. Where did an expert find a bone from the dinosaur?

	a. In a shop

	b. In her office

	c. At a museum

	3. Where did experts find more bones?

	a. South Africa

	b. Morocco

	c. Egypt

	Answers

	1. c

	2. a

	3. b

	bones of all other animals. It had spikes! Spikes are hard and long. They

	have a sharp end.

	有一位專家在英國的一間店裡發現了一塊恐龍骨頭。這塊骨頭很特別，上面有又硬又長的刺。

	At first, she thought someone had made a fake bone. But the bone was real!

	起初她以為這是假的骨頭，但她後來發現竟然是真的！

	Experts found more bones in Morocco. They found the dinosaur had spikes on

	its neck, spikes on its head, spikes on its back, and spikes on its tail!

	之後，科學家在摩洛哥又找到更多這種恐龍的骨頭，而且牠的脖子、頭、背和尾巴上，全都有刺！

	This new dinosaur is called Spicomellus afer! "Spicomellus" means collar of

	spikes. This is what the neck spikes are. And "afer" means Africa.

	這種恐龍叫「Spicomellus

	afer」。「Spicomellus」的意思是「有刺的項圈」，也就是牠脖子上的刺，「afer」則是「非洲」的意思。

	The dinosaur was about four meters long. Its longest spikes were one meter

	long!

	這種恐龍大約有四公尺長，最長的刺竟然有一公尺那麼長！

	Experts think the spikes kept these dinosaurs safe from bigger dinosaurs.

	That's not all. They think the dinosaurs showed their handsome spikes to get

	a partner!

	專家認為，這些刺不但可以保護他們不被更大的恐龍攻擊，還可以用來吸引伴侶！

	Maybe you will find a dinosaur in a shop too!

	________________________________________
sections.vocabulary:
Vocabulary

	這個新發現的恐龍品種，讓科學家大開眼界。

	1. neck 脖子。

	Look at that giraffe! 你看那隻長頸鹿!

	That neck is so long, 那麼長的脖子，

	and the head is so tiny. 那麼小的頭。

	I know, right? 對啊。

	I keep wondering how many bones are in that neck.

	我一直在想牠的脖子有幾根骨頭。

	2. tail 尾巴。

	And look at the spots. 而且你看牠的斑點。

	They are everywhere, even on the tail! 全身都有，連尾巴上也有。

	3. animal 動物。

	When I was little, I didn't believe an animal could look like that.

	我小時候根本不相信動物會長這樣。

	4. Africa 非洲。

	You're looking at it now. 你現在正看著牠。

	Yeah, and it's so far away from its home in Africa. 對啊，牠離非洲的家好遠喔。

	I hope it's happy here. 我希望牠在這裡過得快活。

	來跟我讀今天的單字。

	neck脖子 tail尾巴 animal動物 Africa非洲

	________________________________________
sections.quiz:
Quiz

	1. What is the most famous dinosaur?

	a. Littlefoot

	b. Spicomellus afer

	c. T. rex

	2. Where did an expert find a bone from the dinosaur?

	a. In a shop

	b. In her office

	c. At a museum

	3. Where did experts find more bones?

	a. South Africa

	b. Morocco

	c. Egypt

episodes.title: Singapore Has Too Much Trash Ash
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Singapore Has Too Much Trash Ash

	Every country has too much trash. Singapore does too. Singapore is very

	small. Fifty-two Singapores can go into Taiwan! And it has more than six

	million people. There is almost no space for trash!

	垃圾問題讓很多國家頭痛，新加坡也不例外。新加坡是個小國家，卻有六百萬人口，實在沒有地方放垃圾。

	Many countries burn trash to make electricity. Singapore does this with four

	plants. It is number five in the world! Four countries make more electricity

	with trash. But they do this with many more plants.

	有一些國家用焚燒垃圾來發電，新加坡就有四座這樣的焚化爐，並且很有效率，雖然數量比別的國家少，發電量卻很高。

	Burning makes trash smaller. In Singapore, nineteen million kilograms of

	trash becomes two million kilograms of ash each day.

	焚化垃圾可以讓它的體積大為縮減，新加坡每天一千九百萬公斤的垃圾焚化之後，只剩下兩百萬公斤的灰。

	Countries put trash and ash into landfills. Singapore has one landfill. It is

	for ash. But it will be full in nine years. Now Singapore wants to find ways

	to use ash.

	也有的國家用掩埋法來處理垃圾跟灰燼，新加坡也這樣做，不過它只有一個掩埋場，再過九年就要滿了。它必須想別的辦法來處理垃圾焚化之後產生的灰。

	But Singapore has more and more trash every year. Experts say its people and

	companies need to make less trash. That can help a lot.

	專家說勸導人們減少垃圾的數量也是一個可行的辦法。

	Taiwan makes electricity from trash too. But we also make too much trash. Our

	landfills are also getting full. Let's all make less trash!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	新加坡正在努力想辦法，解決越來越嚴重的垃圾問題。

	1. less 較少的。

	The newspaper says we have much less trash these days.

	報紙說我們現在的垃圾比以前少很多。

	Really? Compared to 100 years ago? 真的嗎，跟一百年前比嗎?

	People are trying to cut waste. 大家在減少廢物。

	2. country 國家。

	But look at all those fast-fashion stores. 但是妳看那些快時尚商店。

	They are in many countries, 好多國家都有，and people just buy things and

	throw them away. 大家就一直買，然後扔掉。

	3. kilogram 公斤。

	Didn't you just buy 9 shirts yesterday? 你不是昨天才買九件襯衫?

	Hey, I gained 7 kilograms! 我胖了七公斤! What can I do? 能怎麼辦?

	4. need 需要。

	All you need to do is cut down on French fries and ice cream.

	你只需要少吃薯條跟冰淇淋就可以了。

	這些單字很有用喔。less較少的 country國家 kilogram公斤 need需要

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. How many plants burn trash to make electricity in Singapore?

	a. Four plants

	b. Five plants

	c. Fifty-two plants

	2. What does Singapore put in its landfill?

	a. Trash

	b. Ash

	c. Space

	3. What do experts say people and companies need to do?

	a. Make more trash

	b. Make less trash

	c. Burn trash

	Answers

	1. a

	2. b

	3. b

episodes.title: Teddy Bear Falls from Sky
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Teddy Bear Falls from Sky

	Narrator: Have you seen this teddy bear? It is light brown. It is wearing a

	school uniform. Its shirt and tie are blue and white. Its shorts are dark

	blue. It fell from very high in the sky. What?

	你有看到一隻穿著學校制服的泰迪熊嗎?

	上衣跟領帶是藍色跟白色，短褲是深藍色。這隻熊是從天上掉下來的。

	Kids at a school in England sent a weather balloon into the sky. The school's

	teddy bear went for a ride on it.

	英國一所小學的學生把氣象氣球送上天空，他們學校的泰迪熊也搭順風車一起去。

	The kids watched the teddy bear go up. The balloon had a camera on it, so the

	kids watched the teddy bear go through the clouds. It went up and up!

	氣球上面有裝攝影機，所以小朋友可以看到泰迪熊一路穿過白雲往上升。

	Three hours later, the teddy bear was 27 kilometers above the Earth! It is

	cold up there! The kids saw ice on the teddy bear's nose! They saw the bear

	shake and shake. And then … it fell! No!

	三個鐘頭之後，泰迪熊已經到了距離地球27公里的高空，好冷喔!

	熊熊的鼻子都結冰了，他全身不斷地抖動! 突然它從氣球上掉了下來，天哪!

	Now the kids are looking for their bear. Other people are too!

	現在那些小學生到處找他們的泰迪熊。大家都來幫忙找。

	Reporter: A teddy bear dropped out of the sky today in the UK …

	Narrator: The teddy bear is famous now. It has been on the news in the UK,

	Germany, Japan, Australia, the U.S.A., Canada, and now, Taiwan.

	英國，德國，日本，澳洲，加拿大，美國以及台灣的新聞都報導了這隻熊。

	If you find this teddy bear, help it go back to the school!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	一隻從天上掉下來的泰迪熊，引起全球小朋友的關注。

	1. balloon 氣球。

	Look at those beautiful hot-air balloons! 你看那些好漂亮的熱氣球!

	I know! I'd love to ride in one, floating high in the sky.

	我知道，真想搭一趟氣球，飄在高高的空中。

	2. cold 寒冷的。

	Yeah, it must be amazing! 真的，一定很精彩! And it would be very cold if we

	go early in the morning. 也會很冷喔，要是我們一大早去的話。

	3. sky 天空。

	True, but the weather report says the sky is clear tomorrow.

	沒錯，不過氣象預報說明天是晴天。

	So, should we sign up or not? 所以我們應該登記嗎?

	We should. 應該。

	4. camera 照相機。

	And I'll bring my camera. 而且我會帶相機。

	To get close-up photos of birds? 好來拍鳥兒的近距離照片?

	Exactly! 正是!

	你有搭過熱氣球嗎? balloon氣球 cold寒冷的 sky天空 camera照相機

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. What color is the teddy bear's shirt?

	a. Blue and white

	b. Dark purple

	c. Light brown

	2. What did the teddy bear go for a ride on?

	a. A motorcycle

	b. A weather balloon

	c. A space rocket

	3. How long did it take to go 27 kilometers above the Earth?

	a. Three minutes

	b. Three hours

	c. Three days

	Answers

	1. a

	2. b

	3. b

	c. A space rocket

	3. How long did it take to go 27 kilometers above the Earth?

	a. Three minutes

	b. Three hours

	c. Three days

episodes.title: An Island Teaches Scientists About Life
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	An Island Teaches Scientists About Life

	More than sixty years ago, some fishers were on a boat. They were near

	Iceland. They saw black ash! It went up nine kilometers! It came from a

	volcano in the ocean! It was scary!

	六十多年前，一群漁夫在漁船靠近冰島時，目睹黑色火山灰從海裡衝上雲霄，高度達到九公里!

	那是海底火山爆發!

	The next day, a small island came out of the ocean. Rocks and lava came out

	of the volcano! Every day, the island was taller and longer. Three and a half

	years later, the volcano stopped.

	第二天岩漿就形成了一個小島，而因為岩漿跟岩石繼續噴發，小島持續長高變長。三年半之後，火山活動終於停止。

	Scientists wanted to learn how plant and animal life start on a new land. But

	people bring changes to new lands. So Iceland keeps this island safe from

	people. Some scientists can go there. But no one else can.

	為了讓科學家好好研究動物跟植物如何在嶄新的島上開始生活，冰島政府只准科學家去，一般人禁止登島。

	Scientists have learned a lot. Seeds come to the island on ocean waves.

	Insects come on the wind or the ocean. Birds fly to the island. They bring

	more seeds. Seals swim to the island.

	科學家發現海浪會帶來植物種子，風帶來昆蟲，鳥也會飛來，傳播更多種子。海豹也會游上岸。

	Bird waste and seal waste help plants grow. The island has slowly become

	green.

	鳥類跟海豹的排泄物成為肥料，讓植物蓬勃生長，小島慢慢變成了綠色。

	Scientists learned plants and animals find new lands in many ways. They

	learned what helps new lands become green too!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	海底火山爆發有時候會形成陸地，是很好的科學研究對象。

	1. volcano 火山。

	If I go to Hawaii, I definitely want to see a volcano.

	假如我去夏威夷，一定要去看火山。

	We have volcanoes. 我們也有火山啊。You don't need to travel that far!

	你不需要跑那麼遠!

	2. lava 岩漿。

	I know. But lava is not coming out of Datun Mountain.

	我知道，可是大屯山沒有岩漿流出來。

	3. island 島嶼。

	Do you know which island is the world's biggest volcanic island?

	你可知道哪個島是世界最大的火山島?

	Let me guess. Taiwan? 我猜是台灣。

	No no. 不對。

	Greenland? 格陵蘭?

	No. 不對。

	4. become 變成。

	It's Iceland. 是冰島。Scientists say it became an island about 16 million

	years ago. 科學家說冰島大約是一千六百萬年前形成的。

	火山噴發非常壯觀，來一起讀單字。volcano火山 lava岩漿 island島嶼

	become變成

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. What came out of the ocean first?

	a. An island

	b. Lava

	c. Ash

	2. What did scientists want to find out about new lands?

	a. How plant and animal life start

	b. Why birds bring seeds

	c. How volcanoes make new islands

	3. What helped the island become green?

	a. Scientists

	b. Animal waste

	c. Iceland

	Answers

	1. c

	2. a

	3. b

	If I go to Hawaii, I definitely want to see a volcano.

	假如我去夏威夷，一定要去看火山。

	We have volcanoes. 我們也有火山啊。You don't need to travel that far!

	你不需要跑那麼遠!

	2. lava 岩漿。

	I know. But lava is not coming out of Datun Mountain.

	我知道，可是大屯山沒有岩漿流出來。

	3. island 島嶼。

	Do you know which island is the world's biggest volcanic island?

	你可知道哪個島是世界最大的火山島?

	Let me guess. Taiwan? 我猜是台灣。

	No no. 不對。

	Greenland? 格陵蘭?

	No. 不對。

	4. become 變成。

	It's Iceland. 是冰島。Scientists say it became an island about 16 million

	years ago. 科學家說冰島大約是一千六百萬年前形成的。

	火山噴發非常壯觀，來一起讀單字。volcano火山 lava岩漿 island島嶼

	become變成

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
sections.quiz:
Quiz

	1. What came out of the ocean first?

	a. An island

	b. Lava

	c. Ash

	2. What did scientists want to find out about new lands?

	a. How plant and animal life start

	b. Why birds bring seeds

	c. How volcanoes make new islands

	3. What helped the island become green?

	a. Scientists

	b. Animal waste

	c. Iceland

episodes.title: Art Shows All Skin is Beautiful
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Art Shows All Skin is Beautiful

	Long ago, there were no cameras. But there were portraits. Portraits are art.

	They show people.

	很久以前沒有照相機，但是有人像畫。人像畫是重要的藝術。

	One artist draws portraits. He draws with a pencil. But his portraits look

	like photos!

	有一位藝術家使用鉛筆作畫。但是他的作品簡直就像照片。

	For one show, the artist drew portraits of eight people. All of them have

	skin conditions. Some have scars. Some have no hair. Some have skin with no

	color. This artist saw beauty.

	這位藝術家有一次為了畫展，替八個人作畫。他們都有皮膚問題，疤痕啦，沒有頭髮啦，有白化症啦，不一而足。但是藝術家眼中只看到美。

	The artist drew fourteen hours every day! Each portrait took about two months

	to draw. He drew a singer, a supermodel, a TV host and others!

	他每天工作14個小時，完成一幅人像畫需要兩個月。那八個人裡面有歌手，超級名模，電視節目主持人等等。

	Many people are not comfortable with their skin conditions. The artist wants

	them to see the portraits. The portraits show other people have skin

	conditions too. And the portraits show these people are comfortable with

	their skin.

	他們對自己的皮膚覺得不是很自在。這位畫家期望那些擔心自己外貌不夠完美的人，看到他的畫作會改變想法。

	The artist wants everyone to know about skin conditions. He wants us to see

	the beauty of all skin. And he wants us to be comfortable with our own skin.

	他希望大家了解各種顏面都有美麗的地方，並且學會接納自己。

	Let's see the beauty of the skin each person is in!

	________________________________________

	Vocabulary

	這位藝術家希望他的作品能彰顯人人都有美麗之處。

	1. artist 藝術家。

	Hey, can I ask you to be my model? 我可以請你當我的模特兒嗎?

	Your model? For what? 你的模特兒?要做什麼?

	Well, I'm trying to become an artist, remember? 我想當藝術家，你記得吧?

	Yeah, I know. 對，我知道。

	2. draw 畫畫。

	And I'm learning how to draw human faces. 我正在學怎麼畫人臉。

	And you like my face? 而你喜歡我的臉?

	Of course. 當然。

	3. take 花時間。

	I like anyone who's willing to sit still for me.

	任何人願意為我好好坐著，我都喜歡。

	So how long will it take? 要花多久時間?

	4. look like 看起來像。

	About four hours a day for a week. 大約一個星期，每天四小時。

	Just don't make me look like my mom. 只要別把我畫得像我媽媽就好。

	你喜歡畫圖嗎?

	artist藝術家 draw畫畫 take花時間 look like看起來像

	________________________________________

	Quiz

	1. What do portraits show?

	a. People

	b. Places

	c. Things

	2. How many hours a day did the artist draw?

	a. 2 hours

	b. 8 hours

	c. 14 hours

	3. Who did the artist draw?

	a. A portrait

	b. Another artist

	c. A supermodel

	Answers

	1. a

	2. c

	3. c
