episodes.title: Women Dive to Fight Ghost Gear
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Women Dive to Fight Ghost Gear

	Plastic bags and bottles are a big problem in the ocean. But the ocean has a

	bigger plastic problem. It is "ghost gear."

	很多人都知道，海洋中有大批塑膠垃圾。不過更多的其實是幽靈捕魚工具。

	Ghost gear is plastic fishing gear that nobody uses. The gear is fishing

	nets, lines, and traps. It is broken, thrown away, or lost.

	幽靈捕魚工具包括漁網，漁線跟抓魚的陷阱。這些東西有的被丟進海裡，有一些被海浪折斷就漂流出去。

	Ghost gear keeps catching fish and other ocean animals. And every year, the

	ocean gets half a million to one million tons of new ghost gear.

	它會纏住許多海洋生物，更糟糕的是，每年都有多達百萬噸的捕魚器具流進海中。

	Some women in Mexico are very worried about ghost gear. They are fishers.

	They know the ocean well. Early in the morning, they dive into the ocean.

	They take away ghost gear. They do not get money to do this.

	墨西哥有一批女性漁夫很擔心這些垃圾，於是她們一大早就潛入水中清理那些器具，而且是免費做。

	Sometimes the ghost gear they find is very big. One fishing net the women

	took was 90 meters long. Seventeen divers cut the net carefully. It took two

	days! Then they pulled the two-ton net from the ocean.

	有時候那些垃圾太大，比如說有一回，漁網長達九十公尺，十七個人花了兩天時間，小心地把漁網剪斷，再把重達兩噸的漁網從水裡拖出來。

	Ghost gear in the ocean is a big problem. These women in Mexico are fighting

	it!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	流落海裡的幽靈捕魚工具，會造成海洋汙染。

	1. dive 潛水。

	I once went diving near Green Island and saw a mess in the ocean.

	我有一次去綠島潛水，看到海裡一堆垃圾。

	Uh-oh, what kind of mess? 什麼樣的垃圾?

	2) broken 壞掉的。Bags, shoes, even broken bicycles!

	袋子，鞋子，甚至壞掉的腳踏車! They were just sitting there on the seabed.

	就那樣坐在海底。

	That's terrible! 真糟糕!

	3) every year 每一年。

	So many tourists go to Green Island every year. 每年有那麼多遊客去綠島。Maybe

	they can help clean it up. 也許他們可以幫忙清理。

	4) throw 扔。

	People will just throw in more trash. 人們只會丟更多圾垃。

	You don't see the bright side much, do you? 你不大看事情的光明面，對吧?

	今天的單字你記住了嗎? dive潛水 broken壞掉的 every year每年 throw扔

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. Who uses "ghost gear"?

	a. Fishers

	b. Women in Mexico

	c. Nobody

	2. What does ghost gear do?

	a. Keeps catching ocean animals

	b. Cuts nets carefully

	c. Throws away fish

	3. How long was one net the women took?

	a. Seventeen meters

	b. Ninety meters

	c. Half a million meters

	Answers

	1. c

	2. a

	3. b

episodes.title: Farm Plays Jazz to Cows
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Farm Plays Jazz to Cows

	Narrator: There is a dairy farm in the UK. It has many cows. The farmers want

	a lot of milk. Most goes into bottles. Some is used to make butter, yogurt,

	and ice cream!

	英國一所畜牧場養了許多乳牛。生產出來的鮮奶會裝進容器裡面出售，或是做成奶油，優格，跟冰淇淋!

	One day, the farmers read that cows like jazz. They read that jazz makes cows

	make more milk!

	牧場主人有一天看到報導，乳牛聽爵士樂會生產更多牛奶!

	The farmers made a video. They brought a big speaker to a field. They played

	jazz. Their cows came to listen.

	他於是做了一段影片，把擴音機搬進牧場，開始放爵士樂影片。乳牛都靠過來聽!

	Then the farmers moved the speaker. The cows followed it! The farmers moved

	it again. The cows followed it again! The farmers put the video online. It is

	very cute! It has over three hundred thousand views!

	牧場主人把擴音機搬個地方，牛群都跟了過來。他再換個地方，牛群又跟著來!

	農夫把這段可愛的影片放上網，有三十多萬人點閱!

	Farmer: Oh! I got an idea!

	Narrator: Then the farmers brought a jazz band to the farm. The cows liked

	the jazz band! A cow licked a trumpet with her big wet tongue!

	農夫決定邀請一整個爵士樂團來牧場表演，大受牛群歡迎!

	有一頭母牛還伸出舌頭舔小喇叭！

	Does jazz make cows make more milk? No one knows. But now, farmers around the

	world are playing jazz for their cows! And people around the world are

	watching their videos!

	沒有人知道爵士樂是不是真的讓乳牛增加產量，但現在，農夫繼續給牛聽爵士樂，而人們繼續看他們的影片!

	Thanks for the milk and thanks for the "mooo-sic"!

	________________________________________

	Vocabulary

	據說乳牛愛聽爵士樂，牧場主人實驗的結果，好像真有其事。

	1. milk 牛奶。

	Have you heard that happy cows give more milk?

	你有聽過快樂乳牛會生產更多牛奶嗎?

	No, but it makes sense. 沒有，不過有道理。

	2) butter 奶油。

	However, I can't say I like milk. 但是我不喜歡牛奶。

	How about butter, cheese or yoghurt? 那麼奶油，起司或優格呢?

	I love butter on my crispy toast! 我很喜歡在脆脆的吐司上塗奶油。

	3) lick 舔。

	I try not to eat too much ice cream. 我努力不要吃太多冰淇淋。

	That's fine. You can just lick it and give me the rest.

	沒關係，你可以舔一舔，剩下都的給我。

	Ew….!

	4) farm 農場。

	We should visit a dairy farm someday. 我們應該哪天去牧場逛逛。

	Okay, I like cows. 好啊，我喜歡牛。

	牛奶很營養喔，來一起讀單字。milk牛奶 butter奶油 lick舔 farm農場

	________________________________________

	Quiz

	1. What do the farmers want a lot of?

	a. Beef

	b. Milk

	c. Cheese

	2. What do cows like to listen to?

	a. Dairy farms

	b. Videos

	c. Jazz

	3. What did one of the cows lick?

	a. A trumpet

	b. A farmer

	c. Ice cream

	Answers

	1. b

	2. c

	3. a

episodes.title: ICRT NEWS FOR KIDS
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	ICRT NEWS FOR KIDS

	Doing Something New Is Easier with Help

	Do you want to do something new? Sometimes it is hard to do new things. It is

	easier to do new things with help at first.

	你想嘗試新的活動嗎？有時候想做點新鮮事並不容易，假如有人在幫忙就會輕鬆很多。

	Some older adults wanted to do something new. But they needed help. So high

	school students in Yunlin helped them!

	在雲林，有一些長者也想嘗試新東西，但他們需要協助，於是一群高中生來幫忙！

	The students know how to make videos with AI. They helped the adults make

	many AI videos. Everyone had lots of fun!

	這些學生一步一步教大人怎麼用 AI 做影片！

	One man had always wanted to dance on stage. But he cannot dance. In his

	video, he danced in a big dance contest. Watching the video made him happy.

	一名不會跳舞的男子一直夢想在舞台上大展身手！他做的AI

	影片，讓他終於能夠參加舞蹈比賽，讓他非常高興！

	Other adults made rap music videos! Using AI, they rapped in English in their

	videos. Others danced with K-pop dancers in their videos!

	還有一些人做了饒舌音樂影片，用英文唱饒舌歌，也有人選擇跟K-pop 舞者一起跳舞。

	Some adults had wild animals in their videos. One walked with tigers! Do not

	try this in real life!

	還有人甚至在影片裡跟老虎一起散步！當然，在現實生活千萬不要這麼做!

	Thanks to the students, more people can use AI now. Do you know how to do

	something others want to do? Would you like to help someone too?

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	AI的用途廣泛，讓很多年紀較大的長者躍躍欲試，但是他們需要幫忙。

	1) how 如何。

	Can you show me how to make videos using AI? 你可以教我怎麼用AI作影片嗎?

	I thought you'd never ask. 我以為你永遠不會問呢。

	2) easier 更容易的。

	It's actually quite easy. 其實滿簡單的。

	With your help, I bet it'll be even easier. 有你幫忙，我打賭一定更簡單。Oh,

	trying to butter me up? 嘴巴這麼甜喔?

	3) student 學生。

	So what would you like to make? 所以你想做什麼呢?

	I want the video to show me singing with Taylor Swift.

	影片裡要有我跟泰勒絲合唱。

	Wow, for your students? 哇，給你的學生看嗎?

	Yeah.對。

	4) fun 樂趣。

	That would be lots of fun. 那會滿好玩的。

	I think so too! 我也覺得!

	今天你學到哪些單字? how如何 easier更容易的 student學生 fun樂趣

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. Where do the students go to high school?

	a. Yunlin

	b. Miaoli

	c. Yilan

	2. Who helped people make AI videos?

	a. Teachers

	b. Students

	c. Older adults

	3. Which wild animals were in a video?

	a. Turtles

	b. Owls

	c. Tigers

	Answers

	1. a

	2. b

	3. c

	Do you want to do something new? Sometimes it is hard to do new things. It is

	easier to do new things with help at first.

	你想嘗試新的活動嗎？有時候想做點新鮮事並不容易，假如有人在幫忙就會輕鬆很多。

	Some older adults wanted to do something new. But they needed help. So high

	school students in Yunlin helped them!

	在雲林，有一些長者也想嘗試新東西，但他們需要協助，於是一群高中生來幫忙！

episodes.title: Mosquitoes Found in Iceland
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Mosquitoes Found in Iceland

	Narrator: Mosquitoes like to live in warm and wet places. But most places in

	the world have mosquitoes. Some kinds of mosquitoes can live in cold places.

	蚊子喜歡住在溫暖潮濕的地方，但全球大部分的地區都有蚊子，有些種類的蚊子甚至可以住在寒帶地區！

	Only two places in the world had no mosquitoes. One is Antarctica. It is very

	cold there. The other was Iceland. It is very cold too. But someone found

	mosquitoes there!

	以前，世界上只有南極和冰島沒有蚊子。那兩個地方非常寒冷，蚊子無法存活。但現在，冰島出現了蚊子。

	A man in Iceland was in his garden. He likes bugs to come to his garden. He

	saw a fly. It was the first time he saw this kind of fly. He caught it. Then

	he found two more! Hmmmmm … Were they mosquitoes?!

	有一名冰島男子喜歡看到昆蟲飛到他的院子。有一天，他以為看到蒼蠅，這是第一次看到這種蒼蠅；他把牠抓住。接著他又看到兩隻!

	他懷疑是蚊子嗎！?

	A bug expert looked at the three bugs. The expert said …

	Bug expert: Yes, these are mosquitoes.

	Narrator: 後來，一位昆蟲專家檢查了這三隻昆蟲，並確認牠們真的是蚊子。

	These mosquitoes can live in cold places. The man thinks they came on a boat.

	這個種類的蚊子可以生活在寒帶。男子推測蚊子是搭船來到冰島。

	But Iceland is getting warmer quickly. It was very warm last year. The warmer

	weather may help mosquitoes live there. Before, Iceland had no mosquitoes.

	Now only Antarctica has no mosquitoes.

	冰島的氣候正在快速變暖。去年冰島的溫度特別高，讓蚊子可以生存。這個曾經看不到蚊子的地方，也已經淪陷，現在只剩下南極沒有蚊子了。

	Scientists are watching. Will there be mosquitoes in Iceland from now on?

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	隨著氣候暖化，冰島居然也出現蚊子。

	1. cold冷的，warm 溫暖的。

	Have you ever been to Iceland? 你有去過冰島嗎?

	No.沒有。

	My husband has. 我先生去過。

	He said the weather was cold, 他說天氣很冷，

	but the hot springs were very warm. 但是溫泉很熱。

	2. first time 第一次。

	That sounds fun. 聽起來很好玩。

	Was it his first time there? 那是他第一次去嗎?

	Actually, no. 其實不是。

	3. before 以前。

	He’d been there before, but never had the time to enjoy it.

	他以前去過，但是沒時間玩。

	4. in the world 世界上。

	This time, he came back saying Iceland is the best place in the world!

	這次他回來說，冰島是全世界最棒的地方!

	Wow!

	你想去北歐旅行嗎?

	cold冷的 warm溫暖的 first time第一次 before以前 in the world世界上

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. How many mosquitoes were found in the garden?

	a. One

	b. Two

	c. Three

	2. What may help mosquitoes live in Iceland?

	a. Warmer weather

	b. More gardens

	c. Bigger boats

	3. What place has no mosquitoes?

	a. Iceland

	b. Antarctica

	c. Greenland

	Answers

	1. c

	2. a

	3. b

episodes.title: People Borrow People at New Taipei's Human Library
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	People Borrow People at New Taipei's Human Library

	We borrow books from the library. We can borrow all kinds of books! At New

	Taipei's Human Library, we can borrow "human books" … People are the human

	books!

	我們可以從圖書館借到各式各樣的書，但在新北市的「真人圖書館」，大家借的不是書，而是人！

	Human Libraries started in Denmark. They help us meet new people, share

	stories, and understand each other. New Taipei's Human Library has 133 human

	books. Last year, 207 people borrowed one!

	真人圖書館最早出現在丹麥，目的是讓大家認識不同的人，分享經驗，促進了解。新北市的真人圖書館現在有

	133 本「人類書」，去年有207個人登門借書！

	You can borrow a dinosaur bone expert, or a chess teacher. You can borrow

	someone who loves to play games, or someone who cannot see. People borrow one

	human book a lot. She helps people understand their feelings.

	你可以在圖書館借一位研究恐龍骨頭的專家，或是西洋棋老師，你也可以借一位電動高手或看不見的人。其中有個人特別受歡迎，因為她很會幫助大家了解自己的感受！

	You can borrow a human book for thirty minutes. If you are under twelve years

	old, your mom or dad go with you. You sit down together. You listen to the

	human book's story. You can ask questions. You can share your story.

	一本人類書可以借30分鐘，12歲以下，需要家長陪同。借出來之後，你可以跟人類書一起坐下來，聽他分享他的故事，也可以提問或是說說自己的想法。

	People's stories are real and exciting! What kind of human book do you want

	to borrow?

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	在人類圖書館借書，借出來的是真人，而不是一本書。

	1. question 問題。

	Isn't it a good idea? 這可不是個好主意?

	To borrow a book who can talk and answer your questions? 借一本會講話又可以回答問題的書?

	For 30 minutes only. 只有三十分鐘。

	That seems too short. 似乎太短了。

	 

	2. story 故事。

	You can borrow "it" again! 你可以再借。

	Like borrowing a real book. 就跟借真正的書一樣。

	What if I don't like the story they share? 要是我不喜歡他們分享的故事呢?

	Just return it. 就還回去。

	 

	3. feeling 情感，感覺。

	But people have feelings! 不過真人是有感情的。

	Books don't. 書可沒有。

	4. kind 種類。

	Some kinds of real books never get borrowed. I guess it's the same with humans. 有些種書從來沒有人借，人類書也一樣吧。

	請跟我一起讀單字。

	question問題 story故事 feeling情感、感覺 kind種類

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. What can you do at New Taipei's Human Library?

	a. Read books

	b. Borrow people

	c. Watch videos

	2. Where did Human Libraries start?

	a. Denmark

	b. New Taipei

	c. Japan

	3. How many human books does New Taipei's Human Library have?

	a. 30

	b. 133

	c. 207

	Answers

	1. b

	2. a

	3. b

episodes.title: Robot Rabbits Are Saving Florida's Wild Animals
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Robot Rabbits Are Saving Florida's Wild Animals

	Pythons are one of the world's biggest snakes. Some are six meters long! They

	are strong and dangerous.

	蟒蛇力氣大又危險，是世界上最大的蛇類之一。有一些蟒蛇甚至長達六公尺！

	Many years ago, there were no pythons in the U.S. People brought pythons from

	Asia. They wanted pet pythons!

	很多年前，美國沒有蟒蛇。有人把蟒蛇從亞洲帶回美國，想要當寵物養！

	These pet pythons grew and grew! People could not take care of them. Many put

	their pythons out in the wild.

	這些蟒蛇越長越大，讓人無法照顧，就把蛇送到野外放生。

	In Florida, a U.S. state, pythons eat many wild animals. Florida is worried

	about these animals. So it does not want pythons in the wild. But pythons are

	hard to find. It can take ten hours to catch one!

	美國佛羅里達州的蟒蛇會吃掉其他的野生動物。當地希望除掉這些蟒蛇，問題是蟒蛇很難找到，有時候要花上十個鐘頭才能抓到一條。

	Now scientists are catching pythons with robots. Pythons eat rabbits, so the

	scientists made small robot rabbits. These robots look like rabbits. They

	move like rabbits. They are warm like rabbits. Pythons think they are real

	rabbits!

	蟒蛇會吃兔子，因此科學家做了小小的機器兔，外表跟行為跟體溫都很像真的兔子，所以蟒蛇以為是真正的！

	When a python comes close to a robot, cameras around the robot see it.

	Workers come quickly. They catch the python!

	蟒蛇靠近機器兔時，附近的攝影機就會拍到牠。工作人員馬上趕來，當場捕獲蟒蛇。

	These robot rabbits help catch pythons. The robot rabbits are saving

	Florida's wild animals!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	機器兔小兵立大功，協助科學家抓捕蟒蛇。

	1. animal 動物。

	My husband and I went to Kenya last month. 我先生跟我上個月去了肯亞。

	Oh? What's in Kenya? 肯亞有什麼?

	Lots of wild animals in the wild. 很多野生動物在野外。

	2. wild 野生的。

	Well, I hope they weren't in the city, being wild and all. 既然是野生動物，

	我希望牠們不在市區。

	You are right. 你說得對。

	We saw lions, leopards and elephants. 我們看到獅子，花豹跟大象。

	3. dangerous 危險的。

	You can see all of those on TV! 你在電視上都看得到!

	True, but on TV they can't smell you. 對，不過牠們在電視裡聞不到你。

	Uh oh, that sounds dangerous! 糟了，聽起來很危險。

	4. close 靠近的。

	I was pretty worried when they got very close. 牠們靠得很近時我會擔心。

	你喜歡動物嗎? 來讀今天的單字。

	animal動物 wild 野生的 dangerous 危險的 close 靠近的

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. How long are some pythons?

	a. 1 meter

	b. 6 meters

	c. 10 meters

	2. What are the pythons in Florida doing?

	a. Catching people

	b. Eating wild animals

	c. Becoming pets

	3. Why do pythons think the robots are real rabbits?

	a. The robots smell like rabbits.

	b. The robots move like rabbits.

	c. The robots taste like rabbits.

	Answers

	1. b

	2. b

	3. b

sections.story:
________________________________

	Robot Rabbits Are Saving Florida's Wild Animals

	Pythons are one of the world's biggest snakes. Some are six meters long! They

	are strong and dangerous.

	蟒蛇力氣大又危險，是世界上最大的蛇類之一。有一些蟒蛇甚至長達六公尺！

	Many years ago, there were no pythons in the U.S. People brought pythons from

	Asia. They wanted pet pythons!

	很多年前，美國沒有蟒蛇。有人把蟒蛇從亞洲帶回美國，想要當寵物養！

	These pet pythons grew and grew! People could not take care of them. Many put

	their pythons out in the wild.

	這些蟒蛇越長越大，讓人無法照顧，就把蛇送到野外放生。

	In Florida, a U.S. state, pythons eat many wild animals. Florida is worried

	about these animals. So it does not want pythons in the wild. But pythons are

	hard to find. It can take ten hours to catch one!

	美國佛羅里達州的蟒蛇會吃掉其他的野生動物。當地希望除掉這些蟒蛇，問題是蟒蛇很難找到，有時候要花上十個鐘頭才能抓到一條。

	Now scientists are catching pythons with robots. Pythons eat rabbits, so the

	scientists made small robot rabbits. These robots look like rabbits. They

	move like rabbits. They are warm like rabbits. Pythons think they are real

	rabbits!

	蟒蛇會吃兔子，因此科學家做了小小的機器兔，外表跟行為跟體溫都很像真的兔子，所以蟒蛇以為是真正的！

	When a python comes close to a robot, cameras around the robot see it.

	Workers come quickly. They catch the python!

	蟒蛇靠近機器兔時，附近的攝影機就會拍到牠。工作人員馬上趕來，當場捕獲蟒蛇。

	These robot rabbits help catch pythons. The robot rabbits are saving

	Florida's wild animals!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
sections.vocabulary:
Vocabulary

	機器兔小兵立大功，協助科學家抓捕蟒蛇。

	1. animal 動物。

	My husband and I went to Kenya last month. 我先生跟我上個月去了肯亞。

	Oh? What's in Kenya? 肯亞有什麼?

	Lots of wild animals in the wild. 很多野生動物在野外。

	2. wild 野生的。

	Well, I hope they weren't in the city, being wild and all. 既然是野生動物，

	我希望牠們不在市區。

	You are right. 你說得對。

	We saw lions, leopards and elephants. 我們看到獅子，花豹跟大象。

	3. dangerous 危險的。

	You can see all of those on TV! 你在電視上都看得到!

	True, but on TV they can't smell you. 對，不過牠們在電視裡聞不到你。

	Uh oh, that sounds dangerous! 糟了，聽起來很危險。

	4. close 靠近的。

	I was pretty worried when they got very close. 牠們靠得很近時我會擔心。

	你喜歡動物嗎? 來讀今天的單字。

	animal動物 wild 野生的 dangerous 危險的 close 靠近的

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
sections.quiz:
Quiz

	1. How long are some pythons?

	a. 1 meter

	b. 6 meters

	c. 10 meters

	2. What are the pythons in Florida doing?

	a. Catching people

	b. Eating wild animals

	c. Becoming pets

	3. Why do pythons think the robots are real rabbits?

	a. The robots smell like rabbits.

	b. The robots move like rabbits.

	c. The robots taste like rabbits.

episodes.title: Fake Famous Singer Sings “Sorry”
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Fake Famous Singer Sings “Sorry”

	Everyone likes to see famous people. We see pictures and videos of them. They

	are everywhere! Some people see a famous person in real life. How exciting …

	Maybe they see Taylor Swift at their supermarket!!

	通常大家都喜歡巧遇只在照片和影片裡面出現的名人。假如在真實生活中碰到，多半會很興奮！泰勒絲的粉絲假如在超市看到她，一定會尖叫。

	A DJ was playing loud music at a club. It was dark. Many people were dancing.

	They were having fun!

	一家暗暗的夜店正在大聲放音樂，很多人開心跳舞。

	A man came in. He was wearing sunglasses and a big hoodie. His clothes were

	like Justin Bieber's clothes. His tattoos were like Justin Bieber's tattoos.

	Hey! Was he Justin Bieber?!

	這時，一名男子走了進來。他戴著太陽眼鏡，穿著寬鬆的帽Ｔ。他的穿著跟身上的刺青都跟小賈斯汀一模一樣！他不會是小賈斯汀吧？

	The man’s friends said he was Justin Bieber! They said he wanted to sing a

	song. Yes! The DJ was excited!

	那名男子的朋友說他就是小賈斯汀，還說他想演唱一首歌！夜店的DJ 好興奮！

	The man sang a song called "Sorry." He sang like Justin Bieber. He moved like

	Justin Bieber. Wow! People took pictures and videos. They were seeing a

	famous person in real life!

	那名男子唱了小賈斯汀的〈Sorry〉。他聲音就像本人一樣，而且連表演時的動作都一樣。大家紛紛拿出手機拍照。

	But later, the DJ got bad news. The man was not Justin Bieber! He was a fake

	Justin Bieber!

	後來，DJ 聽到壞消息。那個男子根本不是小賈斯汀，而是假扮的小「假」斯汀！

	Will this fake Justin Bieber say "Sorry" to the DJ?

	________________________________________

	Vocabulary

	撲朔迷離的小賈斯汀，讓人真假分不清。

	1. sing 唱歌，dance 跳舞。

	Are you going to the club tonight? 你今晚要去夜店嗎?

	I am. How can I miss the singing and dancing? 要啊，我怎麼會錯過唱歌跳舞?

	2) music 音樂。

	And the good food. 還有美食。

	Exactly 正是。

	I’ll bring earplugs too. 我也會帶耳塞。

	The music can be very loud! 音樂有可能太吵。

	Good idea! 好主意。

	3) sunglasses 太陽眼鏡。

	I also plan to wear sunglasses, to look cool. 我也打算戴太陽眼鏡，看起來才酷。

	So people might think you’re a secret star? 這樣大家就會以為你是祕密明星?

	Yeah. 是。

	4) picture 照片。

	Just don’t trip when you’re dancing; the picture won’t look cool.

	可別在跳舞時絆倒，相片就不酷了。

	來一起來讀單字。

	Sing 唱歌 dance 跳舞 music 音樂 sunglasses 太陽眼鏡 picture照片

	________________________________________

	Quiz

	1. Where was everyone dancing?

	a. A supermarket

	b. A club

	c. Everywhere

	2. What was the man wearing?

	a. Justin Bieber's clothes

	b. Sunglasses and a big hoodie

	c. A black T-shirt

	3. Who said the man was Justin Bieber?

	a. His friends

	b. The DJ

	c. Tay Tay

	Answers

	1. b

	2. b

	3. a

episodes.title: A Beauty Contest for Water Buffalo
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	A Beauty Contest for Water Buffalo

	Water buffalo look like very big dark cows. Maybe you have seen them in

	Taiwan. Do you think they are beautiful? Well, one country has beauty

	contests for them!

	水牛看起來像顏色很深、很大隻的牛。你也許在台灣看過牠們！你覺得水牛漂亮嗎？有一個國家會幫水牛辦選美比賽喔！

	The contests are in Thailand. There are small contests. And there is a big

	contest at a water buffalo festival every year.

	在泰國，有些地方會舉辦小型的水牛選美比賽。也有一年一度的大型水牛節選美大賽！

	At this contest, some water buffalo wear beautiful hats and blankets. Others

	have colorful skin. Judges look at them. Do they have big horns? Are their

	feet nice? Are their bodies strong?

	在比賽中，有些水牛會戴上漂亮的帽子或是披上毯子，也有一些水牛的皮膚塗上顏色。評審會仔細看這些水牛的犄角大不大？身體強壯嗎？

	Farmers take good care of these water buffalo. Some get a bath every day.

	They take vitamins. They eat nice food like corn and soybeans. Most other

	water buffalo eat grass.

	農夫平時會細心照顧這些要參賽的水牛，幫他們天天洗澡。跟一般只吃草的水牛不同，要去比賽的水牛會吃維他命、玉米跟黃豆！

	Farmers can sell contest winners for a lot of money. One farmer sold a

	contest winning buffalo for 18 million Taiwan dollars!

	如果水牛在比賽中得獎，就可以賣到很高的價錢。有一位農夫曾經把得獎水牛賣到一千八百萬台幣！

	Long ago, water buffaloes helped farmers. They did a lot of very hard work.

	Now, machines do this work.

	很久以前，水牛會幫農夫耕田。現在，這些辛苦的工作都交給機器了！

	And now there are water buffalo beauty contests!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	要贏得泰國的水牛選美大賽，很不簡單。

	1. winner 贏家。

	Guess which country is the biggest winner in beauty contests.

	猜猜看哪個國家是選美比賽最大贏家。

	The United States? 是美國嗎?

	No, it’s Venezuela. 不對，是委內瑞拉。

	2. beautiful 美麗的。

	I don’t know where it is. 我不知道它在哪裡?

	It’s in South America. 在南美洲。

	So the contest is about being the most beautiful? 所以選美比賽是看誰最漂亮?

	I don’t know. 我也不知道。

	3. take care of 照顧。

	But I think being beautiful means taking care of your health.

	不過我覺得好好照顧自己的健康就是美。

	I do. 我都有喔。

	4. every day 每天。

	I eat well every day, and I take vitamins. 我每天都吃得很好，也吃維他命。

	來一起讀單字。

	winner贏家 beautiful美麗的 take care of照顧 every day每天

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. Where is the beauty contest?

	a. Taiwan

	b. Turkey

	c. Thailand

	2. How much did a farmer sell a contest winner for?

	a. 8 million Taiwan dollars

	b. 18 million Taiwan dollars

	c. 80 million Taiwan dollars

	3. Who did the water buffalo help long ago?

	a. Farmers

	b. Machines

	c. Firefighters

	Answers

	1. c

	2. b

	3. a

episodes.title: Ninety-Eight-Year-Old Swimmer Shares Her Town
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Ninety-Eight-Year-Old Swimmer Shares Her Town

	Tang Cheng-Yao is from Hengchun. She learned how to swim when she was four

	years old.

	來自恆春的唐成瑤從四歲開始就會游泳。

	Now Tang is 98 years old. She cannot see well in one eye. She cannot hear in

	one ear. But she swims 400 meters almost every day.

	現在，唐成瑤已經98歲了！她的視力跟聽力都不好，但她仍然堅持每天游泳四百公尺。

	Tang went to a big swimming contest in Singapore. She was the oldest woman to

	swim. She swam in five races!

	她去參加新加坡一場大型游泳比賽，總共報名五個競賽項目。她是年紀最大的女選手！

	In one race, Tang swam 200 meters. The race was for 95 to 99-year-old women.

	She finished it! In all the years of this race, she was the fastest! She

	finished the race in a little under 13 minutes!

	其中一場比賽是兩百公尺游泳，參賽者都是95到99歲的女性。她順利游完全程，而且成績是歷年來最快的，只用了不到十三分鐘！

	Tang won five gold medals at the contest. That was very exciting! But

	something excited her more.

	唐成瑤在游泳比賽贏得了五面金牌，但讓她更開心的還有另一件事！

	People from all over the world were at the contest. They know Tang loves

	swimming. And now they know she has another love too. Tang loves Hengchun!

	Telling people about her town excited her. She gave them Hengchun bags too.

	來自世界各地的人都認識了她，也知道她不只愛游泳，還很愛恆春。她開心的向大家介紹自己的家鄉，並且贈送他們恆春圖案的袋子。

	This 98-year-old winner shared Hengchun with the world!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	九十八歲的老太太，仍然熱愛游泳保持健康。

	1. contest 比賽。

	I may join a swimming contest. 我也許會參加游泳比賽。

	How come I never see you go swimming? 我怎麼從來沒看過你去游泳?

	That doesn't mean I can't swim. 那並不表示我不會游。

	2. meter 公尺。

	That's true. 那是真的。

	So are you swimming the 100 meters or 200? 所以你要游一百公尺，兩百公尺?

	The 100-meter freestyle. 一百公尺自由式。

	3. finish 結束。

	How fast are you? 你游得多快?

	I can finish it in 10 minutes. 我可以十分鐘游完。

	I can walk 100 meters in 2 minutes! 我走100公尺只要兩分鐘!

	4. gold medal 金牌。

	Walking is faster than swimming, okay? 走路比游泳快，好嗎?

	And I don't plan to get a gold medal! 而且我又不是要拿金牌!

	你想參加游泳比賽嗎?

	contest 比賽 meter公尺 finish結束 gold medal金牌

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. How old is Tang?

	a. 4

	b. 13

	c. 98

	2. What does Tang do almost every day?

	a. Skate

	b. Swim

	c. Ski

	3. What did Tang tell people about?

	a. Singapore

	b. Gold medals

	c. Hengchun

	Answers

	1. c

	2. b

	3. c

	She finished it! In all the years of this race, she was the fastest! She

	finished the race in a little under 13 minutes!

	其中一場比賽是兩百公尺游泳，參賽者都是95到99歲的女性。她順利游完全程，而且成績是歷年來最快的，只用了不到十三分鐘！

	Tang won five gold medals at the contest. That was very exciting! But

	something excited her more.

	唐成瑤在游泳比賽贏得了五面金牌，但讓她更開心的還有另一件事！

	People from all over the world were at the contest. They know Tang loves

	swimming. And now they know she has another love too. Tang loves Hengchun!

	Telling people about her town excited her. She gave them Hengchun bags too.

	來自世界各地的人都認識了她，也知道她不只愛游泳，還很愛恆春。她開心的向大家介紹自己的家鄉，並且贈送他們恆春圖案的袋子。

	This 98-year-old winner shared Hengchun with the world!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
sections.vocabulary:
Vocabulary

	九十八歲的老太太，仍然熱愛游泳保持健康。

	1. contest 比賽。

	I may join a swimming contest. 我也許會參加游泳比賽。

	How come I never see you go swimming? 我怎麼從來沒看過你去游泳?

	That doesn't mean I can't swim. 那並不表示我不會游。

	2. meter 公尺。

	That's true. 那是真的。

	So are you swimming the 100 meters or 200? 所以你要游一百公尺，兩百公尺?

	The 100-meter freestyle. 一百公尺自由式。

	3. finish 結束。

	How fast are you? 你游得多快?

	I can finish it in 10 minutes. 我可以十分鐘游完。

	I can walk 100 meters in 2 minutes! 我走100公尺只要兩分鐘!

	4. gold medal 金牌。

	Walking is faster than swimming, okay? 走路比游泳快，好嗎?

	And I don't plan to get a gold medal! 而且我又不是要拿金牌!

	你想參加游泳比賽嗎?

	contest 比賽 meter公尺 finish結束 gold medal金牌

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
sections.quiz:
Quiz

	1. How old is Tang?

	a. 4

	b. 13

	c. 98

	2. What does Tang do almost every day?

	a. Skate

	b. Swim

	c. Ski

	3. What did Tang tell people about?

	a. Singapore

	b. Gold medals

	c. Hengchun

episodes.title: Fake Eggs for Fewer Pigeons
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Fake Eggs for Fewer Pigeons

	What is making that noise? Pigeons are! They make noise from early in the

	morning!

	你聽見了嗎？鴿子從一大早就開始發出這些聲音。

	Pigeons make buildings dirty too. Cleaning the buildings is hard. It also

	costs a lot of money.

	鴿糞也會汙染建築物的外觀。清理這些建築物不但很麻煩，還很花錢！

	Many cities have too many pigeons. These birds can find lots of food. So they

	lay eggs again and again. They can lay twelve eggs a year!

	很多城市的鴿子太多了。鴿子在市區可以找到充足的食物，會一直生蛋！一隻鴿子一年可以生十二顆蛋！

	Cities try many ways to make pigeons go away. Some of these ways hurt the

	birds. One city does not want pigeons. But it does not want to hurt them.

	有個城市想趕走鴿子，但不想傷害到牠們。

	The city made a pigeon house. It is in a big park. It has lots of food.

	Pigeons leave other parts of the city. They eat and rest in the house.

	於是人們在這個城市的大公園裡蓋了一間鴿子屋，吸引鴿子從其他地方飛來。

	Pigeons lay eggs there too! But people take the eggs. They give the pigeons

	fake eggs.

	鴿子在那裏吃飽喝足後，就會在鳥屋裡生蛋！人們會把這些蛋拿走，再把假的蛋放回去。

	The birds do not know this. They sit and sit on the eggs. But no baby pigeons

	come out! So there are fewer and fewer pigeons in the city.

	鴿子不知道蛋被掉包，會繼續孵蛋。假的蛋孵不出來，城市中的鴿子數量也就減少了！

	Does your city have too many pigeons? What do you think about using fake eggs?

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	這個城市想了個辦法來降低鴿子的數量。

	1. egg 蛋。

	Shhhh … Look! A pigeon is sitting there. 你看，一隻鴿子坐在那裏。

	Wow, is it nesting? 哇，牠在抱窩嗎?

	Are there eggs? 有沒有蛋?

	I can’t see any. 我沒看到蛋。

	2. hurt 傷害。

	But I think it’s nesting. 不過我想牠是在抱窩。

	What should we do? 我們該做什麼?

	Try not to hurt the bird, for one thing. 第一點，儘量不要傷害那隻鳥。

	3. noise 噪音。

	And don’t make too much noise. 也不要弄太多吵鬧聲。

	How long do you think it’ll be there? 你覺得牠會待在那裏多久?

	Let’s look it up online. 來上網找一下。

	4. food 食物。

	It says pigeon eggs take 17 to 19 days to hatch.

	它說鴿子蛋需要17到19天孵出來。

	I wonder how it finds food. 不知道牠怎麼找吃的。

	今天的單字超簡單。

	egg蛋 hurt傷害 noise噪音 food食物

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. When do pigeons start making noise?

	a. Early in the morning

	b. When they lay eggs

	c. When they sleep

	2. What did a city make for pigeons?

	a. A house

	b. A park

	c. A hospital

	3. Why do people take eggs from pigeons?

	a. To make them lay more eggs

	b. To give them fake eggs

	c. To sell the eggs to shops

	Answers

	1. a

	2. a

	3. b

episodes.title: Thieves in Spain Steal Many Chairs
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Thieves in Spain Steal Many Chairs

	Narrator: Thieves take other people's things. Taking other people's things is

	stealing. Thieves steal many kinds of things. They steal cars! They steal

	bikes! They steal money!

	小偷會偷汽車，腳踏車，也會偷錢。

	In Spain, seven thieves worked together. They stole something different. They

	stole … chairs?! In two months, they stole one thousand one hundred chairs!

	And the chairs were not new!

	西班牙有七名小偷一起偷東西，偷的東西很特別。兩個月之內他們偷了1,100張舊椅子！

	The thieves stole chairs from 18 restaurants. These restaurants had tables

	and chairs outside. In Spain, many people like to eat outside and enjoy the

	weather.

	這些椅子來自18家餐廳。在西班牙，很多人喜歡坐在室外吃飯、享受好天氣。因此餐廳會在店外擺放桌椅，讓客人在戶外用餐。

	After these restaurants closed at night, they kept their tables and chairs

	outside. Some put chains on the chairs. But the chains did not stop the seven

	thieves! Then these restaurants had tables outside, but no chairs! Oh no!

	餐廳晚上打烊後不會把桌椅收起來。有些餐廳會用鐵鍊把椅子鎖住，但是擋不住小偷。結果，那些椅子全被偷了，只剩下桌子！

	The thieves sold the chairs in Spain and other countries. Together, the

	chairs were worth more than two million Taiwan dollars!

	小偷把這些椅子賣到很多不同國家，總共賣了超過兩百萬台幣。

	But the police caught the thieves!

	Police: Don't move!

	Narrator: They say the seven thieves worked in a big group of thieves.

	警察逮到這些小偷後，發現他們其實屬於一個更大的偷竊集團！

	Stealing things is not good. But thieves steal. Be careful about your things!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	這些竊賊只偷椅子，其他的不拿。

	1. steal 偷竊。

	Have you ever had anything stolen by a thief? 你有沒有被小偷偷過東西?

	Yes! When I was little, I had a dog named "Deli."

	有，我小時候有一隻狗叫做德利。

	2. police 警察。

	He was the friendliest dog ever, and he was stolen!

	他是最友善的狗，而他被偷了。

	That's awful! 糟透了!

	Yeah, I really wished the police could catch the thief.

	對啊，我那時好希望警察能抓到小偷。

	3. sell 賣掉。

	Maybe Deli just got lost. 也許德利只是迷路。

	No, he was a beautiful dog. 不是，他很漂亮。

	The thief must have sold him. 小偷一定把他給賣了。

	4. bike 腳踏車。

	I had a bike that got stolen. 我曾經有腳踏車被偷走。

	So what did you do? 結果你怎麼辦?

	I had to walk to school! 我得走路上學!

	今天的單字有哪些?

	steal偷竊 police警察 sell賣掉 bike腳踏車

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. What do thieves do?

	a. Work at restaurants

	b. Take other people's things

	c. Eat outside

	2. Where were the chairs stolen from?

	a. Parks

	b. Schools

	c. Restaurants

	3. What did the thieves do with the chairs?

	a. Sold them

	b. Put chains on them

	c. Sat on them

	Answers

	1. b

	2. c

	3. a

episodes.title: Indigenous Houses at Taiwan's Schools
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Indigenous Houses at Taiwan's Schools

	Taiwan has many Indigenous groups. Keeping their ways of life is important

	for Taiwan.

	台灣有很多原住民，保留他們的生活方式很重要。

	Now, about ninety schools are working with local Indigenous groups. They want

	kids to understand Indigenous ways of life.

	目前大約九十所學校跟當地原住民族合作，希望讓小朋友更了解他們。

	These schools have Indigenous houses with Indigenous art, tools, and stories.

	Kids learn by doing.

	這些學校有原住民的傳統房子，裡面有各種手工藝、工具和故事。小朋友可以親身體驗原住民文化。

	Taoyuan's Guanghua Elementary School has Atayal houses. Atayal people helped

	build them. Kids learn Atayal ways.

	桃園的光華國小有泰雅族的房子，讓小朋友們在那裡學習泰雅族的生活方式。這些房子是泰雅族人一起幫忙蓋的。

	Hualien's Taiping Elementary School has a Bunun stone house. The school used

	Bunun ways to build it. Kids learn Bunun ways.

	花蓮的太平國小有布農族石板屋，是用傳統方式蓋的，學生可以更了解布農族。

	Hualien's Ruibei Elementary School has a Bunun and Amis house. Bunun and Amis

	groups built it together. The art, tools, and stories are from both. Kids

	learn the languages, crafts, songs, and dances of both. Kids see the two

	groups work together and respect each other.

	花蓮的瑞北國小有一棟布農族跟阿美族一起蓋的房子，裡面展示兩族的作品跟其他的東西。小朋友學習他們的語言和文化，也看到不同族群怎麼互相尊重與合作。

	Kids at these schools understand Indigenous ways more now. Does your school

	have an Indigenous house?

	________________________________________

	Vocabulary

	台灣很多國小教導兒童原住民文化，希望讓它延續。

	1. understand 了解。

	Did you understand what she said? 你聽懂她在講什麼嗎?

	Not at all. 完全不懂。

	Was she speaking Chinese? 她在講中文嗎?

	I believe so. 我想是。

	2. language 語言。

	I thought it’s another language. 我還以為是在講另外一種話。

	Yeah, Chinese can be hard. 對啊，中文是滿難的。

	3. way of life 生活方式。

	I think when learning a new language, 我覺得學一種新語言，

	you need to learn their way of life. 也需要學他們的生活方式。

	4. help 幫助。

	I agree. 我同意。

	When I was learning Japanese, 我學日文時，

	I ate raw fish every day. 每天吃生的魚。

	Did it help? 有幫助嗎?

	No. 沒有。

	你想學新的語言嗎? 來讀單字。

	understand了解 language語言 way of life生活方式 help幫助

	________________________________________

	Quiz

	1. Where is the school with Atayal houses?

	a. Keelung

	b. Hualien

	c. Taoyuan

	2. What is the Bunun house made of?

	a. Ways

	b. Stone

	c. Tools

	3. What do all of the houses have?

	a. Indigenous art

	b. Atayal tools

	c. Bunun and Amis songs

	Answers

	1. c

	2. b

	3. a

	Yeah, Chinese can be hard. 對啊，中文是滿難的。

	I think when learning a new language, 我覺得學一種新語言，

	you need to learn their way of life. 也需要學他們的生活方式。

	4. help 幫助。

	I agree. 我同意。

	When I was learning Japanese, 我學日文時，

	I ate raw fish every day. 每天吃生的魚。

	Did it help? 有幫助嗎?

	No. 沒有。

	你想學新的語言嗎? 來讀單字。

	understand了解 language語言 way of life生活方式 help幫助

	________________________________________
sections.quiz:
Quiz

	1. Where is the school with Atayal houses?

	a. Keelung

	b. Hualien

	c. Taoyuan

	2. What is the Bunun house made of?

	a. Ways

	b. Stone

	c. Tools

	3. What do all of the houses have?

	a. Indigenous art

	b. Atayal tools

	c. Bunun and Amis songs

episodes.title: Power Bank Fire Safety from Experts
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Power Bank Fire Safety from Experts

	Many people use their phones a lot. They use them all day. Sometimes their

	phones need more power.

	很多人一整天都在滑手機，所以他們的手機需要時常充電！

	So some people use power banks. Power banks give their phones power. But

	sometimes power banks catch on fire!

	有一些人會用行動電源幫手機充電。但行動電源有時候會起火，造成危險。

	Be careful when a power bank is very hot. Be very careful when it has smoke

	or a burning smell. Do not touch the power bank! Find a grownup fast! Your

	mom, your dad, or a teacher!

	行動電源假如變得很燙，就要提高警覺。要是有冒煙或燒焦的氣味，就更要小心喔！這個時候千萬不要去碰行動電源！應該要馬上告訴大人，像是爸爸、媽媽或老師。

	But maybe the grownup does not know what to do! Tell them what experts say.

	They say do not use a fire extinguisher. It will make more smoke!

	如果大人也不知道該怎麼辦，你可以告訴他們專家的建議。專家說不要用滅火器，因為這樣會讓行動電源產生更多煙。

	Experts say to take a smoking or burning power bank outside fast! Then put it

	into water. The water will bubble. Experts say to keep the power bank in the

	water for a week. Wait for no more bubbles.

	專家說要趕快把冒煙或起火的行動電源拿到室外，然後泡進水裡。之後，水會開始冒泡。專家說要把行動電源泡在水裡一個星期，或是到完全沒有泡泡為止。

	Then experts say to give the burned power bank to a sanitation worker. The

	worker can safely throw it away.

	最後，要把燒壞的行動電源交給清潔隊，讓他們安全的處理掉！

	Power banks are helpful. But when a power bank has smoke or a burning smell,

	tell a grownup fast!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	行動電源用起來很方便，卻有起火燃燒的風險。

	1. fire 火。

	Hi, it’s Nancy. I’m going to be late. 嗨，我是南西，我會遲到。

	Did something happen? 出了什麼事嗎?

	Yeah, our train stopped because of a fire. 對，我們的火車停了，因為火災。

	2. power 電力。

	A fire? Are you okay? 火災? 你還好嗎?

	I’m fine. 我很好。

	But they’ve cut off the power so we’re stuck here.

	但是他們切斷了電源，所以我們卡在這裡。

	3. burn 燃燒。

	Oh my god! Is the train still burning? 天哪，火車還在燒嗎?

	No no, just smoke. 只有冒煙。

	4. careful 小心的。

	We’re all safe. 我們都很安全。

	Good. Now you be careful, okay? 很好，你要小心喔。

	Okay. Bye.

	來一起複習今天的單字。

	fire火 power電力 burn燃燒 careful小心的

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. Where do experts say to take a smoking power bank?

	a. Inside

	b. Outside

	c. To a grownup

	2. What do experts say to use for a smoking power bank?

	a. Water

	b. Smoke

	c. A fire extinguisher

	3. What can a sanitation worker do with a burned power bank?

	a. Find a teacher

	b. Catch on fire

	c. Safely throw it away

	Answers

	1. b

	2. a

	3. c

episodes.title: Camping on Greenland's Ice
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Camping on Greenland's Ice

	Ice sheets are very big and thick ice. They are not in an ocean. They are on

	land.

	陸地上的冰原是厚厚的大冰塊構成的！

	The Earth has two ice sheets. The bigger one is in Antarctica. The smaller

	one is in Greenland.

	地球上有兩大冰原，最大的冰原在南極洲，另一個比較小的則在格陵蘭。

	Greenland's ice sheet is the size of 47 Taiwans! It is three kilometers thick

	in some places!

	格陵蘭冰原有 47 個台灣那麼大。有些地方甚至有三公里那麼厚！

	A man went camping with some people on Greenland's ice sheet. The ice has

	lots of big, deep cracks. No one wanted to fall into a crack! Sometimes the

	group used a rope for safety. They walked together very carefully!

	有一名男子跟夥伴一起到格陵蘭冰原露營。冰上有很多又深又大的裂縫，大家都很怕掉進去。他們都抓著繩子，小心翼翼往前走。

	The man also helped pull a very heavy sled. Food, tents, and camping things

	were on it. They fell off a lot!

	這名男子還要幫忙拉很重的雪橇，上面裝滿食物、帳篷跟露營用具。雪橇上的東西還常常會掉下來！

	The man tried swimming in icy water. He had fun!

	他甚至還跑到冰水裡游泳。雖然很冷，但他覺得很好玩！

	But the man also saw that this ice sheet is getting smaller. Scientists say

	150 million liters of its ice become water every minute! They say it is

	because the Earth is getting warmer. This water makes our oceans higher.

	他也發現冰原正在慢慢變小。科學家說，每一分鐘就有一億五千萬公升的冰融化成水。地球暖化讓冰原融化，也讓海平面慢慢升高。

	Let's take care of the Earth and try to keep the ice sheets!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	在格陵蘭厚厚的冰塊上露營，是非常特別的經驗。

	1. icy 冰冷的。

	Is it a good idea to go camping in this weather? 這種天氣去露營是好主意嗎?

	Of course! It's only fun when it's icy cold. 當然，要冰冷天氣才好玩。

	2. thick 厚厚的。

	Otherwise, the snow just melts as soon as it hits the ground.

	要不然雪一碰到地面就化了。

	If you want to see thick snow, 你要是想看厚厚的雪，you'll have to go higher.

	就得去更高的地方。

	3. tent 帳篷。

	But the road could be closed. 但是道路可能會封閉。

	Then you can set up your tent on the roadside. 那你們就可以在路邊搭帳篷了。

	4. lots of 很多的。

	Hey, you're right! 你說得對! That would be lots of fun! 那會超好玩的。

	你喜歡露營嗎? 來讀單字。

	icy冰冷的 thick厚厚的 tent帳篷 lots of很多的

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. Where did the man go camping?

	a. Antarctica

	b. Greenland

	c. Iceland

	2. What did the group use for safety?

	a. A rope

	b. A crack

	c. Ice sheets

	3. What was on the sled?

	a. Icy water

	b. A scientist

	c. Food

	Answers

	1. b

	2. a

	3. c

episodes.title: Kiwis are birds. They have long beaks and soft feathers. They are the same
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Kiwis are birds. They have long beaks and soft feathers. They are the same

	size as chickens. They cannot fly. Kiwis live in New Zealand. They do not

	live in other countries.

	奇異鳥有長長的嘴巴跟柔軟的羽毛。牠們跟雞差不多大，也不會飛行。只有在紐西蘭才見得到奇異鳥喔！

	People in New Zealand love kiwis. Many people there call themselves "Kiwis"!

	紐西蘭人很喜歡奇異鳥，所以很多人會叫自己「奇異人」！

	But there are not many kiwi birds now. They need help. Many other birds in

	New Zealand need help too.

	但是，奇異鳥的數量變少了，而且也有很多其他的鳥類面臨一樣的困境。這些鳥需要大家幫忙！

	Two small animals are not good for them. Rats and possums eat bird eggs and

	baby birds. Possums also eat lots of leaves, flowers, and fruit. Now birds

	have fewer places to live. They also have less food.

	大老鼠跟澳洲袋貂會吃鳥蛋跟雛鳥！袋貂也會吃很多樹葉、花跟水果。這樣一來，鳥能住的地方跟能吃的食物都變少了。

	Long ago, New Zealand had no rats or possums. They came from other countries.

	Now people in New Zealand want to catch all of them.

	大老鼠跟袋貂是從其他國家來的外來種，紐西蘭人希望把牠們全部抓起來，保護鳥類！

	Grownups and kids want to help kiwis and other birds. So they put rat and

	possum traps in gardens, parks, and forests.

	大人跟小孩都一起幫忙，在花園、公園跟森林裡放陷阱捕捉大老鼠跟袋貂！

	The birds need more help. There are many rats and possums to catch. But now

	people in New Zealand see more kiwis and other birds! Kiwis are saving kiwis!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	紐西蘭獨特的奇異鳥，遭到別的動物威脅。

	1. bird 鳥類。

	Will you go shopping with me tomorrow? 你明天會跟我去購物嗎?

	No, sorry. I'm going bird watching. 不行，真抱歉，我要去賞鳥。

	Again? You just went last week. 又要去? 你上星期才去過。

	2. forest 森林。

	We'll see different birds. 是看不同的鳥。This time we'll go to a national

	forest. 這次我們要去國家森林區。

	3. feather 羽毛。

	What's so special about birds, anyway? 鳥兒究竟有什麼特別?

	They are very cute. 牠們很可愛。And their colorful feathers shine under the

	sun. 彩色羽毛在太陽底下會閃閃發光。

	4. catch 捕捉。

	Have you tried to catch them? 你有沒有抓過牠們?

	I only try to catch them with my camera. 我只用相機捕捉。I hope they always

	stay there. 我希望牠們永遠在那裏。

	請跟我讀今天的單字。bird鳥類 forest森林 feather羽毛 catch捕捉

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. Why do kiwis need help?

	a. Rats eat kiwi eggs.

	b. Possums like soft feathers.

	c. Rats have long beaks.

	2. Where did rats come from long ago?

	a. Possums

	b. New Zealand

	c. Other countries

	3. Where do people put traps?

	a. Schools

	b. Parks

	c. Shops

	Answers

	1. a

	2. c

	3. b

episodes.title: ICRT NEWS FOR KIDS
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	ICRT NEWS FOR KIDS

	Taoyuan's New Library Has Robots

	Taoyuan has a new library. It has 23,000 books. And it has robots and

	self-driving vehicles!

	桃園有一間新的圖書館。這間圖書館有兩萬三千本書，而且還有機器人跟自動駕駛車！

	But the robots are not robots with a head, arms, and legs. They are robot

	arms!

	不過，這些機器人不是完整的機器人，而是機械手臂！

	These robot arms move. And they see! They see with cameras. The arms can find

	books on shelves. The arms work with the self-driving vehicles. They work

	together using AI.

	這些機械手臂不但會動，還看得見。它們的眼睛是攝影機，可以找到書架上的書。機械手臂跟自駕車靠著人工智慧合作無間。

	At this library, people can choose books online. The robot arms find the

	books. They pick up the books. They put them on the self-driving vehicles.

	Then the vehicles take the books to the book pickup place. People get the

	books and take them home. This is so easy!

	想要在這間圖書館借書，可以先在網路上選好，機械手臂會在圖書館裡找書，把書拿起來放到自駕車送到取書口，借書人就能把書帶回家，真的很方便！

	The robot arms and self-driving vehicles also work to put books back on

	shelves. They do this at night. No one is in the library then.

	機械手臂跟自駕車也會在晚上合作把書本放回書架，那時候圖書館裡沒人，不受干擾。

	Taoyuan wants robot arms and self-driving vehicles in more libraries. Maybe

	more cities will get them too. So maybe you will see them in your library one

	day!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	神奇的機器手臂和自駕車，大大減少圖書館所需要的人力。

	1. get 得到。

	I'm so hungry! 我好餓! When is the food coming? 什麼時候才上菜?

	Here it comes! 來了! Isn't it fun to get your food from a robot?

	由機器人送餐是不是很好玩?

	I'd say it's a bit scary.我覺得有點恐怖。

	2. arm 手臂，leg 腿。

	Luckily, it doesn't have arms and legs. 還好它沒有手臂跟腿。

	Yeah, I certainly don't want it touching my plates.對，我可不要它碰我的盤子。

	3. take 拿。

	Now what? 現在是怎樣? Why is it just standing here? 它為什麼就站在這裡?

	I think it wants to take your plate.我想它要拿你的盤子。

	4. can 能夠。How did it know I'm done? 它怎麼知道我吃完了?

	Maybe it can see from far away? 也許它老遠就能看到?

	Now that's scary! 那真的很恐怖!

	你想得到機器人的服務嗎? get得到 arm手臂, leg腿 take拿 can能夠

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. What does the library in Taoyuan have?

	a. Robot legs

	b. Robot arms

	c. Robot heads

	2. What do the robots do when people choose books online?

	a. Find the books

	b. Pick up cameras

	c. Drive self-driving vehicles

	3. When do the robots put books back on shelves?

	a. In the morning

	b. In the afternoon

	c. At night

	Answers

	1. b

	2. a

	3. c

episodes.title: Making a Good Change in 2026
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Making a Good Change in 2026

	Narrator: It is 2026! Happy New Year!

	Crowd: Happy New Year!!

	Narrator: 現在是 2026 年！新年快樂喔！

	Every New Year, many people try to do something for one year. They want to

	make a good change in their lives. Do you want to try this? Here are some

	ideas!

	每到新的一年，都會有很多人許下新年新希望。為了讓生活變得更好，他們會訂下一個目標，並且持續執行一整年。你也想試試看嗎？

	You can try to be healthier. How? Eat more fruits and vegetables every day!

	Or drink more water every day!

	你可以試著變得更健康！你可以每天多吃一點蔬菜水果，或是多喝一點水！

	Or play a sport you like every week. Or play a new sport! Join a team, make

	new friends, and feel great!

	你也可以每星期都做你喜歡的運動，或是學一種新運動，加入球隊，認識新朋友。這樣不僅可以讓身體更健康，心情也會變好！

	You can be neater. How? Make your bed every morning. Or give your old toys

	and clothes to kids who need them.

	你還可以變得更乾淨整齊。例如每天早上折被子，或是把不用的玩具和衣服送給需要的小朋友。

	You can help the Earth. How? Use less plastic. Or get a plant! Water it and

	watch it grow!

	幫助地球也不錯喔！少用一點塑膠，或是種一盆植物，看著它長大。

	There are other things you can do. Read one book every month! Or write what

	you think and feel in a notebook. Or try a fun hobby!

	還有很多別的新年新希望，像是每個月讀一本書，寫寫日記記錄你的想法跟感受，或者培養新的興趣！

	Try something that will make a good change in your life. Do it a lot in 2026!

	You will feel good and have a happier year!

	________________________________________

	Vocabulary

	新的一年來臨，你可以決心做很多新的事。

	1. want 想要。

	What's your New Year's resolution, Nancy? 你的新年決心是什麼，南西?

	I want to learn how to say "thank you" in 10 languages!

	我要學會用十種語言講謝謝。

	2. join 加入。

	And I'll join a group of hot pot eaters! 還要加入一個吃火鍋的團體。

	That sounds…not so healthy. 聽起來...不太健康。

	3. every month 每個月。

	Oh, we'll only get together once every month, I think.

	我想我們每個月只會聚會一次。What about you? 你呢?

	4. change 改變。

	I'll make a good change in my life. 我的生活要有很好的改變。

	By doing what…? 怎麼做呢...?

	By feeling great about me! 就從覺得自己很棒開始!

	新年你想做什麼呢? want想要 join加入 every month每個月 change改變

	________________________________________

	Quiz

	1. How can you try to be healthier this year?

	a. Eat more candy

	b. Drink lots of coffee

	c. Drink more water

	2. How can you be neater this year?

	a. Make your bed

	b. Play a new sport

	c. Get a plant

	3. How can you help the Earth?

	a. Join a sports team

	b. Drink more water

	c. Use less plastic

	Answers

	1. c

	2. a

	3. c

episodes.title: Fireworks for the New Year
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Fireworks for the New Year

	It is New Year's Eve! Tomorrow is a new year!

	今晚是跨年夜！明天就是嶄新的一年了！

	Taipei is having a big New Year's Eve party tonight. Thousands of people are

	going! There will be famous people and great music. And Taipei 101 will have

	beautiful fireworks!

	台北今晚有一場超大的跨年派對，有好幾千人要參加！除了會有很多藝人出席，也會有好聽的音樂。最棒的是，台北

	101 會有漂亮的煙火秀！

	Did you know fireworks are more than 2,000 years old? Fireworks started in

	China. People threw bamboo into a fire and … BANG! The noise was very loud!

	最早的煙火開始在兩千多年前的中國。以前的人把竹子丟進火堆裡，發現會發出「劈劈啪啪」的聲音，讓大家又驚又喜。

	Fireworks went to Europe around 600 years ago. They were orange. Later they

	got new colors like green, red, yellow, and white!

	大約六百年前，煙火傳到了歐洲。一開始只有橘色的煙火，但後來慢慢出現了綠色、紅色、黃色跟白色！

	Taipei's New Year's Eve fireworks came 21 years ago. That was Taipei 101's

	grand opening day!

	台北 101 跨年煙火是在 21 年前開始，那天也是 101 正式開幕的日子。

	Taipei 101's fireworks shows are big! They are loud! They are colorful!

	Nineteen years ago, the show had 9,000 fireworks. Sixteen years ago, it had

	16,000. Fifteen years ago, it had 30,000!

	101 的煙火秀非常壯觀且繽紛。十九年前的煙火秀用了九千發煙火，十六年前是

	一萬六千發，之後繼續增加，十五年前放了三萬發！

	Enjoy Taipei 101's famous fireworks tonight! See you next year!

	________________________________________

	Vocabulary

	台北101的跨年煙火，每年都有新花樣，慶祝新年。

	1. color 顏色。

	I love fireworks! 我喜歡煙火! You feel the whole world is

	celebrating!你會覺得整個世界都在慶祝!

	I love the shining colors in the night sky.我喜歡夜空中亮晶晶的顏色。

	2. red 紅色，green 綠色。

	Colors like red and green.比如說紅色跟綠色。

	3. New Year's Eve 除夕。

	Why do we only have fireworks shows on New Year's

	Eve?為什麼我們只有除夕放煙火?

	That's not true. We have that on Valentine's Day too.不對，情人節也放。

	4. more than 比較多。

	We should have more than 2 fireworks shows a year. 應該比一年放兩次多。Let's

	have it every weekend! 我們來每個周末都放吧!

	Yeah, when you become the mayor. 好啊，你當了市長之後。

	你是不是已經記住今天的單字? color顏色 red紅色，green綠色 New Year's

	Eve除夕 more than比較多

	________________________________________

	Quiz

	1. What were the first fireworks made of?

	a. Bamboo

	b. China

	c. Colors

	2. What did fireworks get in Europe?

	a. A grand opening

	b. Orange

	c. New colors

	3. How many fireworks did Taipei 101's show have 15 years ago?

	a. 9,000

	b. 16,000

	c. 30,000

	Answers

	1. a

	2. c

	3. c

	c. 30,000

episodes.title: Women Go from Fishers to Farmers
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Women Go from Fishers to Farmers

	In an island country, some women fished. They fed their families the fish

	they caught. They sold their extra fish.

	在一個島國上，一群婦女靠捕魚維生。她們抓到的魚可以餵飽家人，多的魚可以拿去賣。

	Then a big ship hit rocks near the island! Tons of oil came out of the ship!

	The ocean turned black!

	有一天，一艘大船撞上海邊的礁石。大量的燃料油漏出來了，整片海洋都變黑了！

	The women could not fish. They could not feed their families. The women were

	worried. But they did not give up!

	沒辦法再去捕魚了，家人也會餓肚子。這群婦女都很擔憂，但她們沒有放棄。

	One woman showed people how to clean the ocean. They put hair and sugarcane

	leaves in long nets. They used the nets to catch the oil. But there was too

	much oil.

	一位婦女帶領大家一起清理海洋的油汙。她們把頭髮跟甘蔗葉放進長長的網袋裡，用這些網袋來吸油。但海上的油太多了，清不乾淨！

	How could the women feed their families? That woman had an idea. They could

	become farmers! She got some land for a farm.

	那這些婦女要怎麼養家呢？那位婦女想到解決辦法，就是去當農夫，種田維生！於是，她取得了一些農地。

	The women worked hard. Now, five years later, the farm is big. The women grow

	papayas, bananas, onions, taro, bok choy, and more. They feed their families

	the fruit and vegetables they grow. They sell their extra fruit and

	vegetables.

	這群婦女開始努力耕種。五年來她們在農地上種出了木瓜、香蕉、洋蔥、芋頭、小白菜等等農作物。這些產品除了能讓家人溫飽，多的也能拿去賣錢！

	The women thought they would always fish. But they had to do something new.

	And now they are happy farmers!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	本來是漁民的一群婦女，決定改行當農夫，結果大為成功。

	1. too much 太多。

	Here, have two bananas. 來，給你兩隻香蕉。

	Thank you, I like bananas. 謝謝，我喜歡香蕉。

	I can bring you a bunch if you want. 你要的話我可以帶給你一整串。

	No, that would be too much. 不用，那樣太多了。

	2. farmer 農夫。

	So you’re still a happy farmer? 所以你仍然是個快樂農夫?

	I sure am, even though I’m also an office worker.

	我的確是，雖然我也是個上班族。

	3. grow 種植。

	What else do you grow? 你還種些什麼?

	Tomatoes and cucumbers. 蕃茄跟小黃瓜。

	4. extra 多出來的。

	Sometimes I sell extra ones to my neighbors. 有時候我把多的賣給鄰居。

	At a very cheap price. 價錢特別便宜。

	你剛剛學到哪些單字?

	too much太多 farmer農夫 grow種植 extra多出來的

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. What came out of the ship?

	a. Oil

	b. Water

	c. Fish

	2. What did the women do first?

	a. Became farmers

	b. Cleaned the ocean

	c. Sold extra fruit

	3. What do the women grow?

	a. Apples

	b. Rice

	c. Bok choy

	Answers

	1. a

	2. b

	3. c

sections.story:
________________________________

	Women Go from Fishers to Farmers

	In an island country, some women fished. They fed their families the fish

	they caught. They sold their extra fish.

	在一個島國上，一群婦女靠捕魚維生。她們抓到的魚可以餵飽家人，多的魚可以拿去賣。

	Then a big ship hit rocks near the island! Tons of oil came out of the ship!

	The ocean turned black!

	有一天，一艘大船撞上海邊的礁石。大量的燃料油漏出來了，整片海洋都變黑了！

	The women could not fish. They could not feed their families. The women were

	worried. But they did not give up!

	沒辦法再去捕魚了，家人也會餓肚子。這群婦女都很擔憂，但她們沒有放棄。

	One woman showed people how to clean the ocean. They put hair and sugarcane

	leaves in long nets. They used the nets to catch the oil. But there was too

	much oil.

	一位婦女帶領大家一起清理海洋的油汙。她們把頭髮跟甘蔗葉放進長長的網袋裡，用這些網袋來吸油。但海上的油太多了，清不乾淨！

	How could the women feed their families? That woman had an idea. They could

	become farmers! She got some land for a farm.

	那這些婦女要怎麼養家呢？那位婦女想到解決辦法，就是去當農夫，種田維生！於是，她取得了一些農地。

	The women worked hard. Now, five years later, the farm is big. The women grow

	papayas, bananas, onions, taro, bok choy, and more. They feed their families

	the fruit and vegetables they grow. They sell their extra fruit and

	vegetables.

	這群婦女開始努力耕種。五年來她們在農地上種出了木瓜、香蕉、洋蔥、芋頭、小白菜等等農作物。這些產品除了能讓家人溫飽，多的也能拿去賣錢！

	The women thought they would always fish. But they had to do something new.

	And now they are happy farmers!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
sections.vocabulary:
Vocabulary

	本來是漁民的一群婦女，決定改行當農夫，結果大為成功。

	1. too much 太多。

	Here, have two bananas. 來，給你兩隻香蕉。

	Thank you, I like bananas. 謝謝，我喜歡香蕉。

	I can bring you a bunch if you want. 你要的話我可以帶給你一整串。

	No, that would be too much. 不用，那樣太多了。

	2. farmer 農夫。

	So you’re still a happy farmer? 所以你仍然是個快樂農夫?

	I sure am, even though I’m also an office worker.

	我的確是，雖然我也是個上班族。

	3. grow 種植。

	What else do you grow? 你還種些什麼?

	Tomatoes and cucumbers. 蕃茄跟小黃瓜。

	4. extra 多出來的。

	Sometimes I sell extra ones to my neighbors. 有時候我把多的賣給鄰居。

	At a very cheap price. 價錢特別便宜。

	你剛剛學到哪些單字?

	too much太多 farmer農夫 grow種植 extra多出來的

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	a. Oil

	b. Water

	c. Fish

	2. What did the women do first?

	a. Became farmers

	b. Cleaned the ocean

	c. Sold extra fruit

	3. What do the women grow?

	a. Apples

	b. Rice

	c. Bok choy

episodes.title: Taiwan's Drivers Help Baby Get to Hospital Safely
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Taiwan's Drivers Help Baby Get to Hospital Safely

	Babies start out very small. They are so small that they need lots of care

	and help.

	小嬰兒剛出生時都很小，他們需要很多照顧與幫忙。

	A baby was born too early in Tainan. She was in a hospital. Doctors were

	worried. She could not breathe well. She needed more care.

	在台南的一間醫院裡，有一個寶寶提早出生了。醫生們很擔心，因為她呼吸不順暢，需要比較多照顧。

	The baby had to go to another hospital. She was going by ambulance. But the

	hospital was three hours away. It was in Linkou!

	後來，寶寶必須到另一家在林口的醫院就診，但那家醫院很遠，坐救護車要三個小時才能到！

	The long ambulance ride would be hard for the baby. The ambulance might have

	to move for other cars. She could be hurt then. She needed more help.

	這麼長的路程對寶寶來說很危險。救護車在路上需要不停的閃躲其他車輛，而寶寶可能會因為這樣的晃動而受傷。

	The mom wrote a social media post. She asked people driving in Taiwan to let

	the baby's ambulance go first.

	於是，寶寶的媽媽在社群平台上發文，呼籲全台灣的駕駛看到救護車時要讓路。

	Almost a million people saw the post! Everyone wanted to help. The police

	helped! They drove in front of the ambulance. Cars let the ambulance go

	first. They helped the baby!

	將近一百萬人看到了那篇文章！大家都想一起幫助這個小寶寶。警察們開車在救護車前面開路，路上的車輛也都為救護車讓路！

	The baby got to the hospital. She wasn't hurt! Now she's growing well. It is

	thanks to her mom, her doctors, and Taiwan's helpful drivers!

	________________________________________

	Vocabulary

	在媽媽的呼籲下，駕駛紛紛讓路給小嬰兒救護車!

	1. post 訊息。

	Did you see the social media post? 有看到社群媒體上的訊息嗎?

	No, what happened? 沒有，怎麼了?

	A baby was born on the train! 有個嬰兒在火車上出生!

	2. doctor 醫生。

	On the train from Taitung to Taipei! 從台東到台北的火車!

	Wow, did the mother get any help? 哇，有沒有人幫媽媽?

	Yeah, a doctor just happened to be on that train. 有，有醫生剛好在火車上。

	3. get to 到達。

	Everything happened very fast! 一切都發生得好快! They said mom and baby got

	to the hospital. 他們說媽媽跟寶寶都到醫院了。

	4. well 很好地。

	They are both doing well. 兩個人的狀況都很好。That's very nice! 真好!

	來跟我一起讀單字。post訊息 doctor醫生 get to到達 well很好地

	________________________________________

	Quiz

	1. Where was the baby born?

	a. Tainan

	b. Taipei

	c. Linkou

	2. How long was the baby's ambulance ride?

	a. 2 hours

	b. 3 hours

	c. 4 hours

	3. What did the mom ask drivers to do?

	a. Go to the hospital with her baby

	b. Like her social media post

	c. Let her baby's ambulance go first

	Answers

	1. a

	2. b

	3. c

episodes.title: Kids Make Windows Safe for Birds
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Kids Make Windows Safe for Birds

	Oh, no! That beautiful bird is hurt! It flew into a shiny window. And it was

	flying fast! Ouch!

	糟糕！那隻漂亮的鳥撞上窗戶後受傷了！小鳥飛得很快，一定非常痛。

	In Nan'ao in Yilan, many birds were getting hurt in a park. They flew into

	the shiny windows on a building there. So the park had a day to help birds.

	Many kids came. They were 11 to 14 years old.

	在宜蘭南澳的一個公園裡，很多鳥會一直撞到建築物上亮晶晶的窗戶。於是有人辦了一個幫助小鳥不再受傷的活動，吸引了很多十幾歲的孩子來參加。

	Birds saw the sky and trees on the shiny windows. They wanted to fly there.

	So the kids drew on the windows. They used white markers.

	鳥看到窗戶裡反射的天空跟樹木，以為真的有東西在那裡，所以想飛過去。為了解決這個問題，孩子們開始在窗戶上畫畫。

	First, the kids drew small circles. There were about four centimeters between

	circles. Next, the kids drew flowers, trees, and animals.

	首先，他們用白色的筆在玻璃窗上畫好多個小圈圈，接著又畫上花草、樹木跟各種動物。

	Now, birds see the circles and drawings on the windows. They do not fly into

	the windows. The kids made the windows safe for birds! And they made the

	windows very cute! The kids are artists. They are heroes for birds too!

	現在，鳥看到玻璃窗上的這些圖案就不會再撞上去了。孩子們讓窗戶變得更安全、更可愛！他們不只是藝術家，還是小鳥們的英雄！

	There are many shiny windows around the world. Do you want to help birds?

	What do you want to draw on shiny windows?

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	在玻璃窗上畫一些圖案，小鳥就不會撞上去了。

	1. hurt 受傷的。

	Hey, did that bird just fly and hit the window? 嘿，那隻鳥剛剛飛去撞窗戶嗎?

	Yeah, but don't worry. 對，不過別擔心。

	It didn't get hurt.牠沒受傷。

	2. sky 天空。

	And it may come back and hit the window again. 而且牠還可能回來再撞。

	I wonder why. 我想知道為什麼。

	Birds see the sky in the window and think they can fly through.

	鳥兒看到玻璃窗反射的天空，以為可以飛過去。

	3. window 窗戶。

	Poor birds! 可憐的鳥。

	Yeah, but people can help. 對，不過人類可以幫忙。

	How? 怎麼幫?

	They can hang a cloth over the window. 他們可以在窗戶上掛一塊布。

	4. help 幫忙。

	That's easy.那很容易。

	I'll help. 我會幫忙。

	I love birds. 我喜歡鳥類。

	今天的單字很好記，來跟我一起讀。

	hurt受傷的 sky天空 window窗戶 help幫忙

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. What do birds fly into?

	a. Dirty windows

	b. Cute windows

	c. Shiny windows

	2. How old were the kids?

	a. 7 to 10 years old

	b. 11 to 14 years old

	c. 15 to 16 years old

	3. What did the kids draw first?

	a. Big trees

	b. Small circles

	c. Blue skies

	Answers

	1. c

	2. b

	3. b

episodes.title: “Granny Claus” Makes 1000th Christmas Shoebox Gift
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	“Granny Claus” Makes 1000th Christmas Shoebox Gift

	Santa: Ho-ho-ho! Merry Christmas!

	Narrator: Everyone knows Santa Claus! But how about “Granny Claus”?

	大家都認識聖誕老公公，但你認識「聖誕老奶奶」嗎？

	Granny: Eh?!

	Narrator: Well, that's not her real name. But she is a grandmother. She lives

	in Ireland. She makes gifts all year. She gives them to kids for Christmas …

	like Santa!

	「聖誕老奶奶」不是她的真名，不過她真的是一位奶奶！這位住在愛爾蘭的奶奶一整年都在準備禮物。她在聖誕節把這些禮物送給小朋友，就跟聖誕老公公一樣！

	Granny Claus works with a charity. It helps kids in Africa and Eastern

	Europe. It sends her gifts to them. She thinks every kid should have a

	Christmas gift!

	聖誕老奶奶會跟一個慈善團體合作，把她的禮物送到非洲跟東歐。奶奶覺得每個小孩都應該在聖誕節收到禮物！

	Granny Claus makes shoebox gifts. She puts colored pencils, notebooks, pens,

	candy, toys, and more in shoeboxes!

	奶奶把彩色鉛筆、筆記本、原子筆、糖果、玩具等等放進禮物鞋盒裡面。

	Santa's elves help him. Granny Claus's family and friends help her. Her

	six-year-old granddaughter is her best helper. Her supermarket helps too. It

	gives her candy for her shoeboxes!

	聖誕老公公有小精靈會幫忙，而聖誕老奶奶也有很多好幫手！奶奶的親朋好友都會一起加入準備，當地的超市也會送奶奶糖果，讓她放進鞋盒裡。

	Granny Claus makes 100 Christmas shoeboxes every year. This is her tenth

	year. She has made 1,000 kids happy!

	聖誕老奶奶每年都做 100 個聖誕鞋盒。今年是她第十年準備禮物！

	Does Granny Claus take a break after her shoeboxes are done? No-ho-ho, she

	starts making next year's shoebox gifts!

	________________________________________

	Vocabulary

	耶誕老奶奶喜歡親手做禮物送給小朋友。

	1. gift 禮物。

	I need to think about what gift to give my son. 我需要思考送我兒子什麼禮物。

	2. toy 玩具。

	Toys? 玩具如何?

	He already has too many toys.他已經有太多玩具了。

	Goodies like chocolate, chips, or cookies? 好吃的比如說巧克力，洋芋片，餅乾?

	No, bad for his teeth.不了，對牙齒不好。

	3. give 給予。

	Gee, you’re not making this easy. 你很難搞耶。

	I know, but how about giving him a Christmas card?

	我知道，但是送他耶誕卡怎麼樣?

	That’s not a gift! 那不是禮物!

	4. love 喜愛。

	A card is a gift. 卡片是禮物。

	No, it’s not. You can’t play with it.不是，你不能玩卡片。

	A puppy, then.那送一隻小狗。

	Oh, he’ll love that! 他會喜歡的!

	你喜歡什麼禮物呢?

	gift禮物 toy玩具 give給予 love喜愛

	________________________________________

	Quiz

	1. Where does Granny Claus live?

	a. Ireland

	b. Iceland

	c. In Santa's house

	2. Who gets Granny Claus’ gifts?

	a. Kids in Asia

	b. Kids in Australia

	c. Kids in Africa

	3. How many shoebox gifts does Granny Claus make every year?

	a. 10 gifts

	b. 100 gifts

	c. 1,000 gifts

	Answers

	1. a

	2. c

	3. b

sections.story:
________________________________

	“Granny Claus” Makes 1000th Christmas Shoebox Gift

	Santa: Ho-ho-ho! Merry Christmas!

	Narrator: Everyone knows Santa Claus! But how about “Granny Claus”?

	大家都認識聖誕老公公，但你認識「聖誕老奶奶」嗎？

	Granny: Eh?!

	Narrator: Well, that's not her real name. But she is a grandmother. She lives

	in Ireland. She makes gifts all year. She gives them to kids for Christmas …

	like Santa!

	「聖誕老奶奶」不是她的真名，不過她真的是一位奶奶！這位住在愛爾蘭的奶奶一整年都在準備禮物。她在聖誕節把這些禮物送給小朋友，就跟聖誕老公公一樣！

	Granny Claus works with a charity. It helps kids in Africa and Eastern

	Europe. It sends her gifts to them. She thinks every kid should have a

	Christmas gift!

	聖誕老奶奶會跟一個慈善團體合作，把她的禮物送到非洲跟東歐。奶奶覺得每個小孩都應該在聖誕節收到禮物！

	Granny Claus makes shoebox gifts. She puts colored pencils, notebooks, pens,

	candy, toys, and more in shoeboxes!

	奶奶把彩色鉛筆、筆記本、原子筆、糖果、玩具等等放進禮物鞋盒裡面。

	Santa's elves help him. Granny Claus's family and friends help her. Her

	six-year-old granddaughter is her best helper. Her supermarket helps too. It

	gives her candy for her shoeboxes!

	聖誕老公公有小精靈會幫忙，而聖誕老奶奶也有很多好幫手！奶奶的親朋好友都會一起加入準備，當地的超市也會送奶奶糖果，讓她放進鞋盒裡。

	Granny Claus makes 100 Christmas shoeboxes every year. This is her tenth

	year. She has made 1,000 kids happy!

	聖誕老奶奶每年都做 100 個聖誕鞋盒。今年是她第十年準備禮物！

	Does Granny Claus take a break after her shoeboxes are done? No-ho-ho, she

	starts making next year's shoebox gifts!

	________________________________________
sections.vocabulary:
Vocabulary

	耶誕老奶奶喜歡親手做禮物送給小朋友。

	1. gift 禮物。

	I need to think about what gift to give my son. 我需要思考送我兒子什麼禮物。

	2. toy 玩具。

	Toys? 玩具如何?

	He already has too many toys.他已經有太多玩具了。

	Goodies like chocolate, chips, or cookies? 好吃的比如說巧克力，洋芋片，餅乾?

	No, bad for his teeth.不了，對牙齒不好。

	3. give 給予。

	Gee, you’re not making this easy. 你很難搞耶。

	I know, but how about giving him a Christmas card?

	我知道，但是送他耶誕卡怎麼樣?

	That’s not a gift! 那不是禮物!

	4. love 喜愛。

	A card is a gift. 卡片是禮物。

	No, it’s not. You can’t play with it.不是，你不能玩卡片。

	A puppy, then.那送一隻小狗。

	Oh, he’ll love that! 他會喜歡的!

	你喜歡什麼禮物呢?

	gift禮物 toy玩具 give給予 love喜愛

	________________________________________
sections.quiz:
Quiz

	1. Where does Granny Claus live?

	a. Ireland

	b. Iceland

	c. In Santa's house

	2. Who gets Granny Claus’ gifts?

	a. Kids in Asia

	b. Kids in Australia

	c. Kids in Africa

	3. How many shoebox gifts does Granny Claus make every year?

	a. 10 gifts

	b. 100 gifts

	c. 1,000 gifts

episodes.title: Island Helps Lobsters
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Island Helps Lobsters

	There is a small island in an ocean. It is far away from everything. The next

	island with people is two thousand four hundred kilometers away!

	在海中有一座小島。這座島與世隔絕，離它最近的島也有兩千四百公里！

	Two hundred twenty-nine people live there. Why? They live there because of

	lobsters!

	因為龍蝦的緣故，還是有229個人住在這個小島上。

	Early in the morning, boats leave the island. Fishers catch lobsters with

	cages and nets. The fishers sell these tasty lobsters for lots of money.

	每天清晨，漁船會從島上出發。漁夫用籠子跟網子來抓龍蝦，再把美味的龍蝦賣出去，賺大錢。

	Long ago, many lobsters lived in the ocean there. People at a beach could

	catch one!

	很久以前，這邊的海裡有很多龍蝦。到海邊玩的人都能隨手抓到一隻龍蝦！

	But there were too many boats. They caught too many lobsters. Every year, the

	ocean had fewer lobsters. People on the island were worried. They had nothing

	else to sell. So they made some rules. The rules help lobsters.

	後來，人們過度捕撈龍蝦，導致海裡的龍蝦逐年減少。島上的人擔心沒有別的東西可以賣，所以就制定了一些規則。

	Now, fishers are told how many lobsters they can catch. They cannot catch too

	many. They must put small lobsters back into the ocean too. Each year, people

	check how many lobsters there are.

	現在漁夫抓龍蝦有數量限制，還要把還沒長大的龍蝦放生回海裡。

	People learned they cannot catch too many lobsters. Now they are helping

	lobsters!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	龍蝦很珍貴，小島的居民依賴這種海產維持生計。

	1. tasty 美味的。

	The best lobster I've ever had 我吃過的最好的龍蝦

	is at a fishing port near Keelung. 是在基隆附近的漁港。

	It's so tasty! 真好吃呢!

	Of course, that's where fishers live.當然啦，漁夫就住在那裏。

	2. in the morning 在早上。

	They go out very early in the morning to catch lobsters.

	他們一大早就出發去捕龍蝦。

	3. far away 很遠。

	I've heard some lobsters come from far away. 我聽說有的龍蝦來自遠方。

	Maybe, but the good ones are caught nearby.也許吧，不過好吃的都是在附近抓的。

	4. tell 告訴。

	And let me tell you, 我跟你說，the best way to cook a lobster is to steam it.

	龍蝦最好的吃法是蒸熟。

	With garlic. 跟大蒜一起。

	請跟我讀單字。

	tasty美味的 in the morning在早上 far away很遠 tell告訴

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. How many people live on the island?

	a. 29

	b. 129

	c. 229

	2. What did people do because there were fewer lobsters?

	a. Cooked lobsters

	b. Made rules

	c. Went to the beach

	3. What do fishers do with small lobsters now?

	a. Give them to friends

	b. Eat them for lunch

	c. Put them back in the ocean

	Answers

	1. c

	2. b

	3. c

episodes.title: Man Pulls Tons with His Teeth
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Man Pulls Tons with His Teeth

	There's a very strong man in Egypt. He pulled a 279-ton train. He used his

	teeth to pull it!

	在埃及有一個超級強壯的男人。他可以用牙齒拖動一列 279 噸重的火車！

	People love him. He's famous! Kids run after him in the street! They call him

	"strong man."

	他很有名，大家都很喜歡他！小朋友在街上看到他都會追著他跑。大家都叫他「大力士」。

	The man wanted to do something more amazing than pulling the train with his

	teeth. But first he had to get ready. He exercised for six hours every day.

	He ate twelve eggs, two chickens, and five kilograms of fish every day.

	這位大力士想做更厲害的表演，但他得先做好準備。他每天除了運動六個小時之外，還會吃十二顆蛋、兩隻雞，跟五公斤的魚。

	Then the man was ready. He wanted to pull a 700-ton ship. He used his teeth

	again! He pulled and pulled! He grunted and yelled! And the man pulled the

	ship!

	他終於準備好了。這一次，他想拉動一艘 700

	噸的船。他咬緊牙關用力的拉啊拉！最後，他真的把船拉動了！

	Then the man did something more amazing than pulling one ship with his teeth.

	He pulled two ships with his teeth! Together, the two ships weighed 1,150

	tons!

	接著，他竟然用牙齒拉動兩艘船，加起來有 1,150 噸那麼重！

	What is the most amazing thing? He kept all his teeth! What will this strong

	man with strong teeth pull next?

	________________________________________

	Vocabulary

	埃及這位大力士喜歡挑戰自己的牙齒和力氣。

	1. strong 強壯的。

	I've made a decision. 我做了一個決定。

	I'll only eat food that makes me strong. 我將只吃會讓我強壯的食物。

	2. egg 雞蛋。

	Oh, like what? Magic beans? 比如說什麼，魔術豆嗎?

	No, chicken and eggs. 不是，雞肉跟雞蛋。

	Don't forget fish. 別忘了吃魚。

	3. every day 每天。

	You're right, fish too. 你說得對，也要吃魚。

	So do you plan to eat them every day? 所以你打算每天都吃那些?

	Of course. 當然。

	4. together 在一起。

	And we'll also exercise together.我們也要一起做運動。

	Wait, you mean you and I together? 等一等? 你跟我一起?

	Yeah, don't you want to get strong? 對啊，你不想變強壯嗎?

	No, I hate exercising! 不想! 我討厭運動。

	我們來讀讀單字。

	strong強壯的 egg雞蛋 every day每天 together在一起

	________________________________________

	Quiz

	1. What do kids call the man?

	a. Big Man

	b. Strong Man

	c. Amazing Man

	2. How heavy was one of the ships?

	a. 100 tons

	b. 700 tons

	c. 1,150 tons

	3. What did the man eat twelve of every day?

	a. Eggs

	b. Chickens

	c. Fish

	Answers

	1. b

	2. b

	3. a

episodes.title: Orcas Play with Boats
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Orcas Play with Boats

	Orcas live in the ocean. They are black and white. They are also called

	"killer whales." They are whales, and they are the biggest dolphins in the

	world. They weigh three to six tons.

	全身黑白的虎鯨生活在海中，也被稱作為「殺人鯨」！虎鯨是海豚科內體型最大的物種，重量可以高達三到六噸！

	People love to watch orcas in the ocean. Orcas are friendly. They like to

	play. They like to swim with boats!

	人們喜歡觀察虎鯨在海中嬉戲。虎鯨很友善，會繞著船隻游來游去。

	But some orcas surprised some people on a boat. They hit the boat many times!

	They broke off a piece under the boat! It made a hole! Water came into the

	boat!

	但有些虎鯨撞到船，在船的底部撞出一個大洞。海水灌進船身內，船上的乘客都嚇壞了！

	The orcas swam away. The boat went down into the ocean. Another boat saved

	the people.

	後來船就沉了，還好另一艘船救了受到驚嚇的乘客。

	Why did the orcas hit the boat? Scientists think they were having fun! They

	were playing a game! The game is breaking off the piece under the boat!

	為什麼虎鯨要撞船呢？科學家認為，這是虎鯨玩的一種遊戲！遊戲的玩法就是撞擊船底，讓碎片掉下來。

	Orcas play this game a lot. In four years, they played it 700 times. They

	damaged more than 250 boats! Seven boats went down into the ocean.

	虎鯨很喜歡這個遊戲。四年之中他們撞壞了250多艘船，其中有七艘船因此而沉沒！

	Orcas like playing games! But three-ton orcas playing a game with boats can

	be dangerous! Aaaaahhh! Help!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	虎鯨喜歡玩耍，但是有時候人類會受害。

	1) whale 鯨魚。

	I had the most exciting trip yesterday! 我昨天的旅行超精彩的!

	Yeah? Where did you go? 是喔，你去了哪裡?

	I went whale watching off of Hualien! 我去花蓮外海賞鯨!

	2) fun 樂趣。

	Oh, that's something I've always wanted to do! 我一直想去賞鯨的!

	You really should do it. 你真的應該去。

	We had so much fun! 我們玩得超開心!

	3) dolphin 海豚。

	How many whales did you see? 你看到幾隻鯨魚?

	Two, a mother and a calf. 兩隻，媽媽和寶寶。

	AND we also saw more than 10 dolphins! 還看到十幾隻海豚!

	4) swim 游泳。

	Those dolphins are playful! 那些海豚很愛玩喔!

	They swam so fast and jumped up and down. 他們游得好快，還會上下跳。

	你有看過鯨魚嗎?

	whale鯨魚 fun樂趣 dolphin海豚 swim游泳

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. What is another name for orcas?

	a. Killer fish

	b. Killer dolphins

	c. Killer whales

	2. What happened to the people on the boat?

	a. Another boat saved them.

	b. They swam away.

	c. The orcas ate them.

	3. What is the game?

	a. Saving pieces of boats

	b. Breaking off the piece under the boat

	c. Swimming with a piece of the boat

	Answers

	1. c

	2. a

	3. b

	I went whale watching off of Hualien! 我去花蓮外海賞鯨!

	2) fun 樂趣。

	Oh, that's something I've always wanted to do! 我一直想去賞鯨的!

	You really should do it. 你真的應該去。

	We had so much fun! 我們玩得超開心!

	3) dolphin 海豚。

	How many whales did you see? 你看到幾隻鯨魚?

	Two, a mother and a calf. 兩隻，媽媽和寶寶。

	AND we also saw more than 10 dolphins! 還看到十幾隻海豚!

	4) swim 游泳。

	Those dolphins are playful! 那些海豚很愛玩喔!

	They swam so fast and jumped up and down. 他們游得好快，還會上下跳。

	你有看過鯨魚嗎?

	whale鯨魚 fun樂趣 dolphin海豚 swim游泳

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
sections.quiz:
Quiz

	1. What is another name for orcas?

	a. Killer fish

	b. Killer dolphins

	c. Killer whales

	2. What happened to the people on the boat?

	a. Another boat saved them.

	b. They swam away.

	c. The orcas ate them.

	3. What is the game?

	a. Saving pieces of boats

	b. Breaking off the piece under the boat

	c. Swimming with a piece of the boat

episodes.title: One Sea's Seagrass Balls Can Hold Many Plastic Pieces
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	One Sea's Seagrass Balls Can Hold Many Plastic Pieces

	There is a big sea. It is below Europe and above Africa. It has big flat

	places on the bottom. They are meadows.

	在歐洲跟非洲大陸的中間有一片叫做地中海的海域。地中海海底有很多寬闊的草原。

	The meadows have seagrass. Seagrass has long green leaves. Fish swim there.

	Crabs crawl there. It is a quiet, safe home for them.

	海底草原有長長的海草。對這些小魚跟螃蟹來說，這裡是安靜又安全的家。

	But the waves bring plastic. The plastic is from bags, bottles, and other

	trash. The plastic breaks into smaller and smaller pieces in the sea. It

	makes the sea dirty.

	但是海浪也會帶來塑膠垃圾。塑膠袋和塑膠瓶被海水打成小小的碎片，汙染海洋。

	But seagrass leaves can catch many very small plastic pieces. The leaves help

	clean the sea!

	海草的長葉子可以困住這些小碎片，淨化海水！

	When seagrass gets old, the leaves fall off. They roll and roll together.

	They become brown balls. These are called Neptune balls. Neptune balls can

	hold many very small plastic pieces!

	等海草變老後，葉子就會掉下來。葉子在水裡一直滾動，最後變成棕色的球，叫做「海神球」。海神球裡面可以藏好多塑膠小碎片！

	When the waves are big, they push some Neptune balls to beaches. The sea

	gives people's plastic trash back to them!

	當海浪很大時，海神球會被推到沙灘上，就像大海把人類的塑膠垃圾還回來一樣！

	Neptune balls cannot clean all the plastic in the sea. But they are one way

	nature helps the sea!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	不起眼的海草，卻有很好的環保功能。

	1. beach 海灘。

	Don't you love coming to the beach on a winter day? 冬天來海灘不是好開心嗎?

	It's so nice and quiet here. 這裡這麼好這麼安靜。

	2. quiet 安靜的。

	It's not entirely quiet. 並沒有那麼安靜。

	But yeah, it's nice.但是確實很好。

	It would be better without these dirty bottles. 沒有這些髒瓶子會更好。

	3. wave 海浪。

	I know. But I'm afraid to pick them up. 我知道，但我怕把它們撿起來。

	It's a bit gross. 有點噁。

	Some of this trash was brought by the waves. 有些垃圾是海浪帶來的。

	4. sea 大海。

	Yeah, I just wish they brought seashells instead of trash from the sea.

	對啊，我只希望海浪帶來貝殼而不是海裡的垃圾。

	你喜歡海灘嗎?

	beach海灘 quiet安靜的 wave海浪 sea大海

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. What is a quiet, safe home for fish and crabs?

	a. Beaches

	b. Seagrass meadows

	c. Africa

	2. Where are Neptune balls made of?

	a. Plastic bottles

	b. Seagrass leaves

	c. Fish and crabs

	3. What pushes Neptune balls onto beaches?

	a. Old seagrass

	b. Plastic trash

	c. Big waves

	Answers

	1. b

	2. b

	3. c

episodes.title: Man Gives Rewards for Good Grades
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Man Gives Rewards for Good Grades

	You study hard at school. What makes you study? Do rewards for good grades

	make you study?

	你在學校努力學習是為了什麼？如果好成績可以換來獎勵的話，你會更認真嗎？

	In New York City in the U.S., a man has a small food shop. He loves when kids

	get good grades! They bring him their tests and report cards. He looks at

	their grades. Then he gives them rewards! Kids get their favorite snacks!

	在美國紐約，有一間食品店老闆喜歡看到小朋友得到好成績！小朋友會把考卷跟成績單拿給他看。如果他們成績不錯，老闆就會給他們好吃的零食作為獎勵！

	When their grade is ninety percent or more, the man gives kids the biggest

	reward. They get snacks, a T-shirt, and about three thousand Taiwan dollars!

	如果成績達到九十分以上，老闆就會送出最大獎！最大獎包括零食，一件T-shirt，還有大概三千塊台幣！

	The man also gives rewards for other things, like going to school every day.

	老闆也會獎勵每天都準時去上學的小朋友！

	Why does the man do this? Well, he is from Yemen. Yemen is far away. He has

	three kids there. He misses them a lot. He thinks of them when he gives

	rewards to kids.

	老闆為什麼要這樣做？原來他來自遙遠的葉門，他的三個小孩都在葉門，他非常想念他們。每次給小朋友獎勵時，他都會想到自己的孩子。

	People on social media see kids get rewards. They like this! They want to

	help. They give the man money. Now he can give rewards to more kids!

	很多人看到這件事後想幫忙，就捐錢給老闆。這樣一來，老闆就可以獎勵更多認真的小朋友！

	Do you want a shop like this near you? Would rewards make your grades go up?

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	食品店的老闆提供獎品給好好上學讀書的小孩。

	1. grade 分數。

	My son is getting good grades this semester! 我兒子這學期分數不錯。

	Good for him! 真好!

	Yeah, I think he finally realizes school is not a playground.

	對啊，我想他終於覺悟學校不是遊戲場。

	2. school 學校。

	For my son, school is an on-and-off thing. 對我兒子來說學校可去可不去。

	He only goes to school when he feels like it. 他只有想上學時才去上。

	3. report card 成績單。

	Is that good? 那樣好嗎?

	Well, I'm a work-from-home mom. 我是在家上班的媽媽。

	I don't mind. 我不介意。

	Do you look at his report card? 你看不看他的成績單?

	4. test 考試。

	I do. He does well on all his tests. 我會看，他的考試成績都不錯。

	這些單字你記住了嗎? grade分數 school學校 report card成績單 test考試

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. Where is the shop?

	a. The U.S.

	b. Yemen

	c. Taiwan

	2. What can kids bring to the man to get rewards?

	a. Lots of money

	b. A report card

	c. Their favorite snacks

	3. Why do people on social media give the man money?

	a. To get good grades

	b. To buy their favorite snacks

	c. To help more kids get rewards

	Answers

	1. a

	2. b

	3. c
