episodes.title: A Dog's Last Day at Work
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	A Dog's Last Day at Work

	In Taipei, a big black dog worked in a hospital. He was the first dog to do

	this in Taiwan.

	有一隻大黑狗在台北的醫院工作。牠是台灣第一隻在醫院工作的狗！

	The dog went almost everywhere in the hospital. The hospital boss said it was

	okay! He liked the dog. He said the dog helped the hospital feel warm and

	calm.

	院長允許這隻狗在醫院裡到處走來走去。他很喜歡這隻狗，他說狗狗讓醫院變得更溫暖、更安詳。

	The dog helped very sick people. He made them feel calm. They touched him.

	They hugged him. Some liked to sleep with him. He made their families smile!

	這隻狗會陪伴生重病的人，讓他們安心。病人會摸摸牠、抱抱牠，有的人甚至喜歡和牠一起睡覺。狗狗也能讓病人家屬露出笑容！

	The big black dog worked at the hospital for six years. Then he was ten years

	old. It was time for him to stop working. The hospital had a big party for

	him. It was on his last day of work.

	這隻狗狗在醫院工作了六年之後，在十歲那年退休了。醫院在牠上班的最後一天為牠辦了一個大派對！

	Many people came to the party. More than forty people who had been sick came

	with their families. More than fifty hospital workers came too!

	很多人都來參加這個派對。出席的除了五十多位醫院的員工之外，還有四十多位治癒的病人和他們的家人！

	The hospital gave the dog a medal. Everyone clapped and cheered for him. They

	thanked him.

	醫院頒給這隻狗一面獎牌，所有人都為牠拍手叫好，感謝牠的努力！

	The dog kept his hospital ID card. He will visit sometimes. He will see his

	friends again!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	這條在醫院工作的狗，得到好多病人的喜愛。

	1. touch 觸摸。

	Look at that big dog! 你看那隻大狗! He looks so friendly! 他看起來真友善! He

	does.沒錯。

	I want to touch his fur. 我想摸摸他的毛。

	2. warm 溫暖的。

	Can I touch him? 我可以摸他嗎?

	Sure, go ahead. 當然可以。

	Hi, buddy! You're so cute! 嗨，小朋友，你好可愛! Dogs give such a warm

	feeling! 狗狗給人好溫暖的感覺!

	3. smile 微笑。

	I used to have a dog, Charlie.我以前有一條狗叫做查理。He often smiled when he

	saw me.他看到我時都會笑。

	No kidding. 真的喔。

	4. friend 朋友。

	Charlie was my best friend. 查理是我最好的朋友。I cried so hard when he

	disappeared.牠不見了我哭得好傷心。

	這些單字很有用喔。touch觸摸 warm溫暖的 smile微笑 friend朋友

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. What does the dog look like?

	a. He is big and black.

	b. He is small and white.

	c. He is small and black.

	2. How did the dog help sick people?

	a. Made them calm

	b. Gave them medicine

	c. Took them for walks

	3. What did the hospital give the dog at the party?

	a. An ID card

	b. A medal

	c. A bed

	Answers

	1. a

	2. a

	3. b

episodes.title: Hundreds of Europeans Are Learning Taiwanese Languages
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Hundreds of Europeans Are Learning Taiwanese Languages

	How many languages do you speak? Maybe you speak three: a Taiwanese language,

	Mandarin Chinese, and English! Maybe you speak more than three!

	你會說幾種語言呢？也許你會一種台灣的方言、中文，還有英文！也許你會的還不只這三種！

	Mandarin Chinese and English are the most spoken languages in the world. You

	can speak with many, many people! You can learn about many countries.

	中文和英文是全世界最普遍使用的語言。你可以用這兩種話跟很多人聊天，認識不同的國家。

	Taiwan has many languages. People learning one can also learn about Taiwan.

	台灣有很多種方言。學習台灣的方言能讓人更了解台灣！

	In France, a school has Taiwanese language courses. Taiwanese teachers teach

	them. There are 28 courses.

	有一所法國學校開了由台灣老師教的台灣語言課程，總共有 28 門課。

	Five courses are on Hoklo. Two are on Taiwanese Hakka. Eight are on Taiwanese

	indigenous languages: Amis, Atayal, Bunun, Hla'alua, Paiwan, Puyuma, Rukai,

	Saisiyat, and Truku. Thirteen are on Taiwanese Mandarin.

	其中有 5 門是閩南話、2 門教客家話，還有 8

	門是台灣原住民民族語課。除此之外，還有 13 門中文課！

	Hundreds of European students are taking these classes! Most want to learn

	about Taiwan. Some have family in Taiwan. They also want to know them better.

	好幾百位歐洲學生在上這些課！這些學生想更了解台灣，也有一些人有台灣親戚，所以經由學習語言更了解他們。

	Soon, hundreds of Europeans will speak a Taiwanese language! Su? la*!

	*TRANSLATION

	Su? la (Taiwanese Hokkien) = ?啦 = "Good job!"

	________________________________________

	Vocabulary

	法國的學校不但教學生中文，還有各種台灣的方言。

	1. how many 有幾個，或者多少。

	How many languages do you want to learn this year? 你今年想學幾種語言?

	At least 2! 至少兩種。

	2. course 課程。

	I even signed up for a Spanish course yesterday.我昨天甚至還報名了西班牙課。

	Wow, very ambitious! 真有野心!

	3. European 歐洲的。

	So you'll learn 3 different languages.所以你要學三種不同的語言。

	Right, because I'm traveling to 3 European

	countries.對，因為我要去三個歐洲國家旅行。

	4. teacher 老師。

	Will your teacher tell you how to say, 你的老師會不會教你怎麼說:"Help! I'm

	lost!"? [幫幫我，我迷路了]?

	I'd like to learn "Help! I'm hungry." 我想學的是[幫幫我，我肚子餓]。

	你今天學到哪些單字? how many有幾個，或者多少 course課程 European歐洲的

	teacher老師

	________________________________________

	Quiz

	1. What is one of the most spoken languages in the world?

	a. Taiwanese Mandarin

	b. Mandarin Chinese

	c. European

	2. Where can you learn a Taiwanese language in Europe?

	a. Taiwan

	b. France

	c. China

	3. How many Taiwanese language courses does the school have?

	a. Two

	b. Twenty-eight

	c. Hundreds

	Answers

	1. b

	2. b

	3. b

	你會說幾種語言呢？也許你會一種台灣的方言、中文，還有英文！也許你會的還不只這三種！

episodes.title: Woman Fights Alligator to Save Puppy
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Woman Fights Alligator to Save Puppy

	Alligators are dangerous. They have long, strong jaws. Their jaws have many

	teeth. They can eat small animals like cats and dogs!

	美洲鱷魚很危險，牠強而有力的大嘴巴有很多牙齒，能夠獵食小動物。

	In the U.S., a woman had a young dog. The puppy wore a collar around its neck.

	美國有一名女子養了一隻幼犬，牠的脖子上戴著項圈。

	One day, they walked by a small river. Then an alligator jumped out of the

	water! It bit the puppy's collar. Then it took the puppy under the water! Oh

	no!

	有一天，這名女子在河邊遛狗。突然間，一隻鱷魚從水中一躍而出，咬住了狗狗的項圈，把狗拖下水！

	The woman wanted to save her puppy. She hit the alligator many times. She hit

	it in the eye. Bam! Bam!

	Ouch! That hurt! The alligator let the puppy go. The puppy was safe! But the

	alligator's teeth cut the woman's arm.

	為了拯救她的小狗，女主人全力反擊。她揮拳痛打鱷魚，對著牠的眼睛一次一次打，終於讓鱷魚鬆口!

	小狗逃過一劫，但是女主人的手臂不幸被咬傷！

	The alligator was about one hundred fifty centimeters long. But the woman was

	strong. She put the alligator on its back. It could not move. Then she ran to

	her house with her puppy! They were safe!

	這隻美洲鱷身長一百五十公分，但這名女子很強壯，她把鱷魚翻過來四腳朝天，使牠無法動彈，然後帶著小狗趕快回家！

	This puppy was lucky. The woman had a fight with an alligator for him!

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	兇猛的美洲鱷，碰上救狗心切的女主人也不是對手。

	1. jaw 下顎。

	Did you grow a beard? 你長了鬍子?

	Ha ha, very funny! 好笑。

	No, I fell and hurt my jaw.沒有啦，我跌倒了，傷到我的下顎。

	2. neck 脖子。

	Wow, that must be painful! 哇，一定很痛!

	Not as painful as my neck. 沒有我的脖子痛。

	3. run 跑步。

	Did you see a doctor? 你有去看醫生嗎?

	I did. He told me to stop running for a while. 有啊，他叫我暫時停止跑步。

	So you fell when you were running? 所以你是在跑步時跌倒的?

	Yeah, in the park. 對，在公園裡。

	4. teeth 牙齒。

	Luckily all my teeth are still here. 運氣不錯，牙齒都還在。

	That is lucky! 確實好運!

	Fixing teeth can be very expensive. 修補牙齒會很花錢呢!

	今天的單字很好記。

	jaw下顎 neck脖子 run跑步 teeth牙齒

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. What did the alligator want to take?

	a. The woman's cat

	b. The woman's puppy

	c. The woman's arm

	2. Where did the woman punch the alligator?

	a. On the nose

	b. On the jaw

	c. In the eye

	3. How long was the alligator?

	a. Fifty centimeters

	b. One hundred centimeters

	c. One hundred fifty centimeters

	Answers

	1. b

	2. c

	3. c

episodes.title: A Road Sport in Ireland
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	A Road Sport in Ireland

	Every year, a small town in Ireland has an exciting sports contest. It's on

	two kilometers of a road! For three days, everyone has fun … road bowling?

	每年，愛爾蘭的一個小鎮都會舉辦為期三天的道路保齡球比賽！

	The “King and Queen of the Roads” is the world's biggest road bowling

	contest. People come from around the world to bowl. Thousands come to watch!

	「道路國王皇后冠軍賽」是世界上規模最大的道路保齡球比賽。每年都有好幾千人從世界各地趕到愛爾蘭來欣賞比賽！

	Road bowling is like bowling. But the balls are metal. And they are small,

	like tennis balls.

	道路保齡球跟一般保齡球很像，但道路保齡球的球是鐵做的，而且只有網球那麼大！

	Players take turns. They run a few steps. Then they throw their ball. It

	rolls on the road.

	This road has many surprises! It has bumps! It turns a little to the right!

	It turns a little to the left! The ball rolls and rolls.

	比賽時，參賽者輪流上場。他們先跑幾步，再把鐵球丟出去！路上有各種坑洞和突起，還彎來彎去的。球在馬路上不斷地滾阿滾！

	Players want to get to the finish line. Some players need to throw their ball

	many times. Some need to throw their ball a few times. The player who throws

	the fewest times wins!

	大家都想第一個讓球到達終點線。有人要丟很多次球才到得了，但有人只丟幾次就成功！次數最少的人就是冠軍！

	Boys and girls, men and women like road bowling. And the contest is like a

	big party on the road! Hooray for the King and Queen of the Roads!

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	愛爾蘭的道路保齡球大賽，每年都吸引大批觀眾。

	1. bowl 打保齡球。

	You look tired.你看起來好累。

	I am tired. 我是很累。

	What did you do? 你做什麼了?

	I went bowling last night.我昨晚去打保齡球。

	I didn’t know you’re into bowling.我不知道你喜歡保齡球。

	2. contest 比賽。

	I’m not.我是不喜歡。

	But my roommate insisted that I join the contest.

	但是我的室友堅持要我參加比賽。

	3. roll 滾動。

	So what happened? 結果發生什麼事?

	What happened? 什麼事?

	The ball just rolled and rolled without hitting anything!

	球一直滾呀滾，根本沒碰到任何東西!

	4. throw 扔。

	Every time you threw the ball? 你每次把球丟出去都這樣?

	Almost every time! 幾乎每次!

	You know what? 你知道嗎?

	Try playing baseball.換成打棒球吧。

	來一起讀單字。

	bowl打保齡球 contest比賽 roll滾動 throw扔

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. How long does the road bowling contest last?

	a. One day

	b. Two days

	c. Three days

	2. What are road bowling balls made of?

	a. Metal

	b. Plastic

	c. Paper

	3. Who wins the contest?

	a. The person with the fastest throws

	b. The person with the fewest throws

	c. The person with the most throws

	Answers

	1. c

	2. a

	3. b

episodes.title: Drones Help Fight Mosquitoes
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Drones Help Fight Mosquitoes

	Aaagh! Mosquitoes are everywhere! They are a big problem in many countries.

	They carry sicknesses. They like to bite people. Millions of people get sick

	from mosquito bites every year.

	到處都是蚊子！蚊子會叮人，散布病菌。每年都有好幾百萬人因為蚊子叮咬而生病。

	People fight mosquitoes in many ways. Now there are some new ways! People use

	drones.

	人們用各種方式對抗蚊子。現在，連無人機都可以作為對抗蚊子的工具！

	Drones can go anywhere. They can go to rivers and fields. They can go to

	gardens and the top of houses. They fly high and low.

	無人機可以飛到很多地方。他們可以飛越河川與草地，還可以飛到房子的屋頂上。

	Here is one way drones fight mosquitoes. When mosquito eggs hatch, larvae

	come out. The drones look for larvae. Then the drones spray the larvae. The

	spray stops the larvae from growing. The spray does not hurt anything else.

	當蚊子的幼蟲孵化出來時，就會被無人機偵測到。無人機會噴灑專用的殺蟲劑，阻止幼蟲繼續長大。這種殺蟲劑不會傷害到其他的生物！

	Here is another way drones fight mosquitoes. One kind of drone knows the

	sound of mosquitoes buzzing. It listens for this sound. When it finds a

	mosquito, it hits the mosquito!

	無人機可以辨認蚊子嗡嗡作響的聲音。無人機會循著這個聲音找到蚊子，把蚊子打死！

	In Kenya, mosquito bites make millions of people sick. People cheer as

	mosquito-fighting drones fly by.

	在肯亞，有好幾百萬人因為蚊子叮咬而生病、受苦。看見這些可以消滅蚊子的無人機時，肯亞人會高聲歡呼！

	The fight against mosquitoes is hard. Will drones help us win?

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	無人機用來打蚊子，是另一種新的應用方式。

	1. use 使用。

	Hey, it's not a bird, and it's not a plane. 嘿，那不是鳥，也不是飛機。

	It's a drone ! 是無人機 ! Somebody is using it ! 有人在用無人機。

	2. top 頂端。

	It's on top of that house now.它現在飛到那棟房子上面了。

	I wonder what it's doing.真想知道它在做什麼。

	3. carry 攜帶。

	It's carrying something. 它有帶東西。

	Maybe some medicine.也許是藥品。

	4. anywhere 任何地方。

	Medicine for sick people that can't go out? 送藥給生病沒辦法出門的人嗎?

	What a great idea! 好棒的主意!

	Yeah, drones can go anywhere. 對啊，無人機可以去任何地方。

	你看過無人機在天上飛嗎?一起來讀今天的單字。

	use使用 top頂端 carry攜帶 anywhere任何地方

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. What do mosquitoes carry?

	a. Larvae

	b. Bites

	c. Sicknesses

	2. What do drones do to mosquito larvae?

	a. Spray them

	b. Eat them

	c. Pick them up

	3. What do some drones listen for?

	a. Larvae growing

	b. Mosquitoes buzzing

	c. People cheering

	Answers

	1. c

	2. a

	3. b

sections.story:
________________________________

	Drones Help Fight Mosquitoes

	Aaagh! Mosquitoes are everywhere! They are a big problem in many countries.

	They carry sicknesses. They like to bite people. Millions of people get sick

	from mosquito bites every year.

	到處都是蚊子！蚊子會叮人，散布病菌。每年都有好幾百萬人因為蚊子叮咬而生病。

	People fight mosquitoes in many ways. Now there are some new ways! People use

	drones.

	人們用各種方式對抗蚊子。現在，連無人機都可以作為對抗蚊子的工具！

	Drones can go anywhere. They can go to rivers and fields. They can go to

	gardens and the top of houses. They fly high and low.

	無人機可以飛到很多地方。他們可以飛越河川與草地，還可以飛到房子的屋頂上。

	Here is one way drones fight mosquitoes. When mosquito eggs hatch, larvae

	come out. The drones look for larvae. Then the drones spray the larvae. The

	spray stops the larvae from growing. The spray does not hurt anything else.

	當蚊子的幼蟲孵化出來時，就會被無人機偵測到。無人機會噴灑專用的殺蟲劑，阻止幼蟲繼續長大。這種殺蟲劑不會傷害到其他的生物！

	Here is another way drones fight mosquitoes. One kind of drone knows the

	sound of mosquitoes buzzing. It listens for this sound. When it finds a

	mosquito, it hits the mosquito!

	無人機可以辨認蚊子嗡嗡作響的聲音。無人機會循著這個聲音找到蚊子，把蚊子打死！

	In Kenya, mosquito bites make millions of people sick. People cheer as

	mosquito-fighting drones fly by.

	在肯亞，有好幾百萬人因為蚊子叮咬而生病、受苦。看見這些可以消滅蚊子的無人機時，肯亞人會高聲歡呼！

	The fight against mosquitoes is hard. Will drones help us win?

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
sections.vocabulary:
Vocabulary

	無人機用來打蚊子，是另一種新的應用方式。

	1. use 使用。

	Hey, it's not a bird, and it's not a plane. 嘿，那不是鳥，也不是飛機。

	It's a drone ! 是無人機 ! Somebody is using it ! 有人在用無人機。

	2. top 頂端。

	It's on top of that house now.它現在飛到那棟房子上面了。

	I wonder what it's doing.真想知道它在做什麼。

	3. carry 攜帶。

	It's carrying something. 它有帶東西。

	Maybe some medicine.也許是藥品。

	4. anywhere 任何地方。

	Medicine for sick people that can't go out? 送藥給生病沒辦法出門的人嗎?

	What a great idea! 好棒的主意!

	Yeah, drones can go anywhere. 對啊，無人機可以去任何地方。

	你看過無人機在天上飛嗎?一起來讀今天的單字。

	use使用 top頂端 carry攜帶 anywhere任何地方

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	c. Sicknesses

	2. What do drones do to mosquito larvae?

	a. Spray them

	c. Pick them up

	3. What do some drones listen for?

	a. Larvae growing

	b. Mosquitoes buzzing

	c. People cheering

episodes.title: Big Birds Make Students Run
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Big Birds Make Students Run

	Student: Let's get out of here!

	Narrator: Uh oh! Some students are having trouble at school! The trouble is

	not about their homework or tests. It is about some big birds!

	有些學生惹上大麻煩了！這個大麻煩不是考試或是作業，而是一些很大隻的鳥！

	A university in Taiwan has a beautiful lake. The lake has swans and geese.

	They look very nice on the lake. But sometimes these birds leave the lake.

	They walk everywhere.

	台灣的一所大學有一個漂亮的湖，湖邊有很多鵝跟天鵝。有時候，他們會離開湖邊，到處散步！

	The birds are not afraid of people. But some people are afraid of the birds!

	So the university tells new students about the birds. It tells them to be

	careful.

	這些鳥不會怕人，但有一些人會害怕這些鳥！因此，學校提醒學生們要小心安全。

	Why? Well, some people get too close to the birds. Then the birds run after

	them! The birds try to hit them!

	Student: Ahhh!

	Narrator:

	為什麼呢？這是因為，當有人太靠近的時候，這些鳥就會追著人跑，甚至是攻擊！

	These birds also take things from people. One day, some swans ran after a

	student.

	Student: Go away, go away!

	Narrator: They hit him. Then they tried to take an important paper.

	Student: Hey! Give that back, I need that! That's mine, give it back!

	Narrator: Students go to university for four years to get this paper! The

	swans tried to hit him again. But the student saved his paper.

	這些鳥還會把人的東西搶走！有一天，一隻天鵝追著一名學生跑，不斷地啄他，還把他的畢業證書咬走了！幸好，這位學生最後有成功把自己的畢業證書拿回來。

	So if a big bird runs after you, pick up your things. Oh yes, and leave fast!

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	大雁不怕人，有時候會跟人類過於接近。

	1. goose 雁鴨，或是鵝。

	Have you ever been chased by Canadian geese, Nancy?

	你有沒有被加拿大雁追過，南西?

	I have, more than once. 我有，不只一次。

	2. try 嘗試。

	Sometimes when I went picnicking near a lake in Canada,

	有時候我在加拿大時會去湖邊野餐，

	they would try to steal my food. 牠們會試著偷我的食物。

	3. afraid 害怕的。

	Were you afraid of them? 你會不會怕牠們?

	I certainly was! 我當然怕!

	They are big, you know. And I'm sure they can bite.

	牠們體型很大，而且我確定牠們會咬人。

	4. close 靠近的。

	So I never let them get too close. 所以我從來不讓牠們靠太近。

	I'd run like crazy if they came after me! 牠們假如來追我，我會拼命跑!

	來一起讀單字。

	goose雁鴨，或是鵝 try嘗試 afraid害怕的 close靠近

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. What kind of big birds does the university lake have?

	a. Swans

	b. Owls

	c. Pigeons

	2. Why do these birds run after some people?

	a. The people have food.

	b. The people get too close.

	c. The people are angry.

	3. What did some birds try to take from a student?

	a. Some food

	b. A paper

	c. His phone

	Answers

	1. a

	2. b

	3. b

episodes.title: Police Find Thousands of Unsafe Fake Toys
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Police Find Thousands of Unsafe Fake Toys

	Narrator: Every year there are new toys to buy. But one is the newest,

	coolest, cutest toy! Everyone wants it! They run to the stores!

	每一年，都會有很多人搶著買最新、最酷、最可愛的玩具。

	Some people pay lots of money for the newest, coolest, cutest toy. Then they

	want people to see they have it!

	有些人會花很多錢買到最新奇的玩具，再跟其他人炫耀！

	Some people cannot find the toy! And some people do not want to pay lots of

	money. So, some buy toys that look like the cool new toy. But these toys are

	not the same. They are fake!

	有人買不到最酷的玩具，或是不想花那麼多錢，就會去買盜版玩具！盜版玩具跟正版很像，但他們品質差很多。

	This year, police in the U.K. found about 260,000 fake toys. Most are fakes

	of this year's coolest toy. Sellers tried to bring the fake toys into the

	country. They wanted to get lots of money.

	今年，英國警察查獲二十六萬個盜版玩具！有黑心商人準備把仿冒玩具運送到國內，大賺一筆！

	The police checked these fake toys. Almost two hundred thousand of them are

	not safe. Some can break easily. Little kids might eat the small broken

	parts!

	Kid: Oh no!

	Narrator: Some have bad chemicals. They can make you sick! Some smell bad.

	Kid: Ewwww!

	警察檢查這些盜版玩具，發現大部分都不安全。這些玩具的零件很脆弱，如果脫落可能被小朋友吃下肚。有些玩具氣味難聞，裡面的有毒物質還會讓人生病！

	If you cannot buy the newest, coolest, cutest toy, do not buy a fake toy!

	Stay safe, kids!

	________________________________________

	Vocabulary

	品質優良的兒童玩具價錢比較高，而盜版玩具卻有風險。

	1. store 商店。

	I need to shop for Christmas gifts, 我需要買耶誕禮物，

	but I really don’t know what to buy. 但是真不知道要買什麼。

	Just go to a department store. 就去百貨公司啊。

	2. same 一樣的。

	It has lots of stuff that you may like. 那裏有好多你可能會喜歡的。

	Department stores are all the same. 百貨公司都一樣。

	If you’ve seen one, you’ve seen them all. 逛一家等於都逛過了。

	3. buy 買。

	Fine, then just buy everyone chocolate. 好吧，那你就給大家都買巧克力。

	People love chocolate even when they say they don’t.

	人們喜歡巧克力，就算嘴巴說不，其實還是喜歡。

	4. eat 吃。

	You might be right. And I can eat the extras.

	你也許說對了。而且我還可以吃多出來的。

	今天的單字很簡單喔。

	store商店 same一樣的 buy買 eat吃

	________________________________________

	Quiz

	1. Where did police find the 260,000 fake toys?

	a. The U.S.

	b. The U.K.

	c. The U.A.E.

	2. Why do some people buy fake toys?

	a. They don't want to pay lots of money.

	b. They want toys that break easily.

	c. They don't want safe toys.

	3. Why are some fake toys not safe?

	a. They are delicious.

	b. They have bad chemicals.

	c. They have cute parts.

	Answers

	1. b

	2. a

	3. b

	a. They are delicious.

	b. They have bad chemicals.

	c. They have cute parts.

episodes.title: Man's Tooth Helps Him See
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Man's Tooth Helps Him See

	Narrator: A 13-year-old boy took some medicine. Every day, millions of people

	take this medicine safely. But it hurt the boy's eyes.

	Boy: Oh! My eye!

	Narrator: He was in the hospital for a long time.

	每天有數以百萬計的人安全服用一種很普通的藥。但一個十三歲的小男孩卻在服藥之後眼睛受傷。他住院很長一段時間接受治療。

	Doctors could not save one eye. His other eye could not see. Doctors tried to

	fix this eye for 21 years! The man had fifty operations. He got a new eye

	part many times. But his body did not want to keep them.

	醫生們沒能保住他的一隻眼睛，另一隻眼睛也失明了。醫生為了恢復他的視力，努力了整整

	21 年！他做了五十次手術，他的身體卻不斷排斥移植的眼角膜。

	There was one more operation to try. Almost no one has this operation. It's

	very hard. But the man wanted to see again.

	只剩下最後一個方法。為了能讓自己看見，他決定嘗試一種很困難的手術。

	Doctors took one of the man's teeth. They made a hole in the tooth. They put

	a lens in the hole. Then the doctors put the tooth in the man's eye!

	醫生取出一顆他的牙齒，在上面鑽一個洞。然後，醫生把一個鏡片鑲進牙齒的洞裡，再把這顆牙放進他的眼睛裡！

	Why did the doctors use the man's tooth? Teeth are very strong. A tooth holds

	a lens well. And the man's body knows his tooth. His body will keep it.

	為什麼要用牙齒？因為牙齒很堅固，可以把鏡片牢牢地固定住。而且他自己的牙齒也不會被他的身體排斥！

	Now the man can see his family and friends. He can see his city! His tooth

	lets him see everything again!

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	把牙齒裝進眼睛裡面，這可是聞所未聞的手術!

	1. hospital 醫院。

	I need to go to the hospital tomorrow. 我明天要去一趟醫院。

	I want to have my eyes checked. 去檢查眼睛。

	2. eye 眼睛。

	What's wrong with your eyes? 你的眼睛怎麼了?

	I can't see clearly.我看不清楚。

	3. many times 很多次。

	I've told you many times you work too hard! 我跟你講過很多次，你工作太辛苦了!

	Okay okay, now I need to save my eyes. 好啦，現在我要搶救眼睛。

	4. body 身體。

	Good! Take care of yourself. 很好，要照顧自己。

	Your body only comes with one set of parts. 你的身體只有提供一套零件呢。

	來一起讀單字。

	hospital醫院 eye眼睛 many times很多次 body身體

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. How old was the man when he took the medicine?

	a. 13 years old

	b. 21 years old

	c. 34 years old

	2. How many operations did the man have?

	a. 5

	b. 15

	c. 50

	3. Why did the doctors use the man's tooth?

	a. It had a hole.

	b. It can hold a lens well.

	c. It is not strong.

	Answers

	1. a

	2. c

	3. b

	part many times. But his body did not want to keep them.

	醫生們沒能保住他的一隻眼睛，另一隻眼睛也失明了。醫生為了恢復他的視力，努力了整整

	21 年！他做了五十次手術，他的身體卻不斷排斥移植的眼角膜。

	There was one more operation to try. Almost no one has this operation. It's

	very hard. But the man wanted to see again.

	只剩下最後一個方法。為了能讓自己看見，他決定嘗試一種很困難的手術。

	Doctors took one of the man's teeth. They made a hole in the tooth. They put

	a lens in the hole. Then the doctors put the tooth in the man's eye!

	醫生取出一顆他的牙齒，在上面鑽一個洞。然後，醫生把一個鏡片鑲進牙齒的洞裡，再把這顆牙放進他的眼睛裡！

	Why did the doctors use the man's tooth? Teeth are very strong. A tooth holds

	a lens well. And the man's body knows his tooth. His body will keep it.

	為什麼要用牙齒？因為牙齒很堅固，可以把鏡片牢牢地固定住。而且他自己的牙齒也不會被他的身體排斥！

	Now the man can see his family and friends. He can see his city! His tooth

	lets him see everything again!

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
sections.vocabulary:
Vocabulary

	把牙齒裝進眼睛裡面，這可是聞所未聞的手術!

	1. hospital 醫院。

	I need to go to the hospital tomorrow. 我明天要去一趟醫院。

	I want to have my eyes checked. 去檢查眼睛。

	2. eye 眼睛。

	What's wrong with your eyes? 你的眼睛怎麼了?

	I can't see clearly.我看不清楚。

	3. many times 很多次。

	I've told you many times you work too hard! 我跟你講過很多次，你工作太辛苦了!

	Okay okay, now I need to save my eyes. 好啦，現在我要搶救眼睛。

	4. body 身體。

	Good! Take care of yourself. 很好，要照顧自己。

	Your body only comes with one set of parts. 你的身體只有提供一套零件呢。

	來一起讀單字。

	hospital醫院 eye眼睛 many times很多次 body身體

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
sections.quiz:
Quiz

	1. How old was the man when he took the medicine?

	a. 13 years old

	b. 21 years old

	c. 34 years old

	2. How many operations did the man have?

	a. 5

	b. 15

	c. 50

	3. Why did the doctors use the man's tooth?

	a. It had a hole.

	b. It can hold a lens well.

	c. It is not strong.

episodes.title: Nine-Year-Old College Student Studies to Help Kids
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Nine-Year-Old College Student Studies to Help Kids

	In school, you learn how your brain makes your body work. Some people want to

	learn a lot more about the human brain. They can study neuroscience in

	college.

	在學校裡，你會學到大腦如何控制身體、讓身體運作。想進一步了解人類大腦，學生可以在大學選讀神經科學。

	Neuroscience is not easy to study. But a very smart kid in the U.S. is

	studying it. He is 9 years old. He is a high school student. He is a college

	student too! He is studying neuroscience in college! He goes to college three

	days a week.

	神經科學不是一門簡單的學科。美國有個很聰明的九歲男孩，他既是高中生，也是大學生，每個星期有三天到大學上神經科學課。

	After college, the boy will be 13 or 14 years old. He will study the human

	brain more. He wants to be a brain surgeon for kids. Surgeons are doctors.

	They do operations to fix or take out sick parts of the body.

	他大概十三、十四歲就會讀完大學了！他想當兒童腦神經外科醫生，繼續研究大腦。外科醫生會動手術，把生病的部分治好！

	The boy wants to help sick kids have long and healthy lives. He needs to

	study a lot! But he has fun too. He plays video games and soccer.

	這個男孩想幫助生病的小朋友，讓他們健健康康的長大。他需要讀很多書，不過他也會玩電動、踢足球！

	This boy says we can do anything when we work on it. Listen to him. He wants

	to be a brain surgeon for kids. Now he is the first 9-year-old college

	student to study neuroscience!

	________________________________________

	Vocabulary

	這個資賦優異的男孩，希望更了解人類的頭腦，好幫助別人。

	1. doctor 醫生。

	Why are doctors smart people? 為什麼醫生都是聰明人?

	Who said they're smart? 誰說他們聰明?

	They are! Only the top students can enter medical schools. 真的啊!

	只有最好的學生才能進醫學院。

	2. sick 生病的。

	That's not true. 並不是。

	My mom takes good care of sick people. 我媽媽很會照顧病人。

	She never went to college. 她從沒上過大學。

	3. study 研讀。

	So she's a doctor? 所以她是醫生?

	Not really. 不算是。

	But she studied medicine with her grandpa. 但是她年輕時跟她的阿公學醫。

	4. listen to 注意聽。

	She always said if you listen to people, 她總是說只要你注意聽人講話，

	fixing their problems becomes easy. 處理他們的問題就容易了。

	你想當醫生嗎?來一起讀單字。

	doctor醫生 sick生病的 study研讀 listen to注意聽

	________________________________________

	Quiz

	1. What is neuroscience about?

	a. The human foot

	b. The human heart

	c. The human brain

	2. Where is the boy studying neuroscience?

	a. In high school

	b. In college

	c. At a hospital

	3. What does the boy want to be?

	a. A surgeon for kids

	b. A soccer star

	c. A video game player

	Answers

	1. c

	2. b

	3. a

episodes.title: Milkfish Scare Man
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Milkfish Scare Man

	Taiwan has many milkfish farms. Milkfish are easy to farm. But sometimes they

	get too cold. Then they die! What can fish farmers do with these fish?

	台灣有很多虱目魚養殖廠。虱目魚不難照顧，但有時候天氣太冷，他們容易被冷死！這些冷死的魚該怎麼辦呢？

	A man in Changhua showed farmers how to dry milkfish. The farmers cut the

	fish from the head to the tail. Then they open the fish like a book.

	有個彰化人教養殖業者如何風乾虱目魚！他們把虱目魚對半剖開，就像一本攤開的書。

	The farmers put the fish in salty water. Then they hang the open, wet fish

	outside. The next morning, the fish are dry, salty, and delicious!

	他們把虱目魚浸泡在鹽水中，再把虱目魚掛在戶外風乾一個晚上。到了第二天，虱目魚就變成了鹹鹹的，美味的魚乾！

	The man let farmers hang their fish in his garden. That night, he had a

	visitor. The visitor came on his scooter.

	師傅讓養殖業者把虱目魚掛在他的庭院中。那天晚上，有一名男子騎機車到他家。

	Then his scooter headlight shined on hundreds of big eyes! "Hooo" were they

	looking at? They were looking at him! The visitor was scared. He shouted

	"HELP! OWLS!"

	機車的車燈照向前方時，有好幾百雙盯著他看的大眼睛！他害怕的大叫：「救命啊，有貓頭鷹！」

	The man came outside. He said there were no owls. The eyes were fish eyes.

	師傅聽到他的叫聲後，跑出來解釋那些不是貓頭鷹，而是風乾中的虱目魚的眼睛！

	If you see hundreds of big eyes at night, don't be scared! Maybe fish are

	hanging to dry!

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	黑沉沉的夜裡，吊掛在半空中的魚讓人飽受驚嚇。

	1. dry 弄乾。

	Eeeew! What's that smell? 好噁，那是什麼氣味?

	Oh, that's just my fish. 那是我的魚。

	I'm hanging it up to dry. 我把它掛起來風乾。

	2. delicious 美味的。

	Now why do you want to do that? 為什麼要那樣?

	You've never had dried fish? 你沒吃過魚乾嗎?

	It's delicious! 很好吃的。

	3. look at 注視。

	But are you keeping its eyes? 但是你要保留它的眼睛嗎?

	They are looking at me! 那雙眼睛看著我!

	They are not! 沒有看著你。

	The fish is dead, remember? 魚已經死了，記得嗎?

	4. head 頭部，tail 尾巴。

	I never eat a fish's head and tail. 我從來不吃魚頭和魚尾。

	But fish heads are good. 但是魚頭很好呢。

	請來一起讀單字。

	dry弄乾 delicious美味的 look at注視 head頭部 tail尾巴

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. What did the man show farmers how to do?

	a. Eat milkfish

	b. Farm milkfish

	c. Dry milkfish

	2. What shined on the big eyes that night?

	a. A scooter headlight

	b. Some salty water

	c. Many wet fish

	3. What did the visitor think he saw?

	a. Fish

	b. Owls

	c. Stars

	Answers

	1. c

	2. a

	3. b

episodes.title: Taiwan Has New Robot Dog
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	 

	Taiwan Has New Robot Dog

	 

	Robots can do many things. Some robots make cars. Some fly and take pictures. And some do dangerous things! These dangerous things are not safe for people to do.

	機器人可以做很多事，製造汽車，空拍照都行。他們還可以完成人類做不到的危險任務。

	 

	Taiwan has a new robot dog. It is from the U.S. It was 15 million NT! It helps Taiwan's emergency workers.

	台灣從美國買了一隻要價一千五百萬台幣的機器狗，牠協助台灣的緊急救難人員！

	 

	This robot dog can work around dangerous chemicals. These chemicals can make the air very bad. And some can explode! 

	機器狗可以靠近危險的化學物質！這些化學物質會汙染空氣，還可能會爆炸！

	 

	The robot dog can find these chemicals too. And it can find their names! 

	機器狗不但能找到化學物質的位置，還可以認出不同的種類！

	 

	Sometimes there are emergencies with chemicals. The chemical names are very important to know! Then workers can make the chemicals safer. 

	發生緊急狀況時，救難人員需要馬上知道化學物質的種類跟名稱，才能採取對應行動。

	 

	Can the workers use water? Well, water makes some chemicals safer. But it makes some more dangerous!

	救火時用水就可以撲滅火勢嗎？有時候用水反而會變得更嚴重喔！

	 

	Taiwan will get two more robot dogs. Then it will have three! One robot will work in the north of Taiwan. One will work in the middle. And one will work in the south.   

	台灣還會再買兩隻一樣的機器狗。這三隻機器狗會分別派到台灣的北中南服務！

	 

	These robot dogs will make Taiwan safer!

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	 

	Vocabulary

	機器狗可以去人類避免去到的危險地方。

	 

	1. dog 狗。

	Look! They’re sending a robot dog into the fire! 你看，他們把一隻機器狗送進了火場! 

	Wow! Does it bark? 牠會不會叫? 

	Obviously not. It doesn’t need to bark.顯然不會。牠又不需要叫。

	 

	2. emergency 緊急情況。

	Of course it does! 牠當然需要。

	It has to warn people in an emergency! 緊急情況的時候牠得警告人。

	Well, I guess you have a point. 我想你講得有道理。

	 

	3. air 空氣。

	Look at all that smoke! 你看那些濃煙!

	The air must be very bad.空氣一定糟透了。

	 

	4. dangerous 危險的。

	The dog is coming out now. 狗狗現在出來了。

	Did it find anything? 牠有找到什麼嗎? 

	No. Maybe it’s too dangerous even for a robot dog.沒有。即使是機器狗也可能太危險了。

	 

	來複習今天的單字。

	dog狗    emergency緊急情況    air空氣    dangerous危險的

	 

	 

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	 

	Quiz

	 

	1. Where is Taiwan's new robot dog from?

	a. The U.S.

	b. India

	c. Taiwan

	 

	2. How much was the robot dog?

	a. 5 million NT

	b. 15 million NT

	c. 50 million NT

	 

	3. How many robot dogs will Taiwan have?

	a. Two

	b. Three

	c. Four

	 

	Answers

	1. a

	2. b

	3. b

	The dog is coming out now. 狗狗現在出來了。

	No. Maybe it’s too dangerous even for a robot dog.沒有。即使是機器狗也可能太危險了。

	 

	來複習今天的單字。

	dog狗    emergency緊急情況    air空氣    dangerous危險的

	 

	 

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
sections.quiz:
Quiz

	 

	1. Where is Taiwan's new robot dog from?

	a. The U.S.

	b. India

	c. Taiwan

	 

	2. How much was the robot dog?

	a. 5 million NT

	b. 15 million NT

	c. 50 million NT

	 

	3. How many robot dogs will Taiwan have?

	a. Two

	b. Three

	c. Four

episodes.title: Superhero Keeps Shop Safe
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Superhero Keeps Shop Safe

	Some shops have lights in front. Some shops have guards in front. They help

	keep shops safe.

	有一些店門口會亮燈或是有警衛駐守，保護店家的安全。

	But in Pingtung, one shop has a superhero in front! That's right, it has a

	superhero! He is big. He is two hundred fifty centimeters tall! He looks very

	strong. He looks very mad. And he is very green!

	但屏東一家店鋪的門口有超級英雄！它是250公分高的浩克！他又高又壯，看起來很生氣！

	In movies, he walks and the earth shakes! He talks and people shake! But at

	this shop, he does not walk. He does not talk. He is made of stone.

	在電影中，浩克走路時地會震動。他一開口，大家就嚇得發抖！但這間店的浩克不會走路也不會說話，因為他是石頭做的雕像！

	The shop needs the superhero's help. Some people think the shop is not in a

	good place. Uh-oh … Maybe it will have bad luck. Oh no! Maybe no one will go

	to the shop! The superhero's job is to keep the shop safe from bad luck!

	有一些人覺得這家店的地理位置不好，也許會招來惡運，客人也不上門！他們需要超級英雄幫他們驅除惡運！

	Is the superhero doing a good job? Well, many people go to the shop now. They

	take pictures and videos with him. So, yes! He is doing a good job.

	浩克成功了！現在，很多人會來，跟門口的浩克一起合照！他是很棒的超級英雄！

	Do you think more shops will have superheroes now? Hmmm … Which superhero is

	best for this job?

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	石頭做的浩克，結果是招來顧客的辦法。

	1. shop 商店。

	I can't believe it! 真不敢相信 ! They're closing my favorite coffee shop!

	他們要關掉我最喜歡的咖啡店!

	You mean forever? 意思是永遠關門嗎?

	Yeah, they've sold the place! 對啊，他們已經把它賣掉了!

	2. maybe 也許。

	Maybe they'll open another one. 也許他們會另外開一家。

	But I want this one! 但是我要這一家!

	3. in front 在前面。

	It has tables and chairs in front. 它前面有桌子椅子。

	I can sit there and have my coffee.我可以坐在那裏喝我的咖啡。

	4. walk 走路。

	And just see people walking by? 就看著人走來走去?

	Yeah, that's the best time of my day! 對，那是我一天最好的時光!

	Then you'll need a new "best time". 那你需要一個新的最好的時光。

	來一起讀單字

	shop商店 maybe也許 in front在前面 walk走路

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. How many centimeters tall is the shop's superhero?

	a. One hundred fifty

	b. Two hundred five

	c. Two hundred fifty

	2. What is the shop's superhero made of?

	a. Stone

	b. Bone

	c. Earth

	3. What does the superhero keep the shop safe from?

	a. Good places

	b. Good luck

	c. Bad luck

	Answers

	1. c

	2. a

	3. c

episodes.title: Ice Cream on the Mountain
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Ice Cream on the Mountain

	Narrator: Hikers hiked up a tall mountain. It is in the U.S. It is four

	thousand two hundred meters tall. The hikers were tired and hot.

	一組登山客爬上了一座美國的高山，他們又熱又累。

	There was a surprise at the top. It was a big ice cream cone. Huh? No, wait

	… It was a man! He was wearing an ice cream cone costume. But it wasn't

	Halloween!

	山頂上有個很大的冰淇淋甜筒！不對，那是一位打扮成甜筒的男子！

	The man had a big bag. It was twenty-seven kilograms. It had lots of ice

	cream sandwiches and ice cream bars! It had dry ice too. This cold, cold ice

	kept the ice cream cold.

	那名男子揹著一個很重的大袋子，裡面裝滿了冰淇淋三明治跟冰棒！為了確保冰淇淋不會融化，袋子裡還放了乾冰。

	The hikers cheered!

	Hikers: Ice cream!

	Narrator: Some kids ran to the ice cream man. He gave them ice cream. The

	kids were very happy!

	登山客高興的歡呼：「哇，是冰淇淋！」一些小朋友開心地跑去找冰淇淋先生，享用美味的冰淇淋！

	The ice cream man is strong. It is hard to hike up the mountain. It is harder

	with a big bag! But he hikes up and down the mountain. He hikes fast! Maybe

	he wants to get more ice cream!

	要揹著裝滿冰淇淋的大袋子爬山非常困難。但是冰淇淋先生很強壯，他可以快速地上山又下山！

	Hikers look for this man now. When he is at the top of the mountain, they are

	happier!

	現在，登山客都會期待冰淇淋先生的出現。有冰淇淋先生在山頂上，大家就會很開心！

	Giving people ice cream at the top of a mountain is nice, fun, and very cool!

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	高山上賣冰淇淋，東西還要自己搬上去，這個生意不好做!

	1. thousand 千。

	Finally, we're at the top of the mountain! 我們終於到山頂了!

	Yay!!! One thousand and two hundred meters! 海拔一千兩百公尺!

	How about that! 不錯吧!

	2. down 往下。

	And look at the great view! 而且你看這個壯觀的景色!

	It's all very nice. But we have to go down now.

	是都很好，但是我們現在得下山了。

	3. tired 疲倦的。

	We've just climbed up here! 我們才剛剛爬上來!

	And I'm very tired! 我很累呢!

	4. fast 快速的。

	It's going to be sunset soon.太陽就要下山了。

	We need to get down fast. 我們得趕快下去。

	Or it'll be too dark and cold.要不然就太暗了，也會太冷。

	今天的單字，你記住了幾個?

	thousand千 down往下 tired疲倦的 fast快速的

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. What was the man wearing?

	a. An ice cream cone costume

	b. An ice cream bar costume

	c. An ice cream sandwich costume

	2. What kept the ice cream cold?

	a. Snow

	b. Dry ice

	c. Water

	3. What do we know about the man?

	a. He is strong.

	b. He is hungry.

	c. He is tired.

	Answers

	1. a

	2. b

	3. a

episodes.title: The Old Music Player
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	The Old Music Player

	Shhh… listen. Where is that beautiful music coming from? Oh! It is from a

	music player!

	噓??仔細聽！音樂是從哪裡傳出來的呢？阿，原來是從留聲機傳出來的！

	About one hundred thirty years ago, a very important man went to Germany. He

	got a new music player there. Then he took it to his palace in Indonesia!

	一百三十年前，一位有錢有勢的男人去了德國。他在德國找到這台留聲機後，帶回他在印尼的宮殿！

	This music player plays music with metal plates. They are almost one meter

	wide! These round plates have music on them. One plate has Beethoven's music!

	One plate has Mozart's!

	留聲機要用一公尺寬的圓形大鐵片才能放音樂！音樂被保存在這些鐵片上，有貝多芬，還有莫札特的！

	The music player does not use electricity. So how does it play music? Well,

	you have to help it. First, put one of the metal plates onto the music

	player. Be careful! One plate is five kilograms!

	留聲機不需要靠電力就能運作。想放音樂的話，要先把一片鐵片放到留聲機上。小心喔，鐵片很重！

	The music player has a handle. Turn the handle many times! That makes the

	plate move. And then beautiful music comes out!

	接下來，要轉動留聲機的握把，讓鐵片開始旋轉。這樣子就能聽到美妙的音樂了！

	The music player is very old now. It plays music when important people come

	to the palace. But it is mostly quiet.

	只有重要的人物來到宮殿的時候才會放音樂。留聲機很老舊了，為了好好保存，不能太頻繁的使用！

	That way, this music player can play music for many more years!

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	現在已經沒有人用留聲機了，它以前是很稀罕的。

	1. careful 小心的。

	Be careful of my old music player! 小心我的舊音樂播放器。

	They don't make those any more. 他們現在已經不做那些東西了。

	2. old 老的。

	Why do you still keep it? 你為什麼還留著它?

	I like old stuff. 我喜歡老東西。

	Besides, it works well.何況它很好用呢。

	3. quiet 安靜的。

	Yeah, sometimes I wish I still had my old guitar.

	對啊，有時候我希望我的舊吉他還在。

	It's too quiet here. 這裡太安靜了。

	4. play 玩樂器。

	You? Playing the guitar?! 你...彈吉他?!

	Well, I never said it would be good music. 我可沒說會很好聽。

	今天你學到哪些單字?

	careful小心的 old老的 quiet安靜的 play玩樂器

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. Where is the music player?

	a. A palace in Indonesia

	b. A palace in Germany

	c. A palace in India

	2. What are the plates made of?

	a. Paper

	b. Metal

	c. Wood

	3. What do you turn many times on this music player?

	a. The plate

	b. The handle

	c. Electricity

	Answers

	1. a

	2. b

	3. b

episodes.title: Play Street Brings Kids Outside
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Play Street Brings Kids Outside

	Can you run and play on the street? Noooooo... It is too dangerous! But on

	one street in England, kids played on the street! And it was safe!

	在大街上玩很危險，但是在英國，有一條街可以讓小朋友安全的玩耍！

	On one Saturday, no cars drove on this street for a few hours! The street was

	a big playground! People called it a play street!

	在某個星期六，這條街上好幾個小時都沒有車子開過來！整條街變成大遊樂場！人們叫它「遊戲街」！

	Kids came outside to play. They ran! They danced! They talked loudly! They

	laughed! The kids had lots of fun. They played games! They rode their bikes!

	They made new friends!

	小朋友們在街上跑啊跑，跳啊跳，大聲地談天說笑！他們騎腳踏車，認識新朋友！

	Moms and dads loved the play street. They did not have to worry about their

	kids. Some people watched the kids. They kept the kids safe. People with no

	kids had a good time too. They talked with other people on the street.

	家長也很喜歡遊戲街。有人會負責照顧小朋友，所以家長不用擔心小朋友的安全！沒有小孩的人也可以在街上跟別人開心的聊天。

	The play street is one mom's idea. She says kids need to play outside more.

	They do not watch videos outside. They do not play online games outside.

	遊戲街是一位媽媽提議的。她說小朋友需要多在戶外玩！

	This mom talked to her city. The city liked her idea. It made the play street

	for the kids!

	市政府聽了這個媽媽的提議後覺得非常好。因此，他們決定施行遊戲街這個計畫，讓小朋友盡情玩耍！

	Do you want to have a play street too? Talk to your city!

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	這個城市把整條街道封起來，讓大人小孩盡情玩耍。

	1. on the street 在街上。

	Will you close the window, please? 可以請你關上窗子嗎? It's getting really

	noisy.真的很吵耶。

	It's just kids playing on the street.只是小孩在街上玩罷了。

	2. fun 樂趣。

	They are too loud! 他們太大聲了!

	They're having fun! 他們可開心了!

	Look, they're riding their bikes! 你看，他們在騎腳踏車!

	3. outside 外面。

	We should go outside, too. 我們也應該出門。

	How about going shopping? 去購物如何?

	Shopping is still inside. 購物還是在室內。

	4. idea 主意。

	But we need to go out before going in, right? 但是我們要先出門才進門，對吧?

	Hey, I like your idea! 我喜歡你的主意!

	今天的單字很有趣。

	on the street在街上 fun樂趣 outside外面 idea主意

	---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. What country was the play street in?

	a. Egypt

	b. Ecuador

	c. England

	2. How long were there no cars driving on this street?

	a. A few hours

	b. A few days

	c. A few weeks

	3. Whose idea was the play street?

	a. A kid's

	b. A mom's

	c. A dad's

	Answers

	1. c

	2. a

	3. b

sections.story:
________________________________

	Play Street Brings Kids Outside

	Can you run and play on the street? Noooooo... It is too dangerous! But on

	one street in England, kids played on the street! And it was safe!

	在大街上玩很危險，但是在英國，有一條街可以讓小朋友安全的玩耍！

	On one Saturday, no cars drove on this street for a few hours! The street was

	a big playground! People called it a play street!

	在某個星期六，這條街上好幾個小時都沒有車子開過來！整條街變成大遊樂場！人們叫它「遊戲街」！

	Kids came outside to play. They ran! They danced! They talked loudly! They

	laughed! The kids had lots of fun. They played games! They rode their bikes!

	They made new friends!

	小朋友們在街上跑啊跑，跳啊跳，大聲地談天說笑！他們騎腳踏車，認識新朋友！

	Moms and dads loved the play street. They did not have to worry about their

	kids. Some people watched the kids. They kept the kids safe. People with no

	kids had a good time too. They talked with other people on the street.

	家長也很喜歡遊戲街。有人會負責照顧小朋友，所以家長不用擔心小朋友的安全！沒有小孩的人也可以在街上跟別人開心的聊天。

	The play street is one mom's idea. She says kids need to play outside more.

	They do not watch videos outside. They do not play online games outside.

	遊戲街是一位媽媽提議的。她說小朋友需要多在戶外玩！

	This mom talked to her city. The city liked her idea. It made the play street

	for the kids!

	市政府聽了這個媽媽的提議後覺得非常好。因此，他們決定施行遊戲街這個計畫，讓小朋友盡情玩耍！

	Do you want to have a play street too? Talk to your city!

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
sections.vocabulary:
Vocabulary

	這個城市把整條街道封起來，讓大人小孩盡情玩耍。

	1. on the street 在街上。

	Will you close the window, please? 可以請你關上窗子嗎? It's getting really

	noisy.真的很吵耶。

	It's just kids playing on the street.只是小孩在街上玩罷了。

	2. fun 樂趣。

	They are too loud! 他們太大聲了!

	They're having fun! 他們可開心了!

	Look, they're riding their bikes! 你看，他們在騎腳踏車!

	3. outside 外面。

	We should go outside, too. 我們也應該出門。

	How about going shopping? 去購物如何?

	Shopping is still inside. 購物還是在室內。

	4. idea 主意。

	But we need to go out before going in, right? 但是我們要先出門才進門，對吧?

	Hey, I like your idea! 我喜歡你的主意!

	今天的單字很有趣。

	on the street在街上 fun樂趣 outside外面 idea主意

	---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	a. Egypt

	c. England

	2. How long were there no cars driving on this street?

	a. A few hours

	b. A few days

	c. A few weeks

	3. Whose idea was the play street?

	a. A kid's

	b. A mom's

	c. A dad's

episodes.title: Flying Frogs Need Muddy Water
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Flying Frogs Need Muddy Water

	Big green and yellow frogs live in Southeast Asia.

	They have long back legs. They have big hands and feet. They hop.

	They jump from tall trees. Then…whoosh! They fly!

	在東南亞，有一種黃綠色的青蛙。牠們的後腿很長，有很大的手掌跟腳掌。牠們會從高高的樹上往下跳，然後滑翔！

	These frogs do not fly like birds. They hold out their hands and feet.

	They jump to new trees. They can jump 15 meters!

	Their fingers and toes stick to the new trees.

	青蛙跟鳥飛翔的方法不一樣。這種青蛙會伸開手腳跳到另外一棵樹上，並且用吸盤把自己黏住。牠們最遠能跳十五公尺！

	These frogs live high in trees in rainforests.

	They go down low in trees to lay eggs. They need muddy water under their

	trees.

	When their eggs hatch, tadpoles fall into the water!

	這些青蛙住在熱帶雨林裡的樹上。產卵時會移到比較低的樹枝上，因為牠們需要樹下的水灘。等青蛙蛋孵化，小蝌蚪就會掉進水裡！

	The tadpoles live in the muddy water. They grow!

	They get hands and feet.

	These young frogs go and live on land. Then one day, they go up a tree!

	小蝌蚪在水中慢慢長大，等到長出手和腳，牠們會爬到樹上生活。

	But wait! These frogs need help from another animal.

	With no muddy water, tadpoles cannot live and grow.

	Where does the muddy water come from?

	Rhinos make it! They love mud baths!

	但是，蝌蚪沒有泥巴水就活不下去。他們需要犀牛的幫忙。這些泥巴水是犀牛喜歡泡泥巴澡的水！

	But there are not many rhinos now. People want rhino horns.

	When there are no more rhinos, where will tadpoles live and grow?

	現在犀牛越來越少。沒了犀牛，小蝌蚪要在哪裡長大呢？

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	這種青蛙會利用環境來繁衍下一代。

	1. high 高的。

	If you could fly, how high would you go? 要是你能飛，你會飛多高?

	As high as the birds, I think. 跟鳥兒一樣高吧。

	2. bird 鳥類。

	Wouldn't it be wonderful? 那不是很棒嗎?

	What? 什麼很棒? To fly like a bird?跟鳥一樣飛翔嗎? People can already do that

	using drones.人類已經做到了，用無人機。

	3. land 陸地。

	They USE drones to get a bird's-eye view.人類用無人機來鳥瞰。But they are not

	flying. 但是自己不飛。

	You're right. I prefer to stay on land.你說的對了。我是比較喜歡待在地上。

	4. jump 跳躍。

	Like a kangaroo?像袋鼠一樣嗎?

	Yeah, I'd just hop and jump around in grasslands. 對啊，我就在草原上跳來跳去。

	來跟我一起讀單字。high高的 bird鳥類 land陸地 jump跳躍

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. What can these frogs do?

	a. Fly like birds

	b. Jump to new trees

	c. Talk to rhinos

	2. Why do these frogs come down low in trees?

	a. To eat mud

	b. To lay eggs

	c. To eat eggs

	3. What makes muddy water in the rainforest?

	a. People

	b. Rhinos

	c. Trees

	Answers

	1. b

	2. b

	3. b

episodes.title: Little Boy Calls Police
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Little Boy Calls Police

	Narrator: A four-year-old boy wanted to know about soccer and swimming.

	But he didn't go to his family or friends. He called the police!

	有一個四歲的小男孩想問關於足球和游泳的問題，但他沒有問他的家人或是朋友，而是打電話給警察！

	Dispatch: Hello, police … How may I help you?

	Narrator: The police help keep everyone safe. They catch bad people. The

	police are very busy!

	They often have no time to talk about sports. But they talked to this little

	boy!

	警察要維持治安良好，所以非常忙碌。可是他們沒有拒絕這個小男孩，他們認真地回答了他的問題！

	The police were very kind. They talked to the boy about soccer and swimming.

	The next day, 18 police cars came to his house!

	The boy and his six-year-old brother went in the cars. They tried the sirens.

	Little boy: Hey mom, look!

	Narrator: They tried the loudspeakers!

	警察親切地回答小男孩所有關於足球和游泳的問題。隔天，他們開著警車到小男孩家，讓小男孩跟他哥哥坐在警車上，還讓他們玩車上的警笛跟廣播！

	Narrator: The little boy said his brother's birthday was the next day.

	Ten police cars came in the morning! The police gave his brother a toy police

	hat and other toys.

	第二天是小男孩哥哥的生日，警察一大早就開到了他們家門口，準備跟他們一起慶生。警察還送了男孩的哥哥一頂玩具警察帽子！

	More police came in the evening. A police dog came too!

	The police gave the boys a soccer net. They played soccer with the boys!

	很多警察加入了這場生日派對，甚至連警犬都來了！警察送這對兄弟一個足球網，大家一起開心地踢足球。

	The little boy and his brother have police friends now.

	But, please, do not call the police to talk about sports!

	________________________________________

	Vocabulary

	這群童心未泯的警察，跟兩個小男孩玩得很高興!

	1. police 警察。

	I was once stopped by the police on the street.我有一次在街上被警察攔住。

	What did you do? 你做了什麼?

	I jaywalked. 我亂過馬路。

	You shouldn't do that, Jane. 你不應該那樣。

	2. in the morning 在早上。

	I know, but it was in the morning. 我知道，可是那是早上。 I was running to

	catch the bus. 我跑去趕公車。

	3. kind 親切的。

	Anyway, that policeman was not kind at all! 那個警察一點也不親切!

	He gave you a ticket? 他給你罰單?

	No, but he shouted at me! 沒有，但是他對我大喊大叫。

	4. safe 安全的。

	He was trying to keep you safe! 他想保護你安全!

	No, he was warning me. 才不是呢，他是在警告我。

	今天有哪些單字? police警察 in the morning在早上 kind親切的 safe安全的

	________________________________________

	Quiz

	1. How old is the little boy?

	a. 2 years old

	b. 4 years old

	c. 8 years old

	2. What did the little boy ask the police about?

	a. Friends and family

	b. Sirens and loudspeakers

	c. Soccer and swimming

	3. Whose birthday was the next day?

	a. The little boy's

	b. The little boy's brother's

	c. The police dog's

	Answers

	1. b

	2. c

	3. b

episodes.title: Old Church Goes to New Town
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Old Church Goes to New Town

	In Sweden, a town is moving to a new place. The land under the town is

	getting weak. The people are leaving most buildings. But some buildings will

	go to the new town.

	一個瑞典的小鎮要搬家了！這個小鎮下面的土地很脆弱，所以很多建築物都要被移去新的地方。

	One building is a church. The people love it. It is 113 years old. And it is

	very big! The road to the new place was not big. So workers made the road

	bigger! Then other workers put the church on a very big car. It had 224

	wheels!

	一座有113年歷史的教堂也要一起搬，因為大家很愛它！為了搬這個教堂，工人還把馬路拓寬了。他們把教堂抬到一輛大卡車上。

	The church was ready to go! Many people came to watch. Some came from other

	countries! The king of Sweden came!

	教堂準備出發了！來自世界各地的人都來見證教堂搬家。連瑞典的國王都出現了！

	The church started to move! Everyone was excited! But, where was the driver?

	所有人都興奮地看著教堂被卡車載走！欸？等一下！司機去哪裡了?

	There was no driver! A worker on the road made the car go, turn, and stop. He

	used a remote control.

	卡車上沒有司機！一名工人在用搖控器控制卡車行駛的方向。

	The new place was five kilometers away. The church moved five hundred meters

	an hour. It took two days!

	大教堂緩慢地前進，整整兩天後，終於成功抵達他五公里外的新家！

	The people are happy now. Their old church is in their new town!

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	把整座教堂移到五千公尺以外的地方，真是一項壯舉。

	1. move 搬家。

	You are taking 2 days off next week? 你下星期要休兩天假?

	Yeah, I'm moving to a new place.對，我要搬到新的地方。

	It's so much trouble! 好麻煩喔!

	2. bigger 更大的。

	That's true. Moving is not fun.那是真的，搬家不好玩。

	Especially when you have a piano.尤其是有一架鋼琴時。

	It's much bigger than I thought! 它比我想的大多了。

	3. worker 工作人員。

	For that, movers can help you. 搬鋼琴搬家的人可以幫你忙。

	Those workers are very good at what they do. 那些工人很在行的。

	4. watch 注意看。

	I hope so. 我希望是那樣。

	I just want to sit on the side and watch. 我只想坐在旁邊看。

	你有搬家過嗎?

	move搬家 bigger更大的 worker工作人員 watch注意看

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. What did workers do to the road?

	a. Made it bigger

	b. Moved it

	c. Put wheels on it

	2. Where is the big church?

	a. Singapore

	b. Sweden

	c. Switzerland

	3. How far away was the new place?

	a. Five hundred meters

	b. Five kilometers

	c. Five hundred kilometers

	Answers

	1. a

	2. b

	3. b

	wheels!

	一座有113年歷史的教堂也要一起搬，因為大家很愛它！為了搬這個教堂，工人還把馬路拓寬了。他們把教堂抬到一輛大卡車上。

	The church was ready to go! Many people came to watch. Some came from other

	countries! The king of Sweden came!

	教堂準備出發了！來自世界各地的人都來見證教堂搬家。連瑞典的國王都出現了！

	The church started to move! Everyone was excited! But, where was the driver?

	所有人都興奮地看著教堂被卡車載走！欸？等一下！司機去哪裡了?

	There was no driver! A worker on the road made the car go, turn, and stop. He

	used a remote control.

	卡車上沒有司機！一名工人在用搖控器控制卡車行駛的方向。

	The new place was five kilometers away. The church moved five hundred meters

	an hour. It took two days!

	大教堂緩慢地前進，整整兩天後，終於成功抵達他五公里外的新家！

	The people are happy now. Their old church is in their new town!

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
sections.vocabulary:
Vocabulary

	把整座教堂移到五千公尺以外的地方，真是一項壯舉。

	1. move 搬家。

	You are taking 2 days off next week? 你下星期要休兩天假?

	Yeah, I'm moving to a new place.對，我要搬到新的地方。

	It's so much trouble! 好麻煩喔!

	2. bigger 更大的。

	That's true. Moving is not fun.那是真的，搬家不好玩。

	Especially when you have a piano.尤其是有一架鋼琴時。

	It's much bigger than I thought! 它比我想的大多了。

	3. worker 工作人員。

	For that, movers can help you. 搬鋼琴搬家的人可以幫你忙。

	Those workers are very good at what they do. 那些工人很在行的。

	4. watch 注意看。

	I hope so. 我希望是那樣。

	I just want to sit on the side and watch. 我只想坐在旁邊看。

	你有搬家過嗎?

	move搬家 bigger更大的 worker工作人員 watch注意看

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
sections.quiz:
Quiz

	1. What did workers do to the road?

	a. Made it bigger

	b. Moved it

	c. Put wheels on it

	2. Where is the big church?

	a. Singapore

	b. Sweden

	c. Switzerland

	3. How far away was the new place?

	a. Five hundred meters

	b. Five kilometers

	c. Five hundred kilometers

episodes.title: Clams Bring People to a Beach
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Clams Bring People to a Beach

	What do you do at the beach? Some kids play in the water. Some make sand

	castles. Some pick up seashells. And some dig for clams!

	你都在海邊做什麼呢？你可以玩水，還可以在沙灘上堆沙堡、撿貝殼、挖蛤蜊！

	A beach in Chiayi has lots of clams now! Many people know about the clams.

	They go to the beach. Some moms and dads bring their kids. Everyone looks for

	clams. It is fun! And it is free!

	嘉義布袋的沙灘上有好多蛤蜊！很多遊客會來這個海灘一起撿蛤蜊，不但不用花錢，還很有趣！

	Lots of people walk on the wet sand. The clams are under the sand. People

	look for little holes in the sand. Then they dig! Some people go in the water

	and dig.

	大家仔細的尋找沙灘上的小坑洞。找到後，他們努力向下挖，挖出藏在沙子裡的蛤蜊！

	People dig for clams in many ways. Some people use shovels. Some use small

	rakes. Some use nets. Some use baskets. And some use their hands.

	大家會用各種不同工具挖洞！有人用鏟子跟耙子，也有人用漁網，水桶，或是直接用手挖！

	Finding lots of clams is like winning a prize! Sometimes people find one clam

	in ten minutes. Sometimes people get a big basket of clams in thirty minutes!

	找蛤蜊就像在尋寶一樣，有的人十分鐘只挖到一顆，也有一些人半個小時內就能挖到一大桶的蛤蜊！

	What do people do with their clams? Some people cook and eat them. Yum! Some

	people sell them.

	蛤蜊可以拿來做什麼呢？有人會把蛤蜊煮來吃，也有人會把蛤蜊拿去賣！

	The beach was quiet before there were clams. Now many people dig for clams

	there. They have a good time, thanks to the clams!

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	海灘是充滿趣味的地方，有很多事可以做。

	1. basket 籃子。

	It's a nice day today. 今天天氣真好。

	Let's go dig up some clams! 我們去挖蛤蜊吧!

	I'm ready. 我都準備好了。

	I have my shovel, a basket, and sunglasses. 我帶了鏟子，籃子跟太陽眼鏡。

	2. look for 尋找。

	Now where are these clams of yours? 你的蛤蜊在哪裡?

	Just look for holes in the sand. 你找沙子上的小洞。

	That's where they hide. 牠們就躲在那兒。

	3. cook 煮。

	There's nothing here! 這裡什麼都沒有!

	I was hoping to cook and eat them! 我本來希望把牠們煮來吃的!

	4. eat 吃。

	Come on, let me buy you dinner. 來吧，我請你吃晚飯。

	At a seafood restaurant, right? 去海鮮餐廳對吧?

	Of course, let's have a good time eating clams there! 當然，去好好吃一頓蛤蜊!

	Do you like seafood? 請跟我讀單字。

	basket籃子 look for尋找 cook煮 eat吃

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. Where is the beach?

	a. Changhua

	b. Zuoying

	c. Chiayi

	2. What do people use to get clams at the beach?

	a. Shovels

	b. Hats

	c. Money

	3. What do some people do with their clams?

	a. Put them in the sand again

	b. Cook them and eat them

	c. Throw them in the water

	Answers

	1. c

	2. a

	3. b

episodes.title: A New Cool Animal in Australia
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	A New Cool Animal in Australia

	Australia has many cool animals. One is new to us. It is very cool!

	澳洲有很多有趣的生物。現在，有人發現了新的物種！

	Some people were in a forest on a mountain. They saw a tree branch with legs!

	But it was not a branch. It was a giant stick insect!

	有一群登山客在山上發現了一根長了腳的樹枝！但那其實是一隻巨大的竹節蟲！

	The people took pictures. They put the pictures online. That is where

	scientists first saw this insect. They were excited! Australia has giant

	stick insects. But this is a new kind!

	那群登山客把竹節蟲的照片傳到網路上。科學家看到照片後非常興奮！澳洲有很多大的竹節蟲，但他們第一次見到這個品種！

	This giant stick insect is the heaviest insect in Australia. It is forty-four

	grams. That is as heavy as a golf ball! Wow!

	這隻巨大的竹節蟲是澳洲最重的昆蟲。牠重達44克，跟一顆高爾夫球一樣重！

	This insect is also very long. Look from your teacher's elbow to the end of

	your teacher's longest finger. That is as long as the insect! Whoa!

	這隻昆蟲也很長。牠有一個大人的手肘到指尖那麼長！

	Scientists want to find out more about this insect. It is very big. But it is

	very hard to find. It lives at the top of tall trees. The trees are on

	mountains!

	科學家想深入研究這種大昆蟲，但這種竹節蟲很難找。他們住在山區的大樹上！

	Scientists also want to find more insects. There are many, many kinds of

	insects we don't know about. They are hard to find too!

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	澳洲發現特大號的竹節蟲，以前沒有記錄過。

	1. heaviest 最重的。

	Why is your backpack so heavy? 你的背包怎麼這麼重?

	Oh, this is not even the heaviest. 這還不是最重的呢。

	2. insect 昆蟲。

	The one I use when looking for insects, 我去找昆蟲時用的背包,

	that's the heavy one. 那個才重。

	But insects are very light. 但是昆蟲很輕。

	True. 沒錯。

	3. tree branch 樹枝。

	But I also need to bring back stones and tree branches.

	可是我得把石頭跟樹枝帶回來。

	Because you want to build them a home? 因為你要替牠們建一個家? Yeah.是的。

	4. forest 森林。

	I study them for a while, 我研究牠們一陣子，

	and then send them back to the forest. 然後把牠們放回森林。

	Do you like insects?

	來一起讀單字。

	heaviest最重的 insect昆蟲 tree branch樹枝 forest森林

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. What does the giant stick insect look like?

	a. A leaf

	b. A branch

	c. A flower

	2. Where did scientists first see the giant stick insect?

	a. Online

	b. In a forest

	c. On an elbow

	3. How heavy is this giant stick insect?

	a. Forty-four grams

	b. Forty-four kilograms

	c. Forty-four liters

	Answers

	1. b

	2. a

	3. a

episodes.title: Keelung's Old Shelters Become Happy Places
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Keelung's Old Shelters Become Happy Places

	Narrator: Long ago, Keelung needed shelters for its people. Shelters keep

	people safe when there is danger. When there is no more danger, people go

	home.

	以前打仗的時候，基隆需要可以讓人暫時避難的地方。

	Hmmmm… What was a good place for these shelters? Well, Keelung has many

	hills. Workers made more than six hundred shelters in the hills. Whoa! That's

	a lot!

	基隆有很多山地！因此，工人在基隆的山區建造了六百多個防空洞，讓大家可以躲起來！

	Some shelters are small. Three or four people can go in them. Some shelters

	are big. Many people can go in them.

	那些防空洞有大有小，大的可以容納很多人！

	Keelung does not need the shelters now. Many can be scary …

	Voice: Hello?!!

	Narrator: They are dark. Water drips slowly. There are snakes! There are

	spiders! And there are frogs!

	Voice: Eeeew!

	Narrator:

	現在，基隆已經不需要這些防空洞了。老舊的防空洞內又暗又潮濕，還會有蛇、蜘蛛、跟青蛙！

	But people want to use the shelters now. Schools take kids there. Kids learn

	about the shelters. One shelter shows art. One has a restaurant!

	防空洞有了新的功能！有老師帶學生去防空洞校外教學，還有一個防空洞被改建成餐廳。

	At first, the restaurant owner worried. Will snakes, spiders, and frogs scare

	people eating there? No! They laugh! They say "Look! A cute frog!"

	起初，餐廳老闆很擔心大家會被蛇、青蛙、和蜘蛛嚇跑。幸好客人都覺得青蛙很可愛！他們看到青蛙後開懷大笑！

	Some of Keelung's old shelters are not scary now. They are for learning. They

	are for enjoying art and food. These shelters are happy places now!

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	基隆很多防空洞已經搖身一變，成為吸引人的所在。

	1. dark 黑暗的。

	Wow, this cave is really dark and wet ! 這個山洞真是又黑又潮濕。

	Are you sure we can come here? 你確定我們可以來這裡?

	Oh yes, I've seen people coming in. 可以，我看過有人進來。

	2. spider 蜘蛛。

	Hey, something big just moved! 剛剛有大東西在動!

	Don't say that! 不要那樣說!

	I already saw two spiders. 我已經看到兩隻蜘蛛了。

	3. snake 蛇。

	Maybe there are snakes here too. 也許這裡還有蛇。

	Okay, that's it. I'm going out. 夠了，我出去了。

	No, I'm just kidding! 沒有啦，我開玩笑的!

	4. laugh 笑。

	I'm not laughing. 我可沒在笑。

	I'm scared. 我害怕。

	Alright, let's go. 好吧，我們走吧。

	你有去過防空洞嗎? 來讀單字。

	dark黑暗的 spider蜘蛛 snake蛇 laugh笑

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. Why were the shelters made?

	a. To keep people safe

	b. To sell good food

	c. To study old Keelung

	2. How many shelters did workers make in Keelung?

	a. Three or four

	b. One hundred

	c. More than six hundred

	3. What do people eating at the restaurant laugh about?

	a. The cute art

	b. A cute frog

	c. A cute kid

	Answers

	1. a

	2. c

	3. b

	4. laugh 笑。

	I'm not laughing. 我可沒在笑。

	I'm scared. 我害怕。

	Alright, let's go. 好吧，我們走吧。

	你有去過防空洞嗎? 來讀單字。

	dark黑暗的 spider蜘蛛 snake蛇 laugh笑

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
sections.quiz:
Quiz

	1. Why were the shelters made?

	a. To keep people safe

	b. To sell good food

	c. To study old Keelung

	2. How many shelters did workers make in Keelung?

	a. Three or four

	b. One hundred

	c. More than six hundred

	3. What do people eating at the restaurant laugh about?

	a. The cute art

	b. A cute frog

	c. A cute kid

episodes.title: University Studies Old Skate Park
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	University Studies Old Skate Park

	Skateboarding is cool. Did you know some surfers started it? About seventy

	years ago, they put roller skate wheels on short surfboards. They surfed the

	streets!

	玩滑板很酷！七十年前，一群喜歡衝浪的人把輪子裝到衝浪板上，就變成了滑板。他們在地面上衝浪！

	Young people fell in love with skateboarding. Skate parks were built all over

	the world!

	年輕人愛上滑板，世界各地都開始出現滑板場！

	Scotland's first skate park was built almost fifty years ago. Skateboarding

	there was exciting! Scotland's best skateboarders went there! Scotland's

	first big skateboarding contest was there.

	五十年前，蘇格蘭的第一個滑板場出現了！最優秀的蘇格蘭滑板選手都來這裡玩。他們舉辦了蘇格蘭第一場盛大的滑板比賽。

	Skate parks have to be safe for skateboarders. But keeping them safe costs

	lots of money. So this skate park closed after five years. It was under lots

	of dirt and trees for many years.

	滑板場必須是安全的，但維護場地要花很多錢。滑板場關門後，被樹葉和泥土掩蓋了很多年。

	But now a university is studying the skate park! And some people who were

	skateboarders at the park long ago are helping.

	現在有一所大學在研究這個滑板場！以前在這裡玩滑板的人也來幫忙了。

	Some are helping to take some of the dirt and trees away. Some are sharing

	stories, old pictures, or old videos of skateboarding at the skate park.

	他們幫忙清走樹葉和泥土，也分享大家以前在滑板場玩滑板的照片跟影片。

	Now Scotland won't forget its first skate park again!

	________________________________________

	Vocabulary

	昔日的滑板好手很高興多年之後，能看到老滑板場重見天日。

	1. forget 忘記。

	Do you remember this park? 你記得這個公園嗎?

	We used to hang out here after school. 我們以前放學後都在這裡玩。

	How can I forget? 我怎麼會忘記?

	I walk past here every day. 我每天都走過這裡。

	2. old 老的。

	We were so young then. 我們那時候好年輕。

	You're still young! 你現在還是很年輕!

	But I feel old. 但是我覺得老了。

	3. story 故事。

	Maybe you should write down your stories and share them.

	也許你應該寫你的故事然後分享。

	Will that make me young again? 那會讓我變年輕嗎?

	No. 不會。

	4. picture 照片。

	But if you post your best pictures, 但是假如你po你最好看的照片，

	people will think you're still young.大家會認為你還是很年輕。

	請跟我一起讀單字。

	forget忘記 old老的 story故事 picture照片

	________________________________________

	Quiz

	1. Who started skateboarding?

	a. Ice skaters

	b. Roller skaters

	c. Surfers

	2. About when was Scotland's first skate park built?

	a. Seventy years ago

	b. Sixty years ago

	c. Fifty years ago

	3. What was at Scotland's first skate park long ago?

	a. A university

	b. A big contest

	c. Old pictures

	Answers

	1. c

	2. c

	3. b

episodes.title: Taxi Driver Surprises Man
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Taxi Driver Surprises Man

	TAXI!

	Have you taken a taxi in Taiwan? Many taxi drivers here know great places to

	eat!

	你有在台灣搭過計程車嗎？很多計程車司機都會知道當地好吃的餐廳在哪裡！

	One day, a man got in a taxi. The taxi driver and the man talked. The man

	said he did not pay for long taxi rides. Someone else paid for him. This man

	also said he had lots of online money.

	有天，有一位男子坐上計程車。他和司機說他坐長途計程車不用自己付錢，也有很多虛擬貨幣。

	The taxi driver thought the man was a scammer. Scammers try to get money from

	people. Sometimes scammers tell people, "Let's meet and be friends." Then

	they ask for money.

	司機懷疑這一位乘客是騙別人錢的詐欺犯。

	The taxi driver quietly picked up his phone. He texted someone. Then he

	talked more with the man. The taxi driver said he knew about a good fish soup

	place.

	司機偷偷傳簡訊給別人後，繼續跟那名可疑的乘客聊天，並向他推薦了一間魚湯店。

	The taxi driver and the man went to the fish soup place. But someone else

	went too: a police officer! The taxi driver had texted the police!

	司機跟乘客一起到魚湯店吃飯。突然之間，警察出現了！原來司機偷偷聯繫了警察！

	The police wanted to ask the man questions. They thought the man was a

	scammer too.

	The police are trying hard to find scammers. This taxi driver tried to help

	them. What a surprise!

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	計程車司機抓到了涉入詐騙案的乘客。

	1. taxi 計程車。

	Hey, did you see my phone? 你有沒有看到我的手機

	I think I left it in the taxi! 我想我把它留在計程車裡了。

	Oh no, check your bag and pockets! 糟糕了，檢查一下你的包包和口袋。

	2. let's 讓我們來。

	I did. I can't find it anywhere. 我看過了，都找不到。

	The taxi driver seems like a nice guy. 計程車司機好像人不錯。

	Let's call him. 我們來打電話給他吧。

	3. place 地方。(按鍵聲音)

	Hello, I just took …..(淡出)

	The driver said he'll come back to this place to return the phone.

	司機說他會回到這裡還給我。

	4. police officer 警察。

	So nice! 真好!

	Yeah, I was worried that I might need a police officer to help.

	對啊，我本來還在擔心可能需要警察幫忙。

	今天的單字你記住了嗎?

	taxi計程車 let's讓我們來 place地方 police officer警察

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. What did the taxi driver tell the man about?

	a. Fried rice

	b. Fish soup

	c. Fruit juice

	2. Who did the taxi driver text?

	a. The man

	b. The police

	c. A scammer

	3. What did the police want to do?

	a. Ask the man questions

	b. Have dinner with the man

	c. Ask the man for money

	Answers

	1. b

	2. b

	3. a

episodes.title: No More Home Offices in Cafes
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	No More Home Offices in Cafes

	I want to have a drink at this cafe. But people are sitting … and sitting.

	Many are using their phones or laptop computers. Some are working. Some are

	studying. Some are watching videos. Hey, there's a seat! Ahhhh…

	這間咖啡廳客滿了。店裡的人都在用手機或電腦工作或是讀書。他們在咖啡廳的時間很長很長！

	In South Korea, many people use their phones and laptops in cafes too. But

	some people are making home offices in cafes!

	在南韓，很多人會在咖啡廳用電子產品。大家開始把咖啡廳當成自己的私人辦公室。

	Some of these people bring printers. Some bring big desktop computers! Some

	put small walls around their table!

	有一些人會帶印表機、桌上型電腦、甚至是隔板！

	And these people sit, and sit… and sit. Sometimes they leave for a long

	time. But they keep their things at the table. No one else can sit down! This

	is bad for other people. They cannot enjoy their drinks at the cafe.

	這些人會在咖啡廳坐很久，還會用東西霸佔位置。這樣一來，其他的客人都沒辦法在咖啡廳坐下！

	One cafe chain has many cafes in South Korea. Now it has new rules. People

	can bring phones and laptops. But they cannot bring printers, desktop

	computers, or small walls. And, people have to take their things when they

	leave a table.

	有一間連鎖咖啡廳設了新的規定。客人可以帶手機跟筆電，但不能帶印表機、桌上型電腦跟隔板，也不能再用私人物品占位子！

	The cafe chain wants everyone to enjoy their drinks. Do you think these new

	rules will work?

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	很多人在咖啡館占了太久的位子，讓別人沒辦法坐。

	1) drink 飲料。

	Ah, I just want to sit down and enjoy a drink. 我只想坐下來喝點飲料。

	My feet are killing me!我的腳痛死了。

	Same here. But no seats in this cafe.我也是，但是這家咖啡館沒位子。

	2) leave 離開。

	Should we wait? 我們應該等嗎?

	Maybe not. These people won't leave soon.也許不了，這些人不會很快走的。

	3) work 工作。

	I think they're working here.我想他們在這裡工作。

	Yeah, that man even has two laptops with

	him.對啊，那個人甚至帶了兩部筆記型電腦。

	4) seat 座位。

	I only need one small seat. 我只需要一個小小的座位。

	I can share it with your bag. 可以跟你的包包共享。

	Ha, my bag does need a break.我的包包確實需要歇一下。

	你想喝點飲料嗎?

	drink飲料 leave離開 work工作 seat座位

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. Where do people make home offices in cafes?

	a. South Africa

	b. Singapore

	c. South Korea

	2. What do some people bring to cafes to make home offices?

	a. Coffee

	b. Printers

	c. Videos

	3. Why is making a home office in a cafe bad for other people?

	a. They cannot sit down.

	b. They cannot use their phones.

	c. They cannot get a drink.

	Answers

	1. c

	2. b

	3. a

episodes.title: Delicious Treasure Is Going to Yilan
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Delicious Treasure Is Going to Yilan

	Narrator: Mmmmmm! Taiwan loves pork belly! It is the meat in lǔ ròu fàn, guà bāo, and other dishes. It is delicious! Pork belly looks delicious too. Under

	the pork skin, you can see fat, meat, fat, and meat. Ooohh!

	台灣人超愛五花肉，滷肉飯、刈包裡面都有！豬皮下面可以看到一層瘦一層肥的肉！

	There is a beautiful piece of pork belly. It's at the National Palace Museum

	in Taipei. But wait! It's not at the cafe. You cannot eat it.

	Crowd: What?!

	Narrator: Why not? Well, it is not food! It is a stone!

	故宮博物院有一塊看起來很美味的五花肉！但這塊肉沒辦法吃，因為它其實是一塊石頭！

	Who made it? No one knows. The top of the stone has many little cuts. It

	looks like pork skin. The sides are colored. They look like delicious fat and

	meat.

	石頭表面上有淺淺的痕跡，四周也都有顏色，看起來就像美味的豬肉。

	The museum has many treasures. People say this stone is the most important

	treasure!

	故宮有許多寶貝，有人說肉形石是最重要的收藏品之一！

	But the pork belly stone will leave the museum for a few months. It is going

	to Yilan for the first time. The stone will be in a big show at Lanyang

	Museum. The show is from December 23rd to March 22nd. You can see Yilan's

	treasures there too!

	這塊石頭要暫時搬家了！從12月23號到3月22號，它將首次前往宜蘭。大家也可以在蘭陽博物館欣賞到很多宜蘭的寶藏喔！

	What a great time to go to Yilan!

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	故宮博物院的肉形石，是明星展覽品。

	1. skin 皮。

	Oh, this dish looks beautiful! 這道菜真好看!

	Yeah, it's my pork belly with crispy skin.對，這是我的脆皮五花肉。

	2. first time 第一次。

	You made it yourself?! 你自己做的嗎?!

	Yeah, I'm trying it for the first time. 對，這是我第一次試做。

	3. fat 脂肪。

	Careful, that's a lot of fat. 你要小心，有很多脂肪喔。

	I know, but don't you think it smells too delicious to say "no"?

	我知道，但你不覺得這太香了，很難拒絕?

	I agree. 我同意。

	4. meat 肉。

	I usually don't eat meat for dinner.我通常晚飯不吃肉。

	But I simply must taste this. 但是我一定得嚐嚐這個。

	You won't be sorry.你不會後悔的。

	你今天學到哪些單字?

	skin皮 first time第一次 fat脂肪 meat肉

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. What kind of meat does the stone look like?

	a. Pork jelly

	b. Pork belly

	c. Beef belly

	2. What museum will the stone leave for a few months?

	a. Lanyang Museum

	b. Yilan Story Museum

	c. National Palace Museum

	3. Where will the stone be on December 23?

	a. Yilan

	b. Chiayi

	c. Yuanlin

	Answers

	1. b

	2. c

	3. a

sections.story:
________________________________

	Delicious Treasure Is Going to Yilan

	Narrator: Mmmmmm! Taiwan loves pork belly! It is the meat in lǔ ròu fàn, guà bāo, and other dishes. It is delicious! Pork belly looks delicious too. Under

	the pork skin, you can see fat, meat, fat, and meat. Ooohh!

	台灣人超愛五花肉，滷肉飯、刈包裡面都有！豬皮下面可以看到一層瘦一層肥的肉！

	There is a beautiful piece of pork belly. It's at the National Palace Museum

	in Taipei. But wait! It's not at the cafe. You cannot eat it.

	Crowd: What?!

	Narrator: Why not? Well, it is not food! It is a stone!

	故宮博物院有一塊看起來很美味的五花肉！但這塊肉沒辦法吃，因為它其實是一塊石頭！

	Who made it? No one knows. The top of the stone has many little cuts. It

	looks like pork skin. The sides are colored. They look like delicious fat and

	meat.

	石頭表面上有淺淺的痕跡，四周也都有顏色，看起來就像美味的豬肉。

	The museum has many treasures. People say this stone is the most important

	treasure!

	故宮有許多寶貝，有人說肉形石是最重要的收藏品之一！

	But the pork belly stone will leave the museum for a few months. It is going

	to Yilan for the first time. The stone will be in a big show at Lanyang

	Museum. The show is from December 23rd to March 22nd. You can see Yilan's

	treasures there too!

	這塊石頭要暫時搬家了！從12月23號到3月22號，它將首次前往宜蘭。大家也可以在蘭陽博物館欣賞到很多宜蘭的寶藏喔！

	What a great time to go to Yilan!

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
sections.vocabulary:
Vocabulary

	故宮博物院的肉形石，是明星展覽品。

	1. skin 皮。

	Oh, this dish looks beautiful! 這道菜真好看!

	Yeah, it's my pork belly with crispy skin.對，這是我的脆皮五花肉。

	2. first time 第一次。

	You made it yourself?! 你自己做的嗎?!

	Yeah, I'm trying it for the first time. 對，這是我第一次試做。

	3. fat 脂肪。

	Careful, that's a lot of fat. 你要小心，有很多脂肪喔。

	I know, but don't you think it smells too delicious to say "no"?

	我知道，但你不覺得這太香了，很難拒絕?

	I agree. 我同意。

	4. meat 肉。

	I usually don't eat meat for dinner.我通常晚飯不吃肉。

	But I simply must taste this. 但是我一定得嚐嚐這個。

	You won't be sorry.你不會後悔的。

	你今天學到哪些單字?

	skin皮 first time第一次 fat脂肪 meat肉

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	b. Chiayi

	c. Yuanlin

episodes.title: Man Saves Many With Bulldozer
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Man Saves Many With Bulldozer

	It is raining very hard. Streets and homes are flooded. The water is one

	meter high!

	下暴雨了！很多街道跟住宅都淹水了！

	A man is sleeping. A friend's call wakes him up. Huh?! He asks for help! Two

	older people cannot leave their flooded home!

	一名男子半夜被電話叫醒，他的朋友打來向他求救！有兩位老人家裡淹水了，但他們逃不出去。

	The man has a bulldozer. It is very strong. It has a scoop in front. The

	scoop can move lots of dirt. But, it can carry people too!

	這名男子有一台推土機。推土機前面的大鏟子除了可以鏟土，還可以載人！

	The man drives his bulldozer through the flood. He sees people standing on

	top of their homes! The scoop goes up. He shouts, "Jump in!" People jump in!

	Ten people ride safely in the scoop! The man takes them to a safe place.

	他看到很多人為了避難逃到自己家的屋頂上。他把推土機的鏟子伸長，把在屋頂上的人全部救了下來！

	Then the man drives to the two older people. They jump into the scoop. They

	are safe!

	接著，他開推土機到求救的老人家身邊，用鏟子把他們送到安全的地方！

	The man helps many more people. He works with firefighters too. Sometimes he

	stops water with his scoop for them!

	這名男子和消防隊員一起合作，他用他的推土機幫助了很多人 !

	The flood pushes the bulldozer. But the man doesn't stop. He drives for

	thirteen hours! He saves more than one hundred people!

	水流都快把推土機沖走了，但他沒有放棄。他開了13個小時的推土機，救了一百多個人！

	People call him the "Bulldozer Hero". One man can help many people!

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	說到在水災中救人，一般人不會想到推土機。但是這名駕駛做到了。

	1. flood 淹水。

	Did you hear about the flood last night? 你有聽說昨晚的水災嗎?

	Hear about it? 聽說?

	The street in front of my house was flooded !我家前面的路都淹水了!

	2) firefighter 消防員。

	I almost needed a boat to get to my car! 差點就需要船來送我去車子。

	That was really bad! 那真的很慘!

	Yeah, and even firefighters came around. 對啊，連消防員都跑來。

	3) carry 揹著。

	On a boat? 坐船嗎?

	No, they walked by, carrying sandbags. 沒有，他們揹著沙包走過去。

	4) wake up 叫醒。

	How about you? 你呢?

	I was fine.我很好。

	The sound of the rain woke me up, but that was it.

	雨聲把我吵醒，不過就只有那樣

	你有看過水災嗎?

	flood淹水 firefighter 消防員 carry揹著 wake up叫醒

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. How long did the man drive?

	a. Three hours

	b. Ten hours

	c. Thirteen hours

	2. Who did the man work with?

	a. Police officers

	b. Firefighters

	c. Doctors

	3. What do people call the man now?

	a. Bulldozer Hero

	b. Dozer Hero

	c. Flood Hero

	Answers

	1. c

	2. b

	3. a

episodes.title: Young Man Fights Cancer with His Plane
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Young Man Fights Cancer with His Plane

	A young man loves planes. He became a pilot three years ago. He was 17.

	A child in his family has cancer. It makes people very sick. The young man

	wanted to help fight it.

	一名熱愛飛機的青少年，十七歲那年成為飛行員。

	他的家族中有個小孩得了癌症，他決心要幫忙抗癌。

	He wanted people to give money to fight cancer. But how? He had to do

	something big.

	He could fly a long way in a small plane, alone! He could go to the seven

	continents!

	他希望幫助癌症病患，但是怎麼幫呢? 他想到可以開著飛機，飛越七大洲來募款！

	He began in North America. Then he flew to South America, Europe, Asia,

	Africa, and Australia. He went to 60 countries!

	他從北美洲出發，飛到了南美洲、歐洲、亞洲、非洲、還有澳洲！

	Then, he flew to Antarctica. He did it! Now he's the youngest pilot to fly

	alone to the seven continents! People gave money!

	最後他抵達南極洲，成為全球最年輕的，獨自飛過七大洲的飛行員!

	而且別人還捐錢給他！

	But there were big problems. He broke the law by flying to Antarctica.

	He had to pay money to a country. But the country will use it for children

	with cancer.

	但是他違反了法律，因為沒有降落南極洲的許可證。他被罰錢了，但那個國家會把錢用在癌症病童上！

	And he could not leave Antarctica for two months! He could not fly his plane,

	and there were no other planes.

	他被困在南極洲兩個月，這段時間他都不能開飛機。

	But now he is back in the U.S. He will keep flying and fighting cancer!

	________________________________________

	Vocabulary

	這個男孩不但創下世界紀錄，還能獲得捐款。

	1. continent 洲。

	If you could fly anywhere in the world,要是你能飛到世界任何一個地方， where

	would you go? 你會去哪裡?

	Everywhere! At least 3 continents! 哪裡都想去。至少三大洲!

	2. Europe 歐洲。

	And they are…? 哪三大洲?

	Europe, North America and South America! 歐洲，北美洲，南美洲。

	So you like America. 所以你喜歡美洲。

	Oh, yes. 我是。

	3. country 國家。

	It has many cool countries like Canada and

	Chile.它有很多很酷的國家，例如加拿大跟智利。

	I guess you're right.你說對了。

	4. pilot 飛機駕駛。

	Ever thought of becoming a pilot? 你想過去當機師嗎?

	No, I can't. I'd get air sick. 我不行，我會暈機。

	你想開飛機嗎?那要會英文喔! continent洲 Europe歐洲 country國家

	pilot飛機駕駛

	________________________________________

	Quiz

	1. How old was the man when he became a pilot?

	a. 7

	b. 17

	c. 60

	2. Which continent did the man begin flying from?

	a. North America

	b. Asia

	c. Australia

	3. Where was the man for two months?

	a. South America

	b. Australia

	c. Antarctica

	Answers

	1. b

	2. a

	3. c
