episodes.title: Turtle Found Five Kilometers From Home
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Turtle Found Five Kilometers From Home

	A family had a turtle. She lived in their garden. But one day, they could not

	find her! They looked everywhere in the garden. They looked again and again!

	有一家人在他們的花園裡養了一隻烏龜。有一天，烏龜不見了！大家怎麼找都找不到他！

	Was the turtle somewhere in the garden? Or did she run away from home? Days

	went by. Then a month went by. They were sad. Would they see her again?

	烏龜離家出走了嗎？過了整整一個月，烏龜還是沒有出現。所有人都很難過，因為他們也許再也見不到他們的烏龜了。

	Five kilometers away, a young girl was walking in a field. She almost stepped

	on a turtle! She was worried. Maybe the turtle was not safe there. The girl

	put the turtle in her T-shirt! Then she went to a store.

	在五公里外的一片草皮上，一個小女孩差一點踩到一隻烏龜！他擔心烏龜在野外會受傷，所以把烏龜用衣服包起來，交給附近的店家保管。

	The store owner took a picture of the turtle. Then he put the picture online.

	Four hours later, the family saw it! The turtle was their turtle! They were

	very happy. They went to the store.

	店長拍了烏龜的照片後，上傳到網路上。不久後，那一家人就看到烏龜的照片！那就是他們走失的烏龜！他們迫不急待想把烏龜帶回家。

	This small, slow turtle walked a long, long, way! She crossed fields. She

	crossed roads. She crossed a small river! And she stayed safe!

	這隻小烏龜走了好遠好遠。他跨越了草原、馬路、還有一條小溪。幸好他沒有受傷！

	The turtle is back in her garden. Now the family wants to find the young girl

	and say "thank you!"

	現在，烏龜安全回家了！

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	烏龜雖然走得慢，但是也可以走很遠。

	1. run away 跑掉。

	My dog ran away again last night. 我的狗昨晚又跑走了。

	Again? 又一次?

	Did you scare him? 你把他嚇跑了?

	No, he loved me! 才不是，他超愛我的。

	2. a long way 很長的路。

	Anyway, a policeman called me today, 不管怎樣警察今天打電話給我，

	saying the dog is in Beitou. 說我的狗在北投。

	That's a long way from home! 那離你家很遠呢!

	3. cross 越過。

	Yeah, he had to cross many streets to get there.

	對啊，他得過好多條馬路才能到那裏。

	4. picture 照片。

	How did the police know it's yours? 警察怎麼知道是你的狗?

	I posted his picture online. 我把他的照片po上網。

	Smart! 真聰明!

	請跟我一起讀單字。

	run away跑掉 a long way很長的路 cross越過 picture照片

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. How long was the turtle away from home?

	a. One day

	b. One week

	c. One month

	2. Who found the turtle?

	a. The family

	b. A store owner

	c. A young girl

	3. Where was the turtle found?

	a. In a field

	b. On a road

	c. In a small river

	Answers

	1. c

	2. c

	3. a

	Four hours later, the family saw it! The turtle was their turtle! They were

	very happy. They went to the store.

	店長拍了烏龜的照片後，上傳到網路上。不久後，那一家人就看到烏龜的照片！那就是他們走失的烏龜！他們迫不急待想把烏龜帶回家。

	This small, slow turtle walked a long, long, way! She crossed fields. She

	crossed roads. She crossed a small river! And she stayed safe!

	這隻小烏龜走了好遠好遠。他跨越了草原、馬路、還有一條小溪。幸好他沒有受傷！

	The turtle is back in her garden. Now the family wants to find the young girl

	and say "thank you!"

	現在，烏龜安全回家了！

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
sections.vocabulary:
Vocabulary

	烏龜雖然走得慢，但是也可以走很遠。

	1. run away 跑掉。

	My dog ran away again last night. 我的狗昨晚又跑走了。

	Again? 又一次?

	Did you scare him? 你把他嚇跑了?

	No, he loved me! 才不是，他超愛我的。

	2. a long way 很長的路。

	Anyway, a policeman called me today, 不管怎樣警察今天打電話給我，

	saying the dog is in Beitou. 說我的狗在北投。

	That's a long way from home! 那離你家很遠呢!

	3. cross 越過。

	Yeah, he had to cross many streets to get there.

	對啊，他得過好多條馬路才能到那裏。

	4. picture 照片。

	How did the police know it's yours? 警察怎麼知道是你的狗?

	I posted his picture online. 我把他的照片po上網。

	Smart! 真聰明!

	請跟我一起讀單字。

	run away跑掉 a long way很長的路 cross越過 picture照片

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
sections.quiz:
Quiz

	1. How long was the turtle away from home?

	a. One day

	b. One week

	c. One month

	2. Who found the turtle?

	a. The family

	b. A store owner

	c. A young girl

	3. Where was the turtle found?

	a. In a field

	b. On a road

	c. In a small river

episodes.title: Pay for Food With Plastic Waste at This Cafe
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Pay for Food With Plastic Waste at This Cafe

	Oh! This cafe looks good! But everyone here has old plastic bags. They have

	old plastic bottles too. Why?

	咦? 這間咖啡館的顧客，手上都拿著舊塑膠袋跟寶特瓶欸！

	This cafe in India doesn't take money. It takes plastic waste! One kilogram

	of plastic waste pays for one lunch or dinner. People get rice, two kinds of

	curry, soup, bread, salad, and pickles! Doesn't that sound great?

	這家在印度的咖啡廳不收錢，只收塑膠垃圾！一公斤的垃圾可以換到一頓菜色豐富的午餐或是晚餐。聽起來很棒吧！

	Half a kilogram of plastic waste pays for one breakfast. People can get a

	potato burger. Or they can get a pastry with vegetables in it. Yum!

	半公斤的塑膠垃圾也可以換到一份美味的早餐喔！

	This cafe is helping hungry people. It's cleaning up the city too! Every

	breakfast, lunch, and dinner means less plastic waste on the streets.

	這家咖啡館不但能餵飽飢餓的人，也能淨化環境、減少城市中的塑膠垃圾。

	The cafe has been open for six years. People have given it 23 tons of

	plastic! That's as heavy as 500 10-year-old kids in Taiwan!

	咖啡廳已經開幕六年了，六年來他們總共收到了23噸的塑膠垃圾！

	There are more and more cafes like this in India. All of them take plastic

	waste. Some give food. Some give rice or other things.

	這樣子運作的咖啡廳在印度越來越多。他們收下大家的塑膠垃圾後，把大家餵飽！

	Would you take one kilogram of plastic waste and eat at this kind of cafe?

	Let's go!

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	印度這家店，鼓勵大家回收塑膠垃圾換取食物。

	1. breakfast 早餐，lunch 午餐。

	I'm so hungry I could eat 3 burgers! 我餓到可以吃三個漢堡!

	Oh my! Did you miss breakfast? 天哪，你錯過了早餐?

	Breakfast and lunch 早餐跟中飯.

	2. rice 米飯。

	Then you should try their fried rice too. 那你也應該試試他們的炒飯。

	Bring it on! 都來吧!

	3. pastry 糕餅。

	How about some pastry like apple pie? 要不要來點糕餅，例如蘋果派?

	I love apple pie! 我喜歡蘋果派!

	4. half 一半。

	Now I'm too full! 現在我太飽了!

	I'll save half of the pie for later. 我留一半的派晚一點吃。

	今天的單字每天都會用到。

	breakfast早餐 lunch午餐 rice米飯 pastry糕餅 half一半

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. What does this cafe do?

	a. Grow potatoes

	b. Get money for food

	c. Clean up the city

	2. How much plastic waste pays for a lunch or dinner?

	a. Half a kilogram

	b. One kilogram

	c. Two kilograms

	3. How much plastic waste have people given to the cafe in six years?

	a. 20 tons

	b. 23 tons

	c. 30 tons

	Answers

	1. c

	2. b

	3. b

	咦? 這間咖啡館的顧客，手上都拿著舊塑膠袋跟寶特瓶欸！

episodes.title: Tomatoes Are Fun in This Town
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Tomatoes Are Fun in This Town

	Everyone in a small town in Spain is excited. Big trucks are coming! They are

	full of tomatoes! It's time for a big tomato fight!

	載著番茄的大卡車正在開往西班牙的一個小鎮。他們要舉辦一場盛大的番茄大戰！

	Eighty years ago, some kids in the town got mad. They threw tomatoes at each

	other! That's how the town's tomato fight started.

	八十年前小鎮裡面有一群小孩吵架，拿起番茄互相扔，番茄大戰就這麼開始了！

	This year, 22,000 people threw tomatoes! Many came from around the world.

	They paid 500 Taiwan dollars to throw.

	今年，有兩萬多人從世界各地來這個小鎮一起丟番茄！

	There's a rule. Everyone has to squash their tomatoes. That way, no one gets

	hurt.

	番茄大戰有一個規則：所有的番茄都要先壓扁才能丟，這樣才能避免番茄砸傷別人！

	The fun starts! People squash their tomatoes. They throw them! They get more

	tomatoes! They throw 120 tons of tomatoes!

	番茄大戰開始了！大家把壓扁的番茄丟出去，˙一顆接著一顆！他們總共扔了120噸的番茄！

	Wait … Does this tomato fight waste food? Nope! These tomatoes are not good

	for eating.

	番茄大戰並不會浪費糧食，因為這些番茄本來就不是拿來吃的。

	After one hour, the fight stops. The town is very red. Tomatoes are

	everywhere! Then, fire trucks come. They clean the streets. People take

	showers outside, with their clothes on.

	一個小時後，番茄大戰結束了！小鎮裡到處都是紅紅的番茄汁。消防車開入小鎮，用水柱把大戰後的街道清洗乾淨！大家也都在戶外穿著衣服把自己洗乾淨。

	Everyone had tons of tomato fun!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	西班牙小鎮這個活動，讓它聞名全世界。

	1. fight 打仗。

	Have you ever had a food fight? 你有玩過食物大戰嗎?

	Oh yes, with my sister. 有，跟我姊姊。

	2. each other 互相。

	We threw popcorn at each other! 我們互相扔爆米花。

	And French fries, too! 還有薯條!

	It sounds fun! 聽起來很好玩!

	3. everywhere 到處。

	Yeah, but cleaning was tough. 但是清理可麻煩了。

	They were everywhere! 它們掉的到處都是。

	4. waste 浪費。

	That's why our parents never let us use eggs.

	那是為什麼我爸媽從不讓我們用雞蛋。

	They said that would waste too much food. 她說那樣太浪費食物。

	And it's very hard to clean. 而且超難清理。

	來讀讀今天的單字。

	fight打仗 each other互相 everywhere到處 waste浪費

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. Where is the tomato fight?

	a. Japan

	b. Spain

	c. France

	2. Who started the tomato fight eighty years ago?

	a. Tourists

	b. Kids

	c. Farmers

	3. What is the rule of the tomato fight?

	a. Wear goggles

	b. Bring tomatoes

	c. Squash tomatoes

	Answers

	1. b

	2. b

	3. c

episodes.title: Saving Eels in England
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Saving Eels in England

	Eels look like snakes. They move like snakes. But they live in water! Eels

	are very long fish.

	鰻魚長得像蛇，動作也像蛇，但牠們其實是水生動物！

	Long ago, rivers in one part of England had many eels! People could catch two

	hundred eels in one night! But now people can catch one in one night. Maybe.

	很久以前，英國有個地方的河流中有很多鰻魚。可是現在鰻魚數量已經大幅減少。

	Why? Rivers are dirty. Eels cannot find food. And they cannot go to other

	rivers for food. River walls stop them.

	Eels need help! But not many people know.

	這是因為河流被汙染後，鰻魚找不到食物吃。他們想去別的河流覓食也會被河堤擋住。鰻魚需要大家的幫忙！

	Some people are telling others about eels. One teacher gives baby eels to

	many schools. The kids give their eels food. They clean the eel tanks. They

	study all about eels. A few weeks later, the kids put their eels in a river.

	Now they know eels need help.

	有一位老師把鰻魚幼苗分發給不同學校。小學生飼養這些鰻魚，給牠們良好的生活環境。幾個星期之後，小學生把鰻魚送到河流中。

	Other people are helping eels find food. They make big ropes. They put them

	on river walls. The ropes help eels go over the walls. Then they find food in

	other rivers.

	還有其他人也在想辦法幫助鰻魚覓食。他們在河堤上放繩索，幫助鰻魚跨越河堤，到別的河流吃東西！

	Now more people know eels need help. And more people are helping. Let's hope

	there will be many eels again in England!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	拯救野生鰻魚，有各種不同的方法。

	1. catch 捕捉。

	Did you have a nice weekend? 周末過得好嗎?

	Yeah, I just got back from a fishing trip. 很好，我才剛剛去釣魚回來。

	Interesting! Did you catch anything? 真有趣，有抓到什麼嗎?

	I did! 有!

	2. look like 看起來像。

	A turtle. 一隻烏龜。

	A turtle? 烏龜?

	Hey, it's not your everyday turtle. 可不是普通的烏龜。

	It looks like a pancake 牠看起來像鬆餅。

	3. live 居住。

	Turtles are not fish, right? 烏龜不是魚吧?

	Of course not. 當然不是。

	But they live in water. 不過牠們住在水裡。

	4. river 河流。

	Did you put your turtle back? 你有把烏龜放回去嗎?

	I sure did! It's a nice river. 當然有，那是一條很好的河。

	還記得剛剛的單字嗎?

	catch捕捉 look like看起來像 live居住 river河流

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. What are eels?

	a. Fish

	b. Snakes

	c. Birds

	2. Long ago, how many eels could people catch in one night?

	a. One

	b. One hundred

	c. Two hundred

	3. What are the big ropes for?

	a. Catching eels to eat

	b. Helping eels go over walls

	c. Cleaning eel tanks

	Answers

	1. a

	2. c

	3. b

episodes.title: Belize Wins the World Cup for a Very Old Ballgame
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Belize Wins the World Cup for a Very Old Ballgame

	The Maya people have lived in Central America for thousands of years. These

	smart people made many new things.

	住在中美洲好幾千年的馬雅人十分聰明。他們發明了很多東西！

	The Maya were the first to make rubber. They made rubber balls! They made a

	game with these balls.

	馬雅人也是最早做出橡膠的人，也創造了橡膠球，而且發明橡膠球遊戲。

	The ballgame is called "pok-ta-pok." Maybe it is the first ballgame played in

	teams! There are two teams. They use a heavy ball. It is three or four

	kilograms!

	這個遊戲叫 "pok-ta-pok"，

	很可能是第一個分組對抗的球類遊戲！遊戲中用的球有三到四公斤那麼重！

	The players have to keep the ball in the air. That's like volleyball. But

	they cannot hit the ball with their hands. They hit it with their hips!

	選手要讓球保持在空中，像排球一樣！但他們不能用手，而是要用他們的臀部打球！

	The players try to put the ball through a ring. That's like basketball. But

	the ring is very small! And remember: players cannot use their hands!

	選手要像打籃球一樣，把球投進籃框。但籃框非常小，他們也不能用手托球！

	Today, more and more Maya are playing pok-ta-pok. Central America, Mexico,

	and the U.S. have teams. And every two years, there is a Pok-ta-pok World

	Cup! Belize won the first three World Cups. Wow! Then Mexico won two.

	現在，有越來越多瑪雅人玩pok-ta-pok。墨西哥，美國、和中美洲各國都有球隊。每兩年就會舉辦一次pok-ta-pok世界盃，讓這些球隊一決勝負。

	The 6th World Cup was this year. Seven countries played. Belize and Mexico

	played the last game! And, Belize won!

	________________________________________

	Vocabulary

	古老的馬雅文化可以追溯到西元前兩千年，他們也會玩球。

	1. volleyball 排球。

	Hey, Nancy! Long time no see! 南西，好久不見! What have you been up to

	lately? 最近都在忙什麼?

	I've been playing volleyball with some friends after

	work.我下班之後都跟朋友打排球。

	2. ballgame 球類遊戲。

	Really? I didn't know you liked ballgames.真的喔?我都不知道你喜歡玩球。

	I thought you were more of a biker.我以為你比較愛騎車。

	3. play 玩。

	I was. 以前是。

	But my office has this game night every

	Friday,但是我的公司每周五晚上是玩球日，

	and they always play volleyball. 都是打排球。

	4. keep 保持。

	That's so cool! 真酷呢!

	I tried it once but had trouble keeping it in the air.

	我玩過一次但是很難維持球不掉下來。

	你喜歡打什麼球? 來讀單字。

	volleyball排球 ballgame球類遊戲 play玩 keep保持

	________________________________________

	Quiz

	1. Where have the Maya people lived for thousands of years?

	a. North America

	b. Central America

	c. South America

	2. Who first made rubber?

	a. Pok-ta-pok players

	b. The Maya

	c. A Mexican man

	3. What do pok-ta-pok players hit the ball with?

	a. Their hands

	b. Their feet

	c. Their hips

	Answers

	1. b

	2. b

	3. c

episodes.title: Bear Needs Help with a Snack Jar
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Bear Needs Help with a Snack Jar

	Most bears are strong and dangerous. But some bears need help.

	大部分的熊強壯而兇猛，但有時候也需要別人幫忙！

	A two-year-old bear in a U.S. city needed help. His head was in a big plastic

	jar. He could not take the jar off. Aww … Poor bear!

	有一頭兩歲的熊，牠的頭被卡在透明塑膠罐裡。牠沒辦法把罐子弄掉，需要幫忙！

	Why was the bear's head in the jar? Nobody knows. Maybe the jar had some

	snacks in it. Maybe he ate the snacks.

	我們不知道這頭熊為什麼會把頭卡在塑膠罐裡。可能是吃罐子裡的點心時卡住的！

	The bear could drink some water. But he could not eat. He became very thin.

	He was about 32 kilograms. Most two-year-old bears are 68 kilograms!

	牠可以喝水，但沒辦法吃東西。可憐的熊瘦到只剩下32公斤，比一般的熊瘦很多很多！

	For eleven days, people saw this bear walking around. They called the city.

	City workers tried to find him. But he walked a lot. He walked about 80

	kilometers in one week!

	當地的居民看見熊到處走動，他們打給當地機構尋求幫助。但這頭熊很難找，因為牠一個星期可以走80公里！

	Finally, the workers found the bear. They gave him medicine. It made him

	sleep. Then, they took the jar off of his head.

	工作人員終於找到熊了！他們用藥物讓熊睡著後，把罐子從牠頭上摘下來。

	The workers let the bear go. He needs to sleep all winter soon. But first, he

	needs to eat a lot!

	拿下罐子後，這隻熊要馬上去大吃一頓，為冬眠做準備！

	If you see an animal that needs help, call your city!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	還好有人幫了這頭熊一個大忙。

	1. take off 拿掉或者脫掉。

	Why does your cat look so angry? 你的貓怎麼看起來很生氣?

	I tried to take a piece of tape off her tail. 我想把她尾巴上的一片膠帶撕掉。

	And she got upset? 她就不高興了?

	Yeah. 對。

	2. medicine 藥品。

	I think you need some medicine for those scratches.

	我覺得你那些抓傷需要擦一點藥。

	No, I'm fine. 不用了，我還好。

	3. poor 可憐的。

	Poor cat. 可憐的貓。

	She and I don't get along well.她跟我合不來。

	Poor you! 你比較可憐。

	4. thin 瘦的。

	Where did you find her? 你在哪裡找到她的?

	In the park two months ago. 在公園，兩個月之前。

	She was so thin, only about 2 kilos! 她好瘦，只有兩公斤吧。

	今天的單字你可記住了?

	take off拿掉或者脫掉 medicine藥品 poor可憐的 thin瘦的

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. How many kilograms was the bear?

	a. 32 kilograms

	b. 68 kilograms

	c. 80 kilograms

	2. What made the bear go to sleep?

	a. The jar

	b. Medicine

	c. Snacks

	3. What does the bear need to do before sleeping all winter?

	a. Call his city

	b. Find a new jar

	c. Eat a lot

	Answers

	1. a

	2. b

	3. c

episodes.title: The Biggest Pumpkin Festival
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	The Biggest Pumpkin Festival

	Today is Halloween. Maybe you'll see pumpkins with scary faces! BOO!

	今天是萬聖節！你也許會在路上看到可怕的南瓜燈喔！

	Germany has the world's biggest pumpkin festival. There are half a million

	pumpkins! Whoa! They are orange, green, white, yellow, brown, pink, and

	black! Ewwww!

	世界上最大的南瓜節在德國。這個節日有五十萬顆七彩繽紛的南瓜！

	Why are there so many pumpkins? Well, this year, you can see Superman, Mickey

	Mouse, King Kong and others. They are big. And they are made of pumpkins!

	今年的南瓜節會看到超人、米老鼠、還有金剛的雕像。這些雕像全都是用南瓜做的！

	And, you can buy pumpkins. You can make scary faces on them! You can eat

	pumpkin ice cream! And pumpkin pizza! And pumpkin french fries!

	你也可以在南瓜節買南瓜，在上面刻出可怕的表情，或者是享用各種美味的南瓜料理，像是南瓜冰淇淋，還有南瓜披薩，或是南瓜薯條！

	You can watch a boat race. The boats are made of … yes, big pumpkins!

	在南瓜節還可以看到划船比賽，那些船是超大南瓜做的！

	You can go to two contests for the biggest pumpkin! One is for Germany. One

	is for Europe. The world's biggest pumpkin was about 1,250 kilograms. Will

	there be a bigger one this year?

	很多人會參加德國跟歐洲最大南瓜比賽。世界最大的南瓜有1250公斤重，今年會不會有南瓜破紀錄呢？

	At the end of the festival, big pumpkins are cut open. And you can buy their

	seeds. Then you can grow big pumpkins.

	活動結束時，大南瓜會被切開，而你可以把南瓜子買回家，試著種出更大的南瓜！

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	南瓜節聽起來很好玩吧?

	1. contest 比賽。

	Hey, Nancy, are you going to the Halloween party? 南西，你去不去萬聖節派對?

	Sure, I already bought a big pumpkin for the contest.

	當然，我已經買了大南瓜參加比賽。

	2. bigger 更大的。

	How big are we talking? 有多大呢?

	Bigger than any you've ever seen! 比你看過的都大!

	3. watch 看。

	Wow, I'd love to see it! 哇，我想看看。

	Then come to the party and watch me win. 那你也去派對，看我贏。

	4. ice cream 冰淇淋。

	What are you going to do with that giant thing? 你準備拿那個大東西怎麼辦?

	I'll make pumpkin ice cream and pies. 我要做南瓜冰淇淋跟南瓜派。

	你喜歡吃南瓜嗎? 來一起讀單字。

	contest比賽 bigger更大的 watch看 ice cream冰淇淋

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. Where is the world's biggest pumpkin festival?

	a. Jamaica

	b. Germany

	c. Japan

	2. How many pumpkins are at the festival?

	a. Half a million

	b. Half a billion

	c. Half an hour

	3. What can you watch at the festival?

	a. A dragon boat race

	b. A pumpkin boat race

	c. A pumpkin pizza race

	Answers

	1. b

	2. a

	3. b

episodes.title: Taiwan's High-Speed Rail Trains Get Quieter
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Taiwan's High-Speed Rail Trains Get Quieter

	Taiwan's high-speed rail trains are great. They are very fast. And now, these

	trains are better! Why? They are quieter.

	台灣高鐵變得更好、更安靜了！

	No, the trains are not quieter. The people on the trains are quieter. Why?

	There are new rules on the high-speed rail trains.

	變安靜的不是高鐵本身，而是列車上的乘客。這是因為高鐵有了新規定！

	Before, some people listened to loud music on the trains. Everyone heard it!

	Argh! But now, people have to use headphones or earphones to listen to music.

	People have to use them to watch videos too.

	以前，會有人在車廂內大聲播音樂。新規定上路後，乘客看影片或是聽音樂時都必須戴上耳機！

	People can talk on their phones. But now they have to talk near the train

	doors. Why? The doors are not near the seats.

	乘客想講電話，必須要到遠離座位區，車廂跟車廂之間的空間去講。

	Almost everyone on the train has to talk quietly. But moms and dads do not

	have to worry. It is okay for babies and kids to talk and cry!

	但不是所有人都要輕聲細語。嬰兒跟小朋友可以講話，所以他們的家長不用擔心他們會違反規定！

	People can see the new rules in high-speed rail stations. They can see them

	on the trains. Workers show the rules to loud people too.

	新的規定公告在高鐵站和高鐵車廂內。工作人員也會提醒吵鬧的人要小聲一點！

	These rules are making Taiwan's high-speed rail trains quieter. That's great

	for people who want to sleep!

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	現在搭高鐵，不能大聲講話或發出噪音。

	1. quiet 安靜的。

	It's so quiet in this cafe today. 今天這咖啡館好安靜。

	Yeah, even the coffee machine sounds quieter.

	對啊，連咖啡機的聲音都安靜了些。

	2. headphone 耳機。

	It's better for me.這對我比較好。

	I left my headphones at home. 我把耳機留在家裡了。

	3. loud 大聲的。

	What kind of music do you listen to? 你都聽甚麼音樂?

	I don't listen to music. 我不聽音樂。

	It's often too loud. 音樂通常太吵了。

	4. why 為什麼。

	I prefer podcasts. 我比較喜歡聽播客。

	Like "Wow in the World." 比如說[世界上的哇]。

	Why do you like it? 為什麼喜歡呢?

	Lots of cool stories. 有很多很酷的故 事。

	What do you listen to every day? 來一起讀單字。

	quiet 安靜的 headphone 耳機 loud 大聲的 why 為什麼

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. What is making Taiwan's high-speed rail trains quieter?

	a. New rules

	b. Fast trains

	c. Loud music

	2. What do people have to use to watch videos on Taiwan's high-speed rail

	trains?

	a. Train doors

	b. Rail stations

	c. Headphones

	3. What does almost everyone on Taiwan's high-speed rail trains have to do?

	a. Talk quietly

	b. Listen to music

	c. Watch videos

	Answers

	1. a

	2. c

	3. a

sections.story:
________________________________

	Taiwan's High-Speed Rail Trains Get Quieter

	Taiwan's high-speed rail trains are great. They are very fast. And now, these

	trains are better! Why? They are quieter.

	台灣高鐵變得更好、更安靜了！

	No, the trains are not quieter. The people on the trains are quieter. Why?

	There are new rules on the high-speed rail trains.

	變安靜的不是高鐵本身，而是列車上的乘客。這是因為高鐵有了新規定！

	Before, some people listened to loud music on the trains. Everyone heard it!

	Argh! But now, people have to use headphones or earphones to listen to music.

	People have to use them to watch videos too.

	以前，會有人在車廂內大聲播音樂。新規定上路後，乘客看影片或是聽音樂時都必須戴上耳機！

	People can talk on their phones. But now they have to talk near the train

	doors. Why? The doors are not near the seats.

	乘客想講電話，必須要到遠離座位區，車廂跟車廂之間的空間去講。

	Almost everyone on the train has to talk quietly. But moms and dads do not

	have to worry. It is okay for babies and kids to talk and cry!

	但不是所有人都要輕聲細語。嬰兒跟小朋友可以講話，所以他們的家長不用擔心他們會違反規定！

	People can see the new rules in high-speed rail stations. They can see them

	on the trains. Workers show the rules to loud people too.

	新的規定公告在高鐵站和高鐵車廂內。工作人員也會提醒吵鬧的人要小聲一點！

	These rules are making Taiwan's high-speed rail trains quieter. That's great

	for people who want to sleep!

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

episodes.title: Boy Makes People Happy
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Boy Makes People Happy

	Narrator: When we hear "You did a great job" or "You look nice," that feels

	good! It can make us smile all day!

	每個人受到稱讚時，心情都會變好！

	A nine-year-old boy in the U.S. likes to talk to people. He likes to make

	them happy. He tells people nice things about them!

	美國有個九歲的男孩很喜歡稱讚別人。

	The boy put a small table in front of his house. He wrote a sign for the

	table. It says he will tell people nice things about them for free!

	Woman: Good morning!

	Boy: You look really pretty today!

	Woman: Oh, thank you! You make me feel so good today.

	Boy: Have a great day!

	Woman: You too!

	Narrator: He doesn't want people to pay to be happy. He says that is silly.

	And he is right!

	他不希望大家需要花錢才能得到快樂。他在家門口擺攤，免費稱讚大家，讓大家露出會心的一笑！

	When people go to his table, he asks about their day. He thinks a lot about

	what they say. Then he says something nice about them. Maybe he says "Your

	shoes are cool!", "You are very smart.", or "Oh, you have a very nice smile!

	It makes me very happy!"

	他會認真和大家聊天，再給他們一個特別的讚美！他也許會說，「你的鞋子超酷！」，「你好聰明！」或是，「你的微笑讓我好開心！」

	The boy has made more than sixty people smile! Some come back again and

	again. One person came back four times!

	已經有六十個人因為這個男孩而露出笑容了！也有人會回來找他，想再一次被他稱讚！

	Saying nice things to someone makes them feel good. It can make YOU feel good

	too! So try to say something nice to someone today!

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	喜歡講好話的男孩，讓大家都開心!

	1. look 看起來。

	You look nice today! 你今天很好看呢。

	New shirt?新襯衫嗎?

	Yeah, I feel great in it. 對啊，我也覺得很好。

	2. someone 有人。

	I'd say it makes you look smart, too. 我也要說穿這樣看起來很聰明。

	Thank you. Someone finally noticed. 謝謝，終於有人注意到了。

	3. smile 微笑。

	Just trying to make you smile. 我只是想逗你笑。

	Well, it's working. 很有用。

	You're great at that. 你很行呢。

	4. pay 付費。

	Then you can pay for my coffee as a thank-you. 那你可以請我喝咖啡，算是謝我。

	Nice try. I feel great, but not rich. 想得美，我覺得很好，可是不覺得有錢。

	今天你學到哪幾個單字?

	look看起來 someone有人 smile微笑 pay付費

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. How old is the boy?

	a. Nine

	b. Nineteen

	c. Sixty

	2. Where is the boy's table?

	a. Next to his house

	b. In front of his house

	c. Behind his house

	3. Why does the boy tell people nice things about them?

	a. To make them smile

	b. To get money

	c. To be silly

	Answers:

	1. a

	2. b

	3. a

episodes.title: Man Travels Around the World-Again!
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Man Travels Around the World-Again!

	Traveling is fun. You can travel by plane. You can travel by train or boat.

	And you can travel around the world! One man travels a lot. He traveled

	around the world two times!

	旅行的方式有很多種，每一種都很有趣！有一名男子已經環遊世界兩次了！

	The first time, the man rode a bicycle for eight months! He rode 29,000

	kilometers. Wow!

	他第一次環遊世界時騎了八個月的腳踏車才達成目標！

	The second time, he flew a very, very small plane for six months! He flew 122

	flights! Whoa!

	第二次環遊世界時，他選擇用一台小飛機旅行。

	Now the man is traveling around the world again. He is sailing a small boat

	for nine months! He is sailing 50,000 kilometers! Whew!

	他又要環遊世界了！這一次，他要挑戰開船九個月，總航線長達五萬公里！

	On his bicycle, and in his plane, the man had no free time. On his boat, he

	has lots of free time. So he has video calls with many schools around the

	world. He talks about traveling!

	騎腳踏車和開飛機時他非常忙。但現在在船上，他有時間和世界各處的學生視訊，分享旅行的心得！

	Oh! If he finishes traveling around the world on his boat, guess what? He

	will be the first person to travel around the world by land, air, and sea!

	Woah!

	如果他這次成功了，他就會成為第一個用陸海空三種方式環遊世界的人！

	This man likes to travel very much. What will he do next? Make a guess!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	用各種方式環遊世界，是很大的挑戰。

	1. first time 第一次。

	The first time I went to South Africa, 我第一次去南非時，

	I thought I'd never go back again. 以為再也不會回去了。

	Why not? 為什麼不呢?

	It's too far away. 太遠了!

	2. boat 船。

	I flew for 25 hours! 我飛了25個鐘頭!

	But you did go back? 但是你有回去?

	Yeah, the second time I went there by boat. 有，第二次我是搭船去的。

	Wow, that must be a long trip! 哇，一定是很長的旅行!

	3. next 下一個。

	It was. 是的。

	After that, I told myself I have to take a plane next time.

	之後我告訴自己下次一定要搭飛機。

	4. travel 旅行。

	Will you travel to South Africa one more time? 你會再去一次南非嗎?

	Absolutely not! 絕對不去。

	I'm thinking of the South Pole.我在考慮南極。

	請跟我一起讀單字。

	first time第一次 boat船 next下一個 travel旅行

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. How many times did the man travel around the world?

	a. One time

	b. Two times

	c. Eight times

	2. How did the man travel around the world the first time?

	a. By land

	b. By air

	c. By ocean

	3. How did the man travel around the world by land?

	a. By train

	b. By car

	c. By bicycle

	Answers

	1. b

	2. a

	3. c

episodes.title: A Cool New Aquarium Opens in Taiwan
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	A Cool New Aquarium Opens in Taiwan

	Do you like to see fish and other ocean animals? Well, there's a great new

	aquarium in Taichung!

	台中現在有一座新的水族館！

	At Taichung Aquarium, you can get close to the animals. You can see them! You

	can hear them! You can smell them! You can touch some!

	You can - oh, wait, don't taste them, please…

	你可以在台中水族館跟動物互動，還可以用耳朵聽，用鼻子聞，有一些用手摸，但是拜託別吃牠們！

	The aquarium has five floors. On the first floor, you are in an ocean.

	A very big ocean tank there has sharks, rays, and more cool ocean animals!

	水族館有五層樓。一樓是海洋生物區，除了有鯊魚跟魟魚，還有更多很酷的海洋生物！

	On the second floor, you can see cute penguins walking close to you.

	On the third floor, you can learn about a river in Taichung.

	在二樓，你可以看到可愛的企鵝走來走去。三樓的展覽則介紹一條台中的河流。

	On the fourth floor, you take off your shoes. Then you can walk in a wetland.

	What? Yes, it's Taiwan's first indoor wetland!

	到四樓後，你可以脫掉鞋子，踩一踩全台灣第一個搬進室內的濕地！

	The aquarium also helps sick or hurt ocean animals get better.

	And it teaches people that leaving pet animals in nature is NOT a good idea!

	水族館也幫助生病或是受傷的動物。他們也提醒大家不要放生寵物回到大自然。

	Taichung Aquarium's ocean animals are waiting for you! Come and see, hear,

	smell, and touch them!

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	水族館是非常好玩的地方，可以看到各種有趣的生物。

	1. penguin 企鵝。

	I've ranked my favorite animals.我把最喜歡的動物排了名次。

	Oh? Let's hear it. 我聽聽看。

	First place is the penguin.第一名是企鵝。

	2. shark 鯊魚。

	The second one is the shark.第二名是鯊魚。

	Shark?! The shark is not cute.鯊魚? 鯊魚不可愛。

	It's not. But I like it.的確，不過我喜歡。

	3. third 第三個。

	Okay, and the third one? 好吧，第三名呢?

	It's fish.是魚。

	You like fish because you like to eat it, right?

	你喜歡魚是因為喜歡吃它，對吧?

	4. fish 魚。

	Fish tastes good, don't you think? 魚很好吃，你不覺得嗎?

	I do. I just hope you won't eat penguins.我同意，我只希望你別吃企鵝。

	Do you like seafood? 來讀單字。penguin企鵝 shark鯊魚 third第三個

	fish魚

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. Where is the aquarium?

	a. Tainan

	b. Taichung

	c. Taitung

	2. What animals are on the second floor?

	a. Sharks

	b. Rays

	c. Penguins

	3. Why do you take off your shoes on the fourth floor?

	a. To walk in a wetland

	b. To smell them

	c. To leave them in nature

	Answers:

	1. b

	2. c

	3. a

	I've ranked my favorite animals.我把最喜歡的動物排了名次。

	Oh? Let's hear it. 我聽聽看。

	First place is the penguin.第一名是企鵝。

	2. shark 鯊魚。

	The second one is the shark.第二名是鯊魚。

	Shark?! The shark is not cute.鯊魚? 鯊魚不可愛。

	It's not. But I like it.的確，不過我喜歡。

	3. third 第三個。

	Okay, and the third one? 好吧，第三名呢?

	It's fish.是魚。

	You like fish because you like to eat it, right?

	你喜歡魚是因為喜歡吃它，對吧?

	4. fish 魚。

	Fish tastes good, don't you think? 魚很好吃，你不覺得嗎?

	I do. I just hope you won't eat penguins.我同意，我只希望你別吃企鵝。

	Do you like seafood? 來讀單字。penguin企鵝 shark鯊魚 third第三個

	fish魚

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
sections.quiz:
Quiz

	1. Where is the aquarium?

	a. Tainan

	b. Taichung

	c. Taitung

	2. What animals are on the second floor?

	a. Sharks

	b. Rays

	c. Penguins

	3. Why do you take off your shoes on the fourth floor?

	a. To walk in a wetland

	b. To smell them

	c. To leave them in nature

episodes.title: Old Trains at New Museum
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Old Trains at New Museum

	There's something old and new in Taipei! It's the new National Railway

	Museum. You can learn about Taiwan's old trains. Go and see it with your

	family!

	國家鐵道博物館要開幕囉！你可以在那邊看到早期的火車。

	Before, the museum was a big railway workshop. Workers fixed trains there for

	many years. But that was a long time ago.

	好久以前，這座博物館是一個維修火車的工廠。

	The workshop is very old. But many people worked hard to make it look nice.

	They cleaned the walls. They painted the doors. They cleaned the old tools

	and machines. They did this for nine years!

	原本老舊的工廠需要翻新。整修與裝潢花了整整九年才完成！

	Now the museum is ready. There are lots of things to see. There are

	twenty-four old trains. Their wheels are very big.

	大功告成之後，博物館現在總共有二十四台以前的火車！

	The workshop has tools, machines, and train parts. The old office has papers

	and cool maps. The maps show where the trains went.

	博物館的工作室展出各種機器跟火車零件。辦公室裡面則有公文跟畫了火車路線的地圖。

	On some days, an old bright blue train is ready to go! You can ride it! You

	will hear the loud horn. You will hear the engine. You will feel the train go

	faster and faster!

	有時候，參觀的遊客甚至還可以搭一段藍色的火車，聽到火車鳴笛的聲音，感受到火車越跑越快。

	Go and see the National Railway Museum. You'll have a great train day!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	台北市國家鐵道博物館，讓很多火車迷大為興奮!

	1. train 火車。

	Are you interested in trains? 你對火車有興趣嗎?

	You're going to take me on a train trip? 你要帶我坐火車旅行?

	No, I'm planning to go to a railway museum. 不是，我打算去鐵道博物館。

	2. museum 博物館。

	And you'd like me to go with you? 你想要我一起去?

	If you want to. 要是你想去的話。

	What's in the museum? 博物館裡有什麼?

	3. fix 修理。

	Lots of trains. 很多火車。

	You'll get to see how workers fixed the trains. 你會看到工人怎麼修理火車。

	I prefer to go on a train trip. 我比較想搭火車旅行。

	4. national 國家的。

	Let's go take the Bong Bong Train at Taiping National Forest this weekend.

	我們這周末去太平山國家森林坐蹦蹦車!

	And the museum? 那博物館呢?

	你喜歡搭火車嗎?

	train火車 museum博物館 fix修理 national國家的

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. How many trains are in the museum?

	a. One

	b. Nine

	c. Twenty-four

	2. Where are the papers and maps?

	a. In the workshop

	b. In the old office

	c. On the blue train

	3. What color is the train you can ride?

	a. Blue

	b. Red

	c. Green

	Answers

	1. c

	2. b

	3. a

episodes.title: Farmer Says Goodbye to Buffalo, Hello to Machines
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Farmer Says Goodbye to Buffalo, Hello to Machines

	In sunny Taitung, a farmer is working. He loves to work on his farm!

	The farmer grows rice. It is called "Ugly Beauty." Well, this kind of rice is

	not pretty! But he likes it a lot. It tastes good!

	有一個農夫在台東種植稻米，他種的米叫做「醜美人」。這種米不好看，但很好吃！

	For many years, the farmer had water buffalo. Water buffalo look like cows.

	They are big and strong.

	這名農夫很多年來都用高大強壯的水牛耕田。

	His water buffalo worked on the farm. They worked very hard. They helped the

	farmer turn the soil. This helped the rice grow better!

	農夫的水牛辛苦種田、翻土，讓米長得越來越好。

	But the farmer was getting older. Farming was getting harder and harder for

	him.

	Then he was eighty. He wanted to keep farming. But it was too hard. The

	farmer said goodbye to his water buffalo. He was sad.

	但農夫年紀太大了，沒辦法再種田。他難過的跟他的水牛道別。

	Then the farmer's children came to help! They gave him machines for the farm

	too. The machines made farming easier!

	農夫的小孩來幫忙，也給老爸爸買來機器，讓種田更輕鬆。

	The farmer was happy! His children and the machines helped him keep farming!

	農夫不再難過。因為有了孩子與機器的幫忙，他就能繼續耕田了！

	Now the Ugly Beauty rice farmer is 91 years old. He smiles every day. He

	loves farming!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	農夫和水牛是好朋友，不過機器漸漸取代了牛的地位。

	1. harder and harder 越來越難。

	It's getting harder and harder for me to get up early.我越來越沒辦法早起。

	2. easier 更容易。

	Why? 為什麼?

	It's easier for me as the sun rises early. 我覺得日出提早了，更容易早起。

	That's my problem. 這正是我的問題。

	3. keep 持續。

	I just don't like getting up with the sun. 我就是不愛跟著太陽起床.

	And your bed keeps making you stay longer. 你的床也一直讓你想多待一會兒。

	4. sad 悲傷的。

	Exactly! 正是那樣!

	What should I do? 怎麼辦?

	Think of something happy when you wake up. 醒來時想一些快樂的事。

	But my dreams are often sad. 但是我都做悲傷的夢。

	你今天學到哪些單字?

	harder and harder越來越難 easier更容易 keep持續 sad 悲傷的

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. What kind of rice does the farmer grow?

	a. Beauty Ugly

	b. Beautiful Ugly

	c. Ugly Beauty

	2. What did the farmer's water buffalo do?

	a. Turn the soil

	b. Make farming harder

	c. Say goodbye to him

	3. How old is the farmer now?

	a. 19

	b. 80

	c. 91

	Answers

	1. c

	2. a

	3. c

episodes.title: Wild Mushrooms Can Make You Sick
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Wild Mushrooms Can Make You Sick

	Mushrooms love rainy and humid weather. Taiwan is often rainy and humid. Wild

	mushrooms grow everywhere here! You might see them in the mountains, on farms

	or fields, at school, or in your backyard.

	台灣氣候潮濕，非常適合野生菇類的生長。這些菇類會長在山上、農場上、也可能從你家後院的泥土中冒出來！

	Mmmmm! Wild mushrooms look good to eat. But some are very bad to eat. Which

	are good to eat? Which are bad? It's hard to know! So Taiwan is telling

	everyone not to eat wild mushrooms.

	有些野菇可以吃，有些不能吃，但他們很難分辨。所以政府提醒大家不要亂吃野菇！

	In Kaohsiung, some big wild mushrooms were growing next to a road. Some were

	bigger than a hand! People stopped their cars to look. Maybe some wanted to

	eat these wild mushrooms!

	有人在高雄的路邊發現了很大的野菇！也許會有人想吃吃看。

	The police came. They took the mushrooms away. They wanted to keep everyone

	safe!

	為了確保大家的安全，警察把那些大雨之後長出來的野菇都清除了。

	Wild mushrooms can make you very sick. They can make your stomach hurt a lot.

	They can make you have diarrhea. They can make you throw up.

	有些野生的蕈菇有毒！亂吃野菇的話可能會肚子痛或是嘔吐！

	If you eat wild mushrooms and get sick, don't wait to get better. Go to the

	doctor!

	如果你吃到野菇之後身體不舒服，就一定要去看醫生！

	So remember: don't eat wild mushrooms. They look good but they can be very

	bad for you!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	路邊的野菇不能隨便撿起來吃。

	1. grow 種植。

	I plan to grow some white button mushrooms. 我打算種一些蘑菇。

	Mushrooms! I love mushrooms stir fried with shrimps. 蘑菇! 我愛吃蘑菇炒蝦仁。

	2) weather 天氣。

	Then you must come to my house and eat them. 那你一定要來我家來吃。

	Yeah, if you succeed. 好啊，要是你種成功的話。

	Of course I will! 我當然會。

	It's easy in this humid weather.天氣這麼潮濕，很容易的。

	3) wild 野生的。

	I've seen wild mushrooms in the grass after it rained.

	我看過下雨之後草地上就有野菇。

	Those may be dangerous. 那些可能有危險。

	4) sick 生病的。

	I know. That's why I didn't dare touch them. 我知道，這是為什麼我碰都不敢碰。

	I don't want to get sick. 我可不想生病。

	你喜歡蘑菇嗎?來一起讀單字。

	grow種植 weather天氣 wild野生的 sick生病的

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. What kind of weather do mushrooms like?

	a. Rainy

	b. Sunny

	c. Windy

	2. What is Taiwan telling everyone about wild mushrooms?

	a. Take them home

	b. Eat them

	c. Don't eat them

	3. What did the police do to some wild mushrooms in Kaohsiung?

	a. Took pictures

	b. Took them away

	c. Ate them

	Answers

	1. a

	2. c

	3. b

episodes.title: Ducks Walk to Town for Bedtime
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Ducks Walk to Town for Bedtime

	Every night near a small town in the U.K., some mama ducks and baby ducks go

	for a walk.

	在英國的一個小鎮，每晚都有鴨媽媽帶著一群寶寶出來散步。

	Twenty ducks leave their river together. They walk in two groups. They walk

	for fifteen minutes!

	總共二十隻鴨子一起離開牠們白天待的小河流，搖搖擺擺往前走。

	The ducks walk to town. They go to a parking lot. It has nice, warm stones.

	The ducks like it there.

	走了15分鐘之後來到停車場。牠們很喜歡這裡，因為石頭地面溫暖舒服。

	The ducks sit down. They stay close together. They sleep until morning. Then

	they walk back to the river.

	鴨子們窩在一起，一路睡到早上。起床後，牠們便會走回河邊。

	But these walks are not safe. Some time ago, four ducks got hurt. Cars hit

	them. That was very sad. The cars were going fast. The drivers did not see

	the ducks.

	這段路非常危險。曾經有四隻鴨子在過馬路時不幸被汽車撞上。

	Now kind people help the ducks. Fifteen people take turns. They wear colorful

	clothes. Cars can see them. They walk with the ducks. They stop cars for the

	ducks. They watch the ducks sleep. They keep the ducks safe!

	現在有志工團隊負責指揮交通，幫助鴨子過馬路。這些友善的志工晚上會輪流守護鴨子，確保他們能睡得安穩！

	Today, no more ducks are hurt. They walk from June to December. Every night,

	they come. Every morning, they go.

	如今，沒有鴨子受傷，他們能安全的走在路上！

	The ducks walk happily to and from their place in the parking lot. And people

	smile!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	這群鴨子找到晚上睡覺的地方，會自己走過去。

	1. car 汽車。

	Do you walk to your car from the office every night?

	你每天晚上都從辦公室走去你的車?

	Sure, but I wish I had a driver. 當然，但是真希望我有司機。

	2. safe 安全的。

	I can walk you there tonight. 我今晚可以陪你走。

	To keep me safe? 保護我安全嗎?

	Yeah, two is better than one.對啊，兩個總比一個好。

	3. parking lot 停車場。

	But it's a safe parking lot. 不過那個停車場很安全。

	Uh-huh, you just need a ride, right? 你是想搭便車，對吧?

	4. sleep 睡覺。

	You got me. 被你抓到了。

	So please don't sleep while driving.所以你開車時可別睡著。

	Maybe you can be my driver? 也許你可以當我的司機?

	No, I need to sleep. 不行，我需要睡覺。

	今天的單字你可記住了?

	car汽車 safe安全的 parking lot停車場 sleep睡覺

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. When do the ducks go to the parking lot?

	a. In the morning

	b. In the afternoon

	c. At night

	2. How many people help the ducks?

	a. Two

	b. Fifteen

	c. Twenty

	3. What hurt four ducks before?

	a. Water in the river

	b. Stones in the parking lot

	c. Cars on the road

	Answers

	1. c

	2. b

	3. c

sections.story:
________________________________

	Ducks Walk to Town for Bedtime

	Every night near a small town in the U.K., some mama ducks and baby ducks go

	for a walk.

	在英國的一個小鎮，每晚都有鴨媽媽帶著一群寶寶出來散步。

	Twenty ducks leave their river together. They walk in two groups. They walk

	for fifteen minutes!

	總共二十隻鴨子一起離開牠們白天待的小河流，搖搖擺擺往前走。

	The ducks walk to town. They go to a parking lot. It has nice, warm stones.

	The ducks like it there.

	走了15分鐘之後來到停車場。牠們很喜歡這裡，因為石頭地面溫暖舒服。

	The ducks sit down. They stay close together. They sleep until morning. Then

	they walk back to the river.

	鴨子們窩在一起，一路睡到早上。起床後，牠們便會走回河邊。

	But these walks are not safe. Some time ago, four ducks got hurt. Cars hit

	them. That was very sad. The cars were going fast. The drivers did not see

	the ducks.

	這段路非常危險。曾經有四隻鴨子在過馬路時不幸被汽車撞上。

	Now kind people help the ducks. Fifteen people take turns. They wear colorful

	clothes. Cars can see them. They walk with the ducks. They stop cars for the

	ducks. They watch the ducks sleep. They keep the ducks safe!

	現在有志工團隊負責指揮交通，幫助鴨子過馬路。這些友善的志工晚上會輪流守護鴨子，確保他們能睡得安穩！

	Today, no more ducks are hurt. They walk from June to December. Every night,

	they come. Every morning, they go.

	如今，沒有鴨子受傷，他們能安全的走在路上！

	The ducks walk happily to and from their place in the parking lot. And people

	smile!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
sections.vocabulary:
Vocabulary

	這群鴨子找到晚上睡覺的地方，會自己走過去。

	1. car 汽車。

	Do you walk to your car from the office every night?

	你每天晚上都從辦公室走去你的車?

	Sure, but I wish I had a driver. 當然，但是真希望我有司機。

	2. safe 安全的。

	I can walk you there tonight. 我今晚可以陪你走。

	To keep me safe? 保護我安全嗎?

	Yeah, two is better than one.對啊，兩個總比一個好。

	3. parking lot 停車場。

	But it's a safe parking lot. 不過那個停車場很安全。

	Uh-huh, you just need a ride, right? 你是想搭便車，對吧?

	4. sleep 睡覺。

	You got me. 被你抓到了。

	So please don't sleep while driving.所以你開車時可別睡著。

	Maybe you can be my driver? 也許你可以當我的司機?

	No, I need to sleep. 不行，我需要睡覺。

	今天的單字你可記住了?

	car汽車 safe安全的 parking lot停車場 sleep睡覺

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Quiz

	1. When do the ducks go to the parking lot?

	a. In the morning

	b. In the afternoon

	c. At night

	2. How many people help the ducks?

	a. Two

	b. Fifteen

	c. Twenty

	3. What hurt four ducks before?

	a. Water in the river

	b. Stones in the parking lot

	c. Cars on the road

episodes.title: Play in Nature and Learn
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Play in Nature and Learn

	Nature is everywhere! There are oceans, mountains, forests, animals, and

	much, much more. When you learn about nature, you can help keep it safe.

	大自然無所不在，你要是對海洋，山脈或是動物有更多了解，就可以保護它們。

	Playing in nature is a fun way to learn about it. You and your friends can

	walk in nature with a teacher. What can you see busy bugs doing? What animals

	can you see? Maybe… maybe… you can see a snake!

	你可以跟朋友或是老師走進大自然，看看昆蟲，看看樹木花草。可能還會看到一條蛇!

	Some nature walks are at night. You and your friends can walk in a forest

	with a teacher. Nature is around you. But you can't see much. So... listen

	carefully! Shhhhh!

	有時候夜遊森林也很有趣。四周被樹木包圍了，什麼都看不清楚。那是什麼聲音...?

	Maybe you'll hear this. That's a flying squirrel jumping to a new tree!

	What's that?! That's an owl! Wow! Taiwan doesn't have many. To help owls be

	safe, help make Earth cleaner. A clean Earth is good for all animals!

	你也許會聽到飛鼠跳到另外一棵樹! 或者是貓頭鷹!

	貓頭鷹在台灣並不常見，想保護牠們，就要減少對地球的汙染。

	Hey! What's that? Is your teacher hungry? No! That's a frog! Taiwan has many

	kinds. Some live in trees! How cool!

	咦，你的老師是不是餓了? 不對，是青蛙的叫聲。青蛙種類繁多，有的住在樹上。

	Maybe you'll see frogs too! Wait! To keep them safe, don't touch them!

	不要摸青蛙，牠們的皮膚很細緻，人類的手可能帶來傷害。

	It's fun to play in nature and learn! Play and learn how to keep nature safe!

	________________________________________

	Vocabulary

	擺脫城市走進大自然，你會有不同的收穫。

	1. snake 蛇。

	We should go camping this weekend. 我們這周末應該去露營。

	I miss being in nature.我想念大自然。

	Nature? 大自然?

	The last time you saw a snake,你上次看到蛇，

	you screamed and jumped around! 不但尖叫，還跳來跳去!

	2. forest 森林。

	Because that's one ugly snake! 因為那條蛇好醜!

	That's what you get when you go into a forest. 你進入森林就會看到那些。

	3. owl 貓頭鷹。

	What I want to see are owls and other birds. 我想看的是貓頭鷹跟別的鳥類。

	4. hear 聽到。

	I want to hear the sounds of the forest at night. 我想聽森林在晚上的聲音。

	Like wolves howling. 比如說狼嚎。

	There are no wild wolves in Taiwan! 台灣沒有野生的狼!

	Do you like nature?

	來讀單字。snake蛇 forest森林 owl貓頭鷹 hear聽到

	________________________________________

	Quiz

	1. What can you do when you learn about nature?

	a. Eat healthy food

	b. Keep nature safe

	c. Touch frogs

	2. What do you do on a nature walk at night?

	a. Listen

	b. Jump

	c. Sing

	3. How can you help owls be safe?

	a. Give them food

	b. Walk in a forest

	c. Make Earth cleaner

	Answers

	1. b

	2. a

	3. c

episodes.title: Taipei Is Making Buses Safer to Ride
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Taipei Is Making Buses Safer to Ride

	Do you ride the bus? Many people ride the bus. Some ride every day. But,

	sometimes, bus riders get a surprise.

	你平常會搭公車嗎? 有些人天天搭公車，但車上偶爾會發生意外！

	Some bus drivers drive, and then they drive too fast! Hey! Sometimes they

	stop too fast. Whoa! Both are dangerous to do! Sometimes bus riders fall

	down. Ouch!

	如果公車司機開太快或是突然煞車，乘客就有可能摔倒。

	This year in Taipei, from January to May, almost one hundred bus riders were

	hurt! Every year in Taipei, about two hundred bus riders are hurt! Ow!

	台北每年都有大約兩百位公車乘客因此受傷。

	The bus drivers wanted to do a good job. But they worked many hours. Why?

	Taipei could not get more bus drivers.

	台北的公車司機不夠，所以他們的工作時間很長、很累。

	And the roads were busy. People were waiting at bus stops! The bus drivers

	tried not to be late!

	塞車的時候，司機就會著急，因為他們不想讓大家在公車站等太久。司機一緊張，就容易發生意外！

	But Taipei wants safer buses. Now there are more bus drivers. They cannot

	work more than ten hours a day.

	為了讓乘客更安全，台北雇用了更多司機，減少司機疲勞駕駛的問題。

	The roads are busy. People are waiting at bus stops. But Taipei will also

	teach bus drivers safer driving. And bus drivers can do a good job!

	台北的公車司機需要學習如何安全駕駛。這樣一來，搭公車受傷的人就會變少。

	Bus riders want safer buses. Falling is NOT fun!

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	台北市希望增加公車司機的人數，鼓勵大家多多搭乘。

	1. road 道路。

	This road looks dangerous! 這條路看起來很危險!

	You sure it's safe to drive this fast? 你確定可以開這麼快?

	2. hurt 受傷的。

	Relax, I'm the driver.別擔心，是我在開車。

	No one's gonna get hurt.不會有人受傷的。

	We should just take the bus.我們應該就搭公車的。

	3. late 遲到。

	Then we'd have to wait and wait. 那我們就得一直等。

	I'm already late for work. 我上班已經晚了。

	Your job doesn't pay enough for stunt driving.

	你工作拿的錢可不夠你耍開車特技。

	4. job 工作。

	Maybe I can get a new job as a taxi driver. 也許我可以換新工作，當計程車司機。

	You'll get fined every day! 你會每天都被罰錢的!

	Let's read the vocabulary.

	road道路 hurt受傷的 late遲到 job工作

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. What do bus riders sometimes do when buses stop too fast?

	a. Jump up

	b. Fall down

	c. Sleep

	2. How many bus riders were hurt from January to May in Taipei?

	a. Five

	b. Almost one hundred

	c. About two hundred

	3. What will Taipei teach bus drivers?

	a. Safer driving

	b. Faster driving

	c. Safer falling

	Answers

	1. b

	2. b

	3. a

episodes.title: Japan's Magic Umbrellas
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Japan's Magic Umbrellas

	Everyone wants an umbrella on rainy days. But did you know umbrellas can have

	magic? They do in Japan!

	你知道在日本雨傘是有魔法的嗎？

	A long time ago, umbrellas were for very important people there. Workers held

	the umbrellas high over these people! This showed these people had power in

	their country, or with spirits.

	很久以前，在日本只有重要人物才有人幫他們撐傘。這個象徵他們在國內或者在神鬼之間有權有勢。

	So everyone thought umbrellas had magic. They thought spirits came down to

	Earth and lived in umbrellas!

	因此，大家認為雨傘有魔法，神鬼會降臨到世間，住在雨傘裡！

	Today, everyone can use umbrellas. And in Japan, the magic stays!

	如今大家都能用傘，但是雨傘在日本的魔力仍然不減！

	At one festival there, people spin beautiful umbrellas. They say these

	umbrellas take away sickness!

	在日本的一個祭典上，大家會旋轉漂亮的雨傘。據說這些雨傘可以帶走病痛！

	At another festival, big floats drive in a parade. The floats have umbrellas

	on them. People walk under the umbrellas. They say this brings good luck!

	另一個祭典會有插滿雨傘的花車。參加祭典的人會從雨傘下走過，祈求平安。

	On one island in Japan, people do a dance every two years. They dance with

	colorful umbrellas for one night. This helps spirits go home safely!

	在日本的一個島上，人們會在某一天晚上拿著色彩繽紛的雨傘跳舞。他們每兩年舉行一次這種舞蹈，希望島上的鬼魂可以平安回家。

	So, when you open an umbrella, look at it. Is it full of magic and good luck

	too?

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	日本人相信雨傘很神奇，可以帶來好運。

	1. parade 遊行。

	There's a big parade in Keelung this weekend. 這周末基隆有大遊行。

	And you plan to go? 你計畫要去?

	2. a long time ago 很久以前。

	Yeah, I saw it once a long time ago.對，很久以前我看過一次。

	3. think 認為，或是以為。

	I thought you don't like crowded places.我以為你不喜歡擁擠的地方。

	I don't, but that one was fun. 是不喜歡，不過那次很好玩。

	4. colorful 五顏六色的。

	The floats were colorful and beautiful! 花車五顏六色，好漂亮!

	Some had dancers on them! 有的上面還有人跳舞!

	I'll go with you. 我跟你一起去!

	今天的單字你記住了嗎?

	parade遊行 a long time ago很久以前 think認為，或是以為

	colorful五顏六色的

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. Who were umbrellas for a long time ago in Japan?

	a. Everyone

	b. Very important people

	c. Dancers

	2. A long time ago in Japan, where did everyone think spirits lived?

	a. On parade floats

	b. In umbrellas

	c. On an island

	3. Why do people walk under umbrellas at one parade?

	a. To see spirits

	b. To keep dry

	c. To bring good luck

	Answers

	1. b

	2. b

	3. c

	At another festival, big floats drive in a parade. The floats have umbrellas

	on them. People walk under the umbrellas. They say this brings good luck!

	另一個祭典會有插滿雨傘的花車。參加祭典的人會從雨傘下走過，祈求平安。

	On one island in Japan, people do a dance every two years. They dance with

	colorful umbrellas for one night. This helps spirits go home safely!

	在日本的一個島上，人們會在某一天晚上拿著色彩繽紛的雨傘跳舞。他們每兩年舉行一次這種舞蹈，希望島上的鬼魂可以平安回家。

	So, when you open an umbrella, look at it. Is it full of magic and good luck

	too?

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
sections.vocabulary:
Vocabulary

	日本人相信雨傘很神奇，可以帶來好運。

	1. parade 遊行。

	There's a big parade in Keelung this weekend. 這周末基隆有大遊行。

	And you plan to go? 你計畫要去?

	2. a long time ago 很久以前。

	Yeah, I saw it once a long time ago.對，很久以前我看過一次。

	3. think 認為，或是以為。

	I thought you don't like crowded places.我以為你不喜歡擁擠的地方。

	I don't, but that one was fun. 是不喜歡，不過那次很好玩。

	4. colorful 五顏六色的。

	The floats were colorful and beautiful! 花車五顏六色，好漂亮!

	Some had dancers on them! 有的上面還有人跳舞!

	I'll go with you. 我跟你一起去!

	今天的單字你記住了嗎?

	parade遊行 a long time ago很久以前 think認為，或是以為

	colorful五顏六色的

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
sections.quiz:
Quiz

	1. Who were umbrellas for a long time ago in Japan?

	a. Everyone

	b. Very important people

	c. Dancers

	2. A long time ago in Japan, where did everyone think spirits lived?

	a. On parade floats

	b. In umbrellas

	c. On an island

	3. Why do people walk under umbrellas at one parade?

	a. To see spirits

	b. To keep dry

	c. To bring good luck

episodes.title: Robots Use AI to Play Soccer
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Robots Use AI to Play Soccer

	This summer, six robots ran to a soccer field. They looked like people. They

	were soccer players!

	足球場上有六個機器人，它們是足球選手！

	Each team had three robots. One team wore red shirts. The other team wore

	blue shirts.

	每一隊都有三個機器人，一隊穿著紅色球衣，另一隊穿藍色。

	The whistle blew! The robots started to play! They ran by themselves. People

	did not help them. The robots used AI to play. Each team had their own AI.

	哨聲一響，機器人足球賽就開始了！它們靠著AI自己跑起來，不需要任何人幫忙。

	One robot kicked the ball. One passed the ball to another robot. One robot

	fell down! But it got up!

	一個機器人踢球，另一個傳球，還有一個機器人跌倒後馬上爬起來！

	Another robot fell down. But it did not get up! Two people put it on a

	stretcher. Then they carried it away.

	又有一個機器人跌倒了，但他站不起來！兩個人把它搬上擔架，移到場外。

	Then, one robot made a big kick. GOAL! The other team did not give up. They

	played hard.

	機器人大力一踢，機器人進球了！它的對手沒有放棄，繼續努力比賽。

	The blue team made a goal! The red team scored a goal! The score went up and

	up!

	In the end, the blue team had three points. The red team had five points. The

	red team won! Everyone loved watching the game!

	比賽結束，藍隊三分，紅隊五分，紅隊獲勝！真是一場精彩的比賽！

	Robots playing sports is new and fun. Maybe one day robots can play sports

	with you!

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	足球運動很激烈，機器人玩得有模有樣。

	1. get up 爬起來。

	A soccer game? 足球比賽嗎?

	Yeah, Germany versus Brazil. 對，德國對巴西。

	Wow, this should be a good one! 那應該很精采。

	It is. Look how fast that player got up! 是很棒，你看那個球員一下子就爬起來了!

	2. kick 踢。

	Yeah, he's really playing hard.對啊，他很拚呢。

	Hey, just kick the ball, man! 直接踢球啊!

	3. team 隊伍。

	And they scored! 他們得分了!

	What a great team! 厲害的球隊!

	4. pass 傳遞。

	Did you see how he passed the ball? 你有沒有看到他怎麼傳球?

	I did. He's just amazing. 看到了，他很驚人。

	請跟我讀今天的單字。

	get up起來 kick踢 team隊伍 pass傳遞

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. What sport did the robots play?

	a. Kickball

	b. Hockey

	c. Soccer

	2. How many robots played in the game?

	a. Three robots

	b. Six robots

	c. Twenty-two robots

	3. What did the robots use to play the sport?

	a. AI

	b. People

	c. A stretcher

	Answers

	1. c

	2. b

	3. a

episodes.title: Team of Teens Gets E-Waste Recycled
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Team of Teens Gets E-Waste Recycled

	We use many things that need electricity. There are computers, smartphones,

	TVs, and many more things. When we don't use them anymore, they become

	e-waste.

	我們每天都會用到很多電子產品。電子產品被丟棄就成了電子垃圾。

	Throwing away e-waste makes our land, water, and air dirty. But e-waste can

	be recycled! Then people can make new things!

	電子垃圾會汙染環境，但這些垃圾可以被回收再利用！

	Taiwan is very good at recycling e-waste! But many other places need help.

	台灣很會回收電子垃圾喔！

	Dubai is a city in the United Arab Emirates. Like all cities, it has lots of

	e-waste.

	杜拜這個城市位於阿拉伯聯合大公國。他們也有很多電子垃圾。

	A 14-year-old girl helps get Dubai's e-waste recycled. She works with

	teenagers from six schools.

	那裡有個十四歲的女生集合六所學校的學生，一起回收杜拜的電子垃圾。

	The girl and her team ask people for their e-waste. They do this a few times

	a year. People bring their e-waste to the girl's house. The team sends it to

	be recycled.

	杜拜市民會把電子垃圾帶到這個女生家。接下來，這群學生就會把垃圾送去回收！

	This time, the team got 900 kilograms of e-waste! That's as heavy as two big

	horses!

	他們這一次總共回收了九百公斤的電子垃圾！

	A team of teens is getting e-waste recycled in Dubai! Today is International

	E-Waste Day. Remember to get your e-waste recycled in Taiwan!

	________________________________________

	Vocabulary

	手機，電腦之類的產品，裡面很多成分都可以回收再利用。

	1. team 團隊。

	My friend's son and his team pick up garbage every weekend. 我朋友的兒子和他的隊伍每個周末都去撿垃圾。

	On the beach? 去海灘嗎?

	Yeah. 對。

	2. teenager 青少年。

	How old is he? 他幾歲?

	Seventeen, I think. 十七歲吧。

	Teenagers saving the planet. 拯救地球的青少年。

	That's great! 真棒!

	3. school 學校。

	His school is encouraging it. 他的學校很鼓勵。

	Of course, it's good for the school and Earth. 當然啦，那對學校跟地球都好。

	4. not anymore 不再。

	We should stop using plastic bags too. 我們也應該停用塑膠袋。

	Oh, I don't use them anymore. 我都不再用了。

	Really? 真的嗎?

	今天的單字你記住了嗎?

	team團隊 teenager青少年 school學校 not anymore不再

	________________________________________

	Quiz

	1. What can become e-waste?

	a. A computer

	b. An e-mail

	c. A team of teens

	2. Where is Dubai?

	a. The United Kingdom

	b. The United Arab Emirates

	c. The United States

	3. Where do people in Dubai bring their e-waste?

	a. The girl's house

	b. The team's schools

	c. The team's city

	Answers

	1. a

	2. b

	3. a

episodes.title: Firemen Find a Smelly Surprise
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Firemen Find a Smelly Surprise

	It was late at night. Somewhere in Taichung, people were sleeping. P.U.!!

	There was a new, strong, bad smell. People woke up! They smelled it in their

	houses. They smelled it out on the street. The smell was everywhere!

	某一天晚上，一群台中居民從睡夢中驚醒。他們聞到一股奇怪的臭味！

	People thought the smell was cooking gas. It's dangerous! So they called the

	firemen!

	他們以為是瓦斯外洩，所以立刻打電話給消防隊！

	Fire trucks zoomed down the street. Their sirens went "woop woop!" Their

	lights flashed! Eight firemen jumped out.

	一收到通知，消防車跟消防隊員便快速趕到現場。

	Where was the smell coming from? The firemen needed to find out. They knocked

	on doors. They sniffed. They used a machine that looks for gas. But they did

	not find any gas.

	消防員到處尋找臭味的來源。但即使用了瓦斯偵測器，也沒找到瓦斯味從哪裡來。

	The firemen sniffed and sniffed. Finally, they found where the smell was

	coming from. It was coming from something on a scooter!

	他們聞了好久才發現，臭味是從一台機車散發出來的！

	What was making the bad smell? It was a durian!

	原來臭味的源頭是一顆榴槤！

	The durian is called the king of fruits. It is delicious! But it is very

	smelly! It smells like cooking gas!

	榴槤很美味，但也很臭。它的味道聞起來跟瓦斯一樣！

	Everyone saw the durian. What a surprise! They laughed. It was not dangerous.

	It was a smelly, smelly durian!

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	榴槤讓人以為是瓦斯漏氣了。

	1. everywhere 到處。

	What's that smell? 那是什麼氣味? It's everywhere! 到處都是!

	I'm pretty sure it's cigarette smoke.我很確定是香菸。

	2. street 街道。

	Somebody is smoking out on the street.有人在外面街上抽菸。

	Oh, I hate that! 真討厭!

	Do you want me to yell at him? 你要我對他喊嗎?

	No, I'll do it. 不要，我來對他喊。

	3. surprise 驚訝。

	Hey, hey! Please don't smoke here! 嘿，請你不要在這裡抽菸!

	"Sorry!"

	Wow, that's a surprise! 哇，真讓我驚訝。

	4. look for 尋找。

	Indeed, a very polite man. 真的是很有禮貌的人。

	We should look for more neighbors like him.我們應該找更多像他那樣的鄰居。

	今天你學到哪些單字?

	everywhere到處 street街道 surprise驚訝 look for尋找

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. What did people think the bad smell was?

	a. A scooter

	b. A fruit

	c. Cooking gas

	2. How many firemen came to help?

	a. Five

	b. Eight

	c. Ten

	3. Where did the bad smell come from?

	a. A machine

	b. A durian

	c. Fire trucks

	Answers

	1. c

	2. b

	3. b

episodes.title: The Gardeners of the Ocean
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	The Gardeners of the Ocean

	Big whales swim very far. Every year, they go from cold places to warm places.

	鯨魚每年都會從冷的地方游到溫暖海域。

	Some scientists say whales are the gardeners of the ocean. Gardeners grow

	flowers or food. But how can whales be gardeners?

	科學家說，鯨魚就像海洋的園丁一樣。為什麼呢？

	Cold places have lots of very small fish. Whales eat and eat and eat them.

	Then the whales can swim very far. They swim to warm places.

	鯨魚會在冰冷海水中吃很多很多小魚，然後再游到溫暖的地方。

	The warm places don't have lots of small fish. There's not a lot of food for

	the fish. But that's okay for the whales. They don't eat there. They are busy

	with their babies.

	溫暖的海水沒有小魚吃。不過沒關係，因為鯨魚會在那裏繁殖！

	Oh! The warm water under a whale is turning yellow… But don't say, "EWWWW."

	There's great food in the water now. Whales make lots of it. Scientists say

	whales make about four million kilograms of this food every year!

	鯨魚底下的水變得黃黃的！那是鯨魚的排泄物，也是一種食物。鯨魚每年會製造四百萬公斤這種食物！

	What happens to this food? Plankton use it! They are very, very small plants

	and animals. And plankton are very important food for small fish and whales!

	超級小的植物跟動物叫做浮游生物。牠們會吃掉鯨魚製造的東西。最後，浮游生物也會被小魚和鯨魚吃下去！

	Whales help the ocean stay full of life. That's why they're called the

	gardeners of the ocean!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	鯨魚在大海中遷徙，也幫助維持生態。

	1. million 百萬。

	Did you know that a whale can eat a million tiny fish in one day?

	你知不知道鯨魚一天就吃掉百萬隻小魚？

	No, I didn't. 我不知道。

	But whales are big animals. 不過鯨魚是很大的動物。

	2. kilogram 公斤。

	That's true. 沒錯。

	A sperm whale can weigh some 55-thousand kilograms.

	抹香鯨可以重達五萬五千公斤!

	Wow, that's too heavy! 哇，那太重了!

	3. swim 游泳。

	No, they need the fat. 不，牠們需要脂肪。

	After all, they have to swim across vast oceans. 畢竟牠們必須游過大洋。

	4. very far 很遙遠。

	That sounds very far. 聽起來很遠呢!

	Yeah, it is far. 是很遠。

	來一起讀單字。

	million百萬 kilogram公斤 swim游泳 very far很遙遠

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. Where do whales eat lots of small fish?

	a. In cold places

	b. In warm places

	c. In gardens

	2. How many kilograms of food do whales make?

	a. Four kilograms

	b. One million kilograms

	c. Four million kilograms

	3. What are plankton?

	a. Gardeners of the ocean

	b. Very small plants and animals

	c. Big whales

	Answers

	1. a

	2. c

	3. b

sections.story:
________________________________

	The Gardeners of the Ocean

	Big whales swim very far. Every year, they go from cold places to warm places.

	鯨魚每年都會從冷的地方游到溫暖海域。

	Some scientists say whales are the gardeners of the ocean. Gardeners grow

	flowers or food. But how can whales be gardeners?

	科學家說，鯨魚就像海洋的園丁一樣。為什麼呢？

	Cold places have lots of very small fish. Whales eat and eat and eat them.

	Then the whales can swim very far. They swim to warm places.

	鯨魚會在冰冷海水中吃很多很多小魚，然後再游到溫暖的地方。

	The warm places don't have lots of small fish. There's not a lot of food for

	the fish. But that's okay for the whales. They don't eat there. They are busy

	with their babies.

	溫暖的海水沒有小魚吃。不過沒關係，因為鯨魚會在那裏繁殖！

	Oh! The warm water under a whale is turning yellow… But don't say, "EWWWW."

	There's great food in the water now. Whales make lots of it. Scientists say

	whales make about four million kilograms of this food every year!

	鯨魚底下的水變得黃黃的！那是鯨魚的排泄物，也是一種食物。鯨魚每年會製造四百萬公斤這種食物！

	What happens to this food? Plankton use it! They are very, very small plants

	and animals. And plankton are very important food for small fish and whales!

	超級小的植物跟動物叫做浮游生物。牠們會吃掉鯨魚製造的東西。最後，浮游生物也會被小魚和鯨魚吃下去！

	Whales help the ocean stay full of life. That's why they're called the

	gardeners of the ocean!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

episodes.title: Matsu Goes to a Baseball Game
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Matsu Goes to a Baseball Game

	Everyone was excited about game day in Taoyuan! A VERY important guest came.

	She had her own seat. Who do you think she was?

	在棒球比賽當天，有一位重量級人物出現了！猜猜他是誰？

	It was Matsu! The sea goddess keeps people safe on the ocean and on land.

	是保佑大家平安的海上女神，媽祖！

	A Matsu temple in Taoyuan is two hundred years old this year. The temple's

	people wanted young people to meet Matsu. So Matsu went to a baseball game!

	It was at a stadium.

	桃園一座媽祖廟已經兩百歲了。為了讓年輕人認識媽祖，工作人員把媽祖帶到棒球場。

	How did Matsu go there? Well, it was a long trip. First, she rode in a van.

	She got out at an MRT station. Then she sat on her beautiful wooden chair.

	媽祖前往棒球場的旅程很漫長。首先，祂坐車到捷運站。下車後，坐上華麗的木頭轎子。

	Matsu was carried into the station. Many people came to see her there! Then

	she rode the MRT. She sat on her chair on the train!

	好多人都在捷運站門口歡迎媽祖！進站後，媽祖搭乘捷運到棒球場。

	At the stadium, Matsu sat on the pitcher's mound! The first ball was thrown!

	進入球場，媽祖坐在投手丘上，見證投手投出第一球！

	Later, cheerleaders and baseball fans came to her. They asked for their team

	to win! The cheerleaders went under Matsu's chair for good luck.

	接著，啦啦隊與球迷來到媽祖面前，祈求自己的球隊大贏

	!啦啦隊也鑽過媽祖的轎子底下，希望帶來好運。

	Matsu enjoyed her first baseball game! She met lots of young people too!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	眾人信仰的媽祖，有時候也會出巡，這次是到棒球場!

	1. cheerleader 啦啦隊。

	There will be a baseball game tomorrow night. 明晚有一場棒球賽。

	Yeah? 是嗎?

	And all the cheerleaders will be there! 所有的啦啦隊都會在那裏。

	2. excited 興奮的。

	Why should I be excited about them?為什麼我要因為她們而高興?

	They are wonderful dancers.她們很會跳舞。

	3. throw 丟擲。

	You are there to watch baseball. 你是去看棒球的。You get to see how pitchers

	throw the ball.你會看到投手怎麼投球。

	4. team 隊伍。

	I also want my team to win. 我也要我的球隊贏球。

	And cheerleaders can help? 而啦啦隊可以幫忙?

	No, but Matsu can.不，但是媽祖可以。

	So you'll buy tickets for her? 所以你會幫祂買票?

	No, silly. I'll pray.別傻了，我會祈禱。

	你今天學到了哪幾個單字? cheerleader啦啦隊 excited興奮的 throw丟擲

	team隊伍

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. What sport did Matsu watch?

	a. Basketball

	b. Baseball

	c. Badminton

	2. Where is the stadium?

	a. Taipei

	b. Taoyuan

	c. Kaohsiung

	3. Which did Matsu ride?

	a. A bus

	b. The MRT

	c. A ship

	Answers

	1. b

	2. b

	3. b

episodes.title: Young Amis People Keep the Amis Ways Alive
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Young Amis People Keep the Amis Ways Alive

	 

	In Guangfu Township in Hualien, there is a very old village. It's Taibalang Tribal Village. People of the Amis tribe live there.

	花蓮光復的太巴塱（ㄌㄤˇ）部落中住著許多阿美族人。

	The village is next to two rivers. They are full of crabs!

	部落旁有兩條河，河中很多螃蟹。

	 

	In the Amis language, "Taibalang" means "crab." The village was named forthe crabs in the rivers.

	在阿美族語中，太巴塱就是螃蟹的意思。這就是太巴塱部落名字的起源。

	 

	 

	Taibalang has many old wood carvings. These are pictures cut into wood. There are many carvings of crabs!

	太巴塱有很多古老的木雕，而且螃蟹圖案的木雕特別多！

	 

	 

	There are also carvings of other animals and people. The people are hunting, fishing, and dancing! The carvings show the ways of the Amis people.

	木雕上除了會出現各種動物之外，也會有阿美族人豐富的日常生活！

	 

	 

	Many young people leave the village to work. But every summer, they come back. They help the village get ready for a big festival!

	離開部落工作的年輕人會在夏天回來，一起幫忙舉辦祭典。

	 

	 

	Elders teach young people how to help. Everyone has a job to do. They do things the Amis way. Helping the village keeps the ways of the Amis people alive.

	部落的長輩負責傳授經驗。這樣子，來幫忙的年輕人才能將阿美族的傳統延續下去。

	 

	 

	Taiwan had some big typhoons this year. Guangfu was flooded. Amis people are going back to help the villages there. Others from all over Taiwan are going too. 

	今年 ，台灣遭遇了幾次的大颱風。光復被水淹了。阿美族人和來自台灣各地的其他人都去幫助村子！

	 

	 

	Guangfu needs our help now! Let's hope Guangfu gets back to normal soon.

	________________________________________

	 

	Vocabulary

	阿美族太巴塱部落，很希望維繫他們的傳統。

	 

	1. way 方式。

	Living in an old village by the river…. 住在河邊的古老村落裡...

	Isn't that a nice way of living? 那不是很好的生活方式?

	 

	2. hunt 打獵。

	I don't know about that. 這我不知道。

	People there hunt rabbits and catch crabs?那裏的人獵殺兔子，吃螃蟹? 

	Why not? 為什麼不可以?

	 

	3. young 年輕的。

	And older people can teach the young how to do things. 年紀大的可以教導年輕人做事情。

	What kinds of things? 做怎樣的事? 

	 

	4. wood 木頭。

	Like…how to make a boat with wood. 比如說怎麼樣用木頭來造船。

	So where's this village of yours? 所以你這個村落在哪裡? 

	I have yet to find it. 我還在找。

	Let's go visit Taibalang Tribe together! 來讀今天的單字。way方式    hunt打獵    young年輕的    wood木頭

	________________________________________

	Quiz

	 

	1. What does "Taibalang" mean in Amis language?

	a. Carving

	b. Crab

	c. River

	 

	2. Where is Taibalang Tribal Village?

	a. Yilan

	b. Yunlin

	c. Hualien

	 

	3. What are "wood carvings"?

	a. Birds in trees

	b. People who build buildings

	c. Pictures cut into wood

	 

	Answers

	1. b

	2. c

	3. c

	________________________________

	 

	In Guangfu Township in Hualien, there is a very old village. It's Taibalang Tribal Village. People of the Amis tribe live there.

	________________________________________

	a. Carving

	c. River

	 

	2. Where is Taibalang Tribal Village?

	a. Yilan

	3. What are "wood carvings"?

	a. Birds in trees

	b. People who build buildings

	c. Pictures cut into wood

	 

	Answers

	1. b

	2. c

	3. c

	c. Pictures cut into wood

	 

	Answers

	1. b

	2. c

	3. c

		 

		In

sections.story:
________________________________

	Young Amis People Keep the Amis Ways Alive

	 

	In Guangfu Township in Hualien, there is a very old village. It's Taibalang Tribal Village. People of the Amis tribe live there.

	花蓮光復的太巴塱（ㄌㄤˇ）部落中住著許多阿美族人。

	The village is next to two rivers. They are full of crabs!

	部落旁有兩條河，河中很多螃蟹。

	 

	In the Amis language, "Taibalang" means "crab." The village was named forthe crabs in the rivers.

	在阿美族語中，太巴塱就是螃蟹的意思。這就是太巴塱部落名字的起源。

	 

	 

	Taibalang has many old wood carvings. These are pictures cut into wood. There are many carvings of crabs!

	太巴塱有很多古老的木雕，而且螃蟹圖案的木雕特別多！

	 

	 

	There are also carvings of other animals and people. The people are hunting, fishing, and dancing! The carvings show the ways of the Amis people.

	木雕上除了會出現各種動物之外，也會有阿美族人豐富的日常生活！

	 

	 

	Many young people leave the village to work. But every summer, they come back. They help the village get ready for a big festival!

	離開部落工作的年輕人會在夏天回來，一起幫忙舉辦祭典。

	 

	 

	Elders teach young people how to help. Everyone has a job to do. They do things the Amis way. Helping the village keeps the ways of the Amis people alive.

	部落的長輩負責傳授經驗。這樣子，來幫忙的年輕人才能將阿美族的傳統延續下去。

	 

	 

	Taiwan had some big typhoons this year. Guangfu was flooded. Amis people are going back to help the villages there. Others from all over Taiwan are going too. 

	今年 ，台灣遭遇了幾次的大颱風。光復被水淹了。阿美族人和來自台灣各地的其他人都去幫助村子！

	 

	 

	Guangfu needs our help now! Let's hope Guangfu gets back to normal soon.

	________________________________________
sections.vocabulary:
Vocabulary

	阿美族太巴塱部落，很希望維繫他們的傳統。

	 

	1. way 方式。

	Living in an old village by the river…. 住在河邊的古老村落裡...

	Isn't that a nice way of living? 那不是很好的生活方式?

	 

	2. hunt 打獵。

	I don't know about that. 這我不知道。

	People there hunt rabbits and catch crabs?那裏的人獵殺兔子，吃螃蟹? 

	Why not? 為什麼不可以?

	 

	3. young 年輕的。

	And older people can teach the young how to do things. 年紀大的可以教導年輕人做事情。

	What kinds of things? 做怎樣的事? 

	 

	4. wood 木頭。

	Like…how to make a boat with wood. 比如說怎麼樣用木頭來造船。

	So where's this village of yours? 所以你這個村落在哪裡? 

	I have yet to find it. 我還在找。

	Let's go visit Taibalang Tribe together! 來讀今天的單字。way方式    hunt打獵    young年輕的    wood木頭

	________________________________________

	c. Hualien

	 

	3. What are "wood carvings"?

	a. Birds in trees

	b. People who build buildings

	c. Pictures cut into wood

episodes.title: Barbershops Stop Boredom with Books
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Barbershops Stop Boredom with Books

	Barbers cut people's hair. They work in barbershops.

	Many people like barbershops. They talk with the barber.

	They see their friends. They relax and have fun. Oh, and they get a haircut!

	很多人喜歡理髮店，可以跟師傅聊天，見見朋友，當然也是為了剪頭髮。

	One day, a teacher went to his barbershop. One of his students came in.

	But his student didn't have fun. He had nothing to do. He was very bored. He

	wanted to go!

	有一天，一位老師去剪頭髮。他的學生也在那裡。但是這個學生覺得很無聊，想要離開。

	The teacher knew his student. He needed a good book to stop his boredom.

	Then the teacher had a great idea!

	老師知道他的學生需要看書才不會無聊。他想到一個好點子!

	The teacher gave his barbershop many good kids' books.

	The books were free - and fun! He wanted kids to read at the barbershop.

	He wanted kids to like reading. And great news! His idea worked very well!

	他捐了很多童書給理髮店，希望小朋友可以在理髮店看書，也從此喜歡看書。

	Now he helps over two hundred barbershops! He gives them fun kids' books.

	The barbers talk with kids about reading too. They ask "Do you like to read?"

	and "How is that book?"

	Kids like reading and talking about books there!

	這個老師捐書給兩百多家理髮店。理髮師也會問小朋友們喜不喜歡看書。

	That's thousands of kids' reading books, getting a haircut, and having fun!

	________________________________________

	Vocabulary

	到理髮店剪頭髮，順便看故事書，很棒的主意!

	1. haircut 剪頭髮

	Hey, you got a new haircut! 嘿，你剪了新髮型!

	Looks great on you! 很好看呢!

	Really? I did it yesterday. 真的喔? 我昨天剪的。

	I'm still not sure if I like it. 我還不確定喜不喜歡。

	2. bored 厭煩

	So you were just bored with your old look? 所以你就是厭煩了老樣子?

	Yeah, I got all sweaty with my long hair. 對啊，長頭髮讓我流好多汗。

	3. free 免費的

	But the best thing is my haircut was free! 最棒的是，我剪頭髮是免費的。

	How is that possible? 怎麼可能?

	A free haircut in Taipei? 在台北免費剪頭髮?

	4. great 很棒的

	It's true! 真的啊。Isn't it great? 不是很棒嗎?

	I won a gift voucher in a lucky draw.我在幸運抽獎時抽中了禮券。

	還記得今天學到哪些單字嗎?

	haircut剪頭髮

	bored厭煩

	free免費的

	great很棒的

	________________________________________

	Quiz

	1. Who works in a barbershop?

	a. Teachers

	b. Students

	c. Barbers

	2. What did the student need to stop his boredom?

	a. Nothing

	b. A haircut

	c. A good book

	3. How many barbershops is the teacher helping?

	a. Under 200

	b. Around 200

	c. Over 200

	Answers:

	1. c

	2. c

	3. c

episodes.title: Out of Gas But Unstoppable
episodes.transcript:
________________________________

	Out of Gas But Unstoppable

	People love ordering food online. Food delivery drivers are busy! In India,

	one delivery driver uses his scooter to deliver food orders. But one day, it

	needed gas. He went to the gas station.

	人們喜歡線上點餐，讓外送員都很忙碌。印度有一位外送員騎機車送訂單。有一天他的機車需要加油，就去了加油站。

	At that time, everyone was worried about gas. Was there enough? Maybe not! So

	everyone wanted to buy gas. The line at the gas station was very long!

	當時大家都很擔心汽油不夠，所以都去買油，讓加油站大排長龍。

	The man waited... three hours! Then he got a new food order. This was a big

	problem. He didn't want his hungry customer to wait! But his scooter needed

	gas.

	這位外送員一等就是三個小時，但是他有了新訂單，不能讓客人等。

	The man had an idea. He used his friend's horse! He got the food. He put the

	red delivery bag on his back. Then he rode the horse to deliver the

	customer's order.

	他有個主意，他可以騎朋友的馬送餐! 他騎著馬、揹著紅色外送袋去送客人訂的餐點。

	The road was busy and noisy. But the horse walked calmly.

	街道非常吵雜又擁擠，但是馬冷靜地向前走。

	People were amazed to see a delivery driver riding a horse! Some posted

	pictures online of this unstoppable food delivery driver. He became famous!

	路人都很驚訝看到外送員騎馬送訂單，有一些人上傳照片到網路上，讓他一炮而紅。

	His scooter was out of gas, but this delivery driver found a cool way to do

	his job! Giddyap, horsey!

	------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Vocabulary

	騎馬送餐去，真是使命必達。

	1. famous 著名的

	What's that long line for? 那麼長的隊伍在做什麼?

	Don't you know? That's the famous pancake store. 你不知道嗎?那是有名的鬆餅店。

	2. wait 等待

	People are lining up for pancakes? 大家為了鬆餅排隊?!

	Yeah, I once waited one hour standing there.

	對啊，我有一次站在那兒等了一個鐘頭。

	3. amazed 驚訝的

	I'm amazed you'd do something like that. 我很驚訝你會做那種事。

	Well, you've never tasted their pancakes. 因為你沒吃過他們的鬆餅。

	4. deliver 運送

	No, I'm amazed you didn't have it delivered to you. 不，我是驚訝你沒有叫外送。

	For pancakes, you have to eat it nice and hot. 鬆餅一定要吃熱呼呼的啊。

	今天學到哪些單字?

	famous著名的

	wait等待

	amazed驚訝的

	deliver運送

	----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

	Quiz

	1. What is the man's job?

	a. Camera operator

	b. Horse trainer

	c. Food delivery driver

	2. How long did the man wait for gas?

	a. 3 minutes

	b. 30 minutes

	c. 3 hours

	3. What was the man's idea?

	a. Order food

	b. Ride a horse

	c. Become famous

	Answers:

	1. c

	2. c

	3. b

	Don't you know? That's the famous pancake store. 你不知道嗎?那是有名的鬆餅店。
